metadata.title: Igitabo cy'Amasengesho
metadata.subtitle: Book of Common Prayer - Anglican Church in Rwanda

sections.title: Gusenga kwa mu Gitondo
sections.description: Amasengesho yo mu Gitondo, hamwe n'ibyo gutura ibyaha, Zaburi, Ibyanditswe, n'Amasengesho.

verses.text: AMASENGESHO Y’ITORERO ANGILICANI MU RWANDA
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo gusenga kw iminsi yose nk’ uko bikurikirana kumara umwaka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: GUSENGA KWA MU GITONDO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umusengesha abanze asome bimwe muri ibib bice bivye mu byanditswe byera;
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Maze akurikizeho amagambo yo guhugura
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umunyabyaha nava mu byaha bye agakora ibitunganye bihwanye n amategeko, azakiza ubugingo bwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ezekiyeli 18.27.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nzi ibicumuro byanjye, ibyaha byanjye biri imbere yanjye iteka        zaburi 51.3
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hisha amaso yawe ibyaha byanjye, usibanganye ibyo nakiraniwe byose   zaburi 51.9.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibitambo imana ishima ni umutima umenetse, umutima umenetse, ushenjaguwe mana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntuzawusuzugura                                     zaburi 51.17.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Imitima yanyu abe ari yo mutanyura, mureke imyenda yanyu muhindukirire uwiteka imana yanyu; kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: igira impuhwe, yuzuye n’imbabazi, ntiyihutira kurakara, ahubwo ihorana ibambe ryinshi, kandi yitangira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kutazana ikibi   yoweli 2.13.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umwami imana yacu niyo ifite imbabazi n’ibambe, nubwo twayigomeye, ntitwumvire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwiteka imana yacu ngo tugendere mu mategeko yayo yadushyize imbere   daniyeli9.9-10
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwiteka, umpane, ariko bitarenze urugero; ntumpanishe umujinya kugirango utansemba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yeremiya 10.24
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Mwihane, kuko ubwami bwo mu ijuru buri hafi. Matayo 3.2.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Reka mpaguruke, njye kwa data, mubwire nti”data, nacumuye ku yo mu ijuru no mu maso yawe;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntibinkwiriye kwitwa umwana wawe.”                                                                Luka 15.18,19
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nituvuga yuko nta cyaha dufite. tuba twishuste ukuri kukaba kutari muritwe; ariko nitwatura ibyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byacu ni yo y0 kwizerwa kandi ikiranuka kutubabarira ibyaha byacu, no kutwemeza gukiranirwa kose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 1yohana 1.9.10
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Mu minsi yo kuza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ijoro rirakuze, burenda gucya; nuko twiyambure imirimo y umwijima, twambare intwaro z umucyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abaroma 13.12
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Mwihane, kuko ubwami bwo mu ijuru buri hafi. Matayo 3.2.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ku munsi wo kuvuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Malayika arababwira ati “mwitinya dore ndababwira ubutumwa bwiza bw umunezero mwinshi uzaba ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bantu bose, kuko uyu munsi umukiza abavukiye mu murwa wa dawidi, uzaba kristo umwami “.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ku munsi wo kuzuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko noneho kristo yarazutse, ni we muganura w abasinziriye         1 abakorinto 15.20.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ku munsi wo kuzamuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana yaramuzamuye, imushyira iburyo bwayo, ngo abe ukomeye kandi umukiza, aheshe abisirayeli
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwihana no kubabarirwa ibyaha                                               ibyakozwe 5.31.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ku munsi wo pentekote
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nonese, ko muzi guha abana banyu ibyiza, kandi ko muri babi, so wo mu ijuru ntazarushaho rwose guha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwuka wera abawumusabye??          Luka 11.13
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Benedata bakundwa, mu byanditswe byera henshi harimo ibitwemeza ibyaha byacu, tukabyatura: kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: biduhana kutaryarya no kutabihisha turi imbere y imana ishobobora byose, data wa twese wo mu ijuru,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahubwo tubyaturane imitima yitonze, yoroshye, yihana kandi yumvira kugirango duheshwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubibabarirwa n imbabazi zayo zitagira akagero.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tuzi yuko dukwiriye kubyatura iminsi yose twitonze; ariko cyane cyane dukwiriye kubyatura, iyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: duteraniye kuyishimira ibyiza bikomeye iduhaye, no kuyihimbaza nk uko ikwiriye rwose, no kumva
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ijambo ryayo ryera cyane, no kuyisaba, kugirango iduhe ibyo imitima yacu ikena n iby imibiri nabyo. Ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyo gitumye mbinginga mwebwe abateraniye hano mwese, ngo mwegerane imana nanjye aho intebe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yayo y ubuntu buturuka mu ijuru iri, muzanye imitima itanduye n ijwi ryoroheje, tuyaturire ibyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo kwaturira imana ibyaha bihereko bivugwe na bose bari mu iteraniro bafatanije n umusengesha
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bapfukamye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data wa twese ushobora byose kandi w’imbabazi nyinshi, twayobye inzira zawe nk intama zizimiye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: dukabije gukora iby imitima yacu yifuza; twacumuye amategeko yawe yera; twaretse ibyo dukwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukora, dukora ibidakwiriye gukorwa; ndetse muri twe nta buzima rwose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko, ayi nyagasani, twebwe abafite agahinda k ibyaha byacu utugirire imbabazi mana, ubabarire
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: abatura ibyaha byabo, usubize mu nzira yawe abihannye by ukuri, nk uko waseranije abantu bose muri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yesu kristo umwami wacu, kandi data wa twese w imbabazi nyinshi, tugusabye ku bwa yesu uwo,
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: kugirangotujye tukubaha, dukiranuka, twitonda, tubone guhesha izina ryawe icyubahiro. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hakurikireho ibyo kwemeresha ko ibyaha bibabarirwa bivugwe n umusengesha wenyine.abandi bose
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bakomeze bapfukame
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Imana ishobora byose, se w’umwami wacu yesu kristo, ntishaka ko umunyabyaha apfa, ahubwo ishaka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ko yihana, ibyaha bye akarama; kd yategetse abahereza bayo kugira ubushobozi bwo kubwira abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bayo bihannye, ko babariwe ibyaha byabo, bakabikurwaho.niyo ibabarira abihana by ukuri, kandi iduhe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’umwuka wayo wera, ngo ibyo dukora ubu biyinezeze, kandi hanyuma tuzajye aho tuzagira umunezero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: itanga utazashira.tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu bose bavuge amen; kandi bajye bavuga batyo, uko barangije isengesho ryose.hanyuma
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: umusengesha apfukame, avuge isengesho ry’umwami wacu n’ ijwi ryumvikana. Abantu bose nabo
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: barivuge bafatanije nawe bapfukamye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, izina ryawe ryubahwe; ubwami bwawe buze; ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru, uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; utubabarire ibyaha byacu, nk’uko
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: natw tubabarira ababitugirira; ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize umubi; kuko ubwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n‘ubushobozi n’icyubahiro ari ibyawe ubu n’iteka ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma umusengesha avuge ati:
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nyagasani, bumbura akanwa kacu;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu: kugirango ururimi rwacu rwerekane ishimwe ryawe
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umusengesha: mana, tebuka, udutabare
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abantu: nyagasani, banguka udukize
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Hanyuma bose bahaguruke, umusengesha avuge ati:
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya data wa twese, n’ icy’umwana, n’icy’ umwuka wera,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu: nk’uko cyahozeho mbere na mbere’ nubu niko cyiri kd niko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umusengesha: nimuhimbaze umwami imana yacu;
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abantu: izina ryayo rihimbazwe.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Hanyuma bakurikizeho iyi zaburi, keretse ku munsi wo kuzuka bavuge andi magambo yashyiriweho ku
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bw’uwo munsi, kandi no ku munsi wa cumi n’icyenda wa buri kwezi abe ari bwo bayisomera hamwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’izindi zaburi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Venite         zaburi 95
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nimuze turirimbire uwiteka,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tuvugirize impundu igitare cy'agakiza kacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tujye mu maso ye tumushima,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tumuvugirize impundu n'indirimbo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuko uwiteka ari imana ikomeye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni umwami ukomeye usumba ibigirwamana byose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ikuzimu hari mu kuboko kwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi impinga z'imisozi na zo ni ize.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Inyanja ni iye, ni we wayiremye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Intoki ze ni zo zabumbye ubutaka.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nimuze tumuramye twunamye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Dupfukamire uwiteka umuremyi wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuko ari we mana yacu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Natwe turi abantu b'icyanya cye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Turi intama zo mu kuboko kwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uyu munsi icyampa mukumva ijwi rye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ntimwinangire imitima,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nk'uko mwayinangiriye i meriba,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: No ku munsi w'i masa mu butayu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubwo ba sekuruza wanyu bangeragezaga,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bakantata bakabona umurimo wanjye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Narakariye ab'icyo gihe imyaka mirongo ine,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ndavuga nti "ubu ni ubwoko buhora buyoba mu mitima yabwo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi ntibamenya inzira zanjye."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni cyo cyatumye ndahirana umujinya nti
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "ntibazinjira mu buruhukiro bwanjye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya data wa twese, n’icy’umwana n’icy’umwuka wera. Nk’uko cyahoze mbere na mbere,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ubu niko kiri, kd ni ko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma hakurikiyeho zaburi zitegekewe uwo munsi, kandi zaburi yose isomwa bajye bayirangisha aya
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: magambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma hakurikireho gusoma n’ijwi ryumvikana igice cya mbere cyo mu isezerano rya kera, nk’uko
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bitegetswe muri kalenda; keretse ku munsi mukuru ugira ibice biwutegekewe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ugiye gusoma igice ahagarare yerekeye abantu, kugira ngo bamwumve neza. Namara kugisoma,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: hakurikireho indirimbo yitwa “te deum”.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: “Mana turaguhimbaza”.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi ugiye gusoma igice akirange ati:” igice cya mbere kiri mu gitabo……. Igice cyacyo cya …. Uhereye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ku murongo wacyo wa ……. Namara kugisoma, avuge ati:” igice cya mbere (cya kabiri) kibasomewe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kigarukiye aha.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Te deum
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana, turaguhimbaza, twwemeye ko uri umwami wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo mu isi byose biragusenga, data wa twese uhoraho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abamarayika bose baguhimbarisha ijwi rirenga; ijuru n’abanyambaraga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bose barimo biraguhimbaza.abakerubi n abaserafi bahora bagusingiza iminsi yose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bati:” uwiteka mana nyiringabo, uri uwera, uri uwera, uri uwera; icyubahiro cy’ubumana bwawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gikwiriye ijuru n’isi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umtwe w’intumwa wubahwa rwose ujye guhimbaza; intore zishimwa z’abahanuzi ziguhimbaze;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Intore z’abishwe babahora yesu na zo ziguhimbaze.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Itorero ryawe ry’abakristo bo mu isi yose ryeruye ko uri data wa twese, ufite icyubahiro kd uw’ukuri;
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: kandi ryemeye n’umwuka wera, ko ariwe mufasha.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ayi kristo, ni wowe mwami w’icyubahiro, kandi umwana wa data wa twese, uzahoraho iteka ryose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubwo washyiragaho gukiza abantu, ntiwahinyuye inda ya wa mwari;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze urangije kunesha urubori rw’urupfu, wugururira abizera bose ubwami bwo mu ijuru.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: None ubu wicaye iburyo bw’imana mu cyubahiro cyayo, ni yo data wa twese, kandi twizera ko uzaza,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uzanywe no kuducira imanza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni cyo gitumye tukwinginga ngo udufashe, twebwe abahereza bawe wacunguje amaraso yawe y’igiciro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyinshi;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uduheshe kubaranwa n’abera bawe no guhamwa na bo ubwiza buhoraho nyagasani, kiza abantu bawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uhe abaragwa bawe umugisha;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uduheshe kubaranwa n’abera bawe no guhamwa na bo ubwiza buhoraho nyagasani, kiza abantu bawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uhe abaragwa bawe umugisha;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ujye ubatwara neza, kandi ubahe ubukire iminsi yabo yose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uko bukeye, n’uko bwije, tujye tuguhimbaza, kandi tuzajye dusingiza izina ryawe isi ikiriho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani, wemere kuturinda, tudakora ibyaha uyu munsi;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani, utubabarire, utugirire ibambe;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani, imbabazi zawe zitugumeho, nk’uko tukwizeye;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani, ni wowe nizeye, ntuzemere ko nkorwa n’isoni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Cg iyi ndirimbo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Benedicte
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe mwese, ibyo uwiteka akora, nimumuhimbaze;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe bamarayika b’uwiteka, nimumuhimbaze; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro. Mumushime,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yewe juru risumba ayandi, himbaza uwiteka; umushime, umuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yewe mazi ari hejuruy’isanzure, himbaza uwiteka; umushime, umuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe by’ubushobozi bw’uwiteka mwese; nimumuhimbaze; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe zuba n’ukwezi, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe nyenyeri zo mu ijuru, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe mvura n’ikime, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe miyaga y’imana, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe muriro n’ubushyuhe, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe tumba n’icyi, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe kime n’imbeho, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe iyababa n’ubukonje, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe barafu na sheregi, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe joro n’umunsi, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe mucyo n’umwijima, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe mirabyo n’ibicu, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Erega, reka isi yose ihimbaze uwiteka; imushime, imuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe bintu bimera mu isi mwese, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe mariba n’amasoko, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe nyanja n’imyuzure, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe bifi binini n’amafi yose yoga mu nzuzi; nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe biguruka mu kirere mwese, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe nyamaswa n’amatungo mwese, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe bana b’abantu, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi isirayeli na we, reka ahimbaze uwiteka; amushime; amuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe banyamurwa b’uwiteka, nimumuhimbaze; mumushime; mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe bahereza b’uwiteka, nimumuhimbaze; mumushime; mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe myuka n’imitima y abakiranutsi, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe bera b’imitima yiyoroheje, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe ananiya, n’azariya, na mishayeli, nimuhimbaze uwiteka; mumushime, mumuhe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya data wa twese, n’icy ’umwana, n ‘icy’umwana, n’icy’umwuka wera, nk’uko cyahoze

verses.text: Hanyuma umusengesha apfukame, avuge isengesho ry’umwami wacu n’ijwi ryumvikana. Abantu bose na
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bo barivuge bafatanije nawe bapfukamye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data wa twese wo mi ijuru, izina ryawe ryubahwe; ubwami bwawe buze; ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru, uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; utubabarire ibyaha byacu, nk’uko
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: natw tubabarira ababitugirira; ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize umubi; kuko ubwami n
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubushobozi n’icyubahiro ari ibyawe ubu n’iteka ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma umusengesha avuge ati
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nyagasani, bumbura akanwa kacu;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu: kugirango ururimi rwacu rwerekanishe ishimwe ryawe.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umusengesha: mana, tebuka, udatabare.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abantu: nyagasani, banguka, udukize.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Hanyuma bose bahaguruke, umusengesha avuge ati:
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya data wa twese, n’icy’umwana, n’icy’ umwuka wera;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu: nk’uko cyahoze mbere na mbere, n’ubu niko kiri, kandi niko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umusengesha: nimuhimbaze umwami imana yacu;
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abantu: izina ryayo rihimbazwe.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Hanyuma bakurikizeho zaburi zitegekewe uwo munsi; maze igice cyo mu isezerano rya kera gisomwe n’ijwi
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: rymvikana, nk’uko bitegetswe muri kalenda. Nikimara gusomwa, baririmbe indirimbo y’umwari mariya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yitwa magnificat.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Magnificat (luka 1.46-55)
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umutima wanjye uhimbaza umwami imana, n'ubugingo bwanjye bwishimiye imana umukiza wanjye,kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yabonye  ubukene  bw'umuja  wayo,kandi  uhereye  none  ab'ibihe  byose  bazanyita  uhiriwe.kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ushoborabyose ankoreye ibikomeye,n'izina rye ni iryera.imbabazi ze ziri ku bamwubaha,uko ibihe bihaye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibindi.yerekanishije imbaraga ukuboko kwe,atatanije abibone mu byo batekereza mu mitima yabo.anyaze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abakomeye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyiza,naho  abakire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yabasezereye  amara  masa.atabaye  isirayeli  umugaragu  we,kuko  yibutse  imbabazi  ze,yasezeranije  ba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: sogokuruza,ko azazigirira aburahamu n'urubyaro rwe iteka ryose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: intebe  zabo,ashyize  hejuru  aboroheje.abashonje  yabahagije
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya data wa twese, n’icy’umwana n’icy’umwuka wera. Nk’uko cyahoze mbere na mbere,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ubu niko kiri, kd ni ko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amina.

verses.text: Cyangwa zaburi 98
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Muririmbire uwiteka indirimbo nshya,kuko yakoze ibitangaza.ikiganza cye cy'iburyo n'ukuboko kwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwera yabizanishije agakiza.uwiteka yamenyekanishije agakiza ke,gukiranuka kwe yakwerekanye ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mugaragaro mu maso y'amahanga.yibutsa imbabazi ze n'umurava we,kubigirira inzu y'abisirayeli,abo ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mpera y'isi hose barebye agakiza k'imana yacu.mwa bari mu isi mwese mwe,muvugirize uwiteka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: impundu,musandure muririmbishwe n'ibyishimo,muririmbe ishimwemuririmbire uwiteka ishimwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mubwira inanga,mubwire inanga, muririmbe indirimbo.muvugirize impundu imbere y'umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uwiteka,n'impanda n'ijwi ry'ihembe.inyanja ihorerane n'ibiyuzuye,n'isi n'abayibamo bose.inzuzi zikome
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu mashyi,imisozi iririmbire hamwe,iririmbishwe n'ibyishimo,imbere y'uwiteka kuko agiye kuza,agacira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abari mu isi imanza.azacira abari mu isi imanza zitabera,azacira amahanga imanza zitunganye;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya data wa twese, n’icy’umwana n’icy’umwuka wera. Nk’uko cyahoze mbere na mbere,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ubu niko kiri, kd ni ko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hakurikireho igice cyo mu isezerano rishya, nk’uko bitegetswe. Nikimara gusomwa, hakurikireho
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: indirimbo ya simeyoni yitwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nunc dimittis   luka 2.29-32
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Mwami, noneho urasezerere umugaragu wawe amahoro nk'uko wabivuze,kuko amaso yanjye abonye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: agakiza kawe,ako witeguye mu maso y'abantu bose,kuba umucyo uvira amahanga,no kuba ubwiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw'ubwoko bwawe bw'abisirayeli
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya data wa twese, n’icy’umwana n’icy’umwuka wera. Nk’uko cyahoze mbere na mbere,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ubu niko kiri, kd ni ko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Cyangwa iyi zaburi keretse ku munsi wa 12 w’ukwezi   zaburi 67
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana itubabarire iduhe umugisha, itumurikishirize mu maso hayo.kugira ngo inzira yawe imenywe mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: isi, ubugingo bwawe bukiza bumenywe mu mahanga yose.mana, amoko agushime, amoko yose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: agushime.amahanga yishime, aririmbishwe n'ibyishimo, kuko uzacira amoko imanza z'ukuri, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uzashorerera amahanga mu isi.mana, amoko agushime, amoko yose agushime.ubutaka bweze umwero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wabwo, imana ni yo mana yacu, izaduha umugisha.imana izaduha umugisha, kandi abo ku mpera y'isi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hose bazayubaha.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya data wa twese, n’icy’umwana n’icy’umwuka wera. Nk’uko cyahoze mbere na mbere,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ubu niko kiri, kd ni ko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma hakurikireho kwemera kw’intumwa, bivugwe n’umusengesha hamwe n’abantu bose
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bahagaze.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nemeye imana data wa twese ushobora byose umuremyi w’ijuru n’isi; nemeye na yesu kristo umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we w’ikinege, umwami wacu, wabyawe n’umwari mariya; kandi iyo nda yasamye yari iy’umwuka wera;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yababajwe  ubwo  pontiyo  pilo  yari  umutegetsi  abambwa  ku  musaraba,  arapfa,  arahambwa,  amanuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ikuzimu mu bapfuye, azuka ku munsi wa gatatu, ajya mu ijuru nine ubu yicaye iburyo bw’imana data wa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: twese ushobora byose, niho azava, aje gucira abakiriho n’abapfuye urubanza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi  nemeye  umwuka  wera,  nemeye  ko  hariho  itorero  ryera  katolika  ry’abakristo  bose,  n’ubumwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw’abera, no kubabarirwa ibyaha, no kuzuka k’umubiri, n’ubugingo budashira, amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nibamara kuvuga ibyo. Hakurikireho aya masengesho bose bapfukamye; umusengesha abe ari we

verses.text: ubanza kuvuga n’ijwi ryumvikana ati:
verses.speaker: all

verses.speaker: all

verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru, uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; utubabarire ibyaha byacu, nk’uko

verses.text: Abantu: kuko ari ntawundi mutabazi uturengera keretse wowe mana
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umusengesha: mana, uturememo umutima wera;
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abantu: kandi we kudukuraho umwuka wawe wera
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Hanyuma hakurikireho amasengesho atatu, irya mbere ribe iryashyiriweho  uwo munsi; irya kabiri ribe

verses.text: iryo gusaba amahoro;kandikandi irya gatatu ni iryo gusaba kurindwa akaga kose irya kabir n’ irya

verses.text: gatatu ajye avugwa iminsi yose mu gusenga kwa nimugoroba

verses.text: Isengesha rya kabiri ryo gusaba amahoro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana,tuzi yuko ari wowe uhesha abantu gusa ibyiza byose n,inama nziza zose ukababashisha gukora

verses.text: ibyo gukiranuka byose.ni cyo gitumye twebwe abantu bawe tugusaba amahoro isi itabasha kuduha

verses.text: imitima yacu ishishikarire kumvira  amategeko yawe,kandi  tumare iminsi yacu yose duhawe ihumure n’

verses.text: ituza kuko ari wowe uturinze, bigatuma tudatinya abanzi bacu,ku bw’ kamaro ka yesu kristo umwami

verses.text: wacu. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani,turakwinginze utumurikishirize, umucyo wawe, umwijima turimo ukurweho;kandi udukirishe

verses.text: imbabazi zawe akaga kose kadutera muri iri joro, ku bw’ urukundo rw’umwana wawe yesu kristo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umukiza wacu. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hakurikireho indirimbo maze bavuge aya masengesho
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Iryo gusabira perezida wa repubulika y’u rwanda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose, niwowe utegeka amahanga yose, ukayaha amahoro, kugirango akore ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ushaka; none turakwinginga ngo uhore urebana imbabazi perezida wa repubulika y’u rwanda, umuhe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukoresha neza ubushobozi wamuhaye, iguhugu cyacu kibone kugira amahoro, kugirango abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: batagira imidugararo, ahubwo bagubwe neza, bashimwe n’andi mahanga; kandi ubwo bushobozi ajye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abukoresha uburyo butuma itorero ryawe rigira amahoro. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Iryo gusabira abategetsi bo mu gihugu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose,data wa twese wo mu ijuru ,ubwami bwawe ntabwo bushira,kandi icyubahiro cyawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gikwiriye isi yose .nicyo gituma tukwinginga ngo uhore urebana imbabazi abaministriri n’abandi bategetsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bahawe  ubushobozi  bwo  gutegeka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: inama  neza.kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turabasabira,ngo ubafashe gukorera neza abantu bashinzwe bicishije bugufi,kandi ari abiringirwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iki  gihugu;ubahe  ubwenge  bwo  kujya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi  turakwinginga  ngo  idini  no  kukubaha,  amahoro  no  kugirana  ubumwe,  ukuri  no  guca  imanza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: zitabera, bitabura muri twe iminsi yose, amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo gusabira abakuru b’itorero n’abakristo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose ihoraho; ni wowe wenyine utanga impano nziza zose, none turagusabira abepisikopi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’abapasitori n’abantu bose bo mu bupasitori bwabo abo wabashinze, kugira ngo ubahe umwuka wera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uhesha ubuntu, kandi ubahe  ikime cy’imigisha yawe babone kugushimisha.uduhe  ibyo, nyagasani, ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: biheshe yesu kristo icyubahiro, niwe murengezi wacu kandi umuhuza wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho rya krisostomu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko uduhereye ubuntu uyu munsi kugusaba ibyo dushaka duhuje
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umutima; kandi wasezeranije yuko batatu cg babiri ni bateranira hamwe mu izina ryawe, uzabaha ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: basaba, none, nyagasani, turakwinginze uduhe ibyo tugusabye, uko ubona ko byatugirira umumaro; kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tukiri muri iyi si ujye utumenyesha ukuri kwawe, no mu gihe kizaza tuzahabwe ubugingo buhoraho. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusaba ubuntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubuntu bw’umwami wacu yesu kristo, n’urukundo rw’imana, n’ubumwe bw’umwuka bw’umwuka Wera,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bigumane natwe twese iteka ryose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Aha niho gusenga kwa nimugoroba kugarukiye

sections.title: Amasengesho yo Gusengeshwa Rimwe na Rimwe
sections.description: Amasengesho yo gukoreshwa igihe cyose cy'ubusabane n'Imana no gusengeshwa kw'impuzamahanzu.

chapters.title: Amasengesho yo Gusengeshwa Rimwe na Rimwe

verses.text: AMASENGESHO YO GUSENGESHWA RIMWE NA RIMWE
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Aya masengesho ni aya gukoreshwa iyo basenga ibyo mugitondo n’ibya nimugoroba n’ibya litani,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amasengesho abiri aheruka ataravugwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusabira abantu b’uburyo butari bumwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ihoraho, turagusaba kugira ngo ushyireho umutima kuri twe abantu bawe bukuri imbere hano,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hamwe n’abataje bananijwe n’ubusaza, cyangwa indwara, cyangwa ikindi kintu cyose. Rinda abana,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ramira abashaje; komeza abagira imitima itentebutse, kandi n’abazimiye ubatarure, bagaruke mu rugo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rwawe. Gendana n’abari mu rugendo, hagarikira abapfakazi n’imfubyi, bohora imbohe, kiza abarwayi;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi utabare abari mu makuba bose. Wibuke kugirira neza abadukunda bose hamwe n’abatwanga; kd
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nyagasani, abo twibagiwe wowe ubibuke: kuko ari wowe mufasha w’abatagira shinge na rugero, ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wowe mukiza w’abazimiye: ni wowe buhungiro bw’indushyi kandi umuvuzi w’abarwayi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi, mwami, ubwo uzi uko tumeze, utumare ubukene bwacu bwose, nk’uko ubutunzi bwawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw’ubwiza buri bwo muri kristo yesu umwami wacu.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusabira ubutumwa bwiza ngo bukwire mu bihugu byose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose, umwana wawe yesu kristo ni we wategetse intumwa ze ati:”mugende, mujye mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bihugu byose, mubwire abantu bose ubutumwa bwiza,” natwe abo wahamagaye ngo tube itorero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryawe, uduhe umutima ukunda kumvira iryo tegeko,tubone kumenyekanisha iby’agakiza kawe mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mahanga yose. Turakwinginze urebane imbabazi abatakuzi bose, basandariye hose nk’intama zitagira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwungeri. Kandi, data wa twese, nyiri ibisarurwa, tuma abasaruzi mu bisarurwa byawe, ubahe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwerekanisha icyubahiro cyawe ingeso zabo nziza, kugirango bagaragarize abantu bose agakiza kawe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo, umwami wacu.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusabira amavuriro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko umwana wawe yesu kristo yagendanaga agirira abantu neza,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akabakiza indwara z’uburyo bwose. Nuko turakwinginze, ukomeze uwo murimo we w’ubuntu no muri iki
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gihe, cyane cyane mu mavuriro yo mu gihugu cyacu. Komeza abarwayi, ubakize, kandi uhe abaganga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’abaforomo ubwenge, no kugirira abababaye impuhwe, no kumenyekanisha urukundo rwa yesu mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mibereho yabo. Natwe uduhe gufatanya nabo kugira umutwaro wo kwereka abarwayi inzira y’agakiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kabonerwa muri yesu kristo umwami wacu. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusabira abapfushije ababo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami wacu w’imbabazi, turakwinginze, uhe abapfushije ababo kugira ibyiringiro no kwihangana,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubahe imbaraga zo kunyura mu minsi iri imbere. Batajya batembanwa n’umwuzure, ahubwo bakomere
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu mitima, be kubabara nka babandi badafite ibyiringiro, ahubwo bajye bibuka ibyiza byose wabagiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu bihe byashize. Kdi bagire ibyiringiro byo kuzongera kubonanira nabo mu ijuru. Tubisabye mu izina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rya yesu kristo uzi kubabarana natwe.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusabira ubupasitori bwacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose, turakwinginze, ufashe ubupasitori bwacu; utubabarire ibyaha byacu, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urusheho kutwiyegereza. Uko ijambo ryawe risomwa cyangwa rivugwa, urihe umugisha, kandi uhe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umugisha umurimo wose ukorwa mu itorero ryawe, cyane cyane muri ubu bupasitori bwacu. Abarwayi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’indushyi ubahe kwihangana, kandi utume imibabaro yabo ibahesha umugisha. Kandi turakwinginze,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ugenderere abigisha n’abigishwa babo bo mu mashuri yacu yose y’ubwenge. Kandi twese uduhe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukurira mu buntu bwa yesu kristo, tukarushaho kumumenya, kuko kumumenya ari bwo bugingo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: buhoraho, uduhe ibyo ku bw’uwo wadupfiriye,yesu kristo umwami wacu kandi umukiza wacu.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusabira umunsi w’icyumweru
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami wacu yesu kristo, tuzi yuko wazutse uvuye mu bapfuye ku munsi nk’uyu. Nuko uduhe guhora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: twubaha uyu munsi wawe wera, twe kuwukoraho ibitakunezeza, kugira ngo natwe tubone kuzukana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubugingo bushya, ngo biguheshe icyubahiro n’ishimwe. Ni wowe uhorana na data wa twese n’umwuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wera, muri imana imwe iteka ryose.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusabira abari mu rugendo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana, ni wowe wayoboje abantu bawe nk’ubushyo ukuboko kwa mose na aroni, nuko turakwinginze,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urinde abari mu ngendo, ubahe gusohora amahoro; kandi igihe nikigera, uzabahe gutaha mu bwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwawe bwo mu ijuru. Tubisabye mu izina ra yesu umukiza wacu.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusabira umwaka mushya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose, ni wowe wenyine udahinduka, kandi ni wowe waducishije mu bihe bigenda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bihindahinduka; none ukaba utugejeje muri uyu mwaka mushya  tukiri bazima. Nuko turakwinginze,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: utubabarire ibyaha byose twakoze muri uwo mwaka ushize. Kandi udufashe tubone kumara iminsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: dusigaje tuguhesha icyubahiro. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho ryo mu gihe cy’inzara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana data watwese w’imbabazi, turibuka ko mu gihe cy’umuhanuzi elisa wahinduye inzara yateye muri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: samariya umwijuto; kandi umwami wacu yesu kristo yatwigishije kugusaba ngo uduhe ifunguro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ridutunga uko bukeye, nuko turakwinginze, udukize iyi nzara iduteye, uduhe imigisha ivuye mu ijuru,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: utwereze neza imyaka, kugirango  ibyo uduhaye tubikoreshe mu buryo buguhesha icyubahiro. Tubone
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gutabara abandi bababaye. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho ryo gusaba imvura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana data wa twese wo mu ijuru, ni wowe wasezeranije abitwararika ubwami bwawe no gukiranuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwawe, yuko azabongera ibyo bakena; none turakwinginze utuvubire imvura nziza , kugira ngo tubone
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibidutunga, kandi nawe biguheshe icyubahiro. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho ryo gusaba umucyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose, nubwo ibyaha byacu byari bikwiriye igihano cy’imvura nyinshi y’urushyana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: duhawe, ariko none turakwinginze, utubabarire ku bw’imbabazi zawe, uduhe imicyo yo kweza imyaka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yacu, kandi no mu mitina yacu uduhe kwera imbuto zikwiriye abihannye. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kristo umwami wacu.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho ryo mu gihe cy’ibiba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose, nyiri ijuru n’isi, muri wowe nimwo dufite ubugingo, tugenda, tubaho: ni wowe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uvushiriza izuba ryawe ababi n’abeza, ugaha imvura abakiranutsi n’abakiranirwa. Twebwe abantu bawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakwambaje turakwinginze,uturebane imbabazi,utwoherereze umugisha wawe uvuye mu ijuru,kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muri iki gihe cy’ibiba utumereze imyaka.uduhe guhaga ibyiza byawe mu mubiri no mu mutima,nawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tujye dukora tugushima ubudasiba.tubisabye mw’izina ry’umwami wacu yesu kristo.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho ryo mu bihe by’imivurungano n’intambara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose niwowe mwami utegeka byose ukagira ubushobozi budatsindwa nikintu cyose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: waremye;ni wowe uhana abanyabyaha igihano kibakwiriye.kandi ubabarira abihannye by’ukuri.nuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turakwinginze twitonze cyane,udukize,udukure mu maboko y’ababisha bacu,utsembeho ubwibone
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwabo,ubamaremo igomwa,uhindure inama zabo ubusa,kugira ngo twebwe,nk’uko turindwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’amaboko yawe’twe kugerwaho n’icyago cyose,tubone kuguhimbariza,kuko ari wowe uha abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kunesha.tubisabye twishingikirije ku mirimo myiza umwana wawe yesu kristo umwami wacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yadukoreye.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho ryo gusaba kubabarirwa ibyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana y’imbabazi,turakwinginze,ubabariye abantu bakwizeye,kandi ubahe, amahoro,bakurweho ibyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byabo byose bagukorere n’umutima utuje,kubwa yesu kristo umwami uwacu.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Cyangwa iri-
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ,tuzi yuko imico yawe ari ukubabarira abantu no kubagirira imbabazi;ni cyo gitumye tugusaba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo wemere ibyo tugusabye twitonze;kandi ibyaha byacu ,naho bituboshye nk’ingoyi,ku bwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira neza kwawe kwinshi utubohore,ngo duheshe yesu kristo icyubahiro,ni we murengezi wacu kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuhuza wacu.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gushima kw’abantu bose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mama ishobora byose,data wa twese w’imbabazi zose,twebwe abantu bawe badakwiriye turagushima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyane twitonze,tugushimiye iby’imbabazi byose watuguriye,(cyane cyane abaje none kugushimira ibyiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uheruka kubagirira).turagushimira ko waturemye,ukaturinda,ukaduha ibindi byiza byose byo muri ubu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bugingo;ariko cyane cyane turagushimira urukundo rwawe rutarondoreka rwatumye ucunguza abari mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: isi umwami wacu yesu kristo,n’ibiduhesha ubuntu bwawe ,n’ibyiringiro byo kuzabona ubwiza bwawe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi turakwinginze,uduhe kumenya neza imbabazi zawe zose uko zingana, kugirango imitima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yacu ibone kugushima tutaryarya,twe kwerekanisha ishimwe ryawe ibyo tuvuze gusa ,keretse bifatanyije
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nibyo dukora;tugukorere tukuyobotse,dukora ibiyunganye byera iminsi yose tukiriho.ibyo byose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tubisabye mu izina rya yesu  kristo umwami wacu,uwo twifurizanya nawe n’umwuka wera,icyubahiro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyose n’ubwiza bwose n’ubwiza bwose ibihe bihoraho.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu Byo Gusenga Kwa Mu Gitondo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuri iyi minsi mikuru,uwo kuvukia,uwo kwerekanwa,uwa mariya wera,uwo kuzuka,uwo kuzamuka,uwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: pantekote,uwa yohana umubatiza,uwa yakobo wera,uwa batolomayo wera,uwa matayo wera,uwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: simoni  na yuda abera uwa andereya wera,n’ubutatu;kuri iyo minsi  mikuru mu byo gusenga kwa mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gitondo,mu cyumba cyo kwemera kw’intumwa.umupasitori n’abantu bahagaze bavuge uku kwemera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kw’abakristo kwitwa
verses.speaker: all

sections.title: Kwemera kwa Atanasiyo Wera (Quicunque Vult)
sections.description: Ukwemera kwa Atanasiyo Wera kuvuga ibya Ubutatu Bwera no gukizwa.

verses.text: KWEMERA KWA ATANASIYO WERA (QUICUNQUE VULT)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ushatse gukizwa wese akwkiriycyo guhamya kuruta byose n ukwemera katorike kw abakirisito bose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umuntu wese,niba atemera rwose uko kwemera, cyangwa akwangiza,ntazabura kurimbuka rwose.uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwemera niko uku:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Turamya imana imwe mu butatu;kandi turamya ubutatu mu bumwe.ntituvuga abaperesona
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: b’imana,haba no gutandukanya ubumwe bwayo;kuko hariho peresona umwe,ni data wa twese,undi ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwana,kandi undi ni umwuka wera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko ubumana bwa data wa twese n ’ubw ’ umwana ,n ’ubw ’umwuka wera ni ubumwe;icyubahiro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyabo ni kimwe,kandi ubukuru bwabo ntibuzashira.nk’iko data wa twese ari, ni ko n’umwana ari,kandi ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ko n’umwuka wera ari.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data wa twese ntiyaremwe, umwana na we ntiyaremwe, kandi n’umwuka wera ntiyaremwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data wa twese ntiyamenywa n’umuntu, umwana ntiyamenywa n’umuntu, n’umwuka wera nawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntiwamenywa n’umuntu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data wa twese ni utazashira, n’umwaka ni utazashira, kandi n’umwuka wera na we ni utazashyira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko ntituvuga yuko abatazashyira ari batatu, ahubwo yuko ari umwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi nk’uko abatamenywa n’umuntu atari batatu,kandi abataremwe atari batatu,ahubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abataremwe ari umwe,kandi abatamenywe n’umuntu ari umwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Niko data wa twese ari ushobora byose, n’umwuka ari ushobora byose, kandi n’umwuka wera na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we ari ushobora byose;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyamara ntihariho batatu bashobora byose, keretse umwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi uko niko data wa twese ari imana, n’ umwana ari  imana , kandi  umwuka wera na we ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyamara ntihariho imana eshatu, keretse imana imwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi uko ni ko data wa twese ari umwami n’ umwana ari umwami, kandi umwuka wera na we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ari umwami; nyamara nyihariho abami batatu, keretse umwami umwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi uko niko data wa twese ari umwami, n’umwana ari umwami, kandi umwuka wera nawe ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwami: nyamara ntihariho abami batatu keretse umwami umwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi nk’uko ukuri k’ ubukristo kuduhata kwemera buri peresona ukwe ko ari imana n’umwami.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni ko idini katolika itubuza guhamya tuti:”hariho imana eshatu cyangwa abami batatu” .
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nta waremye imana, ntiyaremwe, kandi ntiyabyawe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwana akomoka kuri data wa twese wenyine, ntiyaremwe, ariko kandi ni umwana wayo rwose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwuka wera akomoka kuri data wa twese n’umwana, ntiyaremwe, ntiyabyawe, ariko rwose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abakomokaho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nicyo gituma hariho data wa twese umwe, si batatu; n’umwana umwe si batatu, n’umwuka wera umwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: si batatu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi muri ubu butatu ntiharimo uw’imbere, cyangwa ubaheruka;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ahubwo abo baperesona batatu bose ntibashira, kandi banganya ubukuru. Nk’uko bivugwa haruguru,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubumwe mu butatu, n’ubutatu mu bumwe, ni bwo dukwiriye kuramya.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nicyo gituma ushatse gukizwa wese akwiriye kumenya iby’ubutatu atyo. Kandi ushatse guhabwa agakiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kadashira wese, ningombwa ko yemera ibyo kuvuka k’umwami wacu yesu kristo mu buryo butunganye:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuko kwemera kacu gutunganye duhamya ari uku, ngo umwami wacu yesu kristo umwana w’imana ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imana, kandi ni umuntu;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni imana kuko yakomotse kuri data wa twese, kandi yari ariho isi itararemwa; kandi ni umuntu, kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yabikomoye kuri nyina, ubwo yabyarirwaga mu isi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana nyamana, kandi umuntu nyamuntu, ufite ubugingo bw’ubwenge, n’umubiri nk’uw’abandi bantu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ahwanye na data wa twese mu byerekeye ubumana bwe, nyamara ntahwanye na we mu byerekeye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuba umuntu kwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nubwo ari imana kandi n’umuntu, ariko si babiri, keretse kristo umwe;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni umwe, si mu buryo bwo guhindura ubumana ngo buhinduke umubiri, ahubwo mu buryo bwo kwinjiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuba umuntu kwe mu mana;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni umwe rwose, si mu buryo kuvanga ubumana, keretse ku bw’ubumwe bw’abo baperesona
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuko, nk’uko ubugingo n’ umubiri biba umuntu umwe, abe ari ko imana n’umuntu biba kristo umwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo uwo ni we wababarijwe kudukiza, akazamuka akajya mu ijuru, ubu yicaye iburyo bwa data wa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: twese imana ishobora byose; kandi hanyuma azavayo aje gucira abazima n’abapfuye urubanza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubwo azagaruka, abantu bazazazuka bafite imibiri, bavuge ibyo bakoze byose. Maze abakoze neza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazazukira ubugingo buhoraho, naho abakoze nabi bazazukira umuriro utazima.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uko niko kwemera katolika kw’abakristo bose. Umuntu utakwemera mu kuri, ntabasha gukizwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya data wa twese, n’icy ’umwana, n ‘icy’umwana, n’icy’umwuka wera, nk’uko cyahoze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mbere na mbere, n’ubu ni ko kiri, kandi ni ko kuzahora kiba iteka ryose.amina
verses.speaker: all

sections.title: Litani
sections.description: Litani y'Itorero: Amasengesho menshi y'ingufu yo gusaba Imana ibyiza byose.

verses.text: LITANI
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Hakurikireho ibya litani, ni ko gusaba ibintu bitari bimwe, bivugwe barangije ibyo gusaba kwa mu
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: gitondo ku munsi w’icyumeru, ku wa gatatu, no kuwa gatanu, no ku yindi minsi, niba bitegetswe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’umwepisikopi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana, data wa twese wo mu ijuru twebwe abanyabyaha bishobeye utugirire imbazbazi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana data watwese wo mu ijuru twebwe abanyabyaha bishobeye utugirire imbabazi
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Mana, umwana kandi umucuguzi w’ isi , twebwe  abanyabyaha  bishobeye utugirire imbabazi
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Mana, umwana kandi umucunguzi w’isi, twebwe abanyabyaha bishobeye utugirire imbabazi
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Mana umwuka wera, ukomoka kuri data wa twese no ku mwana, twebwe abanyabyaha bishobeye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: utugirire imbabazi
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Mana, umwuka wera, ukomoka kuri data wa twese no ku mwana, twebwe abanyabyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bishobeye utugirire imbabazi
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Ayi mu butatu bwera bushimwa kandi bufite icyubahiro, burimo abapersona batatu, ariko rero uri imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imwe,twebwe abanyabyaha bishobeye utugirire imbabazi
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Ayi mu butatu bwera bushimwa kandi bufite icyubahiro, burimo abpersona batatu ariko rero uri imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imwe, twebwe abanyabyaha bishobeye utugirire imbabazi
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Nyagasani, we kwibuka ibicumuro byacu n’ibya ba sogokuruza bacu, kandi ntuduhore ibyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byacu;utubabarire, mwami wacu mwiza, ubabarire abantu bawe wacunguje amaraso yawe y’igiciro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyinshi, kandi ntuduhoranire umujinya iteka ryose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami mmwiza utubabarire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Udukize inabi yose n’igomwa, ubugambanyi n’ uburiganya bwa satani nadutera, kandi n’umujinya wawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: no gucirwaho iteka.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami mwiza udukize.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ujye udukiza ubujiji bwose, ubwibone, kwirarira, n’ uburyarya, ishyari, ubwanzi, kugomanwa no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kutababarirana kose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami mwiza, ubidukize.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Udukize ubusambanyi n’ ibindi byaha byose byicisha, no gushukana kose kw’ iyi si, na kamere yacu na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: satani.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami mwiza, ubidukize.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Udukize inkuba n’ inkubi y’umuyaga, n’ urupfu n’ inzara, intambara n’ ubwicanyi no gukenyuka.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami mwiza, ubidukize.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Udukize imidugararo yose, ubugambanyi n’ ubugome, imyigishirize yose y’ ibinyoma, idini iyobya no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwirema ibice, kugira unangiwe kandi uhinyura ijambo ryawe n’ amategeko yawe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami mwiza, na byo ubidukize.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Udukirishe guhinduka umuntu kwawe, kubatiza kwawe, kwiyiriza ubusa kwawe no kugeragezwa kwawe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami mwiza, ubidukirishe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Udukirishe agahinda wagize no gututubikana amaraso, umusaraba wabambweho n’ imibabaro wagize,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuzukana icyubahiro kwawe no kuza k’ umwuka wera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami mwiza, ubidukirishe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi ujye udukiza mu bihe byose tubonamo imibabaro, mu bihe byose tubonamo ubukire, mu ngoyi z’

verses.text: urupfu kandi no ku munsi wo gucirwaho iteka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami mwiza, udukize.

verses.text: Nyagasani mana, twebwe abanyabyaha turakwinginze wumve gusenga kwacu dusabira itorero ryawe

verses.text: ryera ryo mu isi yose, kugira ngo wemere kuritegeka mu buryo butunganye.

verses.text: Emera kumurikishiriza abepiskopi n’abapasitori n’ abadiakoni ubwenge bw’ukuri, bisobanukiwe ijambo

verses.text: ryawe, babone kuryerekana mu byo babwiriza no mu mico yabo myiza.

verses.text: Emera guha umugaragu wawe perezida wa repubulika y’ u rwanda umugisha, hamwe n’ abaministiri be

verses.text: n’ abandi bategetsi bahawe ubushobozi bwo gutegeka iki gihugu; kandi ujye ubayobora n’ ubwenge
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwawe buva mu ijuru.

verses.text: Mwami mwiza, turakwinginze, utwumvire.

verses.text: Emera guha ab’ inteko ishinga amategeko ubwenge no kujijuka babone gutegesha abantu imbabazi.

verses.text: Emera guha amahanga gushyira hamwe, kugirirana amahoro no guhuza imitima

verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Emera kuduha umutima ugukunda kandi ukubaha, no kugira umwete wo kumvira amategeko yawe

verses.text: Mwami mwiza, turakwinginze, utwumvire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Emera kugwiza mu bantu bawe imbabazi zibemeza kumva ijambo ryawe bafite ubugwaneza. Baryakire

verses.text: barikunze rwose, babone kwera imbuto z’umwuka.

verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Emera kugarura mu nzira y’ukuri abashutswe bose, bakayoba.

verses.text: Mwami mwiza, turakwinginze, utwumvire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Emera gukomeza abahagaze no guhumuriza abadakomeye mu mutima, ukabafasha, kandi abaguye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubabyutse; maze hanyuma utsinde satani, umuture hasi, tumukandagire.

verses.text: Mwami mwiza, turakwinginze, utwumvire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Emera gufasha bose abari mu kaga n’abishobeye, n’abababazwa, no kubatabara no kubahumuriza

verses.text: Mwami mwiza, turakwinginze, utwumvire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Emera kurinda bose bari mu ngendo zo ku butaka, n’izo mu kirere; urinde n’abagore bose baramukwa

verses.text: n’abarwayi bose n’ abana bato; kandi imbohe n’ abanyarugomo bose ubagirire imbabazi.

verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma umusengesha avuge isengesho ry’umwami wacu, afatanije n’abantu bose ati:
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Data wa twese wo mi ijuru, izina ryawe ryubahwe; ubwami bwawe buze; ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru, uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; utubabarire ibyaha byacu, nk’uko
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: natw tubabarira ababitugira; ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize umubi. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umusengesha: nyagasani, ntutugirire ibihwanye n’ibyaha byacu.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abantu: kandi ntitwiture ibihwanye n’ibicumuro byacu
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Dusenge
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana data wa twese w’imbabazi turagushimira yuko utagaya umuntu wese ugutakira afite umutima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubabaye kandi wihana, cyangwa gusenga kw’abafite agahinda; none turakwinginze, ngo utugirire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbabazi, udufashe mu masengesho yacu dusenga, iyo tubonye amakuba n’ibyago, aho biduterera hose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi turagusaba ngo ibibi satani cyangwa abantu bashaka kudukorera n’uburiganya buhindurwe ubusa;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ku bwo kugira neza kwawe ubimareho rwose, nk’uko uzi ibizaba bitaraba; hanyuma twebwe abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bawe bo mu itorero ryawe ryera tuzajye tugushimira iteka, kuko uturinda kubabazwa n abaduhiga.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tubisabye ku bwa yesu kristo umwami wacu.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani, haguruka udutabare, kandi udukize ku bw’izina ryawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana, ba sogokuruza bacu badutekerereje ibyiza wakoze mu gihe cyabo no mu bihe bya kera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: batarabaho; natwe twarabyiyumviye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani, haguruka udutabare, kandi udukize, ngo wiheshe icyubahiro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya data wa twese, n’icy’umwana n’icy’umwuka wera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu: nk’uko cyahozeho mbere na mbere’ nubu niko cyiri kd niko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Ayi kristo, uturinde abanzi bacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Rebana imbabazi imibabaro yacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Utugirire imbabazi, umenye agahinda dufite mu mutima.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Twebweabantu bawe, utugirire imbabazi kand utubabarire ibyaha byacu.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Ku bw’urukundo rwawe umva gusenga kwacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwana wa dawidi, utugirire imbabazi
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Ayi kristo, emera kutwumva none n’iteka ryose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ayi kristo, utwumvane imbabazi; nyagasani kristo, utwumvane imbabazi.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umusengesha: nyagasani, bigaragare ko imbabazi zawe zituriho.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abantu: kuko ari wowe twiringira
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Dusenge
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data wa twese, turakwinginga twitonze, urebane imbabazi intege nke zacu, kandi ibibi byose ibyari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bikwiriye kuduhama ubituzibukirize. Kugira ngo izina ryawe rihabwe icyubahiro; kandi iyo duterewe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ibyago hose, uduhe kwiringira imbabazi zawe tudashidikanya, tubone kuguhereza turi abera kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ababoneye mu ngeso zacu, ngo tuguheshe icyubahiro. Tubisabye ku bw’umurengezi wacu kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuhuza wacu, niwe yesu kristo umwami wacu.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho rya krisostomu wera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko uduhereye ubuntu uyu munsi kugusaba ibyo dushaka duhuje
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umutima; kandi wasezeranije yuko batatu cg babiri ni bateranira hamwe mu izina ryawe, uzabaha ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: basaba, none, nyagasani, turakwinginze uduhe ibyo tugusabye, uko ubona ko byatugirira umumaro; kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tukiri muri iyi si ujye utumenyesha ukuri kwawe, no mu gihe kizaza tuzahabwe ubugingo buhoraho. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusaba ubuntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubuntu  bw’umwami wacu  yesu  kristo,  n’urukundo  rw’imana,  n’ubumwe  bw’umwuka  wera.  Bigumane
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: natwe twese iteka ryose. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Aho niho litani igarukiye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amasengesho y’amasabato n’ay’iminsi yera n’ibice byo gusomwa iyo bagabura igaburo ryera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isabato ya mbere yo mu minsi yo kuza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose, uduhe ubuntu, kugira ngo twiyambure imirimo y’umwijima, twambare intwaro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: z’umucyo, none muri ubu bugingo bw’abagenda bapfa, ubwo umwana wawe yesu kristo yaziyemo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yicishije bugufi cyane, akatugenderera, kugirango ku munsi w’imperuka, ubwo azazana igitinyiro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cy’ubwami bwe guciraabazima n abapfuye urubanza, tuzazukane ubugingo budashira ku bw’ubushobozi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwa yesu kristo umwami wacu uhorana nawe ku ngoma hamwe n umwuka wera none  n’iteka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryose.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Iri sengesho rijye rivugwa iminsi yose yo kuza n’andi masengesho y’iyo minsi. Kugeza ku munsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubanziriza uwo kuvuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko   abaroma 13.8-14
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ntimukagire umwenda wose keretse gukundana, kuko ukunda undi aba ashohoje amategeko, kuko ibi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo "ntugasambane, ntukice, ntukibe, ntukifuze" n'ayandi mategeko yose, bihurira muri iri jambo ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "ukunde mugenzi wawe nk'uko wikunda."  ufite urukundo ntagirira mugenzi we nabi, ni cyo gituma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urukundo ari rwo rusohoza amategeko.nuko mujye mugenza mutyo, kuko muzi yuko igihe cyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukanguka gisohoye rwose. Dore agakiza kacu karatwegereye kuruta igihe twizereye.  Ijoro rirakuze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: burenda gucya. Nuko twiyambure imirimo y'umwijima, twambare intwaro z'umucyo. Tugendane ingeso
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nziza nk'abagenda mu mucyo, tutagira ibiganiro bibi, tudasinda, tudasambana, tudakora iby'isoni nke,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tudatongana kandi tutagira ishyari.  Ahubwo mwambare umwami yesu kristo, kandi ntimuhe urwaho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imibiri yanyu ngo ibone uko ikora ibyo yifuza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa bwiza     matayo 21.1-13
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Bageze bugufi bw'i yerusalemu, bajya i betifage ku musozi wa elayono, maze yesu atuma abigishwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babiri arababwira ati "mujye mu kirorero kiri imbere, uwo mwanya muri bubone indogobe izirikanye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'iyayo, muziziture muzinzanire.  Ariko nihagira umuntu ubabaza ijambo, mumubwire muti 'databuja ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we uzishaka', maze araherako azibahe."ibyo byabereyeho kugira ngo ibyavuzwe n'umuhanuzi bisohore
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo"mubwire umukobwa w'i siyoni muti'dore umwami wawe aje aho uri, ari uw'ineza ahetswe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'indogobe,n'icyana cy'indogobe.' "ba bigishwa baragenda bakora nk'uko yesu yabategetse, bazana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: indogobe n'iyayo baziteguraho imyenda yabo, ayicaraho. Haza rubanda rwinshi, abenshi muri bo basasa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imyenda yabo mu nzira, abandi baca amashami y'ibiti bayasasa mu nzira. Itara ry'abantu bamushagaye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bararangurura bati "hoziyana mwene dawidi, hahirwa uje mu izina ry'uwiteka! Hoziyana ahasumba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hose!" ageze i yerusalemu ab'umurwa bose barashika, barabaza bati "uriya ni nde?" barabasubiza bati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "ni umuhanuzi yesu w'i nazareti y'i galilaya." nuko yesu yinjira mu rusengero rw'imana, yirukanamo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abaruguriragamo bose, yubika ameza y'abavunjaga ifeza n'intebe z'abaguraga inuma,  arababwira ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "byanditswe ngo 'inzu yanjye izitwa inzu yo gusengerwamo', ariko mwebwe mwayihinduye isenga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y'abambuzi."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isabato ya kabiri yo mu minsi yo kuza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami uhimbazwa, turagushimira yuko wandikishirije ibyanditswe byera byose kutwigisha; nuko ujye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: udufasha, tubyumve, tubisome, tubyiteho, tubyige, tubigire ibyo kurya byo kudutunga mu mitima yacu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugirango kwihangana no guhumurizwa n’ijambo ryawe ryera biduheshe gufata no gukomeza rwose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iminsi yose ibyiringiro byiza byo kuzahabwa ubugingo budashira, ibyo waduhereye mu mukiza wacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yesu kristo. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko       abaroma 15.4-13
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ibyanditswe kera byose byandikiwe kutwigisha, kugira ngo kwihangana no guhumurizwa bitangwa na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byo biduheshe ibyiringiro. Nuko rero imana nyir'ukwihangana no guhumurizwa ibahe guhuza imitima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yanyu nk'uko kristo yesu ashaka, kugira ngo muhimbaze imana y'umwami wacu yesu kristo ari yo na se,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'umutima umwe n'akanwa kamwe. Nuko mwemerane nk'uko kristo na we yabemeye, kugira ngo imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ihimbazwe.  Ndavuga yuko kristo yabaye umukozi w'abakebwe wo kubagaburira iby'imana ku bw'ukuri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwayo, kugira ngo asohoze ibyo ba sogokuruza basezeranijwe,  kandi ngo abanyamahanga bahimbarize
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imana imbabazi zayo nk'uko byanditswe ngo"nzavuga ishimwe ryawe mu mahanga,kandi nzaririmbira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: izina ryawe." kandi ngo"banyamahanga mwese mwe, mwishimane n'ubwoko bwayo."kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo"banyamahanga mwese mwe, mushime uwiteka, kandi amoko yose amuhimbaze."yesaya na we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yarabisongeye ati"hazabaho igitsina cya yesayi, ni we uzahaguruka gutwara abanyamahanga,ni na we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abanyamahanga baziringira."imana nyir'ibyiringiro ibuzuze umunezero wose n'amahoro biheshwa no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwizera, kugira ngo murusheho kwiringira mubiheshejwe n'imbaraga z'umwuka wera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa bwiza        luka 21.25-33
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kandi hazaba ibimenyetso ku zuba no ku kwezi no ku nyenyeri, kandi no hasi amahanga azababara,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bumirwe bumvise inyanja n'umuraba bihorera.  Abantu bazagushwa igihumura n'ubwoba no kwibwira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyenda kuba mu isi, kuko imbaraga zo mu ijuru zizanyeganyega. Ubwo ni bwo bazabona umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w'umuntu aje mu gicu, afite imbaraga n'ubwiza bwinshi.  Nuko ibyo nibitangira kubaho muzararame,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwubure imitwe yanyu, kuko gucungurwa kwanyu kuzaba kwenda gusohora." kandi abacira umugani ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "nimwitegereze umutini n'ibindi biti byose.  Iyo bimaze gutoha, murabireba mukamenya ubwanyu ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: igihe cy'impeshyi kiri bugufi.  Nuko namwe nimubona ibyo bibaye, muzamenye yuko ubwami bw'imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: buri hafi.ndababwira ukuri yuko ab'ubu bwoko batazashira na hato, kugeza aho byose bizasohorera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ijuru n'isi bizashira, ariko amagambo yanjye ntazashira na hato.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isabato ya gatatu yo mu minsi yo kuza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami wacu yesu kristo, twibuka yuko, ubwo wazaga ubwa mbere, watumye integuza yawe, ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: igutunganirize inzira imbere. Abe ari ko na none abo wategetse kugabura ibihishwe byawe batunganisha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: inzira zawe guhindura imitima y’abatakumvira, bagire ubwenge bw’abakiranutsi, kugirango, nuza ubwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kabiri gucira abari mu isi urubanza, uzasange turi abantu bemewe nawe. Ni wowe uhorana na data wa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: twese ku ngoma hamwe n’umwuka wera, muri imana imwe iteka ryose. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nuko rero abantu bajye badutekereza yuko turi abakozi ba kristo, n'ibisonga byeguriwe ubwiru
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw'imana.kandi ibisonga bishakwaho ko biba abanyamurava. 3 ni cyo gituma kuri jye bitagira icyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bintwara rwose gucirwa urubanza namwe cyangwa n'abanyarukiko b'abantu, kuko ndetse nanjye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwanjye nticira urubanza  kuko ari nta cyo niyiziho. Nyamara si icyo kintsindishiriza, ahubwo umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ni we uncira urubanza. Ni cyo gituma mudakwiriye guca urubanza rw'ikintu cyose igihe cyarwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kitarasohora, kugeza ubwo umwami wacu azaza agatangaza ibyari byahishwe mu mwijima, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akagaragaza n'imigambi yo mu mitima. Ubwo ni bwo umuntu wese azahabwa n'imana ishimwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rimukwiriye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa bwiza              matayo 11.2-10
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ariko yohana yumviye mu nzu y’imbohe ibyo yesu akora, atuma abigishwa be ko bamubaza bati” mbese
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ni wowe wa wundi ukwiriye kuza cyangwa dutegereza undi?”Yesu arabasubiza ati” nimugende, mubwire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yohana ibyo mwumvise n’ibyo mubonye. Impumyi zirahumuka, ibirema biragenda, ababembe barakira,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibipfamatwi birumva, abapfuye barazurwa, n’abakene barabwirwa ubutumwa bwiza. Kandi hahirwa uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyanjye bitazagusha, abo bakigenda, yesu atangira kuvugana n’abantu ibya yohana, ati:”mwagiye mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: butayu kubera iki? Umuntu wambaye imyenda yoroheye? Erega abambara iyoroheye baba mu ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: z’abami. Ariko mwajyanywe ni iki? Kureba umuhanuzi? Ni koko; kandi ndababwira yuko uruta
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuhanuzi cyane. Uwo niwe wandikiwe ngo”dore ndenda gutuma integuza yanjye imbere yawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: izakubanziriza igutunganize inzira”.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isabato ya kane yo mu minsi yo kuza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami mana,ndakwinginze, uzane aho turi imbaraga zawe nyinshi, uzidutabaze; kandi ubwo ibyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ibicumuro byinshi bitwiziringaho bikatubuza cyane gusiganirwa aho dutegekwa, udukirishe vuba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubuntu bwawe bwinshi n’imbabazi zawe nyinshi. Tubisabye mu izina ry’ umwana wawe watwitangiye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuba inshungu yacu. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko                      abafilipi 4: 1-7
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nuko rero bene data, abo nkunda kandi nkumbura, ibyishimo byanjye n'ikamba ryanjye, muhagarare
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mushikamye mu mwami yesu, bakunzi banjye.ndahugura ewodiya, ndahugura na sintike ngo bahurize
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imitima mu mwami yesu. Kandi nawe, uwo dufatanije uwo murimo by'ukuri, ndakwinginze ujye ufasha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abo bagore kuko bakoranaga nanjye, bakamfasha kurwanira ubutumwa bwiza bo na kilementi n'abandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bafatanyaga nanjye, amazina yabo yanditswe mu gitabo cy'ubugingo. Mujye mwishimira mu mwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu iminsi yose. Yewe, nongeye kubivuga nti "mwishime!"ineza yanyu imenywe n'abantu bose,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwami wacu ari bugufi. Ntimukagire icyo mwiganyira, ahubwo ibyo mushaka byose bimenywe n'imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mubisabiye, mubyingingiye, mushima.  Nuko amahoro y'imana ahebuje rwose ayo umuntu yamenya,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azarindire imitima yanyu n'ibyo mwibwira muri kristo yesu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa bwiza              yohana 1.19-28
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ibi ni byo yohana yahamije, ubwo abayuda bamutumagaho abatambyi n'abalewi, bavanywe i
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yerusalemu no kumubaza bati "uri nde?" nuko ntiyabahisha ukuri, ahubwo araberurira ati "si jye kristo."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nuko baramubaza bati "tubwire, uri eliya?"na we ati "sindi we."bati "uri wa muhanuzi?"arabasubiza ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "oya." baramubaza bati "none se uri nde ngo dusubize abadutumye? Wowe wiyita nde?" ati "ndi ijwi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ry'urangururira mu butayu ngo 'nimugorore inzira y'uwiteka', nk'uko umuhanuzi yesaya yabivuze."abari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: batumwe bari abafarisayo. Nuko baramubaza bati "none ubatiriza iki, ko utari kristo, ntube na eliya,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntube na wa muhanuzi?" yohana arabasubiza ati "jye ndabatirisha amazi, ariko muri mwe hahagaze uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mutaramenya, uwo ni we unsimbura kandi ntibinkwiriye gupfundura udushumi tw'inkweto ze."ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byabereye i betaniya hakurya ya yorodani, aho yohana yabatirizaga.
