sections.title: Amasengesho y'Amasabato n'ay'Iminsi Yera
sections.description: Amasengesho y'Isabato n'ay'Iminsi Mikuru kumara umwaka wose w'Itorero.

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose turagushimira yuko waduhaye umwana wawe w’ikinege ngo abe umuntu nkatwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akabyarwa n’umwari utunganye, nk’uko twibuka uyu munsi. Nuko turakwinginze, ubwo twabyawe ubwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kabiri, tugahindurwa abana bawe n’uko watwemeranye imbabazi. Uduhe kujya duhindurwa bashya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iminsi yose n’umwuka wawe wera. Tubisabye mu izina ry’umwami wacu yesu kristo.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko       Abaheburayo 1:1-12
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kera imana yavuganiye na ba sogokuruza mu kanwa k'abahanuzi mu bihe byinshi no mu buryo bwinshi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: naho muri iyi minsi y'imperuka yavuganiye natwe mu kanwa k'umwana wayo, uwo yashyiriyeho kuba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuragwa wa byose ari we yaremesheje isi.uwo kuko ari ukurabagirana k'ubwiza bwayo n'ishusho ya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kamere yayo, kandi akaba ari we uramiza byose ijambo ry'imbaraga ze, amaze kweza no gukuraho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyaha byacu yicara iburyo bw'ikomeye cyane yo mu ijuru.amaze kurusha abamarayika icyubahiro,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk'uko n'izina yarazwe riruta ayabo. Mbese ni nde wo mu bamarayika imana yigeze kubwira it"uri
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: umwana wanjye, uyu munsi ndakubyaye"? Cyangwa ngo ivuge iti"nzaba se, na we azaba umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wanjye"? Kandi ubwo izongera kuzana impfura yayo mu isi, izavuga iti "abamarayika b'imana bose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bamuramye." iby'abamarayika yarabivuze iti"ihindura abamarayika bayo imiyaga, n'abagaragu bayo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibahindura ibirimi by'umuriro." ariko iby'umwana wayo byo yarabyeruye iti"intebe yawe mana, ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iy'iteka ryose, inkoni y'ubugabe bwawe ni inkoni yo gukiranuka. Kuko wakunze gukiranuka ukanga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubugome, ni cyo cyatumye imana, ari yo mana yawe, igusiga amavuta yo kwishima, ikakurutisha bagenzi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bawe." yongera kuvuga iby'umwana wayo iti"uwiteka, mbere na mbere, ni wowe washyizeho urufatiro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rw'isi, n'ijuru na ryo ni umurimo w'intoki zawe. Ibyo bizashiraho ariko wowe ho uzahoraho,ibyo byose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bizasaza nk'umwenda, kandi uzabizinga nk'umwitero,bihindurwe ukundi.ariko wowe ho uri uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wahoze,imyaka y'ubugingo bwawe ntizagira iherezo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza       Yohana 1.1-14
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Mbere na mbere hariho jambo; jambo uwo yahoranye n'imana kandi jambo yari imana.  Uwo yahoranye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'imana mbere na mbere. Ibintu byose ni we wabiremye, ndetse mu byaremwe byose nta na kimwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kitaremwe na we. Muri we harimo ubugingo, kandi ubwo bugingo bwari umucyo w'abantu. Uwo mucyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uvira mu mwijima, ariko umwijima ntiwawumenya. Hariho umuntu watumwe n'imana witwaga yohana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwo yazanywe no guhamya iby'umucyo, ngo atume bose bizera.  Icyakora uwo si we uwo mucyo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahubwo ni we wahamije ibyawo. Uwo mucyo ni we mucyo nyakuri, kandi ubwo ni bwo yatangiraga kuza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu isi ngo amurikire umuntu wese. Yari mu isi ndetse ni we wayiremye, nyamara ab'isi ntibamumenya.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yaje mu bye, ariko abe ntibamwemera.  Icyakora abamwemeye bose bakizera izina rye, yabahaye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubushobozi bwo kuba abana b'imana.  Abo ntibabyawe n'amaraso cyangwa n'ubushake bw'umubiri,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyangwa n'ubushake bw'umugabo, ahubwo babyawe n'imana. Jambo uwo yabaye umuntu abana natwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: (tubona ubwiza bwe busa n'ubw'umwana w'ikinege wa se), yuzuye ubuntu n'ukuri.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umunsi Twibukiraho Sitefano Wera (December 26)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani, turakwinginze kugirango, iyo duca mu karengane k’iyi si baduhora ukuri kwawe, udufashe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubura amaso dutumbire mu ijuru tubone ubwiza bwawe buzahishurwa; kandi ujye utwuzuza umwuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wawe wera, tubone gukunda abaturenganya no kubasabira umugisha, dukurikije umugaragu wawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: sitefano wishwe bamuguhora, ubwo yasabiraga abamwishe, akaba akwitwaraho, wowe uhora uri iburyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw’imana, utabara abarengenywa wa ku bwawe, kandi umurengezi wacu ushimwa utuburanira. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icyo Mu Cyimbo Cy’urwandiko         Ibyakozwe 7, 55-60
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko sitefano yuzuye umwuka wera arararama, atumbira mu ijuru abona ubwiza bw'imana na yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahagaze iburyo bw'imana,  aravuga ati "dore mbonye ijuru rikingutse, n'umwana w'umuntu ahagaze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iburyo bw'imana."barasakuza cyane biziba amatwi, bamugwirira icyarimwe, baramukurubana bamuvana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu murwa, bamwicisha amabuye. Abagabo bamushinje bashyira imyenda yabo ku birenge by'umusore
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: witwaga sawuli.  Bakimutera amabuye, arambaza aravuga ati "mwami yesu, akira umwuka wanjye."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arapfukama avuga ijwi rirenga ati "mwami, ntubabareho iki cyaha." amaze kuvuga atyo arasinzira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubutumwa bwiza                 matayo 23, 34-39
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko rero ku bw'ibyo, ngiye kubatumaho abahanuzi n'abanyabwenge n'abanditsi: bamwe muri bo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muzabica muzababamba, abandi muzabakubitira mu masinagogi yanyu, muzabirukana mu midugudu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yose bajyamo, muhereko mugibweho n'amaraso yose y'abakiranutsi yaviriye ku isi, uhereye ku maraso
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ya abeli umukiranutsi, ukageza ku maraso ya zakariya mwene berekiya, mwiciye hagati y'ahera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: h'urusengero n'igicaniro.  Ndababwira ukuri yuko ibyo byose bizasohora ku b'iki gihe.yerusalemu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yerusalemu, wica abahanuzi ugatera amabuye abagutumweho, ni kangahe nshaka kubundikira abana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bawe, nk'uko inkoko ibundikira imishwi yayo mu mababa yayo ntimunkundire?  Dore inzu yanyu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muyisigiwe ari umusaka.  Ndababwira yuko mutazambona uhereye none ukageza ubwo muzavuga muti
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 'hahirwa uje mu izina ry'uwiteka.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umunsi Twibukiraho Ibya Yohana. Uwanditse Ubutumwa (December 27)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami wacu w’imbabazi, turakwinginze umurikishirize itorero umucyo, uzatuma iryo torero, ubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: riyobowe n’imyigishirize y’ntumwa yawe yohana wanditse ubutumwa, rigenda rivirwa n’umucyo w’ukuri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwawe, ugez’ ubwo hanyuma rizaba rigeze mu mucyo utazazima w’ubugingo buhoraho. Tubisabye mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko     1 Yohana 1, 1-10
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uwahozeho uhereye mbere na mbere, uwo twumvise, uwo twiboneye n'amaso yacu, kandi uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: twitegereje intoki zacu zikamukoraho, ari we jambo ry'ubugingo  kandi ubwo bugingo bwarerekanywe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turabubona, turabuhamya kandi none turababwira iby'ubwo bugingo buhoraho, bwahoranye na data
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wa twese tukabwerekwa. Ibyo twabonye tukabyumva ni byo tubabwira kugira ngo namwe mufatanye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: natwe, kuko ubwacu dufatanije na data wa twese n'umwana we yesu kristo.  Ibyo ni byo tubandikiye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo umunezero wanyu ube mwinshi. Ubu ni bwo butumwa twumvise buvuye kuri we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tukabubabwira, yuko imana ari umucyo kandi ko muri yo hatari umwijima na muke.  Nituvuga yuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: dufatanije na yo tukagendera mu mwijima, tuba tubeshye tudakurikiza ukuri,  ariko rero iyo tugendeye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu mucyo nk'uko na yo iri mu mucyo, tuba dufatanije ubwacu kandi amaraso ya yesu umwana wayo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: atwezaho ibyaha byose.nituvuga yuko ari nta cyaha dufite tuba twishutse, ukuri kuba kutari muri twe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko nitwatura ibyaha byacu, ni yo yo kwizerwa kandi ikiranukira kutubabarira ibyaha byacu no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kutwezaho gukiranirwa kose.  Nituvuga yuko ari nta cyaha twakoze tuba tuyise umunyabinyoma, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'ijambo ryayo ntiriba riri muri twe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza     Yohana 21, 19-25
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icyatumye avuga atyo ni ukwerekana urupfu azubahisha imana. Amaze kuvuga atyo aramubwira ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "nkurikira."petero arakebuka, abona umwigishwa yesu yakundaga na we abakurikiye, ari we wari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wariseguye igituza cya yesu basangira nijoro akamubaza ati "databuja, ni nde ugiye kukugambanira?"
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: petero abonye uwo abaza yesu ati "mwami, uyu se azamera ate?"yesu aramusubiza ati "niba nshaka ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: agumaho kugeza aho nzazira, upfa iki? Nkurikira." ni cyo cyatumye iryo jambo ryamamara muri bene
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: data ngo uwo mwigishwa ntazapfa. Ariko yesu ntiyabwiye petero yuko uwo atazapfa, ahubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yaramubwiye ngo "niba nshaka ko agumaho kugeza aho nzazira, upfa iki?" uyu ni we wa mwigishwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uhamya ibyo, ni na we wabyanditse kandi tuzi yuko ibyo ahamya ari iby'ukuri. Ariko hariho n'ibindi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byinshi yesu yakoze, byakwandikwa byose ngira ngo ibitabo byakwandikwa ntibyakwirwa mu isi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isabato Ikurikira Umunsi Wo Kuvuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho Ni Rimwe N’iry’umunsi Wo Kuvuka (Paji Ya 41)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko    Abagalatiya 4, 1-7
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko ndavuga yuko umuragwa iyo akiri umwana atagira icyo atandukanaho n'imbata, nubwo yaba ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nyir'ibintu byose. Ahubwo ategekwa n'abamurera n'ibisonga, kugeza igihe cyategetswe na se. Natwe ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ko turi. Tukiri bato twari imbata, dutegekwa n'amategeko ya mbere yahoze mu isi. Maze igihe gikwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gisohoye imana yohereza umwana wayo wabyawe n'umugore, kandi wavutse atwarwa n'amategeko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo acungure abatwarwa na yo, biduheshe guhinduka abana b'imana.kandi kuko muri abana bayo, ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyo cyatumye imana yohereza umwuka w'umwana wayo mu mitima yacu avuga ati "aba, data."  ni cyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gituma utakiri imbata ahubwo uri umwana, kandi rero ubwo uri umwana, uri n'umuragwa ubihawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'imana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza    Matayo 1, 18-25
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuvuka kwa yesu kristo kwagenze gutya. Nyina mariya yari yarasabwe na yosefu, ariko yari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ataramurongora, babona afite inda y'umwuka wera. Umugabo we yosefu kuko yari umukiranutsi kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: adashaka kumukoza isoni ku mugaragaro, yigira inama yo kumubenga rwihishwa.  Akibitekereza,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: marayika w'umwami imana amubonekera mu nzozi ati "yosefu mwene dawidi, witinya kurongora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umugeni wawe mariya, kuko imbuto imurimo ari iy'umwuka wera.  Azabyara umuhungu uzamwite yesu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuko ari we uzakiza abantu be ibyaha byabo."nuko ibyo byose byabereyeho kugira ngo ibyo umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imana yavugiye mu kanwa k'umuhanuzi bisohore ngo "dore umwari azasama inda kandi azabyara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuhungu,azitwa imanweli",risobanurwa ngo "imana iri kumwe natwe". Yosefu akangutse abigenza uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: marayika w'umwami imana yamutegetse, arongora umugeni we. Ariko ntibaryamana arinda ageza igihe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yabyariye umuhungu, amwita yesu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umunsi Twibukiraho Gukebwa Kwa Kristo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: (Janvier 1)

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose, tuzi yuko wemeye ko umwana wawe ushimwa akebwa. None turagusaba,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugirango uduhe gukebwa nyakuri guheshwa n’umwuka; maze imitima yacu n’ingingo zacu zose, ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bimara gupfa ku irari ry’isi no kwifuza kose k’umubiri, tujye tukuyoboka muri byose udushakaho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tubisabye mu izina ry’umwana wawe yesu kristo umwami wacu. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko Abaroma 4:8-14
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Hahirwa umuntu uwiteka atazabaraho icyaha." mbese ayo mahirwe yasezeranijwe abakebwe bonyine,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyangwa n'abatakebwe na bo? Ko tuvuga tuti "kwizera kwa aburahamu kwamuhwanirijwe no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukiranuka"?  Kwamuhwanirijwe ryari? Ni ubwo yari yarakebwe, cyangwa ni ubwo yari atarakebwa? Si
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwo yari amaze gukebwa, ahubwo yari atarakebwa. Bukeye ahabwa ikimenyetso cyo gukebwa, kuba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ikimenyetso cyo gukiranuka kwavuye kuri kwa kwizera yari afite atarakebw, akugira ngo abe sekuruza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w'abizera bose, nubwo baba batakebwe ngo na bo babone kubarwaho gukiranuka, na we abone kuba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: sekuruza w'abakebwe. Nyamara si abakebwe gusa, ahubwo ni abagera ikirenge mu cya sogokuruza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aburahamu ku bw'uko kwizera yari afite atarakebwa, kuko amategeko atari yo yahesheje aburahamu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyangwa urubyaro rwe isezerano ry'uko azaragwa isi yose, ahubwo yariheshejwe no gukiranuka kuva ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwizera. Abiringira amategeko iyaba ari bo baragwa, kwizera kuba guhindutse ubusa n'iryo sezerano na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryo rikaba ripfuye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza   Luka 2.15-21
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abamarayika bamaze gusubira mu ijuru abungeri baravugana bati "nimuze tujye i betelehemu turebe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyabayeyo, ibyo umwami imana itumenyesheje." bagenda bihuta, basanga mariya na yosefu n'umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w'uruhinja aryamishijwe mu muvure w'inka. Babibonye babatekerereza iby'uwo mwana nk'uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babibwiwe. Ababumvise bose batangazwa n'ibyo abungeri bababwiye.  Ariko mariya abika ayo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: magambo yose mu mutima we, akajya ayatekereza.  Maze abungeri basubirayo bahimbaza, bashima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imana ku byo bumvise byose no ku byo babonye nk'uko babibwiwe. Nuko iminsi munani ishize
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arakebwa bamwita yesu, rya zina ryari ryaravuzwe na marayika, nyina atarasama inda ye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umunsi Wo Kwerekanwa K’umwami Wacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: (Janvier 6)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana, turagushimira yuko wayoboresheje ba banyabwenge inyenyeri, ukabereka umwana wawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’ikinege. Natwe waduhaye kumumenya, naho ubu tumumenyeshwa no kwizera gusa; ariko, mana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’imbabazi, turakwinginze, uzaduhe kumumenya rwose mu bugingo bwacu buzaza, aho tuzamubonera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: afite ubwiza bw’ubumana bwe. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko       Abefeso 3:1-12
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ni cyo gituma jyewe pawulo ndi imbohe ya kristo yesu, mbohewe mwebwe abanyamahanga. Kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: namwe mwumvise iby'ubutware bwo kugabura ubuntu bw'imana nahawe ku bwanyu, ko mpishurirwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwiru bwayo mu iyerekwa nk'uko nabanje kwandika mu magambo make. Namwe nimuyasoma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muzirebera ubwanyu uburyo menye ubwiru bwa kristo koko.  Ubwo ntibwamenyeshejwe abana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: b'abantu mu bindi bihe, nk'uko muri iki gihe intumwa ze zera n'abahanuzi babuhishuriwe n'umwuka,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yuko abanyamahanga ari abaraganwa natwe kandi bakaba ingingo z'umubiri umwe natwe, abaheshejwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'ubutumwa bwiza kuzagabana natwe muri kristo yesu ibyasezeranijwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nanjye nahindutse umubwiriza wabwo nk'uko impano iri y'ubuntu bw'imana, iyo naheshejwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'imbaraga zayo zinkoreramo.  Nubwo noroheje cyane hanyuma y'abera bose, naherewe ubwo buntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo mbwirize abanyamahanga ubutumwa bwiza bw'ubutunzi bwa kristo butarondoreka, njijure
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bose ngo bamenye uburyo iby'ubwiru bikwiriye kugenda, ari bwo bwahishwe n'imana yaremye byose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uhereye kera kose,  kugira ngo muri iki gihe abatware n'abafite ubushobozi bwo mu ijuru mu buryo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw'umwuka, bamenyeshwe n'itorero ubwenge bw'imana bw'uburyo bwinshi  nk'uko yabigambiriye kera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kose muri kristo yesu umwami wacu.  Muri we ni mo duherwa ubushizi bw'amanga ngo twegere imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: dushize ubwoba, tubiheshejwe n'uko tumwizeye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza    Matayo 2.1-12
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Yesu amaze kuvukira i betelehemu mu gihugu cy'i yudaya ku ngoma y'umwami herode, haza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abanyabwenge baturutse iburasirazuba bajya i yerusalemu, barabaza bati "umwami w'abayuda wavutse
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ari hehe? Ko twabonye inyenyeri ye turi iburasirazuba, none tukaba tuje kumuramya." umwami herode
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abyumvise ahagarikana umutima n'ab'i yerusalemu bose, ateranya abatambyi bakuru n'abanditsi bose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: b'ubwo bwoko, ababaza aho kristo azavukira aho ari ho.bati "ni i betelehemu mu gihugu cy'i yudaya. Ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ko byanditswe n'umuhanuzi ngo nawe betelehemu ho mu gihugu cya yuda ni ukuri nturi mutoya mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: midugudu ikomeye ya yuda, kuko muri wowe ari ho hazaturuka umutware,uzaragira ubwoko bwanjye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw'abisirayeli.' "
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko herode ahamagara abanyabwenge rwihishwa, abasobanuza neza igihe baboneye ya nyenyeri,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abatuma i betelehemu ati "nimugende musobanuze neza iby'uwo mwana. Nimumubona muze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mubimbwire, nanjye njye kumuramya."bamaze kumva umwami baragenda, kandi ya nyenyeri babonye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakiri iburasirazuba ibajya imbere, irinda igera aho uwo mwana ari ihagarara aho. Babonye iyo nyenyeri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: baranezerwa cyane. Bageze mu nzu basangamo umwana hamwe na nyina mariya, barapfukama
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: baramuramya. Maze bahambura imitwaro yabo, bamutura amaturo y'izahabu n'icyome n'ishangi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baburizwa n'imana mu nzozi gusubira kwa herode, banyura iyindi nzira basubira iwabo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isabato Ya 1.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ikurikira Umunsi Wo Kwerekanwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami imana, turakwinginze ku bw’imbabazi zawe kumva gusenga kw’abantu bawe bakwambaza;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubahe kumenya ibyo bakwiriye gukora, kandi n’imbaraga n’ubuntu byo kubashoboza kubikoresha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umurava. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko    Abaroma 12.1-5
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nuko bene data, ndabinginga ku bw'imbabazi z'imana ngo mutange imibiri yanyu, ibe ibitambo bizima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byera bishimwa n'imana, ari ko kuyikorera kwanyu gukwiriye. Kandi ntimwishushanye n'ab'iki gihe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahubwo muhinduke rwose mugize imitima mishya, kugira ngo mumenye neza ibyo imana ishaka, ari byo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byiza bishimwa kandi bitunganye rwose.ndababwira umuntu wese muri mwe, mbwirijwe n'ubuntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nahawe, mwe kwifata uko mutari, ahubwo mutekereze mwitonze nk'uko imana yagereye umuntu wese
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwizera.  Nk'uko mu mubiri umwe dufite ingingo nyinshi, kandi ingingo zose zikaba zidafite umurimo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwe, natwe ni ko turi kuko turi benshi, nyamara turi umubiri umwe muri kristo, umuntu wese ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urugingo rwa mugenzi we.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza    Luka 2:41-52
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Uko umwaka utashye, ababyeyi be bajyaga i yerusalemu mu minsi mikuru ya pasika. Nuko amaze imyaka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cumi n'ibiri avutse, barazamuka nk'uko umugenzo w'iyo minsi mikuru wari uri. Bamaze iyo minsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: basubirayo, uwo mwana yesu asigara i yerusalemu ababyeyi be batabizi. Icyakora bibwiraga yuko ari mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: itara ry'abantu bajyanye na bo, nuko bagenda urugendo rw'umunsi umwe maze bamushakira muri bene
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wabo no mu ncuti zabo,  bamubuze basubira i yerusalemu bamushaka.  Hashize iminsi itatu bamubona
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu rusengero yicaye hagati y'abigisha, abateze amatwi kandi ababaza.  Abamwumvise bose batangazwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'ubwenge bwe n'ibyo abasubiza. Bamubonye baratangara nyina aramubaza ati "mwana wanjye, ni iki
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyatumye utugenza utya? Dore jye na so twagushatse dufite umutima uhagaze."arabasubiza ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "mwanshakiraga iki? Ntimuzi yuko binkwiriye kuba mu rugo rwa data?" ntibasobanukirwa n'iryo jambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ababwiye. Amanukana na bo ajya i nazareti, agahora abumvira. Ibyo byose nyina abibika mu mutima we.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yesu akomeza kugwiza ubwenge, abyiruka ashimwa n'imana n'abantu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isabato Ya 2
verses.speaker: all

verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose idashira, ni wowe utegeka ibyo mu ijuru no mu isi byose; turagusaba ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw’imbabazi zawe, kugirango wumve ibyo abantu bawe tukwingingira; kandi uduhe amahoro yawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iminsi yose tukiriho. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu. Amina

verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nuko kuko dufite impano zitandukanye nk'uko ubuntu twahawe buri, niba twarahawe ubuhanuzi

verses.text: duhanure uko kwizera kwacu kungana,  cyangwa niba twarahawe umurimo wo kugabura iby'imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tugire umwete wo kubigabura, cyangwa uwigisha agire umwete wo kwigisha,cyangwa uhugura agire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwete wo guhugura. Ugira ubuntu abugire atikanyiza, utwara atwarane umwete, ugira imbabazi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azigire anezerewe.urukundo rwanyu rwe kugira uburyarya. Mwange ibibi urunuka muhorane n'ibyiza.ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byo gukunda bene data mukundane rwose, ku by'icyubahiro umuntu wese ashyire imbere mugenzi we,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ku by'umwete ntimube ibyangwe, muhirimbane mu mitima mukorere umwami wacu.  Mwishime mufite
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyiringiro mwihanganira amakuba, mukomeze gusenga mushikamye, mugabanye abera uko bakennye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mushishikarire gucumbikira abashyitsi.ababarenganya mubasabire umugisha, mubasabire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntimubavume. Mwishimane n'abishima, murirane n'abarira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ku munsi wa gatatu hacyujijwe ubukwe i kana y'i galilaya, kandi na nyina wa yesu yari ahari. Yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bamutorana n'abigishwa be ngo batahe ubwo bukwe. Nuko vino ishize, nyina wa yesu aramubwira ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "nta vino bafite."yesu aramubwira ati "mubyeyi, tubigendanyemo dute? Igihe cyanjye ntikiragera." nyina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abwira abahereza ati "icyo ababwira cyose mugikore."hariho intango esheshatu zaremwe mu mabuye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: zashyiriweho kwiyeza nk'uko umugenzo w'abayuda wari uri, intango yose irimo incuro ebyiri cyangwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: eshatu z'amazi. Yesu arababwira ati "mwuzuze intango amazi." barazuzuza bageza ku ngara. Arababwira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ati "nimudahe noneho mushyire umusangwa mukuru." barayamushyira. Uwo musangwa mukuru
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: asogongeye amazi ahindutse vino ntiyamenya aho iturutse, keretse ba bahereza badashye amazi ni bo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bari babizi. Umusangwa mukuru ahamagara umukwe  aramubwira ati "abandi bose babanza vino nziza,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abantu bamara guhaga bakabona kuzana izitaryoshye, ariko wowe ho washyinguye inziza aba ari zo
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: uherutsa.” Icyo ni cyo kimenyetso cya mbere yesu yakoreye i kana y'i galilaya, yerekana icyubahiro cye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abigishwa be baramwizera.

verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose idashira, turagusaba ku bw’imbabazi zawe, kugira ngo urebe intege nke zacu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi uko tuzaba mu kaga kose, cg mu bukene bwose, ujye uramburira akaboko kwawe kw’iburyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kudutabara no kudufasha. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu.amina

verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Muhuze imitima, ntimukararikire ibikomeye ahubwo mwemere kubana n'ibyoroheje. Ntimukiyite
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abanyabwenge.ntimukiture umuntu inabi yabagiriye. Mwirinde kugira ngo ibyo mukora bibonekere
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abantu bose ko ari byiza. Niba bishoboka, mu rwanyu ruhande mubane amahoro n'abantu bose.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Bakundwa, ntimwihoranire ahubwo mureke imana ihoreshe uburakari bwayo, kuko byanditswe ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "guhora ni ukwanjye, ni jye uzitura, ni ko uwiteka avuga." ahubwo umwanzi wawe nasonza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umugaburire, nagira inyota umuhe icyo anywa, kuko nugira utyo uzaba umurunzeho amakara yaka ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mutwe.ikibi cye kukunesha, ahubwo unesheshe ikibi icyiza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Amanutse kuri uwo musozi, abantu benshi baramukurikira. Maze haza umubembe aramwegera,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aramupfukamira aramubwira ati "mwami, washaka wabasha kunkiza."arambura ukuboko amukoraho ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "ndabishaka kira."  uwo mwanya ibibembe bye birakira. Yesu aramubwira ati "wirinde ntugire uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwira, ahubwo genda wiyereke umutambyi, uture n'ituro mose yategetse ribabere ikimenyetso cyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubahamiriza." ageze i kaperinawumu, haza umutware utwara umutwe w'abasirikare aramwinginga ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "mwami, umugaragu wanjye aryamye mu nzu yararemaye, arababaye cyane."aramubwira ati "ndaza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mukize."umutware w'abasirikare aramusubiza ati "mwami, ntibinkwiriye yuko winjira mu nzu yanjye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahubwo tegeka gusa, umugaragu wanjye arakira.  Kuko nanjye ndi umuntu utwarwa n'abandi, mfite
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abasirikare ntwara. Iyo mbwiye umwe nti 'genda' aragenda, nabwira undi nti 'ngwino' akaza, nabwira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umugaragu wanjye nti 'kora iki' akagikora." yesu abyumvise aratangara, abwira abamukurikiye ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "ndababwira ukuri yuko ntabwo nari nabona kwizera kungana gutya, habe no mu bisirayeli. Ndababwira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yuko benshi bazaturuka iburasirazuba n'iburengerazuba, bakicarana na aburahamu na isaka na yakobo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu bwami bwo mu ijuru, ariko abana bo muri burya bwami bazirukanirwa mu mwijima hanze, ari ho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazaririra bakahahekenyera amenyo." yesu abwira uwo mutware ati "nuko genda bikubere nk'uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wizeye."umugaragu we akira uwo mwanya.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isabato Ya 4
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ikurikira Umunsi Wo Kwerekanwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana, uzi yuko turi mu kaga kenshi gakomeye k’ibishaka kutugusha, bidutera kugira intege nke za
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kamere yacu, zituma tutabasha gukomeza iteka guhagarara dushikamye. Nuko rero turakwinginze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: udukomereshe imbaraga zawe, zidutabare, kugira ngo zitumire, ukotugeze mu kaga kose, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ziducishe mu moshya yose. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko               Abaroma 13.1-7
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umuntu wese agandukire abatware bamutwara, kuko ari nta butware butava ku mana, n'abatware
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bariho bashyizweho n'imana. Ni cyo gituma ugandira umutware aba yanze itegeko ry'imana, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abaryanga bazatsindwa n'urubanza. Abatware si abo gutinywa n'abakora ibyiza, keretse abakora nabi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mbese ushaka kudatinya umutware? Kora neza na we azagushima, kuko ari umukozi w'imana uguhesha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyiza. Ariko nukora nabi utinye, kuko adatwarira inkota ubusa. Ni umukozi w'imana, uhoresha umujinya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukora nabi. Ni cyo gituma ukwiriye kuganduka utabiterwa no gutinya umujinya gusa, ahubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubyemejwe n'umutima uhana.ni cyo gituma musora, kuko abatware ari abagaragu b'imana bitangiye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukora uwo murimo.  Mwishyure bose ibibakwiriye: abasoresha mubasorere, abahinisha mubahinire,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abo gutinywa mubatinye n'abo kubahwa mububahe.

verses.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza        Matayo 8.23-34
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Yikira mu bwato, abigishwa be bajyana na we. Umuyaga uba mwinshi mu nyanja, ubwato bwabo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: burengerwa n'umuraba wisuka muri bwo, ariko we yari asinziriye. Baraza baramukangura bati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "databuja, dukize turapfuye."arababaza ati "ni iki kibateye ubwoba, mwa bafite kwizera guke mwe?"
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: maze arabyuka acyaha umuyaga n'inyanja, biratuza rwose. Abantu baratangara bati "uyu ni muntu ki?
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umuyaga n'inyanja na byo biramwumvira! Amaze gufata hakurya mu gihugu cy'abagadareni, ahura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'abantu babiri batewe n'abadayimoni bava mu mva, bari abasazi cyane bituma ari nta watinyuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kunyura muri iyo nzira.  Barataka cyane bati "duhuriye he, mwana w'imana? Mbese uje hano kutwica
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urupfu n'agashinyaguro, igihe cyacu kitaragera?"hirya yabo hari umugana w'ingurube nyinshi zirisha.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abadayimoni bazibonye baramwinginga bati "nutwirukana utwohereze muri uriya mugana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w'ingurube."arabasubiza ati "nimugende." babavamo baragenda, bajya muri izo ngurube. Umugana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wose wirukira ku gacuri, zisuka mu nyanja zipfira mu mazi. Abungeri bazo barahunga, binjiye mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mudugudu bavuga ibyo babonye byose, n'iby'abari batewe n'abadayimoni. Abo muri uwo mudugudu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bose bajya gusanganira yesu, bamubonye baramwinginga ngo ave mu gihugu cyabo.

verses.text: Ikurikira Umunsi Wo Kwerekanwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani, turakwinginze, urinde ab’umuryango w’itorero ryawe, ubahe gukomeza iteka kwizera ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: waduhishuriye, batabivanga n’ibizira, kugirango twebwe abishingikirije ku byiringiro by’ubuntu bwawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byonyine, turindwe n’imbaraga zawe nyinshi iteka. Tubisabye mu izina ry umwami wacu yesu kristo.

verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko                Abakolosayi 3.12-17
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nuko nk'uko bikwiriye intore z'imana zera kandi zikundwa, mwambare umutima w'imbabazi n'ineza, no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwicisha bugufi n'ubugwaneza no kwihangana, mwihanganirana kandi mubabarirana ibyaha, uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuntu agize icyo apfa n'undi. Nk'uko umwami wacu yabababariye, abe ari ko namwe mubabarirana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko ibigeretse kuri ibyo byose mwambare urukundo, kuko ari rwo murunga wo gutungana rwose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mureke amahoro ya kristo atwarire mu mitima yanyu, ayo mwahamagariwe kuba umubiri umwe, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mugire imitima ishima. Ijambo rya kristo ribe muri mwe rigwiriye rifite ubwenge bwose, mwigishanye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muhugurane muri zaburi n'indirimbo n'ibihimbano by'umwuka, muririmbirirana imana ishimwe mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mitima yanyu. Kandi icyo muzavuga cyose n'ibyo muzakora, mujye mubikora byose mu izina ry'umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yesu, mushima imana data wa twese ku bw'uwo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza                 Matayo 13.24-30
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nuko abacira undi mugani aravuga ati "ubwami bwo mu ijuru bugereranywa n'umuntu wabibye imbuto
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nziza mu murima we, nuko abantu basinziriye, umwanzi araza abiba urukungu mu masaka, aragenda.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko amaze kumera no kwera, urukungu na rwo ruraboneka.  Abagaragu be baraza babaza umutware
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bati 'mutware, ntiwabibye imbuto nziza mu murima wawe? None urukungu rurimo rwavuye he?' ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 'umwanzi ni we wagize atyo.' abagaragu be baramubaza bati 'noneho urashaka ko tugenda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tukarurandura? Na we ati 'oya, ahari nimurandura urukungu murarurandurana n'amasaka, mureke
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bikurane byombi bigeze igihe cyo gusarurwa. Mu isarura nzabwira abasaruzi nti: mubanze muteranye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urukungu muruhambire imitwaro rutwikwe, maze amasaka muyahunike mu kigega cyanjye.' "
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isabato Ya   6

verses.text: Ikurikira Umunsi Wo Kwerekanwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana, turagushimira yuko umwana wawe ushimwa yerekaniwe kumaraho imirimo ya satani,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akaduhindura abana bawe n’abaragwa b’ ubugingo budashira; nuko rero, ubwo dufite ibyo byiringiro,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uduhe gukiranuka, nk’uko umwana wawe akiranuka, kugirango ubwo azazana imbaraga n’icyubahiro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyinshi, tuzinjire mu bwami bwe bwiza budashira dusa nawe. Tubisabye mu izina ry umwami wacu yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kristo. Amina,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko    1yohana 3.1-8
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nimurebe urukundo ruhebuje data wa twese yadukunze, rwatumye twitwa abana b'imana kandi ni ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turi. Ni cyo gituma ab'isi batatumenye kuko batayimenye.  Bakundwa, ubu turi abana b'imana ariko uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tuzamera ntikurerekanwa. Icyakora icyo tuzi ni uko yesu niyerekanwa, tuzasa na we kuko tuzamureba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uko ari. Kandi ufite ibyo byiringiro muri we, yiboneza nk'uko uwo aboneye. Umuntu wese ukora icyaha,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aba agomye, kandi icyaha ni bwo bugome.muzi yuko uwo yerekaniwe gukuraho ibyaha kandi nta cyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kimurimo. Umuntu wese uguma muri we ntakora ibyaha, umuntu wese ukora ibyaha ntiyamubonye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi ntiyamumenye. Bana bato, ntihakagire ubayobya. Ukiranuka ni we mukiranutsi nk'uko uwo ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umukiranutsi. Ukora ibyaha ni uwa satani, kuko uhereye mbere na mbere satani akora ibyaha. Ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwana w'imana yerekaniwe ni ibi: ni ukugira ngo amareho imirimo ya satani.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza               Matayo 24.23-31
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abiyita kristo n'abahanuzi b'ibinyoma bazaduka bakora ibimenyetso bikomeye n'ibitangaza, kugira ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babone uko bayobya n'intore niba bishoboka. Dore mbibabwiye bitaraba."nuko nibababwira bati 'dore
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ari mu butayu', ntimuzajyeyo, cyangwa bati 'dore ari mu kirambi', ntimuzabyemere.  Kuko nk'uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umurabyo urabiriza iburasirazuba ukabonekera aho rirengera, ni ko no kuza k'umwana w'umuntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuzaba. "aho intumbi iri hose, ni ho inkongoro ziteranira. "ariko hanyuma y'umubabaro wo muri iyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: minsi, uwo mwanya 'izuba rizijima, n'ukwezi ntikuzava umwezi wako, n'inyenyeri zizagwa ziva mu ijuru,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'imbaraga zo mu ijuru zizanyeganyega.'  ubwo ni bwo ikimenyetso cy'umwana w'umuntu kizabonekera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu ijuru, n'amoko yose yo mu isi ni bwo azaboroga abonye umwana w'umuntu aje ku bicu byo mu ijuru,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: afite ubushobozi n'ubwiza bwinshi. Azatumisha abamarayika be ijwi rirenga ry'impanda, bateranye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: intore ze mu birere bine, uhereye impera y'ijuru ukageza iyindi mpera yaryo.

verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami mana, turakwinginze, wumvane imbabazi gusenga kw’abantu bawe, kandi nubwo ibihano
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: duhanwa bitaruta ibikwiriye ibicumuro byacu, ubidukize, kubwo kugira neza kwawe n’imbabazi zawe

verses.text: kugirango izina ryawe rihimbazwe tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu amina

verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ntimuzi yuko mu birori abasiganwa biruka bose, ariko ugororerwa akaba umwe? Namwe abe ari ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwiruka kugira ngo mugororerwe.  Umuntu wese urushanwa yirinda muri byose. Abandi bagenzereza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: batyo kugira ngo bahabwe ikamba ryangirika, naho twebwe tugenzereza dutyo kugira ngo duhabwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iritangirika. Nuko nanjye ndiruka ariko si nk'utazi aho ajya, nkubitana ibipfunsi ariko si nk'uhusha.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ahubwo mbabaza umubiri wanjye nywukoza uburetwa, ngo ahari ubwo maze kubwiriza abandi nanjye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwanjye ntaboneka ko ntemewe.

verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ubwami bwo mu ijuru bwagereranywa n'umuntu ufite urugo, yazindutse kare gushaka abahinzi ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bahingire uruzabibu rwe.  Asezerana n'abahinzi idenariyo ku munsi umwe, abohereza mu ruzabibu rwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isaha eshatu arasohoka, asanga abandi bahagaze mu iguriro nta cyo bakora, na bo arababwira ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 'namwe mujye mu ruzabibu rwanjye ndi bubahe ibikwiriye.' baragenda. Yongera gusohoka mu isaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: esheshatu n'isaha cyenda, abigenza atyo.  Isaha zibaye cumi n'imwe arasohoka, asanga abandi bahagaze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arababaza ati 'ni iki kibahagaritse hano umunsi wose nta cyo mukora?' baramusubiza bati 'kuko ari nta
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: waduhaye umurimo.' arababwira ati 'namwe mujye mu ruzabibu rwanjye.' "bugorobye nyir'uruzabibu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abwira igisonga cye ati 'hamagara abahinzi ubahe ibihembo byabo, utangirire ku ba nyuma ugeze ku ba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mbere.'  abatangiye mu isaha cumi n'imwe baje, umuntu wese ahabwa idenariyo imwe.  Ababanje baje
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bibwira ko bahembwa ibirutaho, ariko umuntu wese ahembwa idenariyo imwe.  Bazihawe bitotombera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nyir'uruzabibu bati 'aba ba nyuma bakoze isaha imwe, ubanganyije natwe abahingitse umunsi wose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tuvunika, twicwa n'izuba!'"na we asubiza umwe muri bo ati 'mugenzi wanjye, sinkugiriye nabi. Ntuzi ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: twasezeranye idenariyo imwe?  Ngiyo yijyane ugende. Ko nshatse guhemba uwa nyuma nkawe, mbese
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hari icyambuza kugenza ibyanjye uko nshaka, ko undeba igitsure, kuko ngize ubuntu!' "uko ni ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ab'inyuma bazaba ab'imbere, kandi ab'imbere bazaba ab'inyuma."

verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami mana uzi yuko imirimo dukora ubwacu atariyo twiringira nahato nuko re nuko rero ujye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uturindisha amaboko yawe kugira ngo hatagira ibyago cyangwa amakuba.tubisabye mu izina ry umwami

verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: mwishimira kwihanganira abapfu kuko ubwanyu muri abanyabwenge.  Murihangana iyo umuntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abahinduye imbata, iyo aabamize, iyo abafashe, iyo yishyize hejuru akabakubita inshyi. Ibyerekeye ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bigawa, ni koko twabigizemo intege nke.nyamara icyo undi wese ahangara gukora (ibi mbivuze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk'umupfu) nanjye nagihangara.  Mbese abo si abaheburayo? Nanjye ni uko. Si abisirayeli? Nanjye ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uko. Si urubyaro rwa aburahamu? Nanjye ni uko.  Si abakozi ba kristo bagabura ibye? (noneho ndavuga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk'umusazi), ndabarusha. Mbarusha mu mihati, mbarusha gushyirwa mu mazu y'imbohe, mbarusha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyane gukubitwa birenze urugero: kenshi nari mu kaga k'urupfu.  Ibihe bitanu abayuda bankubise inkoni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mirongo itatu n'icyenda.  Ibihe bitatu nakubiswe inga, igihe kimwe natewe amabuye, ibihe bitatu inkuge
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: zaramenetse, naraye imuhengeri nirirwamo, nari mu ngendo kenshi, mu kaga gatewe n'inzuzi, mu kaga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gatewe n'abambuzi, mu kaga gatewe na bene wacu, mu kaga gatewe n'abapagani, mu kaga ko mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: midugudu, mu kaga ko mu butayu, mu kaga ko mu nyanja, mu kaga ko muri bene data b'ibinyoma, mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: miruho n'imihati. Mba maso kenshi, ngira inzara n'inyota, nirirwa ubusa kenshi, nicwa n'imbeho,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nambara ubusa.  Ariko ne kuvuga ibindi, keretse ko hariho ikindemerera iminsi yose: ni uguhagarikira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umutima amatorero yose. Ni nde udakomeye ngo nanjye mbe udakomeye?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ninde ugushwa ngo nanjye ndeke kugurumana niba binkwiriye kwirata, nzajya nirata iby'intege nke
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: zanjye.  Imana y'umwami yesu ari yo na se ishimwe iteka ryose, izi ko ntabeshya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza Luka 8.4-15
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: nuko abantu benshi bamusanga bavuye mu midugudu yose, bamaze guterana abacira umugani
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ati"umubibyi yasohoye imbuto, akibiba zimwe zigwa mu nzira barazikandagira, inyoni zo mu kirere
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: zirazitoragura.  Izindi zigwa ku kara, zimaze kumera ziruma kuko zihabuze amazi.  Izindi zigwa mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mahwa, amahwa amerana na zo araziniga. Izindi zigwa mu butaka bwiza ziramera, zera imbuto imwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ijana, indi ijana, bityo bityo."amaze kuvuga ibyo avuga ijwi rirenga ati "ufite amatwi yumva
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: niyumve."nuko abigishwa be bamusobanuza uwo mugani.  Arababwira ati "mwebweho mwahawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kumenya ubwiru bw'ubwami bw'imana, ariko abandi bo babibwirirwa mu migani, kugira ngo kureba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babirebe ariko be kubibona, no kumva babyumve ariko be kubisobanukirwa."dore iby'uwo mugani ni ibi:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbuto ni ijambo ry'imana.  Izo mu nzira, abo ni bo bumva ijambo hanyuma umwanzi akaza agakura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ijambo mu mitima yabo, kugira ngo batizera ngo bakizwe.  Izaguye ku kara, abo ni bo bumva ijambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakaryemera banezerewe, ariko ntibagire imizi. Bizera umwanya muto, maze ibibagerageza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byabageraho bagasubira inyuma.  Izaguye mu mahwa ni bo bumva ijambo, maze bakigenda amaganya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'ubutunzi n'ibinezeza byo muri ubu bugingo bikabaniga, ntibere imbuto nziza.  Izo mu butaka bwiza,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abo ni bo bumva ijambo bakarifata neza mu mitima inyuzwe myiza, bakera imbuto ku bwo kwihangana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isaboto Yitwa Kwitwa Kwinwagesima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami mana. Ubwo watunyesheje yuko ibyo dukokara byose bitagigira umumaro namuke, niba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bidafatanyije n urukundo, turagusaba cyane. Nuko turakwinginze.utume umwka wawe wera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amusukishe mu mitima yacu impano kandi ari rwo rudukesha abantu ingeso nziza zose.erega utarufite
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aguhwaniye n’upfuye ahagaze.uduhe ibyo ku bw’umwana wawe w’ikinegeyesu kristo’ amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko  1 Abakorinto 13.1-13
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nubwo navuga indimi z'abantu n'iz'abamarayika, ariko singire urukundo, mba mpindutse nk'umuringa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uvuga cyangwa icyuma kirenga.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi nubwo nagira impano yo guhanura, nkamenya ibihishwe byose n'ubwenge bwose, kandi nubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nagira kwizera kose nkabasha gukuraho imisozi, ariko singire urukundo nta cyo mba ndi cyo. Kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nubwo natanga ibyanjye byose ngo ngaburire abakene, ndetse nkitanga ubwanjye ngo ntwikwe ariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: singire urukundo, nta cyo byamarira. Urukundo rurihangana rukagira neza, urukundo ntirugira ishyari,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urukundo ntirwirarira, ntirwihimbaza, ntirukora ibiteye isoni, ntirushaka ibyarwo, ntiruhutiraho,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntirutekereza ikibi ku bantu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntirwishimira gukiranirwa kw'abandi ahubwo rwishimira ukuri, rubabarira byose, rwizera byose,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rwiringira byose, rwihanganira byose. Urukundo ntabwo ruzashira. Guhanura kuzarangizwa no kuvuga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: izindi ndimi kuzagira iherezo, ubwenge na bwo buzakurwaho kuko tumenyaho igice kandi duhanuraho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: igice, ariko ubwo igishyitse rwose kizasohora, bya bindi bidashyitse bizakurwaho. Nkiri umwana muto
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: navugaga nk'umwana muto, ngatekereza nk'umwana muto nkibwira nk'umwana muto. Ariko maze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukura mva mu by'ubwana.  Icyakora none turebera mu ndorerwamo ibirorirori, ariko icyo gihe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tuzarebana duhanganye mu maso. None menyaho igice, ariko icyo gihe nzamenya rwose nk'uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: namenywe rwose.ariko none hagumyeho kwizera n'ibyiringiro n'urukundo, ibyo uko ari bitatu, ariko

verses.text: ikiruta ibindi ni urukundo.

verses.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza Luka 18.31-43
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Yesu yihererana n'abo cumi na babiri arababwira ati "dore turazamuka tujye i yerusalemu, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi byose bizasohora ku mwana w'umuntu.  Azagambanirwa mu bapagani,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azashinyagurirwa, bazamukoza isoni bamucire amacandwe, kandi nibamara kumukubita imikoba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazamwica, maze ku munsi wa gatatu azazuka."ariko ntibagira icyo bamenya muri ibyo, kuko ayo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: magambo bari bayahishwe, ntibamenya ibyo babwiwe. Nuko yenda kugera i yeriko, impumyi yari yicaye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iruhande rw'inzira isabiriza, yumvise abantu benshi bahita ibaza ibyo ari byo. Barayibwira bati "ni yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w'i nazareti uhita." irataka cyane iti "yesu mwene dawidi, mbabarira."abagiye imbere barayicyaha ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iceceke, ariko irushaho gutaka iti "mwene dawidi, mbabarira." yesu arahagarara, ategeka ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bayimuzanira. Igeze bugufi arayibaza ati "urashaka ko nkugirira nte?"iti "databuja, ndashaka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: guhumuka." yesu arayibwira ati "humuka, kwizera kwawe kuragukijije."ako kanya arahumuka,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amukurikira ahimbaza imana. Abantu bose babibonye bashima imana.

verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose idashira turagushimira yuko ari ntacyo waremye cyose wanga, kandi ubabarira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyaha by’abihana bose nuko turakwinginze uturememo imitima mishya yihana tugire gahinda k’ibyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byacu nk’uko dukwiriye kandi twemere ko turi indembe rwose kugirango tubabarirwe rwose ibyaha

verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Uwiteka aravuga ati "ariko n'ubu nimungarukire n'imitima yanyu yose mwiyirize ubusa, murire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muboroge." imitima yanyu abe ari yo mutanyura mureke imyenda yanyu, muhindukirire uwiteka imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yanyu kuko igira impuhwe. Yuzuwe n'imbabazi, ntiyihutira kurakara ahubwo ihorana ibambe ryinshi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi yitangira kuzana ikibi. Ni nde uzi ko itazahindukira ikigarura ngo ibasigire umugisha, mubone uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mutura uwiteka imana yanyu amaturo y'ifu n'ay'ibinyobwa? Muvugirize impanda i siyoni, mutegeke
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwiyiriza ubusa, mugire iteraniro ryera, muteranye abantu mweze iteraniro, muteranye abakuru n'abana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'abakiri ku ibere, umukwe nasohoke mu nzu ye, n'umugeni mu nzu yarongorewemo. Abatambyi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakorera uwiteka nibaririre hagati y'umuryango w'urusengero n'igicaniro, maze bavuge bati "uwiteka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we, kiza ubwoko bwawe, ntureke ab'umwandu wawe bashinyagurirwa, kandi ngo bategekwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'abanyamahanga. Ni iki gituma duhinyurwa mu banyamahanga, bati 'imana yabo iri hehe?' "
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza       Matayo 6.16-21
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: "kandi nimwiyiriza ubusa ntimukabe nk'indyarya zigaragaza umubabaro, kuko bagaragaza umubabaro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo abantu babarebe ko biyirije ubusa. Ndababwira ukuri yuko bamaze kugororerwa ingororano
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: zabo. Ariko weho niwiyiriza ubusa wisige amavuta mu mutwe, wiyuhagire mu maso, kugira ngo abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: batamenya ko wiyirije ubusa keretse so uri ahiherereye, kandi so ureba ibyiherereye azakugororera.

verses.text: Isabato 1
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yo Mu Minsi Yo Kwiyiriza Ubusa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami yesu turagushimira yuko wamaze iminsi mirongo ine ku manywa na nijoro wiyiriza ubusa kuba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: icyitegererezo cyacu. Nuko turakwinginze uduhere ubuntu budufashe kwiyiriza ubusa, uburyo butuma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kamere yacu itegekwa rwose n umwuka wawe, natwetukumvira ibyiza udutegeka dukiranuka,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: duhinduka abera nyakuri, ngo biguheshe icyubahiro n’igitinyiro. Ni wowe uhorana na data wa twese
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’umwuka wera, muri imana imwe iteka ryose.amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko    2abakorinto 6.1-10
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kandi ubwo dukorana nayo turabinga kugirango mudaherwa ubuntu bw imana gupfa ubusa; kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yavuze iti” mu gihe cyo kwemererwamo narakumviye. No ku munsi wo gukirizwamo naragutabaye dore
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: none nicyo gihe cyo kwemererwamo ;dore none niwo munsi wo gukirizwamo. Ntitugire igisitaza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: dushyira mu nzira y umuntu wese kugirango umurimo wacu utagira umugayo. Ahubwo kukintu cyose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: twihe agaciro nk’abakozi b’imana bagabura ibyayo. Twihangane cyane mu makuba no mu mibabaro mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byago, mu biboko, mu mazu y’imbohe mu midugararo no mu mihati tuba maso twirirwa ubusa, dufite
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umutima uboneye, dufite  ubwenge, tutarambirwa, tugira neza , dufite umwuka wera, dufite urukundo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rutaryarya, tuvuga ijambo ry’ukuri, dufite imbaraga z’imana kandi dufite intwaro zo gukiranuko z’iburyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n iz’ubumoso, mu cyubahiro no mu buhemu, mu mugayo no mu ishimwe dutekerezwa ko turi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abashukanyi ariko turi ab ukuri, dutekerezwa ko turi abatamenyekana kandi nyamara turi ibirangirire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: dusa n abagiye gupfa ariko dore turi bazima, dusa n abahanwa ariko ntitwicwa, dusa n’abababara ariko

verses.text: twishima iteka, dusa nk’abakene nyamara dutungishha benshi, dusa n’abatagira icyo bafite nyamara

verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Maze yesu ajyanwa n'umwuka mu butayu kugeragezwa n'umwanzi, amaze iminsi mirongo ine n'amajoro
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: mirongo ine atarya, abona gusonza. Umushukanyi aramwegera aramubwira ati "niba uri umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w'imana, bwira aya mabuye ahinduke imitsima."aramusubiza ati "handitswe ngo 'umuntu ntatungwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'umutsima gusa, ahubwo atungwa n'amagambo yose ava mu kanwa k'imana.' " maze umwanzi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amujyana ku murwa wera, amuhagarika ku gasongero k'urusengero aramubwira ati "niba uri umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w'imana, ijugunye hasi kuko handitswe ngo 'izagutegekera abamarayika bayo,bakuramire mu maboko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yabo, ngo udakubita ikirenge ku ibuye.' "yesu aramusubiza ati "kandi handitswe ngo 'ntukagerageze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uwiteka imana yawe.' " umwanzi arongera amujyana mu mpinga y'umusozi muremure cyane, amwereka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwami bwose bwo mu isi n'ubwiza bwabwo  aramubwira ati "biriya byose ndabiguha nupfukama
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukandamya." yesu aramubwira ati "genda satani, kuko handitswe ngo 'uramye uwiteka imana yawe, abe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ari yo ukorera yonyine.' "Umwanzi aherako aramureka, maze haza abamarayika baramukorera.
