verses.text: Isabato 2
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yo Mu Minsi Yo Kwiyiriza Ubusa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose, uzi yuko ubwacu tutabasha na hato kwitabara. Nuko rero, ujye uturindisha umubiri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’umutima kugira ngo dukire ibyago byose n’amakuba yose byatera umubiri, dukire n’ibiteye isoni byose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: twakwibwira mu mitima bikawangiza. Tubisabye mu izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko 1 Abatesalonike 4:1-8
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NUKO, bene Data ibisigaye turabinginga tubahugurira mu Mwami Yesu kugira ngo, nk’uko mwabwiwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: natwe uko mukwiriye kugenda no kunezeza Imana, mube ariko mugenda, ndetse murusheho. Muzi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amategeko twahawe n’umwami Yesu kubategekera ayo ari yo. Icyo Imana ishaka ni iki: ni ukwezwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwanyu no kwirinda gusambana, ngo umuntu wese muri mwe amenye gutegeka umubiri we, wezwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ufite icyubahiro, mudatwarwa n’irari ryo kurigira, nk’abapagani batazi Imana; kandi ngo umuntu wese
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: areke kurengera, cyangwa kuriganya mwene se kuri ibyo, kuko umwami wacu ahora inzigo y’ibyo byose,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nkuko twabanje kubabwira no kubahamiriza. Imana ntiyaduhamagariye kwanduzwa ahubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yaduhamagariye kwezwa. Ni cyo gituma uwirengagiza ibyo, aba atari umuntu yanze ahubwo aba yanze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana iha mwebwe Umwuka wayo Wera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa bwiza      Matayo 15:21-28
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: YESU, arahava ajya mu gihugu cy'i Tiro n'i Sidoni. Umunyakananikazi aturuka muri icyo gihugu arataka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyane ati"Mwami mwene Dawidi, mbabarira, umukobwa wanjye atewe na dayimoni cyane." Ntiyagira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: icyo amusubiza. Nuko abigishwa be baramwegera baramwinginga bati"Musezerere kuko adutakira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: inyuma." Arabasubiza ati"Sinatumiwe abandi, keretse intama zazimiye zo mu muryango wa Isirayeli." Na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we araza aramupfukamira aramubwira ati"Mwami, ntabara." Aramusubiza ati"Si byiza kwenda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyokurya by'abana ngo mbijugunyire imbwa." Na we ati"Ni koko Mwami, ariko imbwa na zo zirya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubuvungukira bugwa buvuye ku meza ya ba nyirazo." Maze Yesu aramusubiza ati"Mugore, kwizera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwawe ni kwinshi, bikubere uko ushaka." Umukobwa we aherako arakira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isabato 3
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yo Mu Minsi Yo Kwiyiriza Ubusa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose, turakwinginze, wite ku byo abantu bawe bitonze tugushakaho cyane, uramburire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukuboko kwawe kw’iburyo kudutabara ababisha bacu bose. Tubisabye mu izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwandiko    Abefeso 5. 1-14
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nuko mwigane Imana nk'abana bakundwa. Kandi mugendere mu rukundo nk'uko Kristo yadukunze,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akatwitangira kuba ituro n'igitambo cy'Imana n'umubabwe uhumura neza. Ariko gusambana n'ibyonona
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose no kurarikira ntibikavugwe rwose muri mwe nk'uko bikwiriye abera, cyangwa ibiteye isoni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyangwa amagambo y'ubupfu, cyangwa amashyengo mabi kuko ibyo bidakwiriye, ahubwo mushime
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana. Kuko ibi mubizi neza yuko ari nta musambanyi cyangwa ukora ibyonona cyangwa urarikira, ari we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: usenga ibigirwamana, ufite ibyo azaragwa mu bwami bwa Kristo n'Imana. Ntihakagire umuntu ubohesha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amagambo y'ubusa, kuko ibyo ari byo bizanira umujinya w'Imana abatayumvira. Nuko ntimugafatanye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: na bo, kuko kera mwari umwijima none mukaba muri umucyo mu Mwami wacu. Nuko mugende
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk'abana b'umucyo, kuko imbuto z'umucyo ari ingeso nziza zose no gukiranuka n'ukuri.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mushakashake uko mwamenya ibyo Umwami ashima. Ntimukifatanye n'imirimo y'ab'umwijima itagira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umumaro, ahubwo muyihane kuko ibikorwa na bo rwihishwa biteye isoni no kubivuga. Ariko byose iyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bitangajwe n'umucyo na byo ubwabyo bihinduka umucyo, kuko ikimurikiwe n'umucyo cyose gihinduka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umucyo. Ni cyo gituma bivugwa ngo"Usinziriye we, kanguka uzuke, Kristo abone uko akumurikira!"
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa bwiza      Luka 11.14-28
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Yesu yirukanye dayimoni utera uburagi mu muntu, dayimoni amaze kuva mu kiragi kiravuga, abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: baratangara. Ariko bamwe muri bo baravuga bati"Ni Belizebuli umutware w'abadayimoni umuha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwirukana abadayimoni." Abandi bamushakaho ikimenyetso kiva mu ijuru, bamugerageza. Ariko amenya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyo bibwira arababwira ati"Ubwami bwose iyo bwigabanije ubwabwo burarimbuka, n'inzu ikagwira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: indi. Na Satani niba yigabanije ubwe ubwami bwe bwakomeza bute, ko muvuga yuko ari Belizebuli umpa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwirukana abadayimoni? Ariko jyewe niba Belizebuli ari we umpa kwirukana abadayimoni, abana banyu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ni nde ubaha kubirukana? Ni cyo gituma abo ari bo babacira urubanza. Ariko urutoki rw'Imana niba ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rwo rumpa kwirukana abadayimoni, noneho ubwami bw'Imana bubaguye gitumo. "Umunyamaboko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ufite intwaro iyo arinze urugo rwe, ibintu bye biba amahoro. Ariko umurusha amaboko iyo amuteye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akamunesha, izo ntwaro ze zose yari yizigiye arazimwambura, n'ibyo amunyaze akabigaba. "Uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tutabana ni umwanzi wanjye, kandi uwo tudateraniriza hamwe arasandaza. "
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Dayimoni iyo avuye mu muntu, azerera ahadafite amazi ashaka uburuhukiro, akabubura akavuga ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 'Reka nisubirire mu nzu yanjye navuyemo.' Yagerayo agasanga ikubuye kandi iteguye, akagenda akazana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abandi badayimoni barindwi bamurusha kuba babi, bakinjira bakayibamo. Nuko ibyo hanyuma by'uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muntu bikarusha ibya mbere kuba bibi."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Akivuga ibyo, umugore wari muri iryo teraniro ashyira ejuru aramubwira ati"Hahirwa inda yakubyaye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'amabere yakonkeje." Na we aramusubiza ati"Ahubwo hahirwa abumva ijambo ry'Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakaryitondera."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO 4
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: YO MU YO KWIYIRIZA UBUSA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose twemeye yuko turi abo guhanirwa ibyaha bikomeye twakoze, ariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turakwinginze, ubuntu bwawe ubudukuzeho ibihano bidukwiriye, ubutumarishe umubabaro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubw’imbabazi zawe.  Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO Abagalatiya 4:21-31
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ABASHAKA gutwarwa n’amategeko, nimumbwire.  Ntimurasobanukirwa n’ amategeko?  Byanditswe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yuko Aburahamu yari afite abahungu babiri, umwe ari uw’inshoreke, undi ari uw’umugeni.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uw’inshoreke yavutse nkuko iby’umubiri bigenda, naho uw’umugeni yavutse kubw’isezerano ry’Imana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo birimo umugani, kuko abo bagore bameze nk’amasezerano abiri. Rimwe ryavuye ku musozi w’i
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Sinayi, ribyarira ububata; iryo niryo rigereranywa na Hagari, ari we kandi ugereranywa n’umusozi w’i
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Sinayi wo mu Arabiya, kandi usobanurwa ngo Yerusalemu ya none, kuko iri mu bubata hamwe n’abana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bayo. Ariko Yerusalemu yo mu ijuru ni yo mugeni, ni we mama wa twese, uko byanditswe ngo “ Ishime,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngumba itabyara; tera hejuru, uvuge cyane, utaramukwa; kuko abana b’inyungwakazi ari benshi, baruta
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ab’inkundwakazi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni uko rero, bene Data, namwe muri abana b’isezerano, nkuko Isaka yari ari. Ariko nkuko icyo gihe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uwabyawe n’umubiri yarenganyaga uwabyawe n’Umwuka, na n’ubu niko bikimeze . Mbese ibyanditswe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bivuga bite?  Biravuga biti< Senda inshoreke n’umuhungu wayo, kuko umuhungu w’inshoreke
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: atazaraganwa n’umuhungu w’umugeni.” Nuko, bene Data, ntitukiri abana b’inshoreke, ahubwo turi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ab’umugeni.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA  Yohana 6.1-14
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: HANYUMA y’ibyo Yesu ajya hakurya y’inyanja y’I Galilaya, ni yo yitwa Tiberiya. Iteraniro ry’abantu
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: benshi riramukurikira, kuko babonye ibimenyetso yakoreye abarwayi. Yesu azamuka umusozi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yicaranayo n’abigishwa be. Ubwo Pasika, iminsi mikuru y’Abayuda, yendaga gusohora. Yesu yubura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amaso; abonye abantu benshi baza aho ari,  abaza Filipo ati< Turagura hehe ibyo kurya, ngo aba babone
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyo barya?” Icyatumye amubaza atyo, yagiraga ngo amugerageze;  ubwe yari azi icyo ari bukore. Filipo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aramusubiza ati < Imitsima yagurwa idenariyo magana abiri ntiyabakwira, nubwo umuntu wese yaryaho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gato. Umwe mu bigishwa be, ni we andereya mwene se wa Simoni Petero, aramubwira ati, Hano hari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuhungu ufite imitsima itanu y’ingano , n’ifi ebyiri; ariko ibyo byamarira iki abantu bangana batya?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yesu ati, Nimwicaze abantu. Aho hantu hari ubwatsi bwinshi; nuko abagabo baricara, bari nk’ibihumbi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bitanu. Yesu yenda ya mitsima arayishimira, ayigabanya abicaye , n’ifi na zo azigenza atyo, nkuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazishakaga. Bamaze guhaga , abwira abigishwa be ati, Nimuteranye ubuvungukira busigaye , hatagira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ikintu gipfa ubusa . Barateranya, buzuza intonga cumi n’ebyiri z’ubuvungukira bwa ya mitsima itanu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’ingano, ubwo abariye bashigaje. Abantu babonye ikimenyetso yakoze, baravuga bati, Ni ukuri  uyu ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we wa muhanuzi wari ukwiriye kuza mu isi.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO 5
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: YO MU YO KWIYIRIZA UBUSA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, turakwinginze, urebane imbabazi abantu bawe; ujye ubategekesha kugira-neza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwawe kwinshi, ukabarindisha umubiri n’umutima iteka ryose. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwami wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO Abaheburayo 9.11-15
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ARIKO Kristo amaze kuza ahinduka umutambyi mukuru w’ ibyiza bizaza,anyura mw ihema rirusha rya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rindi gukomera no gutungana rwose ritaremwe n’intoke; ibyo n’ukuvuga ngo, ritari ibyo mu byaremwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibi. Kandi ntiyinjijwe ahera cyane n’amaraso y’ihene cyangwa n’ay’ ibimasa, ahubwo yahinjijwe rimwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’amaraso ye amaze kutubonera gucungurwa kw’iteka. None ubwo amaraso y’ihene n’amapfizi n’ivu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ry’inka y’iriza, iyo biminjiriwe ku bihumanye, ko byeza umubiri, ugahumanuka, nkanswe amaraso ya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo, witambiye Imana atagira inenge, kubw’Umwuka w’iteka, ntazarushaho guhumanura imitima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yanyu, akayezahw imirimo ipfuye, kugira ngo mubone uko mukorera Imana ihoraho? Kubw’ibyo ni cyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gituma aba umuhuza w’isezerano rishya , kugira ngo abahamagawe bahabwe ibiragwa bidashira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byasezeranijwe, ubwo habayeho uwapfiriye gucungura abacumuye, bagitegekwa n’isezerano rya mbere.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA Yohana 8.46-59
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: YESU aravuga ati, Ni nde muri mwe unshinje icyaha? Ko mvuga ukuri, n’iki gituma mutanyizera?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uw’Imana yumva amagambo y’Imana ; mwebwe igituma. Mutumva n’uko mutari ab’Imana. Abayuda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: baramusubiza bati,<Ntitwavuze neza yuko uri Umusamariya , kandi ko ufite dayimoni?> Yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arabasubiza ati< simfite dayimoni, ahubwo nubaha Data; ariko mwe muransuzugura. Icyakora jye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: sinishakira icyubahiro, nyamara hariho Ugishaka, kandi ni we uca imanza. Ni ukuri, ni ukuri ndababwira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yuko umuntu, niyumva ijambo ryanjye, atazapfa iteka ryose. Abayuda baramusubiza bati< Noneho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tumenye yuko ufite dayimoni; Aburahamu yarapfuye, n’abahanuzi nuko, nawe ukavuga ngo umuntu , ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yumvira ijambo ryawe , ntazapfa iteka ryose! Mbese uruta sogokuruza Aburahamu wapfuye n’abahanuzi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bapfuye? Wibwira ko urinde? Yesu arabasubiza ati< Niba nuha icyubahiro, icyo cyubahiro nicy’ubusa;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umpa icyubahiro ni Data, uwo muvuga ngo ni Imana yanyu. Nyamara ntimumuzi,  ariko njye ndamuzi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi navuga yuko ntamuzi,naba  ndi umunyabinyoma nkamwe; ariko ndamuzi,  kandi nitondera ijambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rye.  Aburahamu sekuruza wanyu yifujije cyane kureba umunsi wanjye , kandi awubonye aranezerwa.>
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abayuda baramubwira bati <ko utaramara imyaka mirongo itanu,  Aburahamu wamubonye ute? Yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arababwira ati< Ni ukuri ni ukuri ndababwira yuko Aburahamu ataravuka, ndiho>. Nuko batora amabuye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yo kumutera; ariko Yesu arihisha, asohoka mu rusengero.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO IBANZIRIZA IYO KUZUKA (y’Amashami)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose idashira, turagushimira yuko urukundo rwinshi ukunda abantu rwakwemeje
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gutuma Umwana wawe, Umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo, kuvukana umubiri nk’iyacu, no gupfira ku musaraba,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugirango  abantu bose bakurikize icyitegererezo cye cyo kwicisha bugufi cyane. Nuko uduhe ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw’imbabazi zawe gukurikiza icyitegererezo cye cyo kwihangana, no gufatanya kuzuka kwe. Tubisabye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mw Izina rya Yesu Kristo uwo, Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO Abafilipi 2.5-11
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MUGIRE wa mutima wari muri Kristo Yesu. Uwo, nubwo yabanje kugira akamero k’Imana, ntiyatekereje
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yuko guhwana n’Imana ari ikintu cyo gukundirwa; ahubwo yisiga ubusa, ajyana akamero k’umugaragu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’imbata , agira ishusho  y’umuntu; kandi amaze kuboneka afite ishusho y’umuntu, yicisha bugufi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: araganduka, ntiyanga no gupfa , ndetse urupfu rwo ku musaraba. Ni cyo cyatumye Imana imushyira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hejuru cyane, ikamuha izina risumba ayandi mazina yose, kugirango  amavi yose apfukame mu izina rya
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Yesu , ari ay’ibyo mw ijuru, cyangwa ay’ibyo mu isi, cyangwa ay’ibyo munsi y’isi, kandi indimi zose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: zihamye ko Yesu Kristo ari Uwiteka, ngo Imana Data wa twese ihimbazwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA  Matayo 27. 1-54
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UMUSEKE utambitse abatambyi bakuru bose n’abakuru b’ubwo bwoko bigira inama yi kwica Yesu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baramuboha , baramujyana, bamushyira umutegeka Pilato.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Yuda wamugambaniye, abonye ko urubanza rutsinze Yesu, aricuza, asubiza abatambyi
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bakuru, n’abakuru bya bice by’ifeza mirongo itatu, ati< nakoze icyaha , kuko nagambaniye amaraso
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: atariho urubanza.” Ariko bo baramusubiza bati, biramaze! Ni ibyawe.” Ifeza azijugunya mu rusengero,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arasohoka, aragenda, arimanika. Ariko abatambyi bakuru bajyana bya bice by’ifeza, baravuga bati<
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amategeko ntiyemera ko tubishyira mu bubuko bw’Imana, kuko ari ibiguzi by’amaraso.” Bajya inama ,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazigura isambu y’umubumbyi, ngo ijye ihambamwo  abashyitsi. Ni cyo gituma iyo sambu yitwa Isambu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’amaraso na bugingo n’ubu. Ni bwo ibyavuzwe n’umuhanuzi Yeremiya byasohoye ngo, Bajyane ibice
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: by’ifeza mirongo itatu, ari cyo giciro cy’uwo baciriye, uwo bamwe mu Bisirayeli baciriye, babigura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: isambu y’umubumbyi, nk’uko Uwiteka yanyeretse.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubwo Yesu yari ahagagaze imbere y’umutegeka ; umutegeka aramuza ati< Ni wowe Mwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’abayuda?” Yesu aramusubiza ati< wakabimenye .” Abatambyi bakuru n’abakuru baramurega, ariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntiyagira icyo yireguza na hato. Maze Pilato aramubaza ati< Niwumwise ko bagushinje byinshi? Ariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntiyamusubiza ijambo na rimwe, bituma umutegeka yumirwa cyane. Muri iyo minsi mikuru, uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwaka utashye, umutegeka yagiraga akAminayero ko kubohorera abantu imbohe imwe, iyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bashakaga. Nuko icyo gihe bari bafite imbohe y’ikimenywabose yitwaga Baraba. Nuko bateranye, Pilato
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arababaza ati< Uwo mushaka ko mbabohorera ni nde? Ni Baraba, cyangwa ni Yesu witwa Kristo? Kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yAminaye yuko ishyari ari ryo rimubatangishije. Kandi ubwo yari yicaye ku ntebe y’imanza. Umugore we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amutumaho ati< ntugire icyo utwara uwo mukiranutsi, kuko naraye ndose byinshi kuri we byambabaje>.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko abatambyi bakuru n’abakuru boshya abantu ngo basabe Baraba, bicishe Yesu. Nuko umutegeka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yongera kubabaza ati< Muri aba bombi uwo mushaka  ni nde, nkamubabohorera?> Bati <Ni Baraba..>
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Pilato arasubiza ati< Nuko Yesu witwa Kristo ndamugira nte? > Bose bati< Nabambwe!” Na we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arababaza ati<  ku ki? Yakoze cyaha ki?> Ariko barushaho gusakuza cyane bati< Nabambwe !”  Nuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Pilato abonye ko arushywa n’ubusa, ahubwo ko barushijeho gushega, yenda amazi, akarabira imbere y’
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abantu, ati<  Jyeweho nta cyaha kindiho ku bw’ amaraso y’uyu muntu w’umukiranutsi; biraba ibyanyu.>
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Abantu bose barasubiza bati< Amaraso ye natubeho no ku bana bacu. Maze ababohorera Baraba, ariko
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: amaze gukubita Yesu imikoba, aramutanga ngo abambwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze abasirikare b’umutegeka bajyana Yesu mu rukiko, bamuteraniraho ingabo zose; baramucuza,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bamwambika umwenda w’umuhemba, baboha ikamba ry’amahwa, barimwambika mu mutwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’urubingo mu kuboko kwe kw’iburyo, baramupfukamira, baramushinyagurira, bati< Ni amahoro,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami w’Abayuda!” Bamucira amancandwe , benda rwa rubingo, baramukubita mu mutwe. Bamaze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kumushyinyagurira, bamwambura wa mwenda, bamwambika imyenda ye, bamujyana kumubamba.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bagisohoka bahura n’Umunyakurene witwaga Simoni; uwo bamuhata kujyana nabo, ngo yikorere
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umusaraba wa Yesu. Bageze ahitwa I Goligota, hasobanurwa ngo: I Nyabihanga, bamuha vino ivanze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’indurwe, ngo anywe, Asogongeye yanga kuyinywa. Bamaze kumubamba, bagabana imyenda ye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: barayifindira. Bicara aho baramurinda. Bashyira hejuru y’umutwe we ibirego bamureze, byanditswe ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: “UYU NI YESU UMWAMI W’ABAYUDA.” Maze abambuzi babiri bababambana na we, umwe I buryo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’undi I bumoso. Abahisi baramutuka, bamuzunguriza imitwe, baravuga bati< Wowe usenya urusengero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukarwubaka mu minsi itatu, ikize; niba uri Umwana w’Imana, manuka uve ku umusaraba. Abatambyi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakuru n’abanditsi n’abakuru nabo bamushinyagurira batyo bati, yakijije abandi, ntabasha kwikiza. Kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ari Umwami w’abisirayeli, namanuke ave ku umusaraba nonaha, natwe turamwemera. Yiringiye Imana;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngaho nimukize nonaha, niba imukunda; kuko yavuze ati<  Ndi Umwana w’Imana. N’abambuzi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babambanywe na we nabo bamutuka batyo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uhereye mu isaha ya gatandatu haba ubwirakabiri mu gihugu cyose kugeza mu isaha ya cyenda. Maze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu isaha ya cyenda Yesu avuga ijwi rirenga ati< Eli, Eli, Iama sabakitani? Bisobanurwa ngo, Mana yanjye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ni iki kikundekesheje? Ariko bamwe mu bari bahagaze aho babyumvise baravuga bati, Umva wa mugabo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arahamagara Eliya. Uwo mwanya umwe muri bo arirukanka, yenda sipongo, ayuzuza inzoga isharira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ayishyira ku urubingo, arayimushomesha. Ariko abandi bati< ba uretse turebe ko Eliya aza kumukiza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko Yesu yongera kuvuga ijwi rirenga, aratanga.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwenda ukingiriza ahera cyane h’urusengero utabukamo kabiri, utangirira hejuru ugeza hasi, isi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iratigita, ibitare birameneka, ibituro birakinguka, intumbi nyinshi z’abera bari basinziriye zirazurwa, bava
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu bituro; maze amaze kuzuka, binjira mu murwa wera, babonekera benshi. Umutware utwara umutwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’abasirikare n’abari kumwe nawe barinda Yesu, babonye igishyitsi n’ibibaye, baratinya cyane bati< Ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukuri uyu yari umwana w’Imana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI WA 4 WO MU CYUMWERU CYERA
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO                                1Abakorinto 11:17-34
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                   Luka 23: 1-49
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UMUNSI WO GUPFA KWA KRISTO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: AMASENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, twebwe abana bawe turakwinginze, ujye uturebana imbabazi, kuko ari kubwacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo yemeye kugambanirwa no gutangwa mu maboko y’abanyabyaha, no gupfira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ku umusaraba. None ariho, abana naw ku ngoma hamwe n’Umwuka wera, muri Imana imwe iteka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishibora byose kandi ihoraho, ni Wowe wahaye Itorero ryawe ryose Umwuka wawe ngo aritegeke
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi aryeze. Nuko emera amasengesho yacu tugusabiye abantu bo mu itorero ryawe ryera b’uburyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwose, kugira ngo umuntu wese wo muri ryo, mu byo akora byose, ajye ahora agukorerana umurava,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akubashye. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu, kandi Umukiza wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA y’imbabazi, Muremyi w’abantu bose, kandi Mukunzi w’ibyo waremye byose, turagushimira yuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: udakunda ko umunyabyaha apfa, ahubwo ushaka ko aguhindukirira, akagira ubugingo buhoraho. Nuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turakwinginze, ugirire imbabazi Abayuda, n’Abasiramu, n’abatizera, kandi abayoba bose, ukure mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mitima yabo kujijwa kose no kunangirwa, kandi no kugaya Ijambo ryawe. Nuko ubagarure mu mukumbi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wawe, Mwami wacu ushimwa, bakizanywe n’igice gisigaye cy’Abisirayeli nyakuri, bahinduke umukumbi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wawe umwe, kandi baragirwe n’Umwungeri umwe, Yesu Kristo, uhorana nawe n’Umwuka wera, muri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana imwe iteka ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO                  Abaheburayo 10:1-25
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UBWO amategeko  ari igicucu cy’ibyiza bizaza, akaba adafite ishusho yabyo ubwayo, nta bwo yabasha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gutunganya rwose abegera igicaniro, abatunganishije ibitambo bahora batamba uko umwaka utashye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Iyo abibasha , ntibabe bakimenyaho ibyaha. Ahubwo bahora bibutswa ibyaha byahon’ibyo bitambo, uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwaka utashye. Erega ntibishoboka ko amaraso y’amapfizi n’ay’ihene akuraho ibyaha. Ni cyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyatumye, ubwo Yesy yazaga mu isi. Avuga ati< Ibitambo n’amaturo ntimwabishatse , ahubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wanyiteguriye umubiri. Ntiwishimiye ibitambo byokeje cyangwa ibitambo by’ibyaha: mperaka ndavuga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nti ‘Dore ndaje, Mana, ( Mu muzingo w’igitabo ni ko byanditswe kuri jye), Nzanywe no gukora ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ushaka’>. Amaze kuvuga ibyo ngo < ibitambo n’amaturo n’ibitambo byokeje n’ ibitambo byibaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntiwabishatse, kandi ntiwabyishimiye> ( ari byo bitambwa nk’uko amategeko yategetse), aherako
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aravuga ati < Dore nzanywe no gukora ibyo ushaka.> Akuriraho ibya mbere gukomeza ibya kabiri. Uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gushaka kw’Imana ni ko kwatumye twezwa, tubiheshejwe n’uko umubiri wa Yesu watambwe rimwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gusa ngo bibe bihagije iteka.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi umutambyi wese ahagarara iminsi yose akora umurimo we, atamba kenshi ibitambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bidahinduka bitabasha iteka kugira ubwo bikuraho ibyaha. Ariko wa wundi amaze gutamba igitambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kimwe cy’iteka cy’ibyaha, yicara iburyo bw’Imana, ahera ubwo arindira igihe abanzi be bazashyirirwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: munsi y’ibirenge bye. Kuko abezwa yabatunganishije rwose igitambo kimwe kugeza iteka ryose. Kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Umwuka Wera ni we mugabo wo kuduhamiriza ibyo. Amaze kuvuga ati “iri ni ryo sezerano
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nzasezerana nab o hanyuma y’iyo minsi, ni ko Uwiteka avuga, nzashyira amategeko yanjye mu mitima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yabo, kandi mu bwenge bwabo ni ho nzayandika,” arongera ati “ Ibyaha byabo n’ubugome bwabo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: sinzabyibuka ukundi.” Noneho rero ubwo ibyo bibababariwe , ntihakiriho kongera gutamba ibitambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: by’ibyaha.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko , bene Data, ubwo dufite ubushizi bw’ubwoba bwo kwinjizwa Ahera cyane n’amaraso ya Yesu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tunyuze mu nzira yaduciriye nshya kandi y’ubugingo, inyura mu mwenda ukinze, ni wo mubiri we; kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwo dufite umutambyi ukomeye, utwra inzu y’Imana, twegere dufite imitima y’ukuri twizera rwose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tudashidikanya, imitima yacu iminjiriweho gukurwamo  kwimenyaho ibibi, n’imibiri yacu yuhagijwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amazi meza. Dukomeze kwatura ibyiringiro byacu tutanyeganyega, kuko uwasezeranije ari uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwizerwa, kandi tujye tuzizirikana  ubwacu, kugira ngo duterane ishyaka ryo gukundana n’iry’imirimo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: myiza. Twe kwirengagiza guteranira hamwe, nk’uko bamwe bajya bagira, ahubwo duhugurane, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uko mubonye urya munsi wegera, mube ari ko murushaho kugenza mutyo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                    Yohana 19:1-37.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NUKO Pilato aherako ajyana Yesu, amukubita imikoba.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abasirikare baboha ikamba ry’amahwa, barimwambika mu mutwe, bamwambika n’umwenda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’umuhengeri. Baramwegera, baramubwira bati< Ni amahoro , Mwami w’Abayuda! Bamukubita inshyi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Pilato yongera gusohoka, arababwira ati <Dore ndamusohoye, ndamubazaniye, ngo mumenye yuko ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nta cyaha mubonyeho.” Nuko Yesu asohoka yambaye ikamba ry’amahwa n’umwenda w’umuhengeri.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Pilato arababwira ati “ Uwo muntu nguyu!” Abatambyi bakuru n’abasikare bamubonye batera hejuru
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bati < Mubambe! Mubambe!” Pilato arabawira ati < Mube ari mwe mumujyana, mumubambe; kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: jyewe ntamubonyeho icyaha .” Abayuda baramusubiza bati bati < Dufite itegeko, kubw’iryo tegeko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akwiriye gupfa, kuko yigize Umwana w’Imana .” Pilato yumvise ibyo arushaho gutinya. Nuko yongera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwinjira mu rukiko, maze abaza Yesu ati < Wavuye he?” ariko Yesu ntiyagira icyo amusubiza. Pilato
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aramubaza ati < Uranyihorera? Ntuzi yuko mfite ububasha bwo kukurekura, kandi ko mfite ububasha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwo kukubbamba?” Yesu aramusubiza ati < ntiwagira ububasha bwo kugira icyo untwara, utabuhawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: buvuye mu ijuru; ni cyo gituma ukungabije akurusha icyaha.” Uhereye ubwo Pilato ashaka uburyo bwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kumurekura. Ariko Abayuda batera hejuru bati< Nurekura uyu, uraba uteri inshuti ya Kayisari; kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuntu wese wigize umwami, aba agomeye Kyisari. Nuko Pilato yumvise ibyo, asohora Yesu yicara ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntebe y’imanza ahantu hitwa Amabuye ashashwe, mu Ruheburayo hitwa Gabata. (Ubwo hari ku munsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wo kwitegura ibya pasika, hari nk’isaha esheshatu). Nuko abwira Abayuda ati,< nguyu umwami, wanyu!”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Na bo batera hejuru bati < Mukurho, umubambe!” Pilato ararbabaza ati< Mbese, mbambe umwmi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wnyu?” Abatambyi bakuru baramusubiza bati < Nta mwami dufite keretse Kayisari.” Aherako
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aramubaha , ngo abambwe. Nuko bajyana Yesu, asohoka yiyikoreye umusaraba , agera ahantu hitwa I
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyabihanga, mu Ruheburayo hitwa I Gologota. Bamubambanaho n’abandi babiri, hirya no hino, Yesu ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahagati. Pilato yandika urwandiko, arushyira ku musaraba, rwanditswe ngo, YESU W’INAZARETI,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMWAMI W’ ABAYUDA. Urwo rwandiko benshi mu bayuda barabusoma, kuko ahantu babambye Yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hari bugufi bw’umurwa, kandi rwari rwanditswe mu Ruheburayo, no mu Ruroma, no mu Rugiriki. Nuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abatambyi bakuru b’Abayuda babwira Pilato bati < Ntiwandike ngo, ‘Umwami w’Abayuda;’ ahubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wandi uti ‘ yiyise umwami w’Abayuda.’” Pilato arasubiza ati < Icyo nanditse nacyanditse.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko abasirikare, bamaze kubamba Yesu, bajyana imyambaro ye, bayigabanyamo kane,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umusirikare wese umugabane we; ariko hasigara ikanzu ye. Iyo kanzu ntiyari ifite umubariro, ahubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yari iboshywe yose, uhereye hejuru ukageza hasi. Nuko baravugana bati< Twe kuyitanyagura, ahubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tuyifindire, turebe uri bube nyirayo uwo ari we.” Bavuze ibyo, ngo ibyanditswe bisohore ngo “Bagabanye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imyenda yanjye, kandi bafindira umwambaro wanjye.” Nuko abasirikare babigenza batyo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyina wa Yesu na nyina wabo na Mariya muka kilopa na Mariya Magadarina bari bahagaze ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: musaraba wa Yesu. Nuko Yesu abonye nyina n’ umwigisha yakundaga ahagaze bugufi, abwira nyina ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: <Mubyeyi, nguyu umwana wawe.” Maze abwira uwo mwigisha ati < Nguyu nyoko.” Uhereye uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwanya, uwo mwigishwa amujyana iwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma y’ibyo Yesu Aminaye yuko noneho byose birangiye, agira ngo ibyanditswe bisohore
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: rwose, ni ko kuvuga ati “ Mfite inyota.” Hari hateretse ikibindi cyuzuye vino isharira. Nuko benda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: sipongo yuzuye iyo vino isharira, bayishyira ku rubingo, barayimushomesha. Yesu amaze gusoma iyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: vino, aravuga ati <Birarangiye.” Acurika umutwe, umutima uraca.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwo munsi wari uwo kwitegura Pasika kandi Abayuda ntibashakaga ko imibiri iguma ku misaraba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ku isabato, kuko iyo sabato yari umunsi mukuru; niko gusaba Pilato kubavuna amaguru, ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babamburwe. Abasirikare baraza, babanza kuri umwe, bamuvuna amaguru, n’undi wari ubambanywe na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we bamugenza batyo; ariko bageze kuri Yesu, basanga amaze gupfa, ntibamuvuna amaguru. ariko umwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muri bo amucumita icumu mu rubavu; uwo mwanya havamo amaraso n’amazi. Uwabibonye ni we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubihamije, kandi ibyo ahamya n’ibyukuri, kandi azi ko avuga ukuri ngo namwe mwizere. Kuko ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byabereyeho kugira ngo ibyanditswe bisohore ngo “ Nta gufa rizavunwa.” Byongeye kandi ibindi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byanditswe, biravuga ngo “ Bazabona uwo bacumitse.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI UBANZIRIZA UWO KUZUKA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: URWANDIKO                    I Petero 3:17,22

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA       Matayo 27:57,65
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UMUNSI WO KUZUKA KWA KRISTO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Mu gihe cyo Gusenga kwa mugitondo, mu cyimbo cya Zaburi 95 “Nimuze turirimbire Uwiteka”, ibi bice
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: aribyo bivugwa cyangwa biririmbwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: PASIKA yacu yatambwe ni we Kristo ;nuko rero tujye tuzirikana iminsi mikuru, tudafite umusemburo wa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kera, cyangwa umusemburo  ni wo gomwa n’ ikibi,ahobwo tugire imitsima  idasembuwe, ni yo kuri no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kutaryarya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 1 Abakorinto 5:7,8.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Tuzi yuko Kristo amaze kuzuka atagipfa; urupfu rukaba rutakimufiteho ububasha;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urwo rupfu yapfuye yarapfuye rimwe risa ku bw’ibyaha; ariko ubwo ariho,ariho ku bw’ Imana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abe ari ko namwe mwiyumvamo mwapfuye ku byaha. Mukaba muriho ku Mana muri kristo Yesu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abaroma 6:9,11
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ariko noneho Kristo yarazutse, ni we muganura w’abasinziriye;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuko ubwo urupfu rwazanywe n’umuntu, ni ko no kuzuka kw’ abapfuye kwazanywe n’umuntu. Nk’ uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bose bokojwe gupfa na Adamu, ni ko bose bazahindurwa bazima na Kristo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 1 Abakorinto 15:20,22
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya data wa twese, n’icy’Umwana ,n’icy’umwuka Wera. Nk’uko cyahoze mbere na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mbere, n’ ubu niko kiri, kandi niko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko wanesheje urupfu Umwana wawe  w,ikinege Yesu Kristo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukamutwugururishiriza irembo ry’ubugingo buhoraho. Nuko turakwinginze twitonze, nk’uko ubuntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwawe butujya imbere, ukabushyirisha mu mitima yacu gushaka ibyiza, abe ari ko gufasha kwawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kudasiba kuduhesha kubisohoresha nrza ingeso nziza. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO                     Abakorosayi 3:1-7
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NUKO rero, niba mwarazuranywe na Kristo, mujye mushaka ibiri hejuru, aho Kristo ari yicaye iburyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw’Imana. Mujye muhoza umutima ku biri hejuru, Atari ku biri mu isi, kuko mwapfuye, kandi ubugingo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwanyu bukaba bwarahishanywe na Kristo mu Mana. Kandi ubwo Kristo, ari we bugingo bwacu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azerekanwa, namwe muzaherako mwerekanwe na we muri mu bwiza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko noneho mwice ingeso zanyu z’ibyisi: gusambana, no gukora ibiteye isoni, no kurigira, no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kurarikira, n’imyifurize yose, ari yo gusenga ibigirwamana; ibyo ni byo bizanira umujinya w’Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abatumvira. Kandi namwe mwabigenderamo kera, ubwo mwahoraga muri byo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA Yohana 20:1-10
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: KU WA mbere w’iminsi irindwi, mu rubungabungo hatarabona, Mariya Magadarena aza ku gitoro,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: asanga igitare gikuwe ku gituro. Arirukanka, asanga Simoni Petero na wa mwigishwa wundi Yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yakundaga, arababwira ati “ Bakuye Umwami Yesu mu gituro, kandi ntituzi aho bamushize.” Petero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: asohokana na wa mwigishwa wundi, bajya ku gituro. Bombi birukira icyarimwe; ariko uwo mwigishwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: asiga Petero, aba ari we ubanza kugera ku gituro. Arunama, arungurukamo, abona imyenda y’ibitare
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ishyizwe hasi, ariko ntiyinjiramo. Maze Simoni Petero na we aza amukurikiye, yinjira mu gituro, abona
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imyenda y’ibitare ishyizwe hasi, n’igitambaro cyari mu mutwe we kidashyizwe hamwe n’imyenda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’ibitare, ahubwo cyari kizinze kiri ukwacyo hirya. Ni cyo cyatumye na wa mwigishwa wundi wabanje
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugera ku gituro, na we yinjira. Abibonye, yizera ibyo yabwiwe na wa mugore; kuko bari batarAminaya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyanditswe, ko akwiriye kuzuka. Maze abigishwa basubirayo, bajya iwabo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO            Ibyakozwe 13:26-41

verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ISABATO YA 1 IKURIKIRA IYO KUZUKA
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: DATA WA TWESE ushobora byose, turagushimira yuko watanze umwana wawe w’ikinege, ngo apfire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukuraho ibicumuro byacu, azurirwe kugira ngo dutsindishirizwe. Nuko uduhe kwikuramo igitubura, ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyo gomwa n’ikibi, tukajya tugukorerana ingeso zitunganye n’umurava iminsi yose. Tubisabye mu Izina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO         1Yohani5:4-12
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ICYABYAWE n’Imana cyose kinesha iby’isi; kandi uku ni ko kunesha kwanesheje iby’isi, n’ukwizera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwacu. Ni nde unesha iby’isi keretse uwizera yuko Yesu ari Umwana w’Imana? Ni we Yesu Kristowaje,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: agaca mu mazi n’amaraso, si mu mazi yonyine, ahubwo ni amazi n’amaraso nayo. Kandi Umwuka ni we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubihamya, kuko Umwuka ari ukuri.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibihamya ni bitatu, Umwuka n’amazi n’amaraso; kandi ibyo bitatu birahuje. Ubwo twemera ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abantu bahamya, ibyo Imana ihamya birabiruta, kuko ibyo Imana ihamya ari bibi, ari uko yahamije
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: iby’Umwana wayo. Uwizera Umwana w’Imana aba afite uko guhamya muri we; naho utizera Imana aba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ayise umunyabinyoma, kuko atemeye ibyo Imana yahamije ku Mwana wayo. Kandi uko guhamya ni uku,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ni uko Imana yaduhaye ubugingo buhoraho, kandi ubwo bugingo bubonerwa mu Mwama wayo. Ufite
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uwo Mwami ni we ufite ubwo bugingo, naho udafite Umwana w’Imana nta bugingo afite.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA     Yohana 20:19-23
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NUKO kuri uwo munsi bugorobye, ari wow a mbere w’iminsi irindwi, abigishwa bari bateraniye mu nzu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: inzugi zikinze kuko b atinyaga Abayuda; Yesu araza, ahagarara hagati yabo, arababwira ati< Amahoro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abe muri mwe!” Amaza kuvuga atyo, abereka ibiganza bye n’urubavu rwe. Abigishwa babonye Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: baranezerwa. Yesu yongera kubabwira ati < Amahoro abe muri mwe! Uko Data yantumye, ni ko nanjye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mbatumye.” Amaze kuvuga atyo, abahumekeraho, ati “ Nimwakire Umwuka Wera. Abo muzababarira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyaha bose bazaba babibabariwe; abo mutazabibabarira bose, bazaba batabibabariwe.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO YA 2 IKURIKIRA IYO KUZUKA
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishoborabyose, turagushimira yuko watangiye Umwana wawe w’ikinege kutubera igitambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kiducungura ibyaha, kandi icyitegererezo cy’ingeso nziza. Nuko uduhere ubuntu kugira ngo tujye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tugerageza iminsi yose kugera ikirenge mu cye, mgo tube abera,nk’uko ari  Uwera. Tubisabiye mu izina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO    1 Petero 2:18-25
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BAGARAGU b’imbata, mugandukire ba shobuja mububashye rwose, Atari abeza n’abagira ineza gusa,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahubwo n’ibigoryi; kuko igishimwa ari uko umuntu yakwihanganira imibabaro bamuhoye ubusa, azize
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umutima utunganiye Imana. Ariko se, niba mwihanganira gukubitwa ibpfunsi babahora icyaha,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muzashimwa ki? Icyakora, nimukora neza , akaba ari byo mubabarizwa, mukabyihanganira, ibyo ni byo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana ishima; kandi ibyo nibyo mwahamagariwe, kuko na Kristo yababarijwe, akabasigira icyitegererezo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo mugere mu kirenge mu cye. Nta cyaha yakoze, nta n’uburiganya bwabonetse mu kanwa ke;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yaratutswe, ntiyasubiza; yarababajwe, ntiyabakangisha; ahubwo aritanga yiha Idaca urwa kibera. Ubwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yikoreye ibyaha byacu mu mubiri we, abibambanwa ku giti kugira ngo dupfe ku byaha, duhereko tubeho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ku gukiranuka. Imibyimba ye ni yo yabakijije. Kuko mwari nk’intama zizimiye, ariko none mukaba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwagarukiye Umwungeri w’ubugingo bwanyu, ni we Murinzi wabwo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA Yohana 10:11-16
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ni Jye mwungeri mwiza. Umwungeri mwiza apfira intama ze; ariko uragirira ibihembo, uteri umwungeri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwite, kandi n’intama Atari ize, iyo abonye isega rije, asiga intama, agahunga, isega rikazifata,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rikazitatanya. Kuko ari uw’ibihembo, arahunga, ntiyite kun tama. Ni jye mwungeri mwiza, kandi menya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: izanjye, izanjye zikAminaya , nk’uko Data Aminaya, nanjye nkamumenya; kandi mfira intama zanjye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mfite n’izindi ntzmz zitari izo muri uru rugo; na zo nkwiriye kuzizana; zizumva ijwi ryanjye, kandi zizaba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umukumbi umwe, zigire umwungeri umwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO YA 3 IKURIKIRA IYO KUZUKA
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko umurikishiriza abayobye umucyo, ari wo by’ukuri byawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo bibayobore inzira yo gukiranuka. Nuko abinjijwe mu mukumbi wa Kristo bose, bagihinduka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ingingo z’umubiri we, bakigishirizwa muri wo ibihura n’iby’ukuri bye, ubahe kuzinukwa ibinyurana n’ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bemera, bagakurikiza ibihura nabyo. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO                  1 Petero 2:11-17
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BAKUNDWA, ndabahugura, ubwo muri abasuhuke n’abimukira; kugira ngo mwirinde irari ry’umubiri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ry’uburyo bwinshi rirwanya. Mugire ingeso nziza hagati y’abapagani, kugira ngo, nubwo babasebya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’abakora nabi, ni babona imirimo yanyu myiza, izabatere guhimbaza Imana ku munsi wo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugenderwamo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mugandukire ubutware bwose bw’abantu ku bw’umwami wacu, naho yaba umwami, kuko ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we usumba bose, cyangwa abatware, kuko ari bo batumwe na we guhana inkozi z’ibibi no gushima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abakora neza. Kuko ibyo Imana ishaka  ari uko muzibishaabantu b’abapfapfa, batagiraicyo bAminaya,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukora neza kwanyu, mumeze nk’ab’umudendezo koko, ariko uwo mudendezo mutawutwikirije ibibi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahubwo mugenze nk’imbata z’Imana. Mwubahe abantu bose, mukunde bene Data, mwubahe Imana,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwubahee umwami.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA Yohana 16:16-22
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: YESU yabwiye abigishwa be ati < Hasigaye igihe gito, ntimumbone; maze hazabaho ikindi gihe gito,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mumbone.> Bamwe mu bigishwa be barabazanya bati<Ibyo atubwiye ni ibiki? Ngo ‘Hasigaye igihe gito,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntimumbone; maze hazabaho igihe gito mumbone;’ kandi bati < Ibyo ni ibiki ngo ‘igihe gito?’ Ntituzi ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: avuga. Yesu Aminaye ko bashaka kumubaza, arababaza ati < Murabazanya ibyo mbabwiye ibyo, ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ‘Hasigaye igihe gito, ntimumbine; maze hazabaho ikindi gihe gito mumbone?’ Ni ukuri, ni ukuri,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ndababwira yuko mwebweho muzarira mukaboroga, ariko ab’isi bazanezerwa; mwebweho muzababara,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ariko umubabaro wanyu uzahinduka umunezero. Umugore iyo aramukwa, arababara, kuko igihe cye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gisohoye; ariko, iyo umwana amaze kuvuka, ntaba akibuka kuribwa, kuko anenejwe n’uko umuntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: avutse mu isi. Ni ko namwe mubabara none, ariko nzongera kubobonana namwe, kandi imitima yanyu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: izanezerwa; n’umunezero wanyu nta muntu uzawubaka.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO YA 4 IKURIKIRA IYO KUZUKA
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, tuzi yuko ari Wowe wenyine ushobora gutegeka imitima y’abanyabyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: itagondeka. Nuko rero, twebwe abantu bawe, uduhe gukunda ibyo utegeka, tukishimira ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wasezeranije, kugira ngo naho iby’iyi si  bigenda bihindagurika, imitima yacu ihame muri wowe, aho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umunezero nyakuri ubonerwa. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO Yakobo 1:17-21
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: GUTANGA kose kwiza n’impano yose itunganye rwose ni byo biva mu ijuru, bimanuka bituruka kuri Se
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’imicyo udahinduka, cyangwa ngo agore n’igicucu cyo guhinduka. Yatubyarishije ijambo ry’ukuri nk’uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yabigambiriye, kugira ngo tube nk’umuganura w’ibiremwa byayo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko rero, bene Data bakundwa, umuntu wese yihutire kumva, ariko atinde kuvuga,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi atinde kurakara; kuko uburakari bw’abantu budasohoza ibyo gukiranuka kw’Imana. Ubwo bimeze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bityo mwiyambura imyanda yose n’ububi busaze, Mwakirane ubugwaneza ijambo ryatewe muri mwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ribasha gukiza ubugingo bwanyu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA Yohana 16:5-15
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ARIKO none ndajya ku Uwantumye, kandi muri mwe ntawe umbaza ati <Urajya he?> Ariko kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mbabwiye ibyo, imitima yanyu yuzuye agahinda.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko ndababwira ukuri yuko ikizagira icyo kibamarira, ari uko ngenda; kuko nintagenda, Umufasha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: atazaza aho muri; ariko ningenda, nzamubohererza. Ubwo azaza azatsinda ab’isi, abemeza iby’icyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ibyo gukiranuka n’iby’amateka, n’iby’icyaha, kuko batanyizeye: n’ibyo gukiranuka, kuko njya kwa Data,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi namwe muzaba mutakimbona; n’iby’amateka, kuko umutware w’ab’iyi si aciriweho iteka.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ndacyafite ibyo kubabwira byinshi, ariko ubu ntimubasha kubyihanganira. Uwo Mwuka w’ukuri naza,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azabayobora mu kuri kose, kuko atazavuga ku bwe, ahubwo ibyo azumva, ni byo azavuga; kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azababwira ibyenda kubaho. Uwo azanyubahiriza, kuko azenda ku byanjye, akabibabwira. Ibyo Data
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: afite byose ni ibyanjye, ni cyo gitumye mvuga nti “Azenda ku byanjye, abibabwire.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO YA 5 IKURIKIRA IYO KUZUKA
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NYAGASANI, tuzi yuko ari wowe ibyiza byoze bikomokaho. Ni cyo gitumye twebwe abantu bawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tukwingingira, kugira ngo Umwuka wawe wera atume imitima yacu ihugukira mu byiza, kandi ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw’imbabazi azwe atuyobore, tubone uko twasohoza ibyo byiza. Tubisabye mu Izina ry’Umwami wacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yesu Kristo. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO               Yakobo 1:22-27
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ARIKO  rero, mujye mukora iby’iryo jambo, Atari ugupfa kuryumva gusa mwishuka; kuko uwumva ijambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gusa, ntakore ibyaryo, ameze nk’umuntu urebeye mu maso he mu ndorerwamo. Amaze kwireba,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akagenda, uwo mwanya akiyibagirwa uko asa. Ariko uwitegereza mu mategeko atunganye rwose atera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umudendezo, agakomeza kugira umwete wayo, Atari uwumva gusa akibagirwa, ahubwo ari uyumvira, ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we uzahabwa umugisha mu byo akora. Umuntu ni yibwira ko ari umunyadini, ntagenge erurimi rwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahubwo akishuaka mu mutima, idini ry’uwo muntu riba ari ubusa. Idini ritunganye kandi ritanduye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbere y’Imana Data wa twese ni iri: ni ugura imfubyi n’abapfakazi mu mibabaro yabo, no kwirinda no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwirinda kutanduzwa n’isi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA Yohana 16:23-33
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NI UKURI, ni ukuri, ndababwira yuko icyo muzasaba Data cyose mu izina ryanjye, azakibaha. Kugeza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: none nta cyo mwasabye mu izina ryanjye. Musabe, muzahabwa, ngo umunezero wanyu ube wuzuye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo mbibabwiriye mu migani, ariko igihe kizaza, sinzavuganira namwe mu migani, ahubwo nzababwira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibya Data neruye. Uwo munsi muzasaba mu izina ryanjye; kandi simbabwira ko nzabasabira kuri Data,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuko na we abakunda ubwe, kuko mwankunze, mukizera yuko navuye ku Mana. Navuye kuri Data, nza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu isi; kandi isi ndayivamo, nsubire kuri Data. Abigishwa baravuga bati “Dore noneho ureruye, nta
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mugani uduciriye. Ubu tuzi yuko uzi byose, kandi ko utagomba ko umuntu wese agira icyo akubaza, ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyo gituma twizera ko wavuye ku Mana .” Yesu arabasubiza ati “ None murizeye? Dore igihe kirenda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gusohora, ndetse kirasohoye, ubwo muri butatane, umuntu wese ukwe, mukansiga njyenyine. Ariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: sindi jyenyine, kuko Data ari kumwe nanjye. Ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo mugire amahoro muri jye. Mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: isi mugira umubabaro, ariko nimuhumure, nanesheje isi.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI WO KUZAMUKA KWA KRISTO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, twemeye yuko Uwana wawe w’ikinege Yesu Kristo yazamutsenakajya mu ijuru.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko turakwinginga ngo abe ari ko uduha natwe kuzamuka, tukajyayo mu mutima no mu byo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: dutekereza, ngo duhore tubana na we iteka. Tubisabye mu izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO    Ibyakozwe 1:1-11
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: TEWOFILO we, Muri cya gitabo nanditse ibyo Yesu yabanje gukora no kwigisha byose, kugeza ku munsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yazamuriwe mu ijuru, amaze gutegeka intumwa yatoranije, azitegekesha Umwuka Wera. Amaze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubabazwa, ababonekera ari muzima, atanga ibimenyetso byinshi, agumya kubabonekera mu minsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mirongo ine, avuga iby’ubwami bw’Imana. Nuko abateraniriza hamwe, abategeka kutava I Yerusalemu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ati< Ahubwo murindire ibyo Data yasezeranije, ibyo nababwiye; kuko Yohana yabatirishaga amazi, ariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwebweho mu minsi mike muzabatirishwa Umwuka Wera”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko bamaze guterana, baramubaza bati< Mbese, Mwami, iki ni cyo gihe wenda kugaruriramo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwami mu Bisirayeli?” Arasubiza ati: “Si ibyanyu kumenya iby’iminsi cyangwa ibihe Data yegennye, ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubutware bwe wenyine. Icyakora muzahabwa imbaraga, Umwuka Wera nabamanukira; kandi muzaba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abagabo bo kumpamya I Yerusalemu n’I Yudaya yose, n’I Samamariya no kugeza ku mpera y’isi. “Amaze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuvuga atyo, azamurwa bakimureba, igicu kiramukingiriza. Bakiraramye batumbira mu ijuru, akigenda,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abagabo babiri barababonekera, bahagaze I ruhande rwabo bambaye imyenda year. Barababaza bati <
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yemwe bagabo b’I Galilaya, ni iki gitumye muhagaze mureba mu ijuru? Yesu ubakuwemo akazamurwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu ijuru, azaza atyo, nk’uko mumubonye ajya mu ijuru.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA   Mariko 16:14-20
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UBWANYUMA abonekera abigishwa be cumi n’umwe bicaye bafungura; abagaya ku bwo kutizera kwabo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: no kunangirwa kw’imitima kwabo, kuko batemereye abamubonye amaze kuzuka. Arababwira ati< Mujye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu bihugu byose, mwigishe abaremwe bose ubutumwa bwiza. Uwizera akabatizwa azakizwa; ariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: utizera azacirwaho iteka. Kandi ibimenyetso bizagumana n’abizera ngibi: bazirukana abadayimoni mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: izina ryanjye, bazavuga indimi nshya, bazafata inzoka, kandi ni banywa ikintu kica, nta cyo kizabatwara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: na hato, bazarambika ibiganza ku barwayi, bakire.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko Umwami Yesu, amaze kuvugana nab o, ajyanwa mu ijuru, yicara iburyo bw’Imana. Abo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: barasohoka, bigisha hose, Umwami Yesu ari kumwe nabo abafasha, akomeresha ijambo rye ibimenyetso
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byagendanaga na ryo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO IKURIKIRA UMUNSI WO KUZAMUKA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA, Mwami w’icyubahiro, twibuka yuko washyize hejuru Umwana wawe w’ikinege Yesu Kristo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukamuzamurana icyubahiro cyinshi, ukamujyana mu bwami bwawe bwo mu ijuru. Nuko turakwinginze,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntudusige nk’imfubyi, ahubwo udutumeho Umwuka wawe Wera, ngo aduhumurize, adufashe, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: atuzamure, atujyane ahantu umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo yatubanjirije kujya, ni we utegekana nawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Umwuka Wera, muri Imana imwe iteka ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO       1Petero 4:7-11
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: IHEREZO rya byose riri bugufi; kuko mugire ubwenge, mwirinde ibisindisha, mubone uko mugira umwete
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wo gusenga. Ariko ikiruta byose mukundane urukundo rwinshi, kuko urukundo rutwikira ibyaha byinshi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mucumbikirane, mutitotomba; kandi nkuko umuntu yahawe impano, abe ari ko muzigaburana, nk’uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bikwiriye ibisonga byiza by’ubuntu bw’Imana bw’uburyo bwinshi. Umuntu navuga, avuge nk’ubwirijwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Imana; nagabura ibyayo, abigabure nk’ufite imbaraga Imana itanga. Kugira ngo Imana ihimbazwe muri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose ku bwa Yesu Kristo, nyir’icyubahiro n’ubutware iteka ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA             Yohana 15:26-16:4
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UMUFASHA naza, uwo nzaboherereza ava kuri Data, ni we Mwuka w’ukuri ukomoka kuri Data,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azampamya ; kandi namwe mumpamye, kuko uhereye mbere na mbere mwari kumwe nanjye. Icyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mbabwiriye ibyo ni ukugira ngo hatagira ikibagusha. Bazabaca mu masinagogi, kandi igihe kigiye kuza,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uzabica wese azibwira ko akoreye Imana umurimo. Kandi ibyo bazabibakorera batyo, kuko batAminaye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data, nanjye Nanjye ntibAminaye. Ariko ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo igihe cyabyo ni kigera, muzibuke
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ko ari jye wabibabwiye.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.title: PENTEKOTE , NI WO MUNSI W’UMWUKA WERA

verses.text: PENTEKOTE , NI WO MUNSI W’UMWUKA WERA
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA, turagushimira yuko wohereje abantu bawe bakwizeye umucyo w’Umwuka wawe Wera, ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abigishe, nkuko twibuka uyu munsi. Nuko turakwingingira ko uwo Mwuka aduhesha guhitamo ibyiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muri byose, no kujya twishimira guhumuriza kwe kwera iminsi yose. Tubisabye ku bw’imirimo myiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo Yesu Umukiza wacu yadukoreye, uhorana nawe ku ngoma mu bumwe bw’uwo Mwuka, muri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana imwe iteka ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO            Ibyakozwe 2:1-11
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UMUNSI wa pentekote usohoye, bose bari bari hamwe mu mwanya umwe bahuje umutima. Nuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuriri ubatungura uvuye mu ijuru, umeze nk’uw’umuyaga uhuha cyane, ukwira inzu bari bicayemo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Haboneka indimi zigabanije zisa n’umuriro, ururimi rujya ku muntu wese wo muri bo. Bose buzuzwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwuka Wera, batangira kuvuga izindi ndimi, nk’uko Umwuka yahabaye kuzivuga .
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Muri Yerusalemu habaga Abayuda b’abaturage b’abanyadini, bari baraturutse mu mahanga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yose ari munsi y’ijuru. Uwo muriri ubaye, abantu benshi baratererana, batangazwa n’uko umuntu wese
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yumvise ba bandi bavuga ururimi rw’iwabo. Barumirwa bose, baratangara bati <Mbese aba bose bavuga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: si Abanyagalilaya? None se ni iki gitumye twese tubumva bavuga indimi z’iwacu za kavukire? Kandituri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abapariti n’ Abelamiti n’abatuye I Mesapotamiye n’I Yudaya n’i Kapadokiya n’I Ponto no mu Asiya n’I
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Furugiya n’I Pamfiliya no muri Egiputa no mu guhugu cy’I Libiya gihereranye n’I Kurene, n’Abaroma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: b’abashyitsi n’Abayuda n’abakomeza idini yabo, kandi n’Abakirete n’Abarabu, turabumva bavuga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibitangaza by’Imana mu ndimi z’iwacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA Yohana 14:15-31
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NIMUNKUNDA, muzitondera amategeko yanjye; nanjye nzasaba Data, na we azabaha undi mufasha wo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubana namwe ibihe byose, ni we Mwuka w’ukuri. Ntibishoboka ko ab’isi bamuhabwa, kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: batamurora, kandi batamuzi; ariko mwebweho muramuzi, kuko abana namwe, kandi azaba muri mwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Sinzabasiga nk’imfubyi, ahubwo nzaza aho muri. Hasigaye umwanya muto ab’isi ntibabe bakimbona,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ariko mwebweho muzambona; kuko ndiho, namwe muzabaho. Uwo munsi muzamenya  ko ndi muri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data, namwe mukaba muri jye, nanjye nkaba muri mwe. Ufite amategeko yanjye, akayitondera, ni we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: unkunda; kandi unkunda azakundwa na Data, najye nzamukunda, mwiyereke. Yuda, uteri Isikariyota,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aramubaza ati <Databuja, bibaye bite ko ugiye kutwiyereka, ntiwiyereke ab’isi?” Yesu aramusubiza ati <
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umuntu nankunda, azitondera ijambo ryanjye, na Data azamukunda; tuzaza aho ari, tugumane na we.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko utankunda, ntiyitondera amagambo yanjye; kandi iryo jambo mwumvise si iryanje, ahubwo n’irya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data wantumye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo mbibabwiye nkiri kumwe namwe, ariko Umufasha, ni we Mwuka Wera, uwo Data azatuma mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: izina ryanjye, ni we uzabigisha byose, abibutse ibyo nababwiye byose. Mbasigiye amahoro, amahohoro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yanjye ndayabahaye. Icyakora simbaha nk’uko ab’isi batanga. Imitima yanyu ntihagarare, kandi ntitinye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwumvise uko nababwiye nti ‘Ndagenda, nzagaruka aho muri.’ Iyaba mwankundaga, muba munejejwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’uko njya kwa Data, kuko Data anduta. Nuko rero mbibabwiye bitaraba, ngo ubwo bizaba, muzizere.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Sinkivugana namwe byinshi, kuko umutware w’ab’isi aza, kandi nta cyo amfiteho; ahubwo nkora uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data yantegetse, kugira ngo ab’isi bAminaye, ko mukunda. Nimuhaguruke, tuve hano.>
verses.speaker: all

chapters.title: UMUNSI WA 1 WO MU CYUMWERU CYA

verses.text: UMUNSI WA 1 WO MU CYUMWERU CYA
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: PENTEKOTE
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Isengesho ni rimwe n’iry’umunsi wa Pentekote
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO         Ibyakozwe   10:34-38
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                   Yohana3:16-21
verses.speaker: all

chapters.title: UMUNSI WA 2 WO MUYUMWERU CYA PENTEKOTE

verses.text: UMUNSI WA 2 WO MUYUMWERU CYA PENTEKOTE
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO            Ibyakozwe  8:14-17
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                Yohana 10:1-10
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ISABATO Y’UBUTATU
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byoseidashira, twebwe abantu bawe turagushimira yuko wadufashije kwemera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iby’ukuri waduhishuriye, tukAminaya yuko uri Ubutatu buhoraho, ari bwo Data wa twese n’Umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Umwuka Wera, tukabuhamirisha kwemera kwacu. Kandi turagushimira yuko watwigishije ko ubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Butatu ari Imana imwe. None turagusenga, dushima Ubumana bwawe bukomeye. Nuko turakwinginze,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uturinde dukomeze kwizera ibyo byose, kandi ujye uturinda ibyago byose byadutera, ni Wowe Mnan
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ihoraho uri ku ngoma, kandi uri Imana imwe iteka ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO    Ibyahishuriwe yohana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: HANYUMA  y’ibyo, ngiye kubona mbona mu ijuru urugi rukinguye, kandi numva rya jwi nabanje kumva
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: rivugana nanjye, rimeze nk’iry’impanda, rimbwira riti “Zamuka uze hano, nkwereke ibikwiriye kuzabaho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hanyuma y’ibyo.” Muri ako kanya mba mu Mwuka. Nuko mbona intebe y’ubwami iteretswe ,mu ijuru,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: mbona n’Uyicayeho. Uwari uyicayeho yasaga n’ibuye ryitwa yasipi n’iryitwa sarudiyo; kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umukororombya wari ugose iyo ntebe, usa na simarigido. Iyo ntebe yari igoswe n’izindi ntebe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: myakumyabiri n’enye; kuri izo ntebe mbona abakuru makumyabiri na bane bazicayeho, bambaye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imyenda yera, no ku mitwe yabo bari bambaye amakamba y’izahabu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuri ya ntebe y’ubwami haturukaga imirabyo n’amajwi no guhinda kw’inkuba; kandi amatabaza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arindwi yaka umuriro yamurikiraga imbere y’iyo ntebe hariho igisa n’inyanja y’ibirahuri isa n’isarabwayi;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi hagati y’iyo ntebe no kuyizenguruka hari ibizima bine byuzuye amaso imbere n’inyuma. Ikizima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cya mbere cyasaga n’intare, icya kabiri gisa n’ikimasa, icya gatatu cyari gifite mu maso hasa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ah’umuntu, naho icya kane cyasga n’ikizu kiguruka. Ibyo bizima uko ari bine bifite amababa atandatu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: atandatu, byuzuye amaso impande zose no mu nda; ntibiruhuka ku manywa na nijoro, ahubwo bihora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bivuga biti, “Uwera Uwera Uwera, ni Mwami Imana ishobora byose; ni yo yahozeho, kandi iriho,kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: izahoraho.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo bizima bihaye iyicara kuri ya ntebe ihoraho iteka ryose, icyubahiro no guhimbazwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ishimwe, ba bakuru makumyabiri na bane bikubita imbere y’Iyicara kuri ya  ntebe, bakaramya ihoraho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iteka ryose, bakajugunya amakamba yabo imbere y’iyo ntebe , bavuga bati, “Mwami wacu Mana yacu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukwiriye guhabwa icyubahiro no guhimbazwa n’ubutware koko, kuko ari Wowe waremye byose. Igituma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: biriho, kandi icyatumye biremwa, ni uko wabishatse.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                        Yohana 3:1-16
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: HARIHO umuntu wo mu bafarisayo witwaga Nikodemo, umutware wo mu Bayuda.yasanze Yesu nijoro,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aramubwira ati, “Mwigisha, tuzi yuko uri umwigisha wavuye ku Mana, kuko ari ntawubasha gukora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibimenyetso ujya ukora, keretse Imana iri kumwe na we.” Yesu aramusubiza ati, “Ni ukuri , ni ukuri,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ndakubwira yuko umuntu utabyawe ubwa kabiri atabasha kubona ubwami bw’Imana”. Nikodemo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aramubaza ati, “Mbese umuntu yabasha ate kubyarwa akuze. Yakongera agasubira mu nda ya nyina ,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akabyarwa?” Yesu aramusubiza ati, “Ni ukuri, ni ukuri, ndakubwira yuko umuntu utabyawe n’amazi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Umwuka, atabasha kwinjira mu bwami bw’Imana. Ikibyarwa n’umubiri nacyo n’ umubiri, n’ikibyarwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Umwuka nacyo n’umwuka. Witangazwa n’uko nkubwiye yuko bibakwiriye kubyarwa ubwa kabiri.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umuyaga uhuha aho ushaka, ukumva guhuha kwawo, aeiko ntumenye aho uva cyangwa ujya. Ni ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uwabyawe n’Umwuka wese amera.” Nikodemo aramusubiza ati,” Ibyo byashoboka bite?” Yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aramusubiza ati, “ Ukaba uri umwigisha w’Abisirayeli, ntumenye ibyo! Ni ukuri ,ni ukuri ndakubwira yuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tuvuga ibyo tuzi, kandi duhamya ibyo twabonye: nyamara ntimwemera ibyo duhamya. Ubwo nababwiye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iby’isi, ntimwemere, nimbabwira iby’ijuru, muzemera mute? Nta wazamutse ngo ajye mu ijuru, keretse
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwana w’umuntu wavuye mu ijuru, akamanuka akza mu isi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi nkuko Mose yamanitse inzoka mu butayu, niko Umwana w’umuntu akwiriye kumanikwa,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo umwizera wese abone guhabwa ubugingo budashira. Kuko Imana yakunze abari mu isi cyane
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byatumye itanga Umwana wayo w’ikinege, kugira ngo umwizera wese atarimbuka, ahubwo ahabwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubugingo buhoraho.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO YA 1 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA, ni wowe mbaraga y’abakwingingira bose, turakwinginze wemerane imbabazi ibyo tugusaba;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi kuko integer nke za kamere yacu ishira zitubuza kugira icyiza cyose dukora tudafashijwe nawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: emera kudufashisha ubuntu bwawe, kugira ngo tukunezereshe kwitondera amategeko yawe, ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: dushaka gukora n’ibyo dukora na byo bishimwe nawe. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO               1 Yohana4:7-12
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: BAKUNDWA, dukundane, kuko urukundo ruva ku Mana. Umuntu wese ukunda yabyawe n’Imana, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azi Imana. Udakunda ntazi Imana, kuko Imana ari urukundo. Iki nicyo cyerekanye urukundo rw’Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muri twe: ni uko Imana yatumye Umwana wayo w’ikinege mu isi, kugira ngo tubone uko tubeshwaho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nawe. Muri iki ni mwo urukundo ruri: si uko twebwe twakunze Imana, ahubwo ni uko Imana ari yo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yadukunze, igatuma Umwana wayo kuba impongamo y’ibyaha byacu. Bakundwa, ubwo Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yadukunze ityo, natwe dukwiriye gukundana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uhereye kera kose ntihigeze kubaho umuntu wabonye Imana; nyamara ni dukundana, Imana iguma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muri twe, urukundo rwayo rutunganirizwa muri twe rwose. Iki nicyo kitumenyesha ko yuguma muri yo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nay o ikaguma muri twe, ni uko yaduhaye ku Mwuka wayo. Natwe twarabibonye, kandi duhamya ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data wa twese yatumye Umwana we kuba Umukiza w’abari mu isi. Uvuga yuko Yesu ari Umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’Imana, Imana iguma muri we, na we akaguma mu Mana. Natwe twAminaye kandi twizeye urukundo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana idukunda. Imana ni urukundo, kandi uguma mu rukundo aguma mu Mana, Imana ikaguma muri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we. Ibyo ni byo bimaze gutunganya rwose urukundo muri twe, kugira ngo tuzatinyuke ku munsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’amateka, kuko uko ari , ari ko turi muri iyi isi. Mu rukundo ntiharimo ubwoba, ahubwo urukundo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rutunganijwe rwose rumara ubwoba, kuko ubwoba buzana igihano, kandi ufite ubwoba ntiyari yashikira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urukundo rutunganijwe rwose. Turayikunda, kuko ari yo yabanje kudukunda. Umuntu navuga ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: “Nkunda Imana,” akanga mwene Se, yabonye, atabasha gukunda Imana atabonye. Kandi dufite iri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tegeko ryavuye kuri yo, ngo ukunda Imana, akunde na mwene Se.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA               Luka 16:19-31
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: HARIHO umutunzi wambaraga imyenda y’imihengeri n’iy’ ibitare byiza, iminsi yose yahoraga adamaraye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi hariho n’umukene witwaga Lazaro, wahoraga aryamye ku muryango w’uwo mukire, umubiri we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wuzuyeho ibisebe. Imbwa na zo zarazaga zikamurigata mu bisebe; kandi yifuzwaga guhazwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ubuvungukira buva ku meza y’uwo mutunzi. Bukeye umukene arapfa, abamarayika bamujyana mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gituza cya Aburahamu; n’umutunzi na we arapfa, arahambwa. Ageze ikuzimu, arababazwa cyane;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yubuye amaso, areba Aburahamu ari kure, na Lazaro ari mu gituza cye. Arataka ati< Aburahamu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: sogokuru, mbabarira, wohererze Lazaro, akoze isonga y’urutoke rwe mu tuzi, atonyagirize ku rurimi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuko mbabzwa n’uyu muriro.” Aburahamu aramubwira ati <Mwana wanjye, ibuka yuko wahawe ibyiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byawe ukiriho; Lazaro na we yahawe ibibi; none aguwe neza hano, naho wowe urababazwa cyane. Kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uretse n’ibyo, dore, hariho umworera munini bikabije hagati yacu namwe, washyiriweho kugira ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abashaka kuva hano kuza aho muri batabibasha, kandi n’abava aho batagera hano. Na we ati<
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ndakwinginze, sogokuru, ngo nibura umwohereze kwa data, kuko mfite bana data batanu; ababurire,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo nab o batazaza aha hantu ho kubabarizwa cyane. “ Aburahamu aramubwira ati “ Bafite Mose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’abahanuzi, babumvire.” Na we ati “oya, sogokuru Aburahamu, ahubwo nihagira uzuka akabasanga,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazihana.” Aramubwira ati “ Nibatumvira Mose n’abahanuzi, ntibakwemera baho umuntu yazuka.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO YA 2 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MWAMI Mana, turagushimira yuko ari ntabwo ubura gufasha no gutegeka abana bawe urera ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakubahe iteka, kandi bagukunde. Nuko turakwinginze, ujye uturinda, udutabare, utegekeshe ibyacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwenge bwiza bwinshi, uduhe kujya twubaha izina ryaweryera, tukarikunda. Tubisabye mu izina rya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO              1Yohana 3:13-24
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BENE Data, ntimutangazwe n;uko ba’isi babanga. Twebwe tuzi yuko twavuye mu rupfu tukagera mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bugingo, kuko dukunda bene Data. Udakunda aguma mu rupfu. Umuntu wese wanga mwene se ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwicanyi ; kandi muzi yuko ari nta mwicanyi ufite ubugingo buhoraho muri we. Iki nicyo kitumenyesha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urukundo icyo ari cyo, ni uko Yesu yatanze ubugingo bwe ku bwacu; natwe ikidukwiriye ni uko twatanga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubugingo bwacu ku bwa bene Data.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko se, ufite ibintu byo mu isi, akareba ko mwene se akennye, akamukingira imbabazi ze,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urukundo rw’Imana rwaguma muri we gute? Bana bato, twe gukundana urumamo mu magambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyangwa ku rurimi, ahubwo dukundane mu byo dukora no mu by’ukuri. Icyi ni cyo kizatumenyesha ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turi ab’ukuri, tukabona uko duhumuriza imita yacu imbere yayo, nubwo imitima yacu iducira urubanza,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuko Imana iruta imitima yacu, kandi izi byose. Bakundwa, imitma yacu nitaducira urubanza, turatinyuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbere y’Imana , kandi icyo dusaba cyose tugihabwa nay o, kuko twitondera amategeko yayo, tugakora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibishimwa imbere yayo. Itegeko ryayo ni iri; ni uko twizera izina ry’Umwana wayo Yesu Kristo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tugakundana, nk’uko yadutegetse. Kandi uwitondera amategeko yayo aguma muri yo, nay o ikaguma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muri we ; kandi ikitumenyesha ko iguma muri twe, ni Umwuka yaduhaye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA               Luka 14:16-24
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: HARIHO umuntu watekeshaje ibyo kurya byinshi, ararika benshi. Igihe cyo kurya gisohoye, atuma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umugaragu we kubwira abararitswe ati, “Nimuze,kuko bimaze kwitegurwa.” Bose batangira gushaka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: impamvu z’urwitwazo bahuje umutima. Uwambereati, “ naguze umurima, nkwiriye kuwureba,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ndakwinginze, mbabarira.” Undi ati, “ Naguze amapfizi cumi yo guhinga, ngiye kuyagerageza,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ndakwinginze, mbabrira.” Undi ati, “ Narongoye, ni cyo gituma ntabashakuza.” Nuko uwo mugaragu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: agarutse abwira shebuja uko byagenze. Maze nyiri urugo ararakara, abwira umugaragu we ati,” Sohoka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: vuba, ujye mu nzira nini n’into zo mu mudugudu uzane hano abakene n’ibirema n’impumyi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’abacumbagira.” Umugaragu we agarutse aravuga ati,< Databuja, icyo utegetse ndagikoze; nyamara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: haracyari umwanya w’abandi.” Shebuja abwira umugaragu we ati< sohoka ugende mu nzira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nyabagendwa no mumihora, ubahate kwinjira, kugira ngo urugo rwanjye rwuzure. Ndababwira yuko ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nta muntu wo muri ba bararikwa uzarya ibyo nabiteguriye.
verses.speaker: all
