verses.text: ISABATO YA 3 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MWAMI MANA, turakwinginze, utwumvane imbagazi, kandi ubwo waduhaye umutima ukunda cyane
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gusenga, uduhumurize, uko tuzabona akaga kose cyangwa ibyago byose; kandi ujye uturindisha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gutabara kwawe gukomeye. Tubisabye mu izina tya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO                1 Petero 5:5-11
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MWESE mukenyere kwicisha bugufi, kugira ngo mukomerane, kuko Imana irwanya abibone, naho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abicisha bugufi ikabahera ubuntu. Nuko mwicisha bugufi muri munsi y’ukuboko gukomeye kw’Imana,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo ibashyire hejuru mu gihe gikwiriye. Muyikoreze amaganya yanyu yose, kuko yita kuri mwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwirinde ibisindisha, mube maso, kuko umurezi wanyu Satani azerera nk’intare yivuga, ashaka uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aconshomera. Mumurwanye mushikamye, kandi mufite kwizera gukomeye, muzi yuko bana Data bari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu isi muhuje imibabaro. Kandi Imana, igira ubuntu bwose yabahamagariye ubwiza bwayo buhoraho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: buri muri Kristo, izabatunganya rwose ubwayo, ibakomeze, ibongerere imbaraga, nimumara kubabazwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akanya gato. Icyubahiro n’ubutware bibe ibyayo iteka ryose. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA              Luka 15:1-10
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NUKO abakoresha b’ikoro bose n’abanyabyaha baramwegera ngo bamwumve. Abafarisayo n’abanditsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: barabyivovotera bati < uyu yiyegereza abanyabyaha, kandi agasangira nabo.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abacira uyu mugani ati < Ni nde muri mwe waba afite intama ijana, akazimiza imwe muri zo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntiyasiga izindi mirongo urwenda n’icyenda mu gasozi, akajya gushaka iyazimiye, kugeza aho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aribuyibonere? Iyo ayibonye, ayiterera ku bitugu yishimye; yagera mu rugo, agahamagara inshuti ze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’abaturanyi be, akababwira ati ‘Twishimane, kuko mbonye intama yanjye yari yazimiye.’ Ndababwira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yuko mu ijuru bazishimira batyo umunyabyaha umwe wihannye kumurutisha abakiranuka mirongo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urwenda n’icyenda badakwiriye kwihana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Cyangwa umugore waba afite ibice cumi by’ifeza, yaburamo kimwe, ntiyakongeza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: itabaza, agakubura mu nzu, akagira umwete wo gushaka kugeza aho akibonera? Iyo akibonye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahamagara inshuti ze n’abaturanyi be, akababwira ati “ Twishimane, kuko mbonye igice nari nabuze.’
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ndababwira yuko ari ko haba umunezero mwinshi imbere y’abamarayika b’Imana bishimira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umunyabyaha umwe wihannye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO YA 4 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA, ni wowe Murinzi w’abakwiringira bose; ni wowe wenyine imbaraga zibonerwamo, kandi nta
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wubasha kuba uweraadafashwa na we. Nuko, nk’uko ari wowe udutegeka, utuyobore, turakwinginze,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ugwize imbabazi zawe kuri twe, uzidusagirize, kugira ngo duce mu by’iyi si bishira vuba dukora ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ushima, uburyo butuma tutazabura ibyiza byo mu ijuru bidashira. Uduhe ibyo, Data wa twese wo mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ijuru, kuko tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO           Abaroma 8:18-23
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MBONYE yuko imibabaro y’iki gihe idakwiriye kugereranywa n’ubwiza tuzahishurirwa; kuko ndetse
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ibyaremwe byose bitegerazanya amatsiko guhishurwa kw’abana b’Imana. Kuko ibyaremwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byashyizwe mu bubata bw’ibitagira umumaro; icyakora si ku bw’ubushake bwabyo, ahubwo ni ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwubushake bw’Uwabubushyizemo; yiringira yuko nabyo bizaturwa kuri ubwo bubata bwo kubora,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bikinjira muri uwo mudendezo w’ubwiza bw’abana b’Imana. Tuzi yuko ibyaremwe byose binihira hamwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bikaramukirwa hamwe kugeza ubu; ariko ibyo bias, ahubwo natwe abafite umuganura w’Umwuka ,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tunihira mu mitima yacu, dutegereza guhindurwa abana b’Imana, ari ko gucungurwa kw’imibiri yacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                  Luka 6.36-42
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MUGIRIRANE imbabazi, nk’uko so na we azigirira; kandi ntimugacire abandi urubanza mu mitima yanyu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo namwe mutazarucirwa; kandi ntimugatsindishe, namwe mutazatsindishwa; mubabarire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abandi, namwe muzababarirwa; mutange, namwe muzahabwa; urugero rwiza rutsindagiye, rucugushije,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rusesekaye, ni rwo muzagererwa, kuko urugero mugereramo ari rwo muzagererwamo namwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abacira umugani, ati <Mbese impumyi yabasha kurandata indi mpumyi? Zombi ntizagwa mu mwobo?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwigishwa ntaruta umwigisha, ahubwo umwigisha wese, iyo atunganye rwose mu byo yigishijwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amera nk’umwigisha we. Ni ki gituma ureba agatotsi kari mu jisho rya mwenen so, ukirengagiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umugogo uri mu ryawe? Wabasha ute kubwira mwene so, uti ‘Mwene data, henga ngutokore agatotsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kari mu jisho ryawe,’ nawe nturebe umugogo uri mu ryawe? Wa ndyarya we! Banza wikuremo umugogo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uri mu jisho ryawe, abe ari ho ubona uko utokora agatotsi kari mu jisho rya mwene so.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO YA 5 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MWAMI MANA, turakwinginze, ujye utegeka ibibaho muri iyi si, bitungane neza, kugira ngo Itorero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryawe rigukorerane ibyishimo, rikubashye kandi rituje. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO 1 Petero 3:8-15
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: IBISIGAYE, mwese muhuze imitima, mubabarane, kandi mukundane nk’abavandimwe, mugirirane
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbabazi mwicisha bugufi mu mitima . ntimukiture umuntu inabi yabagiriye cyangwa igitutsi yabatutse;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahubwo mumwiture kumusabira umugisha, kuko ari byo mwahamagariwe, kugira ngo namwe muragwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umugisha. Kuko byanditswe ngo “ Ushaka gukunda ubugingo  no kubona iminsi myiza, abuze ururimi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rwe rutavuga ikibi, n’iminwa ye itavuga iby’uburiganya. Kandi azibukire ibibi, akore ibyiza, ashake
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amahoro, ayakurikire kugira ngo ayashyikire. Kuko amaso y’Uwiteka ari ku bakiranutsi, n’amatwi ye ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ku byo basaba. Ariko igitsure cy’Uwiteka kiri ku nkozi z’ibibi.” Mbese ni nde uzabagirira nabi, ni mugira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ishyaka ry’ibyiza? Icyakora, nubwo mwababazwa babahora gukiranuka, mwaba muhiriwe. Ntimugatinye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyo babatinyisha, kandi ntimugaharike imitima; ahubwo mwubahe Kristo mu mitima yanyu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA             Luka 5:1-11
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: YESU yari agahagaze mu kibaya cy’inyanja Y’ I Genesereti; abantu benshi bamubyiganiraho, ngo bumve
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ijambo ry’Imana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abona amato abiri atitse ku nkombe y’inyanja, ariko abarobyi bari bayavuyemo, bamesa inshundura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: zabo. Yikira mu bwato bumwe bwari ubwa Simoni, amusaba kubutsuraho hato ngo buve ku nkombe;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aricara, yigisha abantu ari mu bwato, arangije kuvuga, abwira Simoni ati <igira imuhengeri, mujugunye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: inshundura, murobe.” Simoni aramusubiza ati <Databuja, twakesheje ijoro dukora cyane nyamara nta
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyo twafashe. Ariko kuko ubivuze, reka nzijugunye.” Babikoze  bafata ifi nyinshi cyane, ndetse
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: inshundura zabo zenda gucika. Barembuza bagenzi babo bari mu bundi bwato, ngo baze babatabare;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: baraza, buzuza amato yombi, bituma yenda kurengerwa. Simoni Petero, ngo abibone atyo, yikubita
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbere ya Yesu, ati <Va aho ndi, Databuja, kuko ndi umunyabyaha.” Kuko ubwe yari yumiwe n’abari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kumwe na we bose, babonye izo fi bafashe; na Yakobo na Yohana bene Zebedayo, bari bafatanije na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Simoni, nabo birabatangaza. Yesu abwira Simoni, ati< Witinya; uhereye none uzajya uroba abantu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bamaze kugeza amato yabo ku nkombe, basiga byose, baramukurikira,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO YA 6 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA, watunganirije abagukunda ibyiza biruta ibyo umuntu wese yAminaya n’ubwenge bwe. Nuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turakwinginze, gwiza urukundo mu mitima yacu, kugira ngo dukunde tukurutisha  ibindi byose, tubone
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: guhabwa ibyo wasezeranije biruta ibyo twabasha kwifuza byose, ku bwa Yesu Kristo. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO   Abaroma 6:-11
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NTIMUZI yuko twese ababatirijwe muri Yesu Kristo, twabatwirijwe no mu rupfu rwe? Nuko rero ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw’umubatizo twahambanywe na we mu rupfu rwe, kugira ngo, nk’uko Kristo yazuwe n’ubwiza bwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data wa twese, abe ari na ko natwe tugendera mu bugingo bushya. Ubwo twateranijwe na we gusangira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urupfu nk’urwe, ni ko tuzaba duteranujwe na we gusangira kuzuka nk’ukwe. Kandi tumenye iki, yuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umunru wacu wa kera yabambanywe na we, kugira ngo umubiri w’ibyaha ukurweho, twe kugumya kuba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbata z’ibyaha; kuko uwapfuye aba atsindishirijwe ibyaha. Ariko niba twarapfanye na Kristo, twizera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yuko tuzabanaho na we, kuko tuzi yuko Kristo, amaze kuzuka, atagipfa; urupfu rukaba rutakimufiteho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urutabi. Urwo rupfu yapfuye, yarapfuye rimwe risa ku bw’ibyaha, ariko ubwo ariho, ariho ku bw’Imana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abe ari ko namwe mwiyumvamo ko mwapfuye ku byaha, mukaba muriho ku Mana muri Kristo Yesu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA   Matayo 5:20-26
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kandi ndababwira ko gukiranuka kwanyu ni kutaruta ukw’abanditsi n’ukw’Abafarisayo, mutazinjira mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwami bwo mu ijuru. Mwumvise ko abakera babwiwe ngo “ntukice, uwica akwiriye guhanwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’abacamanza. Ariko jyeweho ndababwira yuko umuntu wese urakarira mwene se akwiriye guhanwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’abacamanza; uzatuka mwene se ati< Wa gicucu we” Akwiriye gushyirwa mu muriro w’I Gehinomu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko nujyana ituro ryawe ku gicaniro, ukahibukira mwene so ko afite icyo mupfa, usigeyo ituro ryawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbere y’igicaniro ubanze ugende wikiranure na mwene so, uhereko ugaruke uture ituro ryawe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wikiranure vuba n’ukurega mukiri mu nzira; ukurega ye kugushyikiriza umucamanza, umucamanza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ataguha umusirikare, akagushyira mu nzu y’imbohe. Ndakubwira ukuri yuko utazavamo rwose, keretse
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wishyuye umwenda wose, hadasigaye ikuta na rimwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO YA 7 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MWAMI MANA, nyir’imbaraga, ni wowe urema ibyiza byose, ni wowe ubitanga. Tera mu mitima yacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukunda izina ryawe, nk’uko ingurukira iterwa mu giti, utugwizemo idini y’ukuri, utubeshesheho kugira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: neza kwawe kose, kandi ku bw’imbabazi zawe ujye ubiturindiramo tutabitezukaho. Tubisabye mu Izina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO              Abaroma 6:19-23
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: IBYO mbivuze nk’umuntu ku bw’intege nke z’imibiri yanyu kuko, nk’uko mwahaga ibiteye isoni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ubugome ingingo zanyu kuba imbata zabyo, bigatuma muba abagome, abe ari ko na none muha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukiranuka ingingo zanyu kuba imbata zako, kugira ngo mwezwe. Ubwo mwari mukiri imbata z’ibyaha,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntimwatwarwaga no gukiranuka. Mbese icyo gihe mweraga imbuto ki, zitari ibibakoza isoni ubu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amaherezo yaybyo akaba ari urupfu. Ariko noneho, ubwo mwabatuwe ku byaha, mukaba imbata
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: z’Imana , mwifitiye imbuto zanyu, ari zo kwezwa, kandi amaherezo yanyu ni ubugingo buhoraho; kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibihembo by’ibyaha ari urupfu, ariko impano y’Imana ni ubugingo buhoraho muri Yesu kristo Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA   Mariko 8:1-9
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MURI IYO minsi abantu benshi bongeye guterana, ntibabona ibyo kurya; Yesu ahamagara abigishwa be,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arababwira ati “ Aba bantu banteye impuhwe, kuko uyu munsi ari uwa gatatu turi kumwe, none bakaba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: badafite ibyo kurya. Nu mbasezerera ngo basubire iwabo biriwe ubusa, baragwira isari mu nzira; kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bamwe ari abakure .” abaza abigishwa be ati: “Mufite imitsima ingahe? “ Baramusubiza bati: <Ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: irindwi,> ategeka abantu ko bicara hasi, yenda iyo mitsima irindwi, arayishimira, arayimanyagura, ayiha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abigishwa be, ngo bayibashyire; barayibaha. Bari bafite n’udufi duke; na two aradushimira, ategeka ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: batubaha. Bararya, barahaga, bateranya ubuvungukira busigaye, bwuzura ibitebo birindwi. Bari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’ibihumbi bine. Arabasezerera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO YA 8 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA, uhora utegeka ibyo mu ijuru n’ibyo mu isi byose, ubitegekesha ubwenge,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turakwinginze,twitonze, udukureho ibibasha kugira icyo bidutwara byose, uduhe ibitugirira umumaro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tubisabye mu Izina ry’Umwami wacu Yesu Ktristo. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO  Abaroma 8:12-17
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NUKO RERO, bene Data, turimo umwenda, ariko si uwa kamere y’imibiri yacu, ngo dukurikize ibyayo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuko niba mukurikiza ibya kamere y’umubiri, muzapfa; ariko ni mwicisha Umwuka ingezo za kamere,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muzarama. Abayoborwa n’Umwuka w’Imana bose nibo bana b’Imana; kuko mutahawe umwuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’ububata ubasubiza mu bwoba, ahubwo mwahawe umwuka ubahindura abana b’Imana udutakisha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tuti “ Aba, Data!” Umwuka w’Imana ubwe ahamanya n’umwuka wacu, yuko turi  abana b’Imana; kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwo turi abana bayo, turi n’abaragwa; ndetse turi abaragwa b’Imana, turi abaraganwa na Kristo, niba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tubabarana na we, ngo duhanwe ubwiza na we.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA:Matayo 7:15-21
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MWIRINDE abahanuzi b’ibinyoma, baza aho muri basa n’intama, ariko imbere ni amasega aryana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MuzabAminayera ku mbuto zabo. Mbese hari abasoroma imizabibu ku mugenge, cyangawa imbuto
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: z’umutini ku gitovu? Nuko igiti cyiza cyera imbuto nziza, ariko igiti kibi cyera imbuto mbi. Igiti cyiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntikibasha kwera imbuto nziza, kandi n’igiti kibi ntikibasha kwera imbuto nziza. Igiti cyose kitera imbuto
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbuto nziza kiracibwa, kikajugunywa mu muriro. Nuko muzAbaminayera ku mbuto zabo. Umuntu wese
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umbwira ati< Mwami, Mwani,” si we uzinjira mu bwami bwo mu ijuru, keretse ukora ibyo Data wo mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ijuru ashaka. Benshi bazambaza kuri uwo munsi bati < Mwami, Mwami, ntitwahanuraga mu izina ryawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntitwirukanaga abadayimoni mu izina ryawe, ntitwakoraga ibitangaza byinshi mu izina ryawe? Ni bwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nzaberurira nti <Sinigeze kubAminaya, nimumve imbere, mwa nkozi z’ibibi mwe.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO YA 9 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MWAMI Mana, twemeye yuko tutabasha gukora icyiza na kimwe tudafashijwe nawe. Nuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turakwinginze, ugwize muri twe umutima ugambirira ibyiza tukabikra, kugira ngo tujye dukora ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ushima dufashwa nawe. Tubisabye mu izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BENE Data, sinanshaka ko mutAminaya yuko basogokuruza bose bari munsi ya cya gicu, kandi yuko bose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: baciye mu Nyanja yigabanije, bose bakabatirizwa muri icyo gicu no muri iyo Nyanja gutegekwa na Mose,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bose bagasangira bya byo kurya by’Umwuka na bya byo kunywa by’Umwuka; kuko banywaga ku gitare
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cy’Umwuka cyabakurikiraga, kandi icyo gitare cyari Kristo. Ariko benshi muri bo Imana ntiyabashimye; ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyo cyatumye barimbukira mu butayu. Ariko ibyo byababereyo kugira ngo bitubere akabarore, ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tutifuza ibibi, nku’uko bo babyifuje. Nuko rero, ntimugasenge ibishushanyo, nk’uko bamwe bo muri bo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babisengaga, nkuko byanditswe ngo “Abantu bicajwe no kurya no kunywa, bahugurutswa no gukina.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi ntimugasambane, nk’uko bamwe bo muri bo basambanaga, bigatuma hapfa abantu inzovu ebyiri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ibihumbi bitatu ku munsi umwe. Kandi ntimukagerageze Umwami wacu, nk’uko bamwe bo muri bo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bamugerageje, bakicwa n’inzoka. Ntimukivovote, nk’uko bamwe muri bo bivovose, bakicwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’umurimbuzi. Ibyo byabereyeho kutubera akabarore, kandi byandikiwe kuduhugura, twebwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abasohoreweho n’imperuka y’ibihe. Nuko rero uwibwira ko ahagaze, yirinde atagwa. Nta kigeragezo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kibasha kubageraho kitari rusange mu bantu; kandi Imana ni iyo kwizerwa, kuko itazabakundira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugeragezwa ibiruta ibyo mushobora, ahubwo hamwe n’ikibagerageza izabacira akanzu, kugira ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mubone uko mubasha kucyihanganira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA : Luka 16:1-9
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: YESU yabwiye abigishwa be, ati <Hariho umutunzi wari ufite igisonga cye, bakimugeraho ko cyaya ibintu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bye. Aragihamagara, arakibwira ati “Ibyo nkumvaho ni ibiki?’ Murikira ibyo nakubikije, kuko utagikwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuba igisonga cyanjye. Icyo gisonga kiribwira kiti ‘ Ko databuja aribunyage ubutware bwanjye, nkaba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntashobora guhinga, nkagira isoni zo gusabiririza! Ndagira nte? Have! Nzi icyo nzakora, kugira ngo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nimara kunyagwa, bazandaze mu mazu yabo.’ Ahamagara ufite umwenda wa shebuja wese, abaza uwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mbere ati< Harya databuja akwishyuza iki?’ Aramusubiza ati < Inshuro ijana z’amavuta y’elayo. Na we ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: < Enda urwandiko rwawe, wicare vuba, wandike mirongo itanu. Abaza undi ati < Harya wishyuzwa iki?’
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Aramusubiza ati < Inshuro ijana z’amasaka.’ Aramubwira ati< Enda urwandiko rwawe, wandike mirongo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: inani.’ Nuko shebuja ashima icyo gisonga kubi kuko cyakoze iby’ubwenge, kuko abana b’iyi si ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abanyabwenge mu byo ku ngoma yabo kururta abana b’umucyo. Kandi ndababwira nti <Ubutunzi bubi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mubushakisha inshuti, kugira ngo, nibushira, bazabakire mu buturo bw’iteka.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO YA 10 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MWAMI  MANA, twebwe abantu bawe turagusaba twitonze kugira ngo utegere amatwi amasengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yacu, utwumvane imbabazi. Kandi uduhe kugusaba ibyo ushima, kugira ngo duhabwe ibyo dusaba.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tubisabe mu izina rya Yesu Umwami wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO       1 Abakorinto 12:1-11
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BENE Data, ibyerekeye impano z’Umwuka sinshaka ko mutabimenya. Muzi yuko mukiri abapagani
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwayobyagwa, mukajya ku bigirwamana bitabasha kuvuga, uko mwabijyanywagaho kose. Ni cyo gituma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mbAminayesha yuko ari nta muntu ubwirijwe n’umwuka w’Imana uvuga ati < Yesu ni ikivume”, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nta muntu ubasha kuvuga ati < Yesu ni Umwami, atabibwirijwe n’Umwuka Wera”.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icyakore, hariho impano z’uburyo bwinshi, ariko Umwuka ni umwe. Kandi hariho uburyo bwinshi bwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugabura iby’Imana, ariko umwami ni umwe. Hariho n’uburyo bwinshi bwo gukora, ariko Imana ikorera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose muri byose ni imwe, umuntu wese agahabwa ikimwerekanaho Umwuka, kugira ngo bose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bafashwe. Umwe aheshwa ijambo ry’ubwenge n’Umwuka, undi agaheshwa n’uwo Mwuka ijambo ryo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kumenya, undi agaheshwa n;uwo Mwuka kwizera, undi agaheshwa n’uwo Mwuka impano yo gukiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: indwara. Undi agahabwa gukora ibitangaza, undi agahabwa guhanura, undi agahabwa kurobanura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imyuka, undi agahabwa kuvuga indi nyinshi, undi agahabwa gusobanura indimi; ariko ibyo byose uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwuka ni we ubikorera muri bo, agabira umuntu wese uko ashaka.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA  Luka 19:41-46
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: AGEZE hafi, abona umurwa, arawuririra, ati < Uyu munsi nawe, iyo umenya ibyaguhesha amahoro! Ariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: noneho bihishwe amaso yawe. Kuko iminsi izaza, ubwo abanzi bawe bazakubakaho uruzitiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bazakugota, bazakurinda cyane impande zose; kandi bazagutsembana n’abana bawe batuye muri wowe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ntibazagusigira ibuye rigeretse ku rindi, kuko utamenye igihe wagenderewe.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yinjira mu rusengero, atangira kwitukana abaguriragamo, arababwira ati< Handitswe ngo “Inzu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yanjye izaba iyo gusengerwamo; ariko mwebwe mwayihinduye isenga y’abambuzi.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko  yigishiriza mu rusengero iminsi yose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISABATO YA 11 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA, turagushimira yuko cyane cyane werekanishishe imbaraga zawe zishobora byose kubabarira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abantu no kubagirira ibambe. None uduhere ubuntu bwinshi ku bw’imbabazi zawe, kugira ngo duce mu
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: nzira amategeko yawe yadushyize imbere, duhabwe ibyiza wasezeranije ku bwo kugira neza kwawe;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hanyuma tuzahabwe umugabane w’ubutunzi bwawe bwo mu ijuru. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umwami wacu. Amina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO             1 Abakorinto 15:1-11
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BENE Data, ndabAminayesha ubutumwa bwiza nababwirije ubwo mwakiriye mukabukomereramo, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mugakizwa na bwo, niba mubukomeza, nkuko nabubabwirije; keretse mwaba mwizereye ubusa. Muzi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ko nabanje kubaha ibyo nanjye nahawe kumenya, yuko Kristo yapfiriye ibyaha byacu, nkuko byari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byaranditswe, agahambwa, akazuka ku munsi wa gatatu, nkuko byari byaranditswe na none;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akabonekera Kefa, maze akabonekera abo cumin a babiri; hanyuma akabonekera bene Data basaga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Magana atanu; muri abo benshi baracyariho n’ubu, ariko bamwe barasinziriye; yongera kubonekera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yakobo, abonekera n’izindi ntumwa zose. Kandi nyuma ya bose nanjye arambonekera, ndi nk’umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’icyenda, kuko noroheje hanyuma y’izindi ntumwa zose, ndetse ntibinkwiriye  ko nitwa intumwa, kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: narenganyaga Itorero ry’Imana. Ariko ubuntu bwayo nahwe ntibwabaye ubw’ubusa, ahubwo nakoze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imirimo myinshi iruta iya bose; nyamara si jye, ahubwo ni ubuntu bw’Imana buri kumwe nanjye. Nuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rero, ari jye, cyangwa bo, ibyo ni byo tubabwiriza, namwe ni ibyo mwizeye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA          Luka 18:9-14
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UYU mugani Yesu yawuciriye abayiringiye ubwabo ko bakiranuka bagahinyura abandi bose. Ati <Abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babiri bazamutse, bajya mu rusengero gusenga; umwe yari Umufarisayo, undi yari umukoresha w’ikoro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umufarisayo arahagarara, asengera mu mutima we, ati ‘Mana, ndagushimiye yuko ntameze nk’abandi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abanyazi n’abakiranirwa n’abasambanyi, cyangwa ndetse n’uyu mukoresha w’ikoro. Mu minsi irindwi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hose niyiriza ubusa kabiri, ntanga kimwe mu icumi mu byo nungutse byose.’ Naho uwo mukoresha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’ikoresha ahagarara kure, ntiyahagararo no kubura amaso ngo arebe mu ijuru, ahubwo yikubita mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gituza, ati <Mana, mbabarira, kuko ndi umunyabyaha.’ Ndababwira yuko uwo muntu yamanutse ajya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iwe ari we utsindishirijwe kuruta wa wndi; kuko uwishyira hejuru azacishwa bugufi, ariko uwicisha bugufi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azashyirwa hejuru,”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI WA MATIYASI WERA (Fev.24)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, uyu musi turibuka uko watoye umugaragu wawe umwizerwa Matiyasi kuba uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu mubare w´intumwa zawe icumi na babiri mu cyimbo cya Yuda wagambaniye Umwami wacu. None
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turagusaba kugira ngo Itorero ryawe rihore ririndwa intumwa z’ibinyoma, kandi rigire abungeri kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bizerwa bo kuriyobora. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO           Ibyakozwe 1:15-26
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Muri iyo minsi Petero ahagaze hagati ya bene Data, (umubare w'abantu bose bari bahateraniye bari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk'ijana na makumyabiri), aravuga ati"Bagabo bene Data, ibyanditswe byari bikwiriye gusohora, ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwuka Wera yahanuriye mu kanwa ka Dawidi kuri Yuda wayoboye abafashe Yesu, kuko yari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yarabazwe muri twe, agahabwa umugabane w'uyu murimo." (Kandi uwo muntu, amaze kugura isambu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ku byo yahawe ho igihembo cyo gukiranirwa kwe, agwa yubamye araturika, amara ye yose arataraka.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bimenyekana mu batuye i Yerusalemu bose, ni cyo cyatumye iyo sambu mu rurimi rwabo bayita
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Akeludama, risobanurwa ngo"Isambu y'amaraso.") "Ndetse byanditswe mu gitabo cya Zaburi ngo 'Iwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hasigare ubusa, Kandi he kugira undi uhaba.' Kandi ngo 'Ubusonga bwe bugabane undi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko muri abo twagendanaga iteka, ubwo Umwami Yesu yari akiri muri twe, uhereye ku kubatiza kwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yohana ukageza ku munsi Yesu yadukuriwemo azamuwe, bikwiriye ko umwe aba umugabo hamwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: natwe wo guhamya kuzuka kwe." Bahitamo babiri, umwe ni Yosefu witwaga Barisaba, uwo bahimbye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yusito, undi ni Matiyasi. Barasenga bati"Mwami Mana, umenya imitima y'abantu bose, werekane uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: utoranije muri aba bombi abe intumwa, ahabwe uyu murimo Yuda yataye akajya ahe." Barabafindira,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubufindo bufata Matiyasi. Nuko abaranwa n'intumwa cumi n'imwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA       Matayo 11.25-30
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Muri iyo minsi Yesu aravuga ati"Ndagushima Data, Mwami w'ijuru n'isi, kuko wahishe ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abanyabwenge n'abahanga, ukabimenyesha abana bato. Ni koko Data, kuko ari ko wabishatse. "Byose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nabihawe na Data, kandi nta wuzi Umwana w'Imana keretse Se, kandi nta wuzi Se keretse Umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w'Imana, n'umuntu wese uwo Mwana ashatse kuyimenyesha. "Mwese abarushye n'abaremerewe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nimuze munsange ndabaruhura. Mwemere kuba abagaragu banjye munyigireho, kuko ndi umugwaneza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi noroheje mu mutima, namwe muzabona uburuhukiro mu mitima yanyu, kuko kunkorera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kutaruhije, n'umutwaro wanjye utaremereye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUSI W’UMWARI MARIYA
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UHIRIWE (Mars 25)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NYAGASANI Mana, turakwingize, ugwize mu mitima yacu ubuntu bwawe, kugira ngo, nk’uko ubutumwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwa marayika bwatumenyesheje ibyo kuvuka k’Umwama wawe Yesu Kristo, abe ari ko ubutumwa bwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubabazwa kwe ko ku Musaraba buduhesha gufatana na we mu kuzuka kwe kw’icyubahiro. Tubisabye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo uwo, Umwami wacu. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO                 Yesaya 7 : 10-15
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Uwiteka yongera kubwira Ahazi ati"Saba Uwiteka Imana yawe ikimenyetso, usabe icy'ikuzimu cyangwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: icyo hejuru mu kirere." Ariko Ahazi aravuga ati"Nta cyo nsaba, singiye kugerageza Uwiteka." Yesaya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aravuga ati"Nimwumve yemwe mwa muryango wa Dawidi mwe, murushya abantu mukabona
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: biboroheye, none murashaka no kurushya Imana yanjye nayo ? Ni cyo kizatuma Uwiteka ubwe ari we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uzabihera ikimenyetso. Dore Umwari azasama inda, azabyara umwana w'umuhungu amwite izina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imanweli. Amata n'ubuki ni byo bizamutunga kugeza aho azamenyera ubwenge bwo kwanga ibibi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: agakunda ibyiza. "
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA   Luka 1 : 26-38
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Mu kwezi kwa gatandatu, Marayika Gaburiyeli atumwa n'Imana mu mudugudu w'i Galilaya witwa i
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nazareti, ku mwari wari warasabwe n'umugabo witwaga Yosefu wo mu nzu ya Dawidi, izina ry'uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwari ni Mariya. Amusanga aho yari ari aramubwira ati"Ni amahoro Uhiriwe, Umwami Imana iri kumwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nawe." Ariko we ahagarika umutima cyane w'iryo jambo, atekereza iyo ndamutso icyo ari cyo. Marayika
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aramubwira ati"Witinya Mariya, kuko uhiriwe ku Mana. Kandi dore uzasama inda, uzabyara umuhungu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uzamwite Yesu. Azaba mukuru, azitwa Umwana w'Isumbabyose kandi Umwami Imana izamuha intebe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y'ubwami ya sekuruza Dawidi, azima mu nzu ya Yakobo iteka ryose, ubwami bwe ntibuzashira." Mariya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abaza marayika ati"Ibyo bizabaho bite ko ntararyamana n'umugabo ?" Marayika aramusubiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ati"Umwuka Wera azakuzaho, n'imbaraga z'Isumbabyose zizagukingiriza, ni cyo gituma Uwera uzavuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azitwa Umwana w'Imana. Kandi dore mwene wanyu Elizabeti na we afite inda y'umuhungu yo mu za
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bukuru, uwitwaga ingumba none uku ni ukwezi kwe kwa gatandatu, kuko ari nta jambo Imana ivuga ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rihere." Mariya aramubwira ati"Dore ndi umuja w'Umwami Imana, bimbere uko uvuze." Nuko marayika
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amusiga aho aragenda.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI WA MARIKO WERA (Avril 25)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko wigishaga Itorero ryawe ryera imyigishirize Mariko Wera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yanditse mu Butumwa bwe bwiza. None turagusaba kugira ngo tudateraganwa hirya no hino nk’abana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bato n’imiyaga n’imyigishirize Yose idafite umumaro, tubone gukomezwa n’ukuri kuri mu Butumwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwabwe bwiza. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO     Abefeso 4 : 7-16
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ARIKO umuntu wese muri twe yahawe ubuntu nk'uko urugero rw'impano ya Kristo ruri. Ni cyo gituma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ivuga iti"Amaze kuzamuka mu ijuru, Ajyana iminyago myinshi, Aha abantu impano." Ariko iryo jambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo"Yazamutse mu ijuru" risobanurwa rite ? Ntirigaragaza yuko yabanje kumanuka ikuzimu ?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwamanutse ni we wazamutse ajya hejuru y'amajuru yose, kugira ngo asohoze byose. Nuko aha bamwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuba intumwa ze, n'abandi kuba abahanuzi, n'abandi kuba kugira ngo abera batunganirizwe rwose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukora umurimo wo kugabura iby'Imana no gukomeza umubiri wa Kristo, bwiza, n'abandi kuba abungeri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'abigisha, kugeza ubwo twese tuzasohora kugira ubumwe bwo kwizera no kumenya Umwana w'Imana,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi kugeza ubwo tuzasohora kuba abantu bashyitse bageze ku rugero rushyitse rw'igihagararo cya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo, kugira ngo tudakomeza kuba abana duteraganwa n'umuraba, tujyanwa hirya no hino n'imiyaga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yose y'imyigishirize, n'uburiganya bw'abantu n'ubwenge bubi, n'uburyo bwinshi bwo kutuyobya,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahubwo tuvuge ukuri turi mu rukundo, dukurire muri we muri byose. Uwo ni we mutwe, ari wo Kristo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuri uwo ni ho Umubiri wose uteranywa neza, ugafatanywa n'uko ingingo zose zigirirana, nuko igice
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyose kigakora umurimo wacyo cyagenewe. Muri Kristo uwo ni ho umubiri ukura gukura kwawo, kugira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo ukurizwe mu rukundo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                Yohana 15 :1-11
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: "NDI umuzabibu w'ukuri, kandi Data ni nyirawo uwuhingira. Ishami ryose ryo muri jye ritera imbuto
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arikuraho, iryera imbuto ryose aryanganyaho amahage yaryo ngo rirusheho kwera imbuto. None
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mumaze kwezwa n'ijambo nababwiye. Mugume muri jye, nanjye ngume muri mwe. Nk'uko ishami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ritabasha kwera imbuto ubwaryo ritagumye mu muzabibu, ni ko namwe mutabibasha nimutaguma muri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: jye. "Ni jye muzabibu, namwe muri amashami. Uguma muri jye nanjye nkaguma muri we, uwo ni we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wera imbuto nyinshi, kuko ari nta cyo mubasha gukora mutamfite. Umuntu utaguma muri jye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ajugunywa hanze nk'ishami ryumye, maze bakayateranya bakayajugunya mu muriro agashya.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nimuguma muri jye amagambo yanjye akaguma muri mwe, musabe icyo mushaka cyose muzagihabwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo ni byo byubahisha Data, ni uko mwera imbuto nyinshi, mukaba abigishwa banjye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uko Data yankunze ni ko nanjye nabakunze. Nuko rero mugume mu rukundo rwanjye. Nimwitondera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amategeko yanjye muzaguma mu rukundo rwanjye, nk'uko nanjye nitondeye amategeko ya Data
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nkaguma mu rukundo rwe. "Ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo umunezero wanjye ube muri mwe, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'umunezero wanyu ube wuzuye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI W’ABERA FILIPO NA YAKOBO (Mai 1)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko kukumenya ari bwo bugingo buhoraho. None turakwingize,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uduhe kumenya rwose Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo ko ari we nzira, ukuri, n’ubugingo, kugira ngo tugere
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ikirenge mu cy’intumwa zawe Filipo na Yakobo, tubone gukomeza mu nzira ijya mu bugingo budashira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tubisabye mu Izina ry’Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO                    Yakobo 1 :1-12
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: YAKOBO imbata y'Imana n'Umwami Yesu Kristo ndabandikiye, mwebwe abo mu miryango cumi n'ibiri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y'abatatanye ndabatashya. Bene Data, mwemere ko ari iby'ibyishimo rwose nimugubwa gitumo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'ibibagerageza bitari bimwe, mumenye yuko kugeragezwa ko kwizera kwanyu gutera kwihangana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko mureke kwihangana gusohoze umurimo wako, mubone gutungana rwose mushyitse mutabuzeho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: na gato.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko niba hariho umuntu muri mwe ubuze ubwenge, abusabe Imana iha abantu bose itimana, itishama
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi azabuhabwa. Ariko rero asabe yizeye ari nta cyo ashidikanya, kuko ushidikanya ameze nk'umuraba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wo mu nyanja, ujyanwa n'umuyaga ushushubikanywa. Ariko rero asabe yizeye ari nta cyo ashidikanya,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuko ushidikanya ameze nk'umuraba wo mu nyanja, ujyanwa n'umuyaga ushushubikanywa. Umeze atyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ye kwibwira ko azagira icyo ahabwa n'Umwami Imana, kuko umuntu w'imitima ibiri anamuka mu nzira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ze zose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwene Data w'umukene yishimire yuko afite isumbwe, naho umutunzi yishimire yuko acishijwe bugufi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuko azashiraho nk'uburabyo bw'ibyatsi. Kuko izuba iyo rirashe rifite ubushyuhe bwotsa, ryumisha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyatsi uburabyo bwabyo bugahunguka, ubwiza bw'ishusho yabyo bukabura. Uko ni ko umutunzi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azumira mu nzira ze zose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA              Yohana 14 :1-14
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: YESU yabwiye abigishwa be ati   «Ntimuhagarike imitima yanyu, mwizere Imana nanjye munyizere. Mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rugo rwa Data harimo amazu menshi : iyaba adahari mba mbabwiye, kuko ngiye kubategurira ahanyu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi ubwo ngiye kubategurira ahanyu, nzagaruka mbajyane iwanjye, ngo aho ndi namwe muzabeyo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi aho njya, inzira murayizi." Toma aramubwira ati"Databuja, ntituzi aho ujya, inzira twayibwirwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'iki ?" Yesu aramubwira ati"Ni jye nzira n'ukuri n'ubugingo : nta wujya kwa Data ntamujyanye. Iyaba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwaramenye, muba mwaramenye na Data. Uhereye none muramuzi kandi mwamurebye." Filipo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aramubwira ati"Databuja, twereke Data wa twese biraba bihagije." Yesu aramubaza ati"Nabanye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: namwe iminsi ingana ityo, kandi ntiwari wamenya, Filipo ? Umbonye aba abonye Data. Ni iki gitumye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uvuga uti 'Twereke Data wa twese' ? Ntiwizeye yuko ndi muri Data, na Data akaba ari muri jye ?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amagambo mbabwira sinyavuga ku bwanjye, ahubwo Data uguma muri jye ni we ukora imirimo ye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nimunyizere mwemere ko ndi muri Data, na Data akaba muri jye, ariko rero nimutizezwa n'ibyo mvuga,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: munyizezwe n'imirimo nkora ubwayo. Ni ukuri, ni ukuri, ndababwira yuko unyizera, imirimo nkora na we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azayikora ndetse azakora n'iyiruta, kuko njya kwa Data. Kandi icyo muzasaba cyose mu izina ryanjye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nzagikorera kugira ngo Data yubahirizwe mu Mwana we. Nimugira icyo musaba cyose mu izina ryanjye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nzagikora.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI WA BARUNABA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: WERA INTUMWA (Juin 11)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MWAMI Mana ishobora byose, wahaye intumwa yawe Barunaba impano z'umwuka nziza, none
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turakwiginze, ntubure kuduha impano zawe zitari zimwe n'ubuntu bwo kuzikoresha, ngo ziguheshe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: icubahiro no guhimbazwa. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy'URWANDIKO               Ibyakozwe 11 :22-30
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Iyo nkuru irumvikana igera mu matwi y'itorero ry'i Yerusalemu, batuma Barinaba muri Antiyokiya.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Asohoyeyo kandi abonye ubuntu bw'Imana aranezerwa, abahugura bose ati"Mugume mu Mwami Yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mumaramaje mu mitima yanyu." Kuko Barinaba yari umunyangesonziza, wuzuye Umwuka Wera no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwizera. Abantu benshi bongererwa Umwami Yesu. Bukeye avayo ajya i Taruso gushaka Sawuli,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amubonye amujyana mu Antiyokiya. Bamarayo umwaka wose baterana n'ab'Itorero, bigisha abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: benshi, kandi muri Antiyokiya ni ho abigishwa batangiriye kwitwa Abakristo. Muri iyo minsi abahanuzi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bava i Yerusalemu, bajya mu Antiyokiya. Nuko umwe muri bo witwaga Agabo, arahaguruka arahanura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abwirijwe n'Umwuka ati"Inzara nyinshi izatera mu isi yose." (Ni yo yateye ku ngoma ya Kilawudiyo.)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko abigishwa bagambirira koherereza bene Data batuye i Yudaya imfashanyo, umuntu wese akurikije
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubutunzi bwe. Babigenza batyo, babyoherereza abakuru babihaye Barinaba na Sawuli.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA               Yohana 15 :12-16
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ngiri itegeko ryanjye: mukundane nk'uko nabakunze. Nta wufite urukundo ruruta urw'umuntu upfira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: incuti ze. Muri incuti zanjye, nimukora ibyo mbategeka. Sinkibita abagaragu kuko umugaragu atazi ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: shebuja akora, ahubwo mbise incuti kuko ibyo numvise kuri Data byose mbibamenyesheje. Si mwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwantoranyije, ahubwo ni jye wabatoranyije kandi mbashyiriraho kugira ngo mugende mwere imbuto,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbuto zanyu zigumeho kugira ngo icyo muzasaba Data cyose mu izina ryanjye akibahe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI WA YOHANA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UMUBATIZA (Juin 24)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko washatse ko umugaragu wawe Yohana Umubatiza yavutse
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu buryo butangaza ; ukamutuma guteguriza Umwana wawe Umukiza wacu inzira, abwiriza ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwihana. Natwe udufashe, dukurikize imyigishishirize ye n’ingeso ze nziza, tubone kwihana nyakuri,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’uko yigishaga ; kandi uduhe kujya tuvuga iby’ukuri, ducyaha abakora ibyaha dushize amanga, kandi
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: twemere kurenganywa baduhoye ukuri twihanganye, nk uko na we yakoraga. Tubisabye mu Izina rya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO            Yesaya 40:1-11
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: "Nimuhumurize abantu banjye, mubahumurize." Ni ko Imana yanyu ivuga. "Muvuge ibyururutsa imitima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y'ab'i Yerusalemu, mukomere muhabwire ko intambara zaho zishize kandi yuko gukiranirwa kwaho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hakubabariwe, n'ibyaha byaho byose ko habihaniwe kabiri n'Uwiteka." Nimwumve ijwi ry'urangurura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo"Nimutunganyirize Uwiteka inzira mu butayu, mugororere Imana yacu inzira nyabagendwa mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kidaturwa. Igikombe cyose kizuzuzwa kandi umusozi wose n'agasozi bizaringanizwa, n'ahagoramye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hazagororwa n'inzira zidaharuwe zizaharurwa. Maze icyubahiro cy'Uwiteka kizahishurwa kandi abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bose bazakibonera rimwe, kuko akanwa k'Uwiteka ari ko kabivuze." Ijwi ryaravuze riti"Rangurura." Maze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: habaho ubaza ati"Ndarangururira iki?""Abantu bose bameze nk'ubwatsi, n'ubwiza bwabo bwose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bumeze nk'uburabyo bwo ku gasozi. Ubwatsi buraraba, uburabyo bugahunguka kuko umwuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w'Uwiteka ubuhushyeho. Ni ukuri abantu ni nk'ubwatsi. Yewe wumvisha i Siyoni inkuru z'ibyiza zamuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umusozi muremure, yewe wumvisha i Yerusalemu inkuru z'ibyiza rangurura ijwi ryawe cyane,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rirangurure witinya ubwire imidugudu y'i Buyuda uti"Dore Imana yanyu." Dore Umwami Imana izaza ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: intwari, kandi ukuboko kwayo kuzayitegekera. Dore izanye ingororano, kandi inyiturano zayo ziyiri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbere. Izaragira umukumbi wayo nk'umushumba, izateraniriza abana b'intama mu maboko ibaterurire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu gituza, kandi izonsa izazigenza neza. »
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA         Luka 1 :57-80
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nuko iminsi yo kubyara kwa Elizabeti irasohora, abyara umuhungu. Abaturanyi be na bene wabo bumva
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yuko Umwami Imana yamugiriye imbabazi nyinshi, bishimana na we. Nuko ku munsi wa munani bajya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukeba umwana, bashaka kumwita izina rya se Zakariya. Nyina arabasubiza ati"Oya, ahubwo yitwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yohana." Baramubwira bati"Ko ari nta wo mu muryango wanyu witwa iryo zina!" Bacira se amarenga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo bamubaze uko ashaka kumwita. Bacira se amarenga kugira ngo bamubaze uko ashaka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kumwita. Atumira icyo kwandikiraho arandika ati"Izina rye ni Yohana." Bose baratangara. Muri ako
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kanya akanwa ke karazibuka, n'ururimi rwe ruragobodoka aravuga, ashima Imana. Abaturanyi bose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: baterwa n'ubwoba, ibyo byose byamamara mu misozi y'i Yudaya yose. Ababyumvise bose babishyira mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mitima yabo bati"Mbese uyu mwana azaba iki?" Nuko ukuboko k'Umwami Imana gukomeza kubana na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we. Se Zakariya yuzuzwa Umwuka Wera arahanura ati"Umwami ahimbazwe, Imana y'Abisirayeli, Kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: igendereye abantu bayo ikabacungura. Kandi iduhagurukirije ihembe ry'agakiza, Mu nzu y'umugaragu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wayo Dawidi, (Nk'uko yavugiye mu kanwa k'abera bayo, Bahanuraga uhereye kera kose.) Kudukiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abanzi n'amaboko y'abatwanga bose, Kugirira ba sogokuruza imbabazi, No kwibuka isezerano ryayo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryera, Indahiro yarahiye sogokuruza Aburahamu, Ko nitumara gukizwa amaboko y'abanzi bacu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tuzayisenga tudatinya, Turi abera dukiranuka imbere yayo iminsi yacu yose. "Kandi nawe mwana, uzitwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuhanuzi w'Isumbabyose, Kuko uzabanziriza Umwami ngo utunganye inzira ze, No kumenyesha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abantu be iby'agakiza, Ko ari ukubabarirwa ibyaha byabo. Ku bw'umutima w'imbabazi w'Imana yacu, Ni
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: wo uzatuma umuseke udutambikira uvuye mu ijuru, Ukamurikira abicaye mu mwijima no mu gicucu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cy'urupfu, No kuyobora ibirenge byacu mu nzira y'amahoro." Uwo mwana arakura, agwiza imbaraga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: z'umutima, aguma mu butayu kugeza umunsi yerekewemo Abisirayeli.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI WA PETERA WERA (Juin 29)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: INSENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA Ishobora byose, tuzi yuko watumye umwana wawe Yesu Kristo guha intumwa yawe Petero wera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: impano nziza nyinshi, ukamutegeka kuragirana umwete umukumbi wawe. None turakwingize,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: utereAbepiskopi n’Abapastori bose umuhati wokubwiriza Ijambo ryawe ryera. Kandi turasabira abantu,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: kugira ngo bumvire iryo jambo barikurikije ; hanyuma bazabone guhabwa ikamba ry’icubahiro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kitazashira. Tubisabye mu Izina ry’Umwami Yesu Kristo. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO            Ibyakozwe 12 : 1-11
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NUKO muri icyo gihe Umwami Herode afatira abo mu Itorero bamwe kubagirira nabi. Yicisha Yakobo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: inkota, mwene se wa Yohana. Abonye ko anejeje Abayuda, ariyongeza afata na Petero. Icyo gihe hari mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: minsi y'imitsima idasembuwe. Amaze kumufata amushyira mu nzu y'imbohe, amuha abasirikare cumi na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: batandatu kumurinda bane bane, agira ngo azamushyire abantu Pasika ishize. Nuko Petero arindirwa mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nzu y'imbohe, ariko ab'Itorero bagira umwete wo kumusabira ku Mana. Herode araye ari bumusohore,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iryo joro Petero yari asinziriye hagati y'abasirikare babiri, aboheshejwe iminyururu ibiri, abarinzi na bo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bari ku rugi barinda inzu y'imbohe. Nuko marayika w'Umwami Imana ahagarara aho, umucyo waka mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nzu, marayika akoma Petero mu mbavu aramukangura ati"Byuka n'ingoga." Iminyururu imuva ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: maboko iragwa. Marayika aramubwira ati"Kenyera ukwete inkweto zawe." Abigenza atyo. Arongera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aramubwira ati"Wifubike umwitero wawe, unkurikire." Arasohoka aramukurikira, ariko ntiyamenya ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: marayika akoze ko ari iby'ukuri, ahubwo agira ngo abirose mu nzozi. Banyuze ku barinzi ba mbere no ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ba kabiri, bagera ku irembo rikingishijwe urugi rw'icyuma rijya mu murwa. Rurabikingurira ubwarwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: barasohoka banyura inzira imwe, uwo mwanya marayika amusiga aho. Petero agaruye umutima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aribwira ati"Noneho menye by'ukuri yuko Umwami Imana yatumye marayika wayo, ikankura mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: maboko ya Herode, ikankiza ibyo ubwoko bw'Abayuda bwategerezaga byose."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA           Matayo 16 : 13-19
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nuko Yesu ajya mu gihugu cy'i Kayisariya ya Filipo abaza abigishwa be ati"Abantu bagira ngo Umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w'umuntu ndi nde ?" Baramusubiza bati"Bamwe bagira ngo uri Yohana Umubatiza, abandi ngo uri Eliya,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abandi ngo uri Yeremiya, cyangwa ngo uri umwe wo mu bahanuzi." Arababaza ati"Ariko mwebwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwanyu mugira ngo ndi nde ?" Simoni Petero aramusubiza ati"Uri Kristo, Umwana w'Imana ihoraho."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yesu aramusubiza ati"Urahirwa Simoni wa Yona, kuko umubiri n'amaraso atari byo byabiguhishuriye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahubwo ni Data wo mu ijuru. Nanjye ndakubwira nti 'Uri Petero, kandi nzubaka Itorero ryanjye kuri urwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rutare, kandi amarembo y'ikuzimu ntazarishobora.'Nzaguha imfunguzo z'ubwami bwo mu ijuru, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: icyo uzahambira mu isi kizaba gihambiriwe mu ijuru, n'icyo uzahambura mu isi kizaba gihambuwe mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ijuru."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI WA YAKOBO WERA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: INTUMWA (Juillet 25)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: INSENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA  y’imbabazi  turibuka  uko  Intumwa  yawe  yera  Yakobo  yasize  se  n’ibyo  yari  afite  byose,  akitaba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwana  wawe  Yesu  Kristo  adatindiganije,  akamukurikira.  None  turagusaba  kugira  ngo  natwe  uduhe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwemera gusiga ibyo kurigira iby’iyi si n’iby’umubiri, tubone  kurushaho kwitegura kumvira amategeko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yawe yose. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO              Ibyakozwe 11 : 27-12 :3
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MURI IYO minsi abahanuzi bava i Yerusalemu, bajya mu Antiyokiya. Nuko umwe muri bo witwaga Agabo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arahaguruka arahanura abwirijwe n'Umwuka ati"Inzara nyinshi izatera mu isi yose." (Ni yo yateye ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngoma ya Kilawudiyo.) Nuko abigishwa bagambirira koherereza bene Data batuye i Yudaya imfashanyo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuntu wese akurikije ubutunzi bwe. Babigenza batyo, babyoherereza abakuru babihaye Barinaba na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Sawuli. Nuko muri icyo gihe Umwami Herode afatira abo mu Itorero bamwe kubagirira nabi. Yicisha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yakobo inkota, mwene se wa Yohana. Abonye ko anejeje Abayuda, ariyongeza afata na Petero. Icyo gihe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hari mu minsi y'imitsima idasembuwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                 Matayo 20 :20-28
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MAZE nyina wa bene Zebedayo azana n'abana be aho ari, aramupfukamira ngo agire icyo amusaba. Na
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: we aramubaza ati"Urashaka iki ?" Aramusubiza ati"Tegeka ko aba bana banjye bombi bazicara mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwami bwawe, umwe iburyo bwawe undi ibumoso." Yesu aramusubiza ati"Ntimuzi icyo musaba.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwabasha kunywera ku gikombe nzanyweraho ?" Bati"Turabibasha." Arababwira ati"Ni ukuri igikombe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyanjye muzakinyweraho, ariko kwicara iburyo bwanjye n'ibumoso si jye ubigaba, keretse abo Data
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yabitunganyirije." Ba bandi cumi babyumvise barakarira abo bavandimwe bombi. Yesu arabahamagara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arababwira ati"Muzi yuko Abami b'abanyamahanga babatwaza igitugu, n'abakomeye babo bahawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubategeka. Ariko muri mwe si ko biri, ahubwo ushaka kuba mukuru muri mwe ajye aba umugaragu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wanyu, kandi ushaka kuba uw'imbere muri mwe, ajye aba imbata yanyu, nk'uko Umwana w'umuntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ataje gukorerwa, ahubwo yaje gukorera abandi no gutangira ubugingo bwe kuba incungu ya benshi."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI WA BARUTOLOMAYO WERA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: INTUMWA (Aout 24)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: INSENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA  ishobora  byose  ihoraho,  wagiriye  intumwa  yawe  Barutolomayo  ubuntu  butuma  yizera  by’ukuri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ijambo  ryawe,  akaryigisha.  Turakwingize,  uhe  Itorero  ryawe  umutima  ukunda  rya  Jambo  yizeraga  no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuritora. T ubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO                    Ibyakozwe 5 :12-16
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ibimenyetso n'ibitangaza byinshi byakorwaga mu bantu n'amaboko y'intumwa, kandi bose bateraniraga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu ibaraza rya Salomo n'umutima uhuye. Ariko nubwo abantu bose babahimbazaga cyane, ntihagiraga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'umwe muri bo watinyukaga kwifatanya na bo. Nyamara abizeye Umwami Yesu bakomezaga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubongerwaho, abantu benshi b'abagabo n'abagore, byatumaga bazana abarwayi mu nzira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakabashyira ku mariri no mu ngobyi, kugira ngo Petero nahanyura nibura igicucu cye kigere kuri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bamwe. Hateraniraga benshi bavuye no mu midugudu ihereranye n'i Yerusalemu, bazanye abababazwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'abadayimoni bose bagakizwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA       Luka 22 :24-30
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Maze habyuka impaka muri bo, ngo ni nde muri bo ukwiriye gutekerezwa ko ari we mukuru. Arababwira
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ati"Abami b'amahanga barayategeka, n'abafite ubutware bwo kuyatwara bitwa ba ruhekerababyeyi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko mwebweho ntimukabe mutyo, ahubwo ukomeye muri mwe abe nk'uworoheje, n'utwara abe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk'uhereza. Umukuru ni uwuhe? Ni uherezwa cyangwa ni uhereza ? Si uherezwa ? Ariko jyewe ndi hagati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yanyu meze nk'uhereza. "Ni mwe mwagumanye nanjye, twihanganana mu byo nageragejwe. Nanjye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mbabikiye ubwami nk'uko Data yabumbikiye, kugira ngo muzarye munywe mwegereye ameza yanjye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu bwami bwanjye. Kandi muzicara ku ntebe z'icyubahiro, mucire imanza imiryango cumi n'ibiri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y'Abisirayeli."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI WA MATAYO WERA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: INTUMWA (Sep. 21)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: INSENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, watumye Umwami wawe ushimwa guhamagara Matayo ngo ave bukoresha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw’ikoro, ahinduke intumwa n’umubwiriza w’ubutumwa. None uduhe umutima, wemeye gusiga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imyifurize yose mibi itwifurisha iby’abandi, no gukunda ubutunzi uburyo bukabije, tubone gukurikira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo uhorana nawe ku ngoma hamwe n’umwuka Wera, muri Imana imwe iteka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryose. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO              2 Abakorinto 4 :1-6
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nuko rero, ubwo dufite uwo murimo wo kugabura iby'Imana ku bw'imbabazi twagiriwe, ntiducogora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahubwo twanga ibiteye isoni bikorwa rwihishwa, tutagendera mu buriganya kandi tutagoreka ijambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ry'Imana, ahubwo tuvuga ukuri tweruye bigatuma umuntu wese adushimisha umutima we imbere
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y'Imana. Ariko niba ubutumwa bwiza twahawe butwikiriwe, butwikiririwe abarimbuka ari bo batizera,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abo imana y'iki gihe yahumiye imitima, kugira ngo umucyo w'ubutumwa bw'ubwiza bwa Kristo, ari we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: shusho y'Imana utabatambikira. Kuko tutabwiriza abantu ibyacu, ahubwo tubabwiriza ibya Kristo Yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ko ari we Mwami, natwe tukaba abagaragu banyu ku bwa Yesu. Imana yategetse umucyo kuva uturutse
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu mwijima, ni yo yaviriye mu mitima yacu, kugira ngo imurikishe ubwenge bwo kumenya ubwiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw'Imana buri mu maso ha Yesu Kristo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA             Matayo   9 :9 -13
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Yesu avayo, akigenda abona umuntu witwaga Matayo yicaye aho yakoresherezaga ikoro, aramubwira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ati"Nkurikira." Arahaguruka, aramukurikira. Hanyuma ubwo Yesu yari yicaye mu nzu bafungura, haza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abakoresha b'ikoro benshi n'abanyabyaha, basangira na Yesu n'abigishwa be. Abafarisayo babibonye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babaza abigishwa be bati"Ni iki gitumye umwigisha wanyu asangira n'abakoresha b'ikoro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'abanyabyaha?" Abyumvise arababwira ati"Abazima si bo bifuza umuvuzi, keretse abarwayi. Ariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nimugende, mwige uko iri jambo risobanurwa ngo 'Icyo nkunda ni imbabazi, si ibitambo.' Sinazanywe no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: guhamagara abakiranuka, keretse abanyabyaha."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI WA MARAYIKA MIKAELI
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: N’ABAMARAYIKA BOSE (sep.29)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ihoraho washyiriyeho Abamarayika n’abantu, kugira ngo bagukorere muri gahunda nziza. None
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turakwingize kubw’imbabazi zawe, ujye utuma abamarayika bawe bera, baturengere kandi baturinde
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tukiri muri iyi isi, nk’uko bahora bagukorera mu ijuru. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO             Ibyahishuwe 12 :7-12
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Mu  ijuru  habaho  intambara.  Mikayeli  n'abamarayika  be  batabarira  kurwanya  cya  kiyoka,  ikiyoka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kirwanana n'abamarayika bacyo. Ntibanesha kandi mu ijuru ahabo ntihaba hakiboneka. Cya kiyoka kinini
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kiracibwa,  ari  cyo  ya  nzoka  ya kera  yitwa  Umwanzi na  Satani,  ari cyo kiyobya abari  mu  isi  bose.  Nuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kijugunywa  mu  isi,  abamarayika  bacyo  bajugunyanwa  na  cyo.  Numva  ijwi  rirenga  rivugira  mu  ijuru
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: riti"Noneho agakiza karasohoye, gasohoranye n'ubushobozi n'ubwami bw'Imana yacu n'ubutware bwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo wayo, kuko Umurezi wa bene Data ajugunywe hasi, wahoraga abarega ku manywa na nijoro imbere
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y'Imana  yacu.  Na  bo  bamuneshesheje  amaraso  y'Umwana  w'Intama  n'ijambo  ryo  guhamya  kwabo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntibakunda amagara yabo, ntibanga no gupfa.  Nuko rero wa  juru we, namwe  abaribamo nimwishime.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Naho wowe wa si we, nawe wa nyanja we, mugushije ishyano kuko Satani yabamanukiye afite umujinya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwinshi, azi yuko afite igihe gito."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA           Matayo 18 :1-10
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Icyo gihe abigishwa begera Yesu baramubaza bati"Umukuru mu bwami bwo mu ijuru ni nde?"
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ahamagara umwana muto amuhagarika hagati yabo, arababwira ati"Ndababwira ukuri yuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nimudahinduka ngo mumere nk'abana bato, mutazinjira mu bwami bwo mu ijuru. Nuko uzicisha bugufi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk'uyu mwana muto, ni we mukuru mu bwami bwo mu ijuru. Uwemera umwana umwe muto nk'uyu mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: izina ryanjye, ni jye aba yemeye. "Ariko ushuka umwe muri aba bato banyizera akamugusha, ikiruta ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uko yahambirwa urusyo mu ijosi rye, akazikwa imuhengeri mu nyanja. Isi izaboneshwa ishyano
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'ibigusha abantu, kuko ibyo bigusha bitazabura kuza, ariko uwo muntu uzana ibigusha azabona ishyano.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "Ariko ukuboko kwawe cyangwa ukuguru kwawe nibigucumuza uguce ugute kure yawe. Ibyiza ni uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wakwinjira mu bugingo usigaranye ukuboko kumwe cyangwa ukuguru, biruta ko wajugunywa mu muriro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: utazima ufite amaboko yombi cyangwa amaguru yombi. Cyangwa ijisho ryawe nirikugusha urinogore
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urite kure yawe. Ibyiza ni uko wakwinjira mu bugingo usigaranye ijisho rimwe gusa, biruta ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wajugunywa muri Gehinomu y'umuriro ufite amaso yombi. "Mwirinde mudasuzugura umwe muri aba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bana bato. Ndababwira yuko abamarayika babo bo mu ijuru bahora bareba mu maso ha Data wo mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ijuru.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umunsi wa LUKA WERA (Oct. 18)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, wahamagaye Luka umuvuzi ushimirwa cyane Ubutumwa Bwiza yanditse, ngo abe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umubwiriza w’ubutumwa, kandi umuvuzi w’imitima y’abantu. None turagusaba, kugira ngo udukize
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: indwara zacu zose z’imitima, uzikirishe umuti mwiza, ni wo myigishirize yahawe, ku bw’ibyiza Umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wawe Yesu Kristo yadukoreye. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO                   2 Timoteyo 4 :5-15
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ARIKO wowe ho wirinde muri byose, wemere kurengana, ukore umurimo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w'umubwirizabutumwa bwiza, usohoze umurimo wawe wo kugabura iby'Imana. Kuko jyeweho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: maze kumera nk'ibisukwa ku gicaniro, igihe cyo kugenda kwanjye gisohoye. Narwanye
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: intambara nziza, narangije urugendo, narinze ibyo kwizera. Ibisigaye mbikiwe ikamba ryo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukiranuka, iryo Umwami wacu, umucamanza utabera azampa kuri urya munsi, nyamara si jye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: jyenyine, ahubwo ni abakunze kuzaboneka kwe bose. Gira umwete wo kuza aho ndi vuba.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Dema yaransigiriye kuko akunze iby'iki gihe cya none, ajya i Tesalonike. Kiresikenti na we yagiye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: i Galatiya, naho Tito yagiye i Dalumatiya. Luka ni we wenyine ukiri kumwe nanjye. Shaka Mariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuzane, kuko angirira umumaro wo kunkorera. Ariko Tukiko namaze kumwohereza muri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Efeso. Nuza uzazane umwitero nasize i Tirowa kwa Karupo n'ibitabo, ariko cyane cyane uzazane
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iby'impu. Alekizanderi, umucuzi w'imiringa yangiriye inabi nyinshi. Umwami wacu azamwitura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibikwiriye ibyo yakoze. Nawe umwirinde, kuko yarwanije amagambo yacu cyane.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA       Luka 10: 1-7
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: HANYUMA y'ibyo Umwami Yesu atoranya abandi mirongo irindwi, atuma babiri babiri ngo
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bamubanzirize, bajye mu midugudu yose n'aho yendaga kujya hose. Arababwira ati"Ibisarurwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ni byinshi ariko abasaruzi ni bake, nuko mwinginge nyir'ibisarurwa ngo yohereze abasaruzi mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bisarurwa bye. Nimugende, dore mbatumye mumeze nk'abana b'intama hagati y'amasega.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ntimujyane uruhago rurimo ifeza, cyangwa imvumba, cyangwa inkweto, kandi ntimugire uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muramutsa muri mu nzira. Nimujya mugira inzu yose mwinjiramo, mubanze muvuge muti
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 'Amahoro abe muri iyi nzu.'Niba harimo umunyamahoro, amahoro yanyu azaba kuri we.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Natahaba, amahoro yanyu azabagarukira. Kandi iyo nzu abe ari yo mugumamo, musangire na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bo ibyokurya n'ibyokunywa, kuko umukozi akwiriye guhembwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI W’ABERA SIMONI NA YUDA (Oct. 28)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, wubatse Itorero ryawe ku rufatiro rw’intumwa n’abahanuzi, kandi Yesu Kristo ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we Buye rikomeza imfuruka. Nuko rero, nawe uduhe kugirana ubumwe bw’umwuka dufatanishijwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imyigishirize yabo, bituma duhimduka urusengero rwera wishimira. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwami wacu. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO       Yuda 1-8
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yuda imbata ya Yesu Kristo kandi mwene se wa Yakobo, ndabandikiye mwebwe abahamagawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakundwa kuko muri mu Mana Data wa twese, mukarindirwa Yesu Kristo. Imbabazi n'amahoro
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: n'urukundo bigwire muri mwe. Imbuzi zo kwirinda abatubaha Imana n'abigisha b'ibinyoma Bakundwa,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwo nagiraga umwete wo kubandikira iby'agakiza dusangiye niyumvisemo ko mpaswe no kubahugura,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo mushishikarire kurwanira ibyo kwizera abera bahawe rimwe, bakazageza iteka ryose. Kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hariho bamwe baseseye muri mwe rwihishwa bagenewe kera gucirwa ho iteka: ni abantu batubaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana, bahindura ubuntu bw'Imana yacu isoni nke, bakihakana Yesu Kristo ari we wenyine Databuja
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'Umwami wacu. Ndashaka kubibutsa, nubwo byose hari ubundi mwigeze kubimenya, yuko Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana imaze gukirisha ubwoko bw'Abisirayeli kubakura mu gihugu cya Egiputa, hanyuma irimbura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abatizeye. N'abamarayika batarinze ubutware bwabo ahubwo bakareka ubuturo bwabo, ibarindira mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: minyururu idashira no mu mwijima w'icuraburindi kugira ngo bacirwe ho iteka ku munsi ukomeye. Kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'i Sodomu n'i Gomora n'imidugudu yari ihereranye na ho, kuko abaho na bo bitanze bakiha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubusambanyi no kwendana mu buryo imibiri itaremewe, iyo midugudu yashyiriweho kuba akabarore
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ihanwa n'umuriro utazima. Uko ni ko na ba bandi b'abarosi bonona imibiri yabo, bagasuzugura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gutegekwa bagatuka abanyacyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                Yohana 15: 17-27
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ibyo mbibategekeye kugira ngo mukundane. "Ab'isi nibabanga, mumenye ko babanje kunyanga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: batarabanga. Iyo muba ab'isi, ab'isi baba babakunze. Ariko kuko mutari ab'isi, ahubwo nabatoranyije mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: b'isi, ni cyo gituma ab'isi babanga. Mwibuke ijambo nababwiye nti 'Umugaragu ntaruta shebuja.' Niba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bandenganyije namwe bazabarenganya, niba bitondeye ijambo ryanjye, n'iryanyu na ryo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazaryitondera. Ariko ibyo byose bazabibagirira babahora izina ryanjye, kuko batazi Uwantumye uwo ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we. Iyaba ntaje ngo mvugane na bo ntibaba bafite icyaha, ariko noneho ntibafite uko biregura icyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyabo. Unyanga aba yanze na Data. Iyaba ntakoreye muri bo imirimo itakozwe n'undi muntu, nta cyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: baba bafite. Ariko noneho barayibonye, nyamara baratwanga jyewe na Data. Ariko byabaye bityo kugira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo ijambo risohore, ryanditswe mu mategeko yabo ngo 'Banyangiye ubusa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umufasha naza, uwo nzaboherereza ava kuri Data, ari we Mwuka w'ukuri ukomoka kuri Data,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azampamya. Kandi namwe muzampamya, kuko uhereye mbere na mbere mwari kumwe nanjye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUNSI W’ABERA BOSE (Nov 1)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISENGESHO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko wafatanirije hamwe intore zawe, zikagira ubumwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ziteranijwe mu mubiri w’umwana wawe Yesu Kristo mu buryo bw’umwuka. None turagusaba, kugira ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tugere ikirenge mu cy’Abera bawe bashimwa; twigane ingeso zabo nziza zikubahisha; hanyuma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tuzabone kugera mu byishimo bitavugwa wateguriye abagukunda bataryarya. Tubisabye mu Izina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ry’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO               Ibyahishuwe 7: 2-12
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MBONA na marayika wundi azamuka ava i burasirazuba, afite ikimenyetso cy'Imana ihoraho, arangurura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ijwi rirenga, abwira ba bamarayika bane bahawe kubabaza isi n'inyanja ati"Ntimubabaze isi cyangwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: inyanja cyangwa ibiti tutaramara gushyira ikimenyetso mu ruhanga rw'imbata z'Imana yacu." Numva
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umubare w'abashyizweho ikimenyetso ngo ni agahumbi n'inzovu enye n'ibihumbi bine. Ni bo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bashyizweho ikimenyetso bo mu miryango yose y'Abisirayeli. Abo mu muryango wa Yuda bashyizweho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ikimenyetso ni inzovu n'ibihumbi bibiri.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abo mu muryango wa Rubeni ni inzovu n'ibihumbi bibiri;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma y'ibyo mbona abantu benshi umuntu atabasha kubara, bo mu mahanga yose n'imiryango yose
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: n'amoko yose n'indimi zose, bahagaze imbere ya ya ntebe n'imbere y'Umwana w'Intama, bambaye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibishura byera kandi bafite amashami y'imikindo mu ntoki zabo, bavuga ijwi rirenga bati"Agakiza ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ak'Imana yacu yicaye ku ntebe n'ak'Umwana w'Intama." Nuko abamarayika bose bari bahagaze bagose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ya ntebe na ba bakuru na bya bizima bine, bikubita hasi bubamye imbere y'intebe, baramya Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bati"Amen, amahirwe n'icyubahiro n'ubwenge n'ishimwe, no guhimbazwa n'ubutware n'imbaraga bibe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iby'Imana yacu iteka ryose." Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA        Matayo 5 :1-12
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: YESU abonye abantu benshi azamuka umusozi, maze kwicara abigishwa be baramwegera. Aterura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amagambo ati"Hahirwa abakene mu mitima yabo, Kuko ubwami bwo mu ijuru ari ubwabo. Hahirwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abashavura, Kuko ari bo bazahozwa. Hahirwa abagwa neza, Kuko ari bo bazahabwa isi. Hahirwa abafite
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: inzara n'inyota byo gukiranuka, Kuko ari bo bazahazwa. Hahirwa abanyambabazi, Kuko ari bo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazazigirirwa. Hahirwa ab'imitima iboneye, Kuko ari bo bazabona Imana. Hahirwa abakiranura, Kuko ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bo bazitwa abana b'Imana. Hahirwa abarenganyirijwe gukiranuka, Kuko ubwami bwo mu ijuru ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwabo. "Namwe muzahirwa ubwo bazabatuka bakabarenganya, bakababeshyera ibibi byinshi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babampora. Muzanezerwe, muzishime cyane kuko ingororano zanyu ari nyinshi mu ijuru, kuko ari ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: barenganyije abahanuzi ba mbere.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: AMAGAMBO Y’IBYO
verses.speaker: all

sections.title: Amasakaramento
sections.description: Amasakaramento n'imirimo y'Itorero: Igaburo Ryera, Ubatizo, Gukomezwa, Gushyingirwa, Guhamba Abapfu, no Kurobanura Abayobozi b'Itorero.

verses.text: IGABURO RYERA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: RY’UMWAMI WACU
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu bashaka guhabwa igaburo ryera, niba harimo uzwi na bose ko ari umunyangeso mbi cyane, cyangwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukabije kugirira nabi abaturanyi be mu byo ubu avuga no mu byo akora, bikajya bikoza Itorero isoni,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori abyumvise akwiriye kumuhamagara, avugane na we, amubwire ko atemewe kujya ku Meza
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: y’Umwami wacu atarihana ingeso ze mbi ku mugaragaro, akerekana yuko yemeye kuzireka, kandi si cyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyo nyine, ahubwo akwiriye no gusubiza uwo yambuye, cyangwa gusezerana ko azabimusubiza vuba,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ab’itorero abari bababaye ku bwe babone kumwakira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi Umupastori namenya ko mu Itorero rye harimo abangana, nabo akwiriye kubagenza atyo,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: abahakanira kujya ku meza kugeza ubwo azamenya ku buzuye. Umwe muri abo banganaga ni yemera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubabarira rwose mugenzi we wamugiriye nabi, cyangwa ubwe yakwemera gusubiza mugenzi we icyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bapfa, ariko mugenzi we akanga kunyurwa nk’umukristo, ahubwo agakomeza kugira agahinda,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori akwiriye kwemera uwo wihannye, ntiyemere wa wundi wanze kwihana.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ni habaho Guterana ku Meza kwera, aya meza bayashyire hagati mu rusengero, cyangwa ahandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hakwiriye, cyangwa se aho basanzwe basengera Gusenga kwa mugitondo, babanze bayirambureho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwenda wera ; hanyuma Umupastori ahagaruke ahagarare i ruhande rwayo rw’ibumoso, avuge
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Isengesho ry’Umwami wacu wenyine, m’irindi rikurikirana na ryo, bapfukanme.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: DATA wa twese wo mu ijuru, Izina ryawe ryubahwe ; Ubwami bwawe buze ; Ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,
verses.speaker: all
