verses.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu Ijuru ; uduhe none infunguro ridutunga uko bukeye ; Utubabarire ibyaha byacu,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: nk’uko tubabarira ababitugirira ; Ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize umubi. Amen
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, ni wowe uzi ibyo abantu bose bibwira mu mutima n’ibyo bifuza, kandi nta
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mugambi wose uyobewe ; none uduhumekeremo Umwuka wawe Wera, utunganye ibitekerzo byo mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mutima yacu, tubone kugukunda rwose, duhimbaze Izina ryawe ryera nk’uko bigukwiriye. Tubisabye mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma Umupastori ahindukirire abantu, abasomere amategeko cumi y’Imana n’ijwi ryumvikana. Ku
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: itegeko ryose n’amara kurisoma, abantu basabe Imana kubababarira kwica iryo tegeko mu minsi ishize,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: no kubafasha kuryumvira mu minsi izaza : ubwo babivuge bapfukamye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Imana yavuze aya magambo yose iti « Ndi Uwiteka Imana yawe yagukuye mu gihugu cy’Egiputa mu nzu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’uburetwa. Ntukagire izindi mana umbangikanya na zo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu :                Nyagasani, utubabarire uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: AMATEGEKO 10
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori :       Ntukiremere igshushanyo kibajwe, cyangwa igisa n’ishusho y’ikintu cyose kiri hejuru
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: mu ijuru, cyangwa mu mazi yo hasi y’ubutaka ; ntukabyikubite imbere, ntukabikorere ; kuko Uwiteka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana yawe ndi Imana ifuha, mpora abana gukiranirwa kwa base, nkageza ku buzukuruza n’ubuvivi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw’abanyanga, nkababarira abankunda bakitondera amategeko yanjye, nkageza ku buzukuruza babo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: b’ibihe igihumbi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu :                   Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umupastori :         Ntukavugire ubusa izina ry’uwiteka Imana yawe, kuko Uwiteka atazamubara
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: nk’utacumuye uvugiye ubusa Izina rye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu :                  Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umupastori :         wibuke kweza umunsi w’isabato. Mu minsi itandatu ujye ukora, abe ari yo ukoreramo
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: imirimo yawe yose ; ariko uwakarindwi ni wo sabato y’Uwiteka Imana Yawe. Umuhungu wawe, cyangwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: itungo ryawe, cyangwa umukobwa wawe, cyangwa umuja wawe, cyangwa itungo ryawe, cyangwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umunyamahanga wawe uri i wanyu ; kuko iminsi itandatu ari yo Uwiteka yaremyemo ijuru n’isi n’inyanja
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ibirimo byose, akaruhuka ku wa karindwi ; ni cyo cyatumye Uwiteka aha umugisha umunsi w’isabato,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akaweza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu :                   Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umupastori :          Wubahe so na nyoko, kugira ngo uramire mu gihugu Uwiteka Imana iguha
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abantu :                   Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umupastori :             Ntukice
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abantu :                   Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umupastori :            Ntugasambane
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abantu :                   Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umupastori :           Ntukice
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abantu :                   Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umupastori :          Ntukashinje mugenzi wawe ibinyoma
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abantu :                  Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umupastori :          Ntukifuze inzu ya mugenzi wawe, ntukifuze umugore wa mugenzi wawe, cyangwa
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: umugaragu we, cyangwa umuja we, cyangwa inka ye, cyangwa indogobe ye, cyangwa ikintu cyose cya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mugenzi wawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu :                   Nyagasani, turakwinga utubabarire, kandi wandike ayo mategeko yose mu mitima
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: yacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Cyangwa Umupastori, mu cyimbo cy’ayo mategeko, asome aya mategeko abiri
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umwami wacu Yavuze aciye mu magambo make.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMWAMI wacu Yesu yaravuze ati « Umva, Isirayeli, Uwiteka Imana yacu ni we Mwami wenyine. Nuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rero, ukundishe Uwiteka Imana yawe umutima wawe wose, n’ubugingo bwawe bwose, n’ubwenge
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwawe bwose, n’imbaraga zawe zose. Irya kabiri ngiri ; Ukunde mugenzi wawe nk’uko wikunda. Nta
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rindi tegeko rirusha aya gukomera. Muri ayo mategeko yombi, amategeko yose n’ibyahanuwe ni yo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byuriririraho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu :              Nyagasani, turakwinginga utubabarire, kandi wandike ayo mategeko yose mu mitima
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Yacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hakurikiraho Amasengesho yo gusabira abadutegeka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo gusabira Perezida wa Repubulika y’u Rwanda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, ni wowe utegeka amahanga yose ukayaha amahoro kugira ngo akore ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ushaka ; none turakwinginga ngo uhore urebana imbabazi Perezida wa Repubulika y’u Rwanda, umuhe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukoresha neza ubushobozi wamuhaye, igihugu cyacu kibone kugira amahoro, kugira ngo abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: batagira imidugararo, ahubwo bagubwe neza, bashimwe n’andi mahanga ; kandi ubwo bushobozi ajye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abukoresha uburyo butuma Itorero ryawe rigira amahoro. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo gusabira Abategetsi bo mu gihugu cyacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, ubwami bwawe ntabwo bushira, kandi icyubahiro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyawe gikwiriye isi yose. Ni cyo gituma tukwinginga, ngo uhore urebana imbabazi Abaministiri n’abandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bategetsi bahawe ubushobozi bwo gutegeka iki gihugu ; ubahe ubwenge bwo kujya inama neza. Kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turasabira, kugira ngo ubafashe gukorera neza abantu bashinzwe bicishijwe bugufi kandi ari abiringirwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi turakwinginga ngo indini no kukubaha, amahoro no kuugirana ubumwe, ukuri no guca imanza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: zitabera, bitabura muri twe iminsi yose. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma akurikizeho Isengesho ry’uwo munsi : maze asome Igice cyo mu Nzandiko abantu bicaye,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ati ; Igice cYo mu Nzandiko cyanditswe mu guce cya……cyo mu Rwandiko rwanditse na……uhereye ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: murongo wa…….
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Narangiza, avuge ati « Igice vy’urwandiko kigarukiye aha »
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma asome Igice cyo mu Butumwa bwiza, abantu bahagaze, arange ati « Ubutumwa Bwiza
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bwanditswe mu gice cya...cyo u Butumwa bwa…….., uhereye ku murongo wa……Ataragisoma bose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bavuge bati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: N’amara kugisoma, bose bavuge bati ;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icyubahiro kibe icyawe, Mwami Mana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami Mana, tugushimiye ubu butmwa bwawe bwiza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma bose bavuge ibyo kwemera, bagihagaze
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NEMEYE Imana imwe, Data wa twese ushobora byose, Umuremyi w’ijuru n’isi, kandi w’ibintu bigaragara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ibitagaragara. Kandi nemeye Umwami umwe Yesu Kristo, Umwana w’Imana wahoze ari Umwana wayo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: isi n’ibiri mu ijuru bitararemwa ; Imana iva mu Mana, Umucyo uva mu Mucyo, Imana Nyamana, nyamara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yahoze ari Umwana, ntiyaremwe : afite akamero kamwe n’aka Data wa twese, kandi ni we waremye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibintu byose. Yavuye mu Ijuru, amanuka ku bwacu abantu ngo dukizwe ; Yambikirwa umubiri n’umubiri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’umwuka Wera mu Mwari Mariya, aba umuntu ; Arababazwa, arahambwa, amara iminsi itatu, arazuka,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’uko byari byaranditswe ; Arazamuka, ajya mu ijuru. None ubu yicaye iburyo bwa Data wa twese.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Hanyuma azagarukana igitinyiro gucira abariho n’abapfuye urubanza ; ubwami bwe ntibuzashira.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kandi nemeye Umwuka Wera ni we Mwami kandi umugabyi w’ubugingo, ukomoka kuri Data wa twese
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: no ku Mwana, usengerwa hamwe na Data wa twese n’Umwana, agahimbazanywa na bo, wavugiraga mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ijwi ry’abahanuzi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi nemeye yuko hariho Itorero rimwe Katolika ry’abakristo bose, rikurikiza intumwa za Kristo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mpamya yuko hariho kubatizwa kumwe ko gukuraho ibyaha ; kandi ntegereje ko hazabaho kuzuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kw’abapfuye, n’ubugingo bwo mu gihe kizaza. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hakurikiraho kuranga ibizakorwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni birangira, Umupastori ajye ku meza, asome amagambo amwe muri aya akurikira. Maze baturishe
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: amaturo yo gufasha umurim w’Imana, bayashyire ku nkoko : Umupastori abyakire, abimurikire Imana,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: maze abishyire ku meza yitonze.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Igaburo Ryera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abe ari ko umucyo wanyu ubonekera imbere y’abantu, kugira ngo babone imirimo yanyu myiza,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bahereko bahimbaza so wo mw’Ijuru
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Matayo 5 :16
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: "Ntimukibikire ubutunzi mu isi, aho inyenzi n'ingese ziburya, kandi abajura bacukura bakabwiba.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ahubwo mwibikire ubutunzi mu ijuru, aho inyenzi n'ingese zitaburya, n'abajura ntibacukure ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babwibe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Matayo 6 :19-20.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Mukwiriye gukora imirimo ngo mubone uko mufasha abadakomeye, no kwibuka amagambo Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yesu yavuze ati 'Gutanga guhesha umugisha kuruta guhabwa."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyakozwe 20 :35.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Uwigishwa ijambo ry'Imana agabane n'umwigisha ibyiza byose. Ntimuyobe : Imana ntinegurizwa izuru,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuko ibyo umuntu abiba ari byo azasarura.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wihanangirize abatunzi bo mu by'iki gihe, kugira ngo be kwibona cyangwa kwiringira ubutunzi butari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwo kwizigirwa, ahubwo biringire Imana iduha byose itimana ngo tubinezererwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abagalatiya 6 : 6-7.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ku munsi wo Kuvuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 1 Timoteyo 6 :17.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Muzi ubuntu bw'Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo uko yari umutunzi, maze agahinduka umukene ku bwanyu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo ubukene bwe bubatungishe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 2 Abakorinto 8 :9
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ku munsi wo Kuzuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Pasika yacu yatambwe, ari we Kristo. Nuko rero tujye tuziririza iminsi mikuru tudafite umusemburo wa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kera, cyangwa umusemburo ari wo gomwa n'ibibi, ahubwo tugire imitsima idasembuwe ari yo kuri no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kutaryarya.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amaze kuzamuka mu ijuru, Ajyana iminyago myinshi, Aha abantu impano.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ku munsi wo Kuzamuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 1 Abakorinto 5 :7,8.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abafeso 4 :8.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Imana ni yo yadushyizeho ikimenyetso, iduha Umwuka wayo mu mitima yacu ho ingwate.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ku munsi wa Pentekote
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ku munsi w’ubutatu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 1 Abakorinto 1 : 22
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umwami nyir'ibihe byose udapfa, kandi utaboneka, ari we Mana imwe yonyine, ihimbazwe kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: icyubahiro kibe icyayo iteka ryose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Niba habayeho Igaburo rYera, Umupastori ahereko ashyire ku Meza umugati na vino ibikwiriye.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: 1Timoteyo 1 :17
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Dusabire Itorero rya Kristo rirwana intambara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nziza muri iyi isi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, ni Wowe wayoboye intumwa yawe kutwigisha gusabira abantu bose no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubingingira no kubashimira. None turakwinga twitonze ku bw’imbabazi ku bw’imbabazi zawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: (kwemera ibyo tugutuye) kumva ibyo tugusaba, Mana y’icyubahiro. Turagusaba ngo uhe Itorero ryawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: riri mu isi yose umutima w’ukuri no kugirana ubumwe no guhuza inama. Kandi turagusaba ngo abature
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Izina ryawe bose bahuze kwemera kw’ijambo ryawe ryera, bashyire hamwe, bakundane urukundo ruva
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuri wowe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi turakwinginga ngo ukize abategetsi. Abakristo bose, ujye ubarinda, cyane cyane umugaragu wawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Perezida wa Repubilika y’u Rwanda, ngo adutware neza mu mahoro. Kandi uhe abatware be bose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gutwara neza, bace imanza batabera, bahane abakora nabi, bakomeze idini yawe y’ukuri kandi bakwize
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ingeso nziza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data wa twese wo mw’ijuru, Abeskopi, abapastori n’abandi bahereza bawe bose ubahe Ubuntu bwawe,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: kugira ngo berekanishe Ijambo ryawe rizima ingeso zabo nziza n’ibyo bigisha, kandi bajye bahereza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amasakaremento yawe yera nk’uko bikwiriye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ujye uha abantu bawe bose Ubuntu bwawe buva mu ijuru, cyane cyane aba bateraniye hano, kugira ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ijambo ryawe ryera baryumvane umutima witonze, ukubaha, bagukorere bakiranuka iminsi yose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazamara bakiriho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi Nyagasani Mana, turakwinga twitonze kurebana imbabazi zawe abababaye n’abashavura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’indushyi n’abarwayi n’abagize ibindi byago bakiri muru iyi si, ubahumurize kandi ubafashe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi turagushima abantu abantu bawe bose bavuye muri ubu bugingo bakwizeye kandi bakubashye;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turakwinginga ngo natwe uduhere Ubuntu, kugira ngo dukurikize ingeso zabo nziza, hanyuma tuzabone
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gufatanariza na bo mu bwami bwawe bwo mw’ijuru. Uduhe ibyo, Data wa twese, ku bwa Yesu Kristo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umuhuza wacu kandi Umurengezi wacu wenyine. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abashaka kujya ku Meza y’Umwami wacu, ni bamara kugera mu myamya, Umupastori abahugura atya
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ati:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: YEMWE bakundwa cyane mu Mwami wacu, mugashaka guhabwa Igaburo ryera ry’Umubiri n’Amaraso
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: by’Umukiza wacu Kristo, mukwiriye kwibuka uko Pawulo wera yahuguraga abantu bose kwisuzumana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwete, batarahangara guhabwa kurya kuri uwo mugati no kunywera kuri icyo gikombe; kuko tuzi yuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umugisha duhabwa ari mwinshi, iyo duhabwa iryo Sakaramento tuzanye umutima wihannye by’ukuri;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: (kuko, ubwo tuba turya ku Mubiri wa Kristo, tukanywa ku Maraso ye mu buryo bw’Umwuka, ikiva muri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyo tuguma muri Kristo, nawe akaguma muri twe; tuba umwe na Kristo, na we akaba umwe natwe).
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko mumenye yuko ni duhabwa iryo Sakaramento tudakwiriye kurihabwa tuba twishyize mu kaga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gakomeye; kuko ubwo tuba dutsinzw n’urubanza rwo gucumura Umubiri n’Amaraso bya Kristo Kristo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umukiza wacu; tuba tuririye kandi tunywereye gucirwaho iteka, tuzize kutita ku Mubiri w’Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu; tuba duteye Imana kuturakarira, ikaduteza indwara zitari zimwe n’imfu nyinshi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kubw’ibyo, Bene Data, mwicire urubanza, Umwami wacu ye kuba ari we urubacira. Mwihane by’ukuri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyaha mwakoze; mwemere rwose Kristo Umukiza wacu mudashidikanya, muboneze ingeso zanyu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi mukundane n’abantu bose urukundo rudafite inenge, mubone kuba abakwiriye gusangira iri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gaburo ryera rihesha imigisha ihishwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi ikiruta byose mukwiriye gushima Imana Data wa twese n’Umwana n’Umwuka Wera, muhamana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umutima wicishije bugufi, muyishimiye ko yancungye isi n’urupfu n’imibabaro by’Umukiza wacu Kristo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ni we Mana kandi n’Umuntu. Turamushira yuko yicishije bugufi, akemera kudupfira ku Musaraba,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: twebwe abanyabyaha b’indembe, abari mu mwijima no mu gicucu cy’urupfu, kugira ngo aduhindire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abana b’Imana, adukuze, atugeze ku bugingo budashira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi ubwo tumenye yuko yashakaga ko tujya twibuka Urukundo rwinshi cyane Yesu Kristo Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu kandi Umkiza wacu yatweretse ubwo yadupfiraga, n’imigisha itarondereka yaduhesheje kuvusha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amaraso ye y’igiciro cyinshi, ni cyo cyatumye ashyiraho ibyo bimenyetso byera, kutubera ingwate
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’urukundo adukunda, kandi ngo bihore bitwibutsa urupfu rwe, tubone kugira ihumure ryinshi ridashira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko none tumushimire na Data wa twese n’Umwuka Wera, nk’uko dukwiriye, tumuyoboke,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tumugandukire, tubone gukora ibyo ashaka, kandi duhirimbanire kumukorera turi abera bamukiranukira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iminsi yose tuzamara tukiriho, Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maz’Umupastori abwire abaje guhabwa Isakaremento ati:
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: YEMWE abihana rwose by’ukuri ibyaha byanyu,mugakunda na bagenzi banyu, mukemera kugira ingeso
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nshya mwumviye amategeko y’Imana, mukagendere mu nzira yayo yera, mwigire hafi mwizeye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muhabwe iri Sakaremento ryera ryo kubahumuriza, kandi mwaturire Imana ishobora byose ibyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byanyu mwicishe bugufi, mupfukamye, mwitonze.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma ibyo Kwatura iyaha kw’abantu bose bivugwe n’Umupastori hamwe n’abaje guhabwa
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: isakaramento bapfukamye bitonze, bati:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, Se w’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo, Umuremyi w’ibintu byose, uzacira abantu bose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imanza, twemeranye umubabaro ibyaha n’ibicumuro byinshi twakoze nabi rwose hato na hato, mu byo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: dutekereza, no mu byo tuvuga, no mu byo dukora, ducumura icyubahiro cyawe, Mana, bituma twizanira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uburakari bwawe. Turihannye rwose; tubabajwe cyane n’ibyo bicumuro byacu; iyo tubyibutse, tugira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: agahinda, bitUbera umutwaro uremereye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Utubabarire, utubabarire, Data wa twese w’imbabazi zose. Kubw’Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu utubabarire ibyo twagakoze byose; kandi uduhe kujya tugukorera neza, tukunezeze, tugire ingeso
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nshya nziza, kugira nGo none n’iminsi Yose Izina ryawe ryubahahwe. Tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori ahagaruke, ahindukirire abantu, avuge ati
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: IMANA ishobora byose, Data wa tewse wo mw’ijuru, yasezeranije ku bw’imbabazi zayo nyinshi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubabarira abayihindukiriye bihannye rwose, bizeye by’ukuri. Ibagirire imbabazi, ibababarire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyaha byanyu byose, ibahe imbaraga zo gukora ibyiza byose; hanyuma izabageze mu bugingo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: budashira. Tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Umupastori avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nimwumve amagambo ahumuriza Umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo abwira abamuhindukiriye by’ukuri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bose ati,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: "Mwese abarushye n'abaremerewe, nimuze munsange ndabaruhura.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: “Kuko Imana itatumye Umwana wayo mu isi gucira abari mu isi ho iteka, ahubwo yabikoreye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo abari mu isi bakizwe na we.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi nimwumve ibyo Pawulo wera yavuze ati,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: “Iri jambo ni iryo kwizerwa rikwiriye kwemerwa rwose, yuko Kristo Yesu yazanywe mu isi no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukiza abanyabyaha.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi nimwumve ibyo Yohana wera yavuze ati:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: “Ni hagira umuntu ukora icyaha, dufite Umurengezi kuri Data wa twese, ni we Yesu Kristo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukiranuka. Uwo ni we mpongano y’ibyaha byacu.”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Umupastori akurikize avuge ati;
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Mucurure imitima yanyu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu                       Tuyicururire Umwami wacu.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umupastori               Dushime Imana Umwami wacu.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abantu                       Ni byiza, kandi biratunganye ko dukora dutyo.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Maze Umupastori ahindukirire Ameza, avuga ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NYAGASANI, ni byiza rwose, kandi biratunganye, ko tugushimira ahantu hose n’ibihe byose, uri Data wa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: twese Wera, Imana ishobora byose ihoraho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ayo magambo uhereye kuri ´Data wa twese´ areke kuvugwa ku munsi w’ubutatu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NI CYO gitumye twebwe hamwe n’abaMarayika bakuru n’abo mu ijuru bose, dushima Izina ryawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ry’icubahiro, tuguhimbaza ibihe byose tuti, Nyagasani Mana nyiri ingabo, uru Uwera, uri Uwera, uri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwera; icyubahiro cyawe gikwiriye ijuru n’isi; Wowe Uwiteka usumba byose uhimbazwe. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: AMAGAMBO YO KONGERWAHO KU MINSI MIKURU
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ku munsi wo kuvuka ku minsi irindwi ikurikiraho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: KUKO watanze Umwana wawe w’ikinege Yesu Kristo kuvuka kubgacu, nk’uko tubyibuka muri iki gihe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uko yahinduwe n’Umwuka Wera, akaba umuntu rwose abikomoye mu nda y’Umwari Mariya nyina,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akabyarwa adafite inenge rwose, ngo abone kudukuraho ibyaha. Ni cyo gitunye n’ibindi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ku munsi wo kuzuka no ku minsi irindwi ikurikiraho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: KANDI cyane cyane dukwiriye kuguhimbariza Kuzuka k’Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo kw’icyubahiro, kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ari we Mwana w’intama wa Pasika yacu wadutangiwe, akamaraho ibyaha by’abari mu isi. Niwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wahinduje ubusa urupfu gupfa kwe, kandi ku bwo Kuzuka kwe yatugaruriye ubugingo budashira. Nicyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gitumye n’ibindi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ku munsi wo Kuzamuka no ku minsi irindwi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ikurikiraho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: KUBW’Umwana wawe ukunda cyane Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu wiyeretse Intumwa ze zose ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mugaragaro, amaze kuzukana icyubahiro cyinshi. Yarazamutse ajya mu ijuru zimureba, ngo adutegurire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwanya; kandi ngo, aho ari, natwe tuzajyeyo, twimane na wem u cyubahiro cye. Ni cyo gitumye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ibindi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ku munsi wa Pentekote no ku minsi irindwi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ikurikiraho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: KUBWA Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu wasezeranye gutuma Umwuka Wera, Muri iki gihe turibuka uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yamanutse avuye mu ijuru nk’inkubi y’umuyaga uhuha cyane, ameze nk’indimi z’umuriro zijya ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ntumwa. Uwo Mwuka yazanywe no kubigisha no kubayobora mu by’ukuri byose; kandi yabahaye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: impano zo kuvuga indimi zitari zimwe; n’ubushizi bw’amanga bwo kubwiriza amahanga yose ubutumwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwiza. Maze natwe yabudukuje mu mwijima no mu myigishirize iyobya, atujyana mu mucyo utangaje,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo tukumenye n’Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo. Ni cyo gitumye n’ibindi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ku munsi w’ubutatu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URI Imana imwe kandi Umwami umwe; ariko nturi Peresona umwe wenyine, ahubwo uri abaperesona
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: batatu, nyamara muri ubumana bumwe. Ni cyo gitumye twebwe hamwe n’abaMarayika n’abaMarayika
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakuru n’abo mu ijuru bose, dushima Izina ryawe ry’icubahiro, tuguhimbaza ibihe byose tuti “Nyagasani
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana nyiri ingabo, uri Uwera, uri Uwera, uri Uwera, icyubahiro cyawe gikwiriye ijuru n’isi; Wowe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwiteka usumba byose usumba byose uhimbazwe:“ Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Umupastori apfukame i ruhande rw’Ameza avuge mu izina ry’abaje guhabwa isakaramento
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ati:(Cyangw’ubundi yafatanya n’abandi kubivuga bati:)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MWAMI w’imbabazi; ntiduhangara kwegera aya meza yaw twiringiye gukiranuka kwacu, ahubwo tuje
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: twiringiye imbabazi zawe nyinshi zikomeye. Ntidukwiriye gutoragura n’ubuvungukira buri munsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’Ameza yawe. Ariko uri Umwami udahinduka, imico yawe n’ukugira imbabazi. Mwami w’ibambe uduhe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kurya ku Mubiri w’Umwama wawe ukunda Yesu Kristo. No kunywa ku Maraso ye, uburyo butuma imibiri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yacu yandujwe n’ibyaha yezwa n’Umubiri we, n’imitima yacu yezwa n’Amaraso ye y’igiciro cyinshi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo duhore muri we, na we ahore muri twe ibihe byose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori n’amara gutegura umugati na vino, aho ashobora kumanyura neza umugati nogufata
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: igikombe abantu bamureba, avuga ati,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, Data wa twese wo mw’ijuru, watanganye imbabazi zawe nyinshi Umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wawe w’ikinege Yesu Kristo gupfira ku musaraba ngo aducungure, kuri wo yitangayeho rimwe kuba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: igitambo n’ituro n’icyiru byuzuye, bitunganye rwose, birangiriza rimwe gukuraho ibyaha by’abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bose. Kandi yashyizeho urwibutso ruhoraho rw’urupfu rwe rw’igiciro cyinshi, adutegekera mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Butumwa bwe bwera ngo duhore turukurikiza kugeza aho azagarukira, None Data wa twese
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’ibambe, turakwinginga twitonze cyane, utwumvire, ni twakira ibi bintu waremye, umugati na vino,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’uko Umwana wawe Umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo yategetse, ngo bitwibutse urupfu rwe n’imibabaro
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ye, kugira ngo dusangire Umubiri we n’Amaraso by’igiciro cyinshi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ijoro yagambaniwemwo, asingira umugati; amaze kuwushimira Imana, arawumanyagura, awuha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abigishwa be, arababwira ati <<Mwakire murye uyu ni umubiri wanjye ubatangiwe; mujye mukora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mutya ngo munyibuke<>>
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: (afate isahane mu ntoke, awumanyagure, maze ashyire ikiganza ku mugati wose).
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi barangije kurya, asingira igikombe; amaze kugishimira Imana agiha abigishwa be,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arababwira ati <<Nimunyweho mwese; aya ni yo maraso yanjye y’isezerano rishya avuye ku bwanyu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: no kubw’abandi benshi gukuraho ibyaha; mujye mukora mutya, kugira ngo munyibuke.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: (afate igikombe mu ntoke, ashyire ikiganza ku bintu cyose kirimo vino).
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori abanze yihe Isakaramento, umugati na vino ku bwe, hanyuma arihe abandi Bapastori
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: niba bahari; ahereko arihe abantu bapfukamye bitonze agire ati,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMUBIRI w’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo wagutangiwe ukurinde umubiri n’umutima kugeza ubwo uzagera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu bugingo budashira. Akira, urye uyu, wibuke ko ari wowe Kristo yapfiriye, umurishe umutima wawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wizeye, ushima. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nabaha vino avuge ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: AMARASO y’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo yavuye ku bwawe akurinde umubiri n’umutima kugeza ubgo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uzagera mu bugingo budashira. Nywaho, wibuka ko ari wowe Kristo yaviriye amaraso, kandi ushime.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bose ni bamara kugaburinzwa, Umupastori agaruke ku meza y’Umwami wacu, asubizeho umugati na
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: vino bisigaye, abitwikirize umwenda mwiza wera yitonze.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma Umupastori avuge Isengesho ry’Umwami wacu, afatanije n’abantu bose.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: DATA wa twese wo mw‘ijuru, Izina ryawe ryubahwe; Ubwami bwawe buze; Ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru; uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; Utubabarire ibyaha byacu, nk’uko
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: tubabarira ababitugirira; Ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize Umubi; kuko Ubwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ubushobozi n’icyubahiro ari ibyawe iteka ryose. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori ahereko avuge iri sengeshowenyine.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, twebwe abanu bawe, bitonze turagusaba cyane, kuko uri umubyeyi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwiza, ngo wemere kubw’imbabazi zawe iki gitambo cyacu cyo guhimbaza no gushima.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Turakwinginga cyane twitonze ku bwo gukiranuka k’Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo no ku bw’urupfu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rwe, kandi kuko twizeye amaraso ye, ibyo biduheshanye Itorero ryawe ryose kubabarirwa gukiranirwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwacu, kandi duhabwe indi migisha yose ikomoka mu mibabaro ye. None ubu, Mwami Mana,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turakwihaye, tugutuye imitima n’imibiri yacu, ngo bibe igitambo cycu gikwiriye, cyera, kizima: kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turisabira, twebwe abasangiye iri Gaburo ryera, kugira ngo tugwizwemo ubuntu bwawe n’imigisha yawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iva mu ijuru.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi nubwo tudakwiriye kuguhongerera igitambo cyose kubw’ibyaha byacu byinshi, ariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turakwingize, wemere ibyo tugukoreye none bidukwiriye rwose, utabitewe n’ibyiza twakoze, ahubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: utubabarire ibyaha byacu; tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wwacu. Ayi Data wa twese ushobora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose, ku bwe no muri we icyubahiro cyose n’igitinyiro cyose bibe ibyawe mu bumwe bw’umwuka Wera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iihe byose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, twebwe abahawe iri Gaburo ryera risura iby’ubwiru bw’Imana,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turagushimana umutima wose, kuko utugaburiye ifunguro ry’umwuka, ni ryo mubiri n’amaraso
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: by’Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo Umukiza wacu by’igiciro cyinshi; kandi ku bw’ibyo turahamya neza ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: udukunda, ukatugirira imbabzi, kandi ukatugirira ingingo z’Umubiri w’Umwana wawe, ni wo mutwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ushimwa w’abakwizeye bose.Kandi si byo byonyine; turi n’abaragwwa bafite ibyiringiro byo kuzataha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu bwami budashira, tubuheshejwe n’urupfu rw’Umwama wawe ukundwa cyane no kubabazwa kwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kw’igiciro cyinshi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, turakwinginga twitonze cyane kudufashisha ubuntu bwawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: butuma dukomeza kuba mu bumwe bwera dufitanye, tubone gukora imirimo myiza yose waduteguriye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo tuyikomeze. Ibyo tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu, kugira ngo Wowe hamwe na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we n’Umwuka Wera mugire ishimwe ryose n’icyubahiro cyose iteka ryose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori akurikizeho gusengana n’abandi aya magambo.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MU IJURU icyubahiro kibe Icy’Imana, no mu isi amahoro abe mubo yishimira. Nyagasani Mana, Mwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wo mu ijuru, Mana Data wa twese ushobora byose, turaguhimbaza, turagushima, turagusenga,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turagusingiza, kandi turagushimira icyubahiro cyawe cyinshi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani, Yesu Kristo, Mwana n’ikinege wa Data wa twese ukuraho ibyaha by’abari mu isi, utugirire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbabazi;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wowe ukuraho ibyaha b’abari mu isi, utugirire imbabazi;
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Wowe ukuraho ibyaha b’abari mu isi, utugirire imbabazi;
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Wowe wicaye iburyo bw’Imana Data wa twese, utugirire imbabazi;
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kuko ari Wowe wenyine wera, ari wowe wenyine wera, ari Wowe Mugabe wenyine. Kristo, ni wowe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uhimbazanywa n’Umwuka wera mu cyubahiro cy’Imana Data wa twese, Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma Umupastori (cyangwa Umwepiskopi niba ahari), abasabire umugisha n’aya magambo, babone
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: kugenda, ati;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: AMAHORO Imana itanga, aruta ayo umuntu wese yakwibwira, ajye arinda imitima yanyu n’ubwenge
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwanyu, kugira ngo mukomeze kumenya no gukunda Imana n’Umwana wayo Yesu Kristo Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu. Kandi umugisha w’Imana ishobora byose, Data wa twese, Umwana, kandi Umwuka wera ube muri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwe, kandi ugumane namwe iminsi yose. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni hagira ibisigara ku mugati na vino byarobanuwe, Umupastori na bamwe mu bamaze guherezwa,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: amaze gusabira abantu umugisha bahereko barangize ibisigaye bitonze.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Andi masengesho yo gusomwa barangije gutura amaturo, nk’uko Umupastori ashaka, niba hatariho
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Igaburo ryera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NYAGASANI, twebwe abagaragu n’abaja bawe, turakwingize ku bw’imababzi zawe, udufashe mu byo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tukwingingira no mu byo tugusaba, kandi udutangarize inzira izatugeza ku gakiza kadashira; kandi ubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyo muri ubu bugingo bw’abapfa bigenda bihinduka, cyangwa bidutungura, ujye ubiturinda, kuko uhora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: witeguye kudufashisha Ubuntu bwawe bwinshi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tubisabye mu Izina ry’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NYAGASANI, turagusaba kugira ngo urukundo rwawe n’ubuntu bwawe bidushorere mu byo dukora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose, kandi udufashe kujya twunguka mu byo tugukorera, kugira ngo muri Wowe umurimo wacu wose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abe ariho utangirira, abe ari ho ukomerezwa, kandi abe ari ho urangirizwa, bitume duhesha Izina ryawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryera icyubahiro, kandi natwe hanyuma tuzahabwe ubugingo buhoraho ku bw’imbabzi zawe. Tubisabye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: KUBATIZA ABANA BATO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ni byiza kwiteguza ko umunsi ko abana babo bakwiriye kubatirizwaho uzaba uw’icyumweru, cyangwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwe wo mu minsi ( mikuru, kuko ari umunsi abantu bakunda guteraniraho ari benshi; abo bantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakwiriye kuba abagabo bo guhamya ko aba bana babatijwe bemewe kwinjira mu mubare w’Itorero rya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo. Kandi umuntu wese uri aho akwiriye kwibuka ibyo yasezeraniye mu kubatizwa kwe, nareba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubatizwa kw’abo bana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo kubatizwa bikwiriye kuvugwa mu rurimi rwa bene gihugu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko ni haramukahabaye ikibuza kubabatiza ku munsi mukuru, babasha kwemerwa kubatizwa ku wundi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: munsi wose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mumenye yuko umwana wo kubatizwa, niba ari umuhungu, akwiriye kugira abishingizi batatu, abagabo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babiri n’umugore umwe; kandi niba ari umukobwa, akwiriye kugira abagore babiri n’umugabo umwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ababyeyi bemerewe kuba abishingizi b’abana babo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abishingizi bakwiriye kuba Abakristo bashimwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori n’agera ku cyo kubatirizamo kirimo amazi meza, ahagarare aho, abaze ati
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Muri aba bana harimo ababatijwe, cyangwa nta wurabatizwa?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Niba basubiza bati, Ntawurabatizwa, Umupastori akomeze ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BENE Data, nk’iko abantu bose bavukana kamere ikunda gukora ibyaha, kandi nk’uko Umukiza wacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yesu Kristo yavuze ati “Ntawe ushobora kwinjira mu Bwami bw’Imana atabyawe n’amazi n’Umwuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wera, ndabinginga ngo musabe Imana Data wa twese mu Izina ry’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo, kugira ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubwo imbabazi zayo nyinshi ihe aba bana icyo btabasha guhabwa na kamere bavukany, babatirishwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amazi n’Umwuka Wera, binjire mu Itorero rya Kristo ryera, kandi bahinduke ingingo zaryo nzima.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Umupastori avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Dusenge.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, ku bw’imbabazi zawe nyinshi kera winjije Noa n’abo mu rugwe rwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu  nkuge,  urabarokora,  ntibicwa  n’amazi;  hanyuma washoreye  abantu  bawe  Abisirayeli,  ubacisha mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyanja itukura, ni yo yasuraga Kubatiza kwawe kwea; kandi Ubwo Umwana wawe ukunda cyane, Yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo, yabatizagwa mu ruzi Yorordani, yejeje amazi ngo abe icyitegererezo cyo gukuraho ibyaha. Nuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: none  turakwinginga  ngo  ku  bw’imbabazi  aba  bana,  uboze  ubeze  n’Umwuka  Wera,  bakire  uburakari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwawe,  binjire  mu  nkuge,  ni  yo  Torero  rya  Kristo,  babone  guca  mu  biruhanya  by’iyi  si  bakomeje  ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: twemera, banejejwe n’ibyiringiro bafite, kandi bashoye imizi mu rukundo, hanyuma bazajye mu gihugu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cy’ubugingo  budashira,  bimane  nawe  ibihe  byose;  tubisabye  mu  Izina  rya  Yesu  Kristo  Umwami  wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana  ishobora  byose  ihoraho,  umutabazi  w’abagutabaze,  umuvunyi  w’abaguhungiraho  bose,  uhesha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abakwizera ubugingo, kandi uzra abapfuye,  none  dusabiye aba bana kugira ngo, ubwo baje kubatizwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kubatizwa  kwawe  kwera, bahabwe  isezerano  ryo kubyarwa  ubwa  kabiri  mu  buryo  nw’umwuka,  n’iryo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubabarirwa ibyaha.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani,  ubakire,  nk’uko  wasezeranije  mu  magambo  yavuzwe  n’Umwana  wawe  ukunda  cyane,  ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: “Musabe, muzahabwa; mushake, muzabona; mukomanage, muzakingurirwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: None rero twebwe abasabye uduhe, abashatse tubone, abakomanze udukingurire, kugira ngo aba bana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bahabwe  umugisha  wo  kwoza  kwawe  ko  mu  buryo  bw’Umwuka,  babone  kuzinjira  mu  Bwami  bwawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: budashira, nk’uko wadusezeranije muri Kristo Yesu Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu bose bahaguruke; maze
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umupastori avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nimwumve amagambo y’Ubutumwa Bwiza bwanditswe na Mariko Wera, mu gice cya cumi, uhereye ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: murongo wa cumi n’itatu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bamuzanira abana bato ngo abakoreho, abigishwa barabacyaha. Ariko Yesu abibonye ararakara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arababwira ati"Mureke abana bato bansange, ntimubabuze kuko abameze batyo ubwami bw'Imana ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwabo. Ndababwira ukuri yuko utemera ubwami bw'Imana nk'umwana muto, atazabwinjiramo na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hato." Arabakikira, abaha umugisha abarambitseho ibiganza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori, namara gusoma ubutumwa,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abahuguze aya magambo asobanura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo asomye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bakundwa, mwumvise muri ubwo Butumwa amagambo Umukiza wacu Kristo yavuze ategeka ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bamuzanira abana bato, acyaha abashakaga kubabuza, kandi ahugura abantu bose gukurikiza imico
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’abana batigeze gukora ikibi. Mubonye ko ibyo yakoze byerekanye urukundo yabakundaga, kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yabakikiye, akabarambikaho ibiganza bye, akabaha umugisha.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko rero namwe ntimushidikanye, ahubwo mwizere rwose, yuko yemerana imbabazi aba bana,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abakiriza amaboko ye abafatiye ibambe, kandi ko azabaha umugisha w’ubugingo budashira,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’umugabane wo mu Bwami bwe buhoraho. Kubw’ibyo, nk’uko twizeye rwose yuko Data wa twese wo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu ijuru akunda cyane kugirira neza aba bana, nk’uko Umwana wayo Yesu Kristo yahamije; kandi nk’uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tudashidikanya yuko yemeye uyu murimo wacu w’urukundo w’urukundo wo kuyizanira aba bana ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babatizwe Kubatiza kwayo kwera, tubanze tuyishime, twizeye kandi tuyubashye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, turagushimira twicishije bugufi, yuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wemeye kuduhamagarira kumenya Ubuntu bwawe, tukakwizera, None turagusaba, utwongerere uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kumenya, udukomezemo uko kwizera iminsi yose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi aba bana ubahe Umwuka wawe Wera, kugira ngo babyarwe ubwa kabiri, kandi babe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abaragwa b’agakiza katazashira; tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu, ugumana nawe, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: utegekana nawe n’Umwuka Wera none n’ibihe byose. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma Umupastori ahugure Abishingizi bose ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Bakundwa cyane, muzanye aba bana kubatizwa, kandi musabye Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo kubakira,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo ababohore ibyaha, abeze n’Umwuka Wera, azabinjize mu Bwami bwo mu ijuru, kandi azabahe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubugingo budashira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwumvise kandi yuko Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo yasezeranije mu Butumwa bwe bwera gukora ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mumusaba byose, kandi ibyo yasezeranije ntazabura kubisohoza rwose. Nuko rero, ubwo Kristo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yasezeranye atyo, aba bana nabo bakwiriye gusezeranirwa namwe abishingizi babo kugeza aho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazakurira, bakisezeranira ubwabo, yuko bazimura Satani n’ingeso ze zose, bakazakomeza kwizera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ijambo ryera ry’Imana, bakazitondera amategeko yayo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ababyeyi n’abishingizi bahaguruke basezeranire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abana babo imbere y’Imana n’imbere y’itorero.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Pasitori:    WOWE nk’umwishingizi, usezeranye kwigisha uyu mwana kwimura no kwanga Satani n’ingeso
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ze zose, n’ikuzo n’icyubahiro by’isi by’ubusa, no kwifuza ibyayo kose, n’irari ry’umubiri, ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: atazabikurukiza, cyangwa gutegekwa na byo?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza      Byose ndabyemeye kandi nsezeranye kuzabikora.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umupastori   Usezeranye gutoza uyu mwana kwemera Imana data wa twese, Umuremyi w’ijuru n’isi; Na
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Yesu Kristo Umwana we w’ikinege Umwami wacu?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi ko yabyawe n’Umwari Mariya, kandi ko iyo nda yasamye yari iy’Umwuka Wera; ko yababajwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwo Pontiyo Pilato yari umutegetsi; ko yabambwe ku musaraba, agapfa, agahambwa, akamanuka i
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kizimu mu bapfuye, akazuka ku munsi wa gatatu, akajya mu ijuru? Ko ubu yicaye iburyo bw’Imana Data
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wa twese ushobora byose, kandi ko azavayo ku mperuka y’isi gucira abariho n’abapfuye urubanza?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi uzamutoza kwemera Umwuka Wera, kwemera ko hariho Itorero ryera Katolika ry’Abakristo bose,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Ubumwe bw’Abera, no Kutubabarirwa ibyaha, no Kuzuka kw’umubiri, n’Ubugingo budashira, ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tumara gupfa?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza      Byose ndabyemeye kandi nsezeranye kuzabikora.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umupastori:  Usezeranye gutoza uyu mwana gusenga no kumvira iby’Imana ishaka n’ibyo itegeka,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: akabigenderamo iminsi yose azamara akiraho?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uzamutoza kujya mu materaniro kugira ngo yige Ijambo ry’Imana kugeza ubwo azakurikira akisezeranira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwe; kandi uzamutoza gusoma ibyanditswe byera no kuririmbira Imana?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza      Byose ndabyemeye kandi nsezeranye kuzabikora.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umupastori   Namwe mu izina ry’uyu mwana murashaka ko abatizwa?
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Gusubiza        Nicyo dushaka
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umupastori n’amara kubibaza, asenge atya ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Mana y’ibambe, wemere ko kamere y’Adamu wa kera iri muri aba bana ihambwa, kugira ngo kamere
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’umuntu mushya izurizwe muri bo. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wemere ko irari ry’umubiri ryose ripfa muri bo. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wemere kubaha ubushobozi n’ububasha bwo kunesha Satani n’iby’iyi si n’ibya kamere. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umuntu wese, twebwe mu murimo wacu tuguhaye ubu, wemere kujya umutoza ingeso nziza nk’iz’abo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu ijuru, akazabihererwa ingororano, Mwami Mana ihimbazwa, ihoraho, kandi itegeka byose iteka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, turagushimira kuko Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo ukundwa cyane
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yavuyebamazi n’amaraso mu rubavu rwe, ngo tubone kubabarirwa ibyaha byacu,agaha abigishwa be
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: itegeko ryo kujya kwigisha abo mu mahanga yose, bakabatiza mu Izina rya Data wa twese,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’iry’Umwana, n’iry’Umwuka Wera ; none turakwinginze wumve ibyo aba bantu bateraniye hano
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bagusabye ; robanura aya mazi, ngo abe icyitegerezo cyo kozaho ibyaha ; kandi emera aba bana baje
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuyabatirizwamo,ko buzura imbabazi zawe, bakaguma mu mubare w’abana bawe bizerwa b’intore ;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Umupastori yakire Umwana, abwire abishingizi ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nimwite uyu mwana izina.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori avuge izina bamubwiye ´, asuke amazi ku mutwe w’uwo mwana, ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kanaka, ndakubatiza mu izina rya Data wa twese, n’iry’Umwana, n’iry’Umwuka Wera. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma Umupastori avuge ati
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Twakiriye uyu mwana mu Iteraniro ry’umukmbi wa Kristo, tumushyizeho ikimenyetso cy’umusaraba,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kimuhamiriza ngo uhereye ubu atazagira isoni zo guhamya ko yizeye Kristo wabambwe, kandi ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azagumya arwanisha ubutwari munsi y’ibindera ye, arwnya ibyaha n’iby’isi na satani, agakomeza kuba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: intore ya Kristo kandi umugaragu we (umuja we) ukiranuka kugeza ku gupfa. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Umupastori akurikizeho aya magambo
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BENE DATA bakundwa, ubwo aba bana bahawe ingwate yo kubyarwa ubwa kabiri, bagaterwa mu mubiri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’Itorero rya Kristo nk’ingurukira, dushimire Imana ishobora byose iyo migisha, tuyisenge duhuje
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umutima, dusabira aba bana ngo bazamare iminsi isigaye bakiriho bameze neza nk’uko babitangiye ubu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hakurikireho Isengesho ry’umwami ry’Umwami wacu, bose bapfukanye.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: DATA wa twese wo mu ijuru, Izina ryawe ryubahwe; Ubwami bwawe buze: ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru; Uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; Utubabarire ibyaha byacu, nk’uko
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: tubabarira ababitugirira; Ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize Umubi. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Umupastori avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: DATA wa twese w’ibambe, turagushimira yuko wasezeranye kubyarisha ubwa kabiri aba bana Umwuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wawe Wera, no kubakira ngo babe abana bawe binjiye mu Itorero ryawe ryera. Kandi ubwo kubatizwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kutubera ikimenyetso cyo gupfa ku byaha, no guhambanwa na Kristo mu rupfu rwe, turakwingingira aba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bana ngo bazapfe ku byaha, babereho gukiranuka; kandi ngo bahambanwe na Kristo uburyo butuma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazazukana nawe. Maze mu gihe cy’imperuka bazaraganwe n’abandi bose bo mu Itorero ryawe ryera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwami bwawe budashira. Tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abishingizi babaguruke, Umupastori abahugure ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UBWO mwebwe abishingizi b’aba bana mubasezeraniye ko bazimura Satani n’ingeso ze zose, bakizera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana, bakayikorera, mugomba kwibuka yuko ari Umurimo wanyu kureba aba bana ko bigishwa neza,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwo bazagera ku gihe cyo gusobanukirwa ko mwabasezeraniye iri sezerano rikomeye, mukabarahirira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iyi ndahiro, mukabahamiriza ibyo muhamije ubu. Kandi kugira ngo babimenye neza, muzajye mureba, ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bajya baza kumva ibibwirizwa; cyane cyan ko bigishwa ibyo Kwemera, n’Isengesho ry’Umwami wacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Amategeko cumi mu rurimi rwabo, hamwe n’ibindi byose Umukristo akwiriye kumenya no kwemera,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo ubugingo bwabo bumere neza. Kandi muzagire umwete wo kubarera neza, nokubatoza ingeso nziza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: za gikristo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi mujye mwibuka yuko kubatizwa kutwibutsa ibyo duhamya, niko gukurikiza icyitegererezo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cy’Umukiza wacu Kristo, tugashushanywa na we; kandi nk’uko yadupfiriye, akatuzukira, natwe ni ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: dukwiriye gupfa ku byaha, tukazukira gukiranuka, tukabona uko twicisha ingeso zacu mbi zose n’irari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryose, tugakomeza iteka ingeso nziza zo kubaha Imana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma yongere, avuge ati
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: TURABAHUGURA ngo mugire umwete kuzazanira Umwepiskopi aba bana ngo abarambikeho ibiganza
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bamaze kwigishwa neza ibyo Kwemera kw’Intumwa, n’Isengesho ry’Umwami wacu, n’Amategeko cumi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hamwe n’ibya Gatekisimu n’ibindi abo gukomezwa bategetswe kwiga.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: KUBATIZWA ABANTU BAKURU
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BAFITE UBWENGE BWO KWISUBIRIZA.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu ni baba bateranye ku Cyumweru cyangwa ku wundi munsi mukuru, abashaka kubatizwa,
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: bagasanga bashyitse, abishingizi babo cya kabiri cyo mu byo Gusenga kwa mugitondo cyangwa kwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nimugoroba, nk’uko Umupastori ashima.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ni bagera aho babatiriza, Umupastori ahagarare, abaze yuko muri bo harimo ababatijwe kera. Ni
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bamuhakanira, avuge ati,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: BAKUNDWA cyane, tuzi yuko abantu bavukana kamere ikunda gukora ibyaha, kandi ko ikibyarwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’umubiri na cyo ari umubiri, kandi ko abatwarwa na kamere iyo badashobora kunezeza Imana, ahubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bahora bakora ibyaha mu buryo bwinshi. Kandi tuzi yuko Umukiza wacu Kristo yavuze ati “Umuntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: utabyawe ubwa kabiri, n’Amazi n’Umwuka, ntabasha kubona Ubwami bw’Imana ; Ni cyo gituma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mbinginga gusaba Imana Data wa twese mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu, kugira ngo ihe aba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bantu ibyo batabasha guheshwa na kamere yabo, babatirishwe Amazi n’Umwuka Wera, binjizwe mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Itorero ryera rya Kristo, kandi babe abantu baryo by’ukuri
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Maze Umupastori avuge ati
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Dusenge.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu bose bapfukame.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, ku bw’imbabazi zawe nyinshi kera winjije Nowa n’abo mu rugo rwe mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nkuge, urabarakora, ntibicwa n’amazi ; hanyuma washoreye abantu bawe Abisirayeli, ubacisha mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyanjya itukura niyo yasuraga Kubatizwa kwawe kwera. Kandi ubwo Umwana wawe ukunda cyane Yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo yabatizwaga mu ruzi Yorodani, yejeje Amazi ngo abe icyitegererezo cyo gukuraho ibyaha. Nuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: none turakwinginga ngo ku bw’imbabazi zawe zitagira akagero, urebane imbabazi aba bantu bawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uboze, bakire uburakari bwawe, binjire mu nkuge, ni yo Torero rya Kristo, babone guca mu biruhanye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: by’iyi si bakomeje ibyo twemera, banejejwe n’ibyiringiro bafite, kandi bashoye imizi mu rukundo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hanyuma bazajye mu gihugu cy’ubugingo budashira, bimane nawe ibihe byose; tubisabye ku bwa Yesu
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, umutabazi w’abagutabaza, umuvunyi w’abaguhungiraho bose, uhesha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abakwizera ubugingo, kandi uzura abapfuye, none dusabiye aba bantu kugira ngo, ubwo baje kubatizwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kubatiza kwawe kwera, babyarwe ubwa kabiri mu buryo bw’Umwuka, ni ko kubabarirwa ibyaha.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani, ubakize, nk’uko wasezeraniye mu magambo yavizwe n’Umwana wawe ukunda cyane ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: “Musabe, muzahabwa; mushake muzabona; mukomange, muzakingurirwa”. None rero twebwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abasabye uduhe, abashatse tubone abakomanze udukingurire, kugira ngo aba bantu bahabwe umugisha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wo koza kwawe ko mu buryo bw’Umwuka, babone kwinjira mu Bwami bwawe budashira, nk’uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wadusezeranije muri Kristo Yesu Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu bose bahagaruke; maze Umupastori avuge ati,
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Nimwumve amagambo y’Ubutumwa Bwiza bwanditswe na Yohana Wera mu gice cya gatatu, uhereye ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: murongo wa mbere.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hariho umuntu wo mu Bafarisayo witwaga Nikodemo, umutware wo mu Bayuda. Uwo yasanze Yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nijoro aramubwira ati"Mwigisha, tuzi yuko uri umwigisha wavuye ku Mana, kuko ari nta wubasha gukora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibimenyetso ujya ukora, keretse Imana iri kumwe na we." Yesu aramusubiza ati"Ni ukuri, ni ukuri,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ndakubwira yuko umuntu utabyawe ubwa kabiri, atabasha kubona ubwami bw'Imana." Nikodemo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aramubaza ati"Mbese umuntu yabasha ate kubyarwa akuze? Yakongera agasubira mu nda ya nyina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akabyarwa?" Yesu aramusubiza ati"Ni ukuri, ni ukuri, ndakubwira yuko umuntu utabyawe n'amazi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'Umwuka atabasha kwinjira mu bwami bw'Imana. Ikibyarwa n'umubiri na cyo ni umubiri, n'ikibyarwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'Umwuka na cyo ni umwuka. Witangazwa n'uko nkubwiye yuko bibakwiriye kubyarwa ubwa kabiri.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umuyaga uhuha aho ushaka, ukumva guhuha kwawo ariko ntumenya aho uva cyangwa aho ujya. Ni ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uwabyawe n'Umwuka wese amera."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Namara kubisoma, avuge aya magambo ahugura, atya ati,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: BENE DATA, mwumvise muri ubwo Butumwa bwiza, uko umukiza wacu yavuze, yuko umuntu utabyawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Amazi n’Umwuka Wera atabasha kwinjira mu bwami w’Imana. Nuko rero mubona yuko iri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Sakaramento rikwiriye abantu bose bishobotse. Kandi dusoma mu gice giheruka cy’Ubutumwa bwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mariko Wera, yuko Kristo agiye kuzamuka ngo ajye mu ijuru, yategetse abigishwa be ati << mujyye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mubihugu byose, mwigishe abaremwe bose Ubutumwa Bwiza. Uwizera akabatizwa, azakizwa; ariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: utizera azacirwaho iteka. Ayo magambo na yo atwigisha umumari mwinshi kubatizwa kutugirira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni cyo cyatumye Petero Wera, agitangira kubwiriza iby’Ubutumwa Bwiza, abantu benshi bacumitwa mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mitima, bamubazanya n’izindi ntumwa bati << Bagabo bene Data, tugire dute? Arabasubiza ati <<
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwihane, umuntu wese muri mwe abatizwe mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo ngo mubone kubabarirwa ibyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byanyu, maze muhabwe iyo mpano y’Umwuka Wera, kuko isezerano ari iryanyu n’abana banyu, n’abari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kure bose bazahamagarwa n’Umwami Imana yacu. Hanyuma akomeza kubahamiriza n’andi magambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: menshi, arabahugura ati <<Mwikize, mwitandukanye n’ab’iki gihe biyobagiza. Kandi Petero uwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yahamije mu rwandiko rwe rwa mbere yuko Kubatizwa kudukiza na none, icyakora si uko gukuraho ico
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryo ku mubir, ahubwo n’isezerano ku Mana ry’umutima uticira urubanza, ribakirisha Kuzuka kwa Yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ntimushidikanye rero, ahubwo mwizere rwose, yuko Kristo yemeranye imbabazi aba Bantu bihannye
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: by’ukuri, bakamusanga bamaze kwizera, kandi yuko ababariye ibyaha byabo; akabaha Umwuka Wera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’umugisha w’ubugingo budashira, akabagabira umugabane w’ubwami bwe butazashira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko rero, ubwo twizeye rwose yuko Data wa twese wo mu Ijuru akunda cyane kugirira neza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aba bantu, nk’uko byahamijwe na Yesu Kristo Umwana we, tumushime twizeye kandi tumwubahsye tuti,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose ihoraho, Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, turagushimira twicidhije bugufi, ko wemeye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuduhamagarira kumenya ubuntu bwawe, ngo tukwizere. Utwongeremo uko kumenya, udukomezemo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uko kwizera iminsi yose; kandi abantu ubahe Umwuka wawe Wera ngo babyarwe ubwa kabiri, baragwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: agakiza gahoraho. Tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori ahereko abwire abagiye kubatizwa ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BENE DATA bakundwa, abaje hano mushaka Kubatizwa kwera, mwumvise uko iri teraniro ribasabiye ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo abakire, abahe umugisha, ababohore ibyaha byanyu, abinjize mu bwami bwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu ijuru, kandi abahe ubugingo budashira. Kandi mwumvise mu Butumwa bwe bwera, uko yasezeranye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuduha ibyo tumusaba byose; kandi ibyo yasezeranye kuduha ibyo tumusaba byose; kandi ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yasezeranije ntazabura kubisohoza rwose. Nuko rero, nk’uko Kristo yasezeranije atyo, namwe mukwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gusezeranira by’ukuri imbere y’aya bishingizi banyu, kandi imbere y’iri teraniro ryose, ko muzimura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Satani n’ingeso ze zose, mukazakomeza kwizera Ijambo ry’Imana ryera, mukajya mwitondera amategeko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yayo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori ahereko abaze abantu bagiye kubatizwa umwe umwe ibi bibazo, ati
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kubaza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kubaza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wimuye Satani n’ingeso ze zose, n’ikuzo n’icyubahiro by’iyi si by’ubusa, no kwifuza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyayo kose, n’irari ry’umubiri, ngo utazabikurikiza, cyangwa ugategekwa na byo?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo byose ndabyimuye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wemeye Imana Data wa twese ushobora byose;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umuremyi w’ijuru n’isi;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Na Yesu Kristo Umwana we w’ikinege Umwami wacu? Kandi wemeye ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yabyawe n’Umwari Mariya, kandi ko iyo nda yasamye yari iy’Umwuka Wera; ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yababajwe, ubwo Pontiyo Pilato yari umutegetsi, ko yabambwe ku musaraba, agapfa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: agahambwa, akamanuka ikuzimu mu bapfuye, akazuka ku munsi wa gatatu, akajya mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ijuru? Wemeye ko ubu yicaye iburyo bw’Imana Data wa twese ushobora byose, kandi ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azavayo ku mperuka y’isi gucira abakiriho n’abapfuye urubanza?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi wemeye Umwuka Wera, wemeye ko hariho Itorero ryera Katolika
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ry’Abakristo bose, n’Ubumwe bw’Abera, no Kubabarirwa ibyaha, no kuzuka k’umubiri,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Ubugingo budashira, ni tumara gupfa?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo byose ndabyimuye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nawe urashaka kubatizwa wemeye utyo?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni cyo nshaka.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wemeye ko uzajya wumvira ibyo Imana ishaka n’ibyo itegeka ukabigenderamo iminsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yose ukiriho?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nzagerageza kubikora, Imana ari yo mufasha wanjye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori namara kubibaza, asenge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kubaza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kubaza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Mana y’ibambe, wemere ko kamere y’Adamu wa kera iri muri aba Bantu ihambwa, kugira ngo kamere
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’umuntu mushya izurizwe muri bo. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wemere ko irari ry’umubiri ryose ripfa muri bo, ngo ibyo Umwuka ategeka byose bikurikire muri bo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wemere kubaha ubushobozi bwo kunesha Satani n’iby’iyi si n’ibya kamere. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wemere ko aba bantu twebwe tuguhaye ubu bahabwa ingeso nziza ziva mu ijuru,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakazagorerwa ingororano zihoraho, ku bw’imbabazi zawe, Mwami Mana ihimbazwa, ihoraho ibihe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, turagushimira kuko Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo ukundwa cyane yavuye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amazi n’amaraso mu rubavu rwe, ngo tubone kubabarirwa ibyaha byacu, agaha abigishwa be iegeko ryo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kujya kwigisha abo mu mahanga yose, bakababatiza mu Izina rya Data wa twese n’iry’Umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’iry’Umwuka wera ; none turakwingize wumve ibyo abantu bateraniye hano bagusabye ; robanura aya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mazi, kuyabatirizwamo, ko buzura imbabazi zawe, bakaguma mu mubare w’abana bawe bizerwa,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: b’intore; tubisabye kubwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori afate ugiye kubatizwa ukuboko kw’iburyo, abaze abishingizi izina rye, amubatize,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kanaka ndakubatiza mu Izina rya Data wa twese n’iry’Umwana n’iry’Umwuka Wera, Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze akurikizeho kuvuga ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: TWAKIRIYE uyu muntu mu Iteraniro ry’umukumbi wa Kristo, tumushyizeho ikimenyetso cy’umusaraba,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kimuhamiriza ngo uhereye ubu atazagira isoni zo guhamya ko yizeye Kristo wabambwe, kandi ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azagumya arwanisha ubutwari munsi y’ibendera ye, arwanya ibyaha n’iby’iyi si na Satani, kandi ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azahora ari intore kandi umugaragu (umuja) ukiranuka wa Kristo iminsi yose azamara akiriho. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amaze kubabatiza bose, avuge ati,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bene Data bakundwa, ubwo aba Bantu bamaze kubyarwa ubwa kabiri, kandi bashyizwe mu muryango
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’Itorero rya Kristo tubishimire Imana ishobora byose kandi dusabe duhuje imitima, kugira ngo aba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bantu bazarinde bapfa bagikomeje kuba abantu bayo, nk’uko batangiye ubu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bose bapfukame, bavugire hamwe bati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: DATA wa twese wo mu ijuru, Izina ryawe ryubahwe; Ubwami bwawe buze; Ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru; Uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; Utubabarire ibyaha byacu, nk’uko
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: tubabarira ababitugirira; Ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize umubi. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Umupastori, avuge ati;
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: DATA wa twese wo mu ijuru, tugushimiye ko wemeye kuduhamagarira kumenya Ubuntu bwawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tukakwizera. Utwongereho uko kumenya, udukomezemo uko kwizera iminsi yose. Kandi aba bantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubahe Umwuka wawa Wera, kugira ngo, ubwo babyawe ubwa kabiri ; bakaba abaragwa b’agakiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gahoraho ku bw’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo, bazakomeze kuba abantu bawe, hanyuma bagere ku byo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wabasezeranije; tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo uwo Umwana wawe kandi Umwami wacu uhoraho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yimanye nawe n’Umwuka Wera iteka ryose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bose bahaguruke, Umupastori abanze ahugure abishingizi,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UBWO aba bantu basezeraniye imbere yanyu kwimura Satani n’ingeso ze zose, no kwizera Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakayikorera, namwe mukwiriye kwibuka yuko ari umurimo wanyu kubibutsa izo ndahiro n’ayo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: masezerano bahamije imbere y’iri Teraniro, kandi cyane cyane imbere yanyu, abishingizi babo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bitoranije, ko bikomeye cyane. Kandi muzajye mubahugura kugira umwete wose wo kwigishwa neza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ijambo ryera ry’Imana, kugira ngo bakurire mu buntu bwayo no kumenya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babe mu isi bubaha Imana, bakiranuka, kandi bitonda.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze abwire abaje kubatizwa ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Namwe abambaye Kristo ubu ku bwo kubatizwa, kandi ubwo mubaye abana b’Imana, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwo mubaye abana b’Imana, kandi abana b’umucyo kuko mwizeye Kristo, mumenye ko ari umurimo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wanyu kugenza uko bikwiriye abahamagariwe kuba Abakristo, kandi abana b’umucyo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mujye mwibuka yuko Kubatizwa kutwereka ibyo twemeye, ni ko gukurikiza ingeso nziza z’Umwami wacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo no kumera nka we; kandi nk’uko yadupfiriye, akazuka ku bwacu, natwe ababatijwe dukwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gupfa ku byaha, tukazukira, tubone kujya tunesha kwifuza kwacu kubi kose, kandi dukomeze ingeso
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nziza zose zo kubaha Imana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni byiza umuntu wese ubatijwe ari mukuru ko adatinda, ahubwo atebuke gukomezwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Umwepiskopi, abone kwemerwa kujya ku Meza y’Umwami wacu.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: AMAGAMBO YO KWINJIZA MU ITORERO
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UWAVUYE MURI KIRIZIYA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Y’I ROMA
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori, arangije kubatiza abantu, niba hariho urwavuye muri Kiriziya y’I Roma, aze amuhagarare
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: imbere; maze Umupastori amwakire, amubaze ati;
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kubaza    Wowe uhagaze hano imbere y’Imana n’imbere y’iri Torero, mbese uhakanye ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kirisiya y’I Roma yigisha bidahura n’Ibyanditswe Byera?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo byose ndabihakanye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kubaza    Uhereye none umaramaje rwose guhora ukora ibihura n’Ijambo ry’Imana, kandi bihuje
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’imyigishirize y’iri Torero, ari ryo rugingo rw’Itorero ryera rya Kristo?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Maramaje rwose ko nzahora nkora ntyo, mfatanije n’Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori amufate ukuboko kw’ibburyo, amubaze izina, maze akurikizeho aya amagambo ati:
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ndabamenyesha yuko uyu muntu yabatijwe muri Kiriziya y’I Roma, bakamwita izina……..., none
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yongeweho irindi……. (cyagwa niryo akomeje) Kandi ndababgira ko twemeye kumwinjiza muri iki gice
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cy’Umukumbi wa Kristo, ari cyo rugingo rw’Itorero rye, kuko ari cyo uyu muntu yemeye, kandi ahamije
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yuko uhereye none atazagira isoni zo guhamya ko yizeye Kristo wahambwe, kandi ko azaguma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arwanisha ubutwari munsi y’ibendera ye, arwanya ibyaha n’iby’iyi si na Satani, kandi ko azahora ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: intore kandi umugaragu (umuja) ukiranuka wa Kristo iminsi yose azamara akiriho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gatekisimu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni amagambo akwiriye kwigishwa bose abashaka kuzanirwa Umwepiskopi ngo bakomezwe.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ndi kanaka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bansezeraniye ibintu bitatu, bararahira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ikibazo   Izina ryawe uri nde?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Igisubizo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza     Ni nde wakwise iryo zina?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza   Abishingizi banjye nibo barinyise mu ibatizwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza      Muri iryo Batizwa, abishingizi bawe bagukoreye iki?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icya mbere, jyewe kwimura ingingo ze zose, n’ikuzo n’icyubahiro by’iyi si by’ubusa no kwifuza ibyayo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kose ; n’irari ry’umubiri.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icya kabiri, jyewe kwemera ingingo zose z’indini y’ubukristo ;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icya gatatu, jyewe kumvira amatageko y’Imana no kujya nkora ibyo ishaka byera, nkabikomeza iminsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yose nkiriho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza    Ntiwibwira ko ukwiriye kwemera no gukora, nk’uko bagusezeraniye ?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza   Ndabyemeye rwose ; kandi ni cyo nzakora Imana ari Umufasha wanjye. Kandi ndashimira Data
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wa twese wo mu ijuru, kuko yampamagariye kuguma muri agakiza gaheshwa na Yesu Kristo Umukiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu. Kandi ndasaba Imana ubuntu buzatuma nkomeza muri ako gakiza kugeza ubgo nzapfa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwigisha Mbwira ingingo z’ibyo twemera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Igisubizo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nemeye Imana data wa twese ushobora byose umuremyi w’ijuru n’isi ;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nemeye na Yesu Kristo umwana we w’ikinege, umwami wacu, wabyawe n’umwari Mariya ; kandi iyo nda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yasamye yari iy’Umwuka Wera ; yababajwe ubwo pontiyo pilato yari umutegetsi abambwa ku musaraba,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arapfa, arahambwa, amanuka ikuzimu mu bapfuye, azuka ku munsi wa gatatu, ajya mu ijuru nine ubu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yicaye  iburyo  bw’imana  data  wa  twese  ushobora  byose,  niho  azava,  aje  gucira  abakiriho  n’abapfuye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urubanza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi  nemeye  Umwuka  Wera,  nemeye  ko  hariho  itorero  ryera  katolika  ry’abakristo  bose,  n’ubumwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw’abera, no kubabarirwa ibyaha, no kuzuka k’umubiri, n’ubugingo budashira, Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza   Ni magambo ki makuru wiga muri izo ngingo z’ibyo twemera ?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza Icya mbere, niga kwizera Imana Data wa twese,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yandemanye n’ibyo mu isi byose;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icya kabiri, niga kwizera Imana Umwana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwanshunguranye n’abantu bose;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icya gatanu, niga kwizera Imana Umwuka Wera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Unyezanya n’abantu b’Imana bose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Batoranijwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza   Uvuze ngo Abashingizi bawe bagusezeraniye ko uzajya witondera amategeko y’Imana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mbwira umubare wayo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza Ni icumi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza   Ni ayahe ?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza Ni ayo Imana yategetse, tukayasoma mu gice 20 cyo mu Gitabo cyitwa Kuva, itya iti :
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 1.  "Ndi Uwiteka Imana yawe yagukuye mu gihugu cya Egiputa, mu nzu y'uburetwa. "Ntukagire izindi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mana mu maso yanjye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 2.  Ntukiremere igishushanyo kibajwe, cyangwa igisa n'ishusho yose iri hejuru mu ijuru, cyangwa hasi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ku  butaka  cyangwa  mu  mazi  yo  hepfo  y'ubutaka.  Ntukabyikubite  imbere,  ntukabikorere  kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwiteka  Imana  yawe  ndi  Imana  ifuha,  mpora  abana  gukiranirwa  kwa  ba  se,  nkageza  ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: buzukuruza  n'ubuvivi  bw'abanyanga,  nkababarira  abankunda  bakitondera  amategeko  yanjye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nkageza ku buzukuruza babo b'ibihe igihumbi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 3.  Ntukavugire  ubusa  izina  ry'Uwiteka  Imana  yawe,  kuko  Uwiteka  atazamubara  nk'utacumuye,
verses.speaker: all
