verses.text: uvugiye ubusa izina rye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wibuke kweza umunsi w'isabato. Mu minsi itandatu ujya ukora, abe ari yo ukoreramo imirimo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yawe yose,  ariko uwa karindwi  ni wo sabato y'Uwiteka Imana yawe. Ntukagire umurimo wose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uwukoraho,  wowe  ubwawe,  cyangwa  umuhungu  wawe  cyangwa  umukobwa  wawe,  cyangwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umugaragu wawe cyangwa umuja wawe, cyangwa itungo ryawe cyangwa umunyamahanga wawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uri iwanyu, kuko iminsi itandatu ari yo Uwiteka yaremeyemo ijuru n'isi n'inyanja n'ibirimo byose,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akaruhukira ku wa karindwi. Ni cyo cyatumye Uwiteka aha umugisha umunsi w'isabato, akaweza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 5.  Wubahe so na nyoko, kugira ngo uramire mu gihugu Uwiteka Imana yawe iguha.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 6.  Ntukice.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 7.  Ntugasambane.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 8.  Ntukibe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 9.  Ntugashinje ibinyoma mugenzi wawe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 10. Ntukifuze inzu ya mugenzi wawe, ntukifuze umugore wa mugenzi wawe, cyangwa umugaragu we
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyangwa  umuja  we,  cyangwa  inka  ye  cyangwa  indogobe  ye,  cyangwa  ikindi  kintu  cyose  cya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mugenzi  wawe."  "Ntukifuze  inzu  ya  mugenzi  wawe,  ntukifuze  umugore  wa  mugenzi  wawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyangwa  umugaragu  we  cyangwa  umuja  we,  cyangwa  inka ye  cyangwa  indogobe  ye,  cyangwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ikindi kintu cyose cya mugenzi wawe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ikigukwiriye ku Mana ni iki ?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza     Ni magambo ki makuru wiga muri ayo mategeko ?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza Niga amagambo abiri, ikinkwiriye ku Mana, kandi ibinkwiriye ku Bantu bose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza   Nkwiriye  kuyizera,  no  kuyubaha,  kandi  no  kuyikundisha  umutima  wanjye  wose  n’ubwenge
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwanjye bwose n’imbaraga zanjye zose. Nkwiriye kuyiramya, no kuyishima, no kuyishingikirizaho rwose,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: no kuyambaza, no guhesha Izina ryayo n’Ijambo ryayo icyubahiro, kandi no kuyikorerana umurava iminsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yose nkiriho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ikigukwiriye ku muturanyi wawe ni iki ?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza  Nkwiriye  kumukunda  nk’uko  nikunda,  no  kugirira  abantu  bose,  nk’uko  nakunda  kobangirira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nkwiriye gukunda ababyeyi banjye no kububaha no kubafasha. Nkwiriye kubaha Abategetsi bacu bose no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubumvira.  Nkwiriye  kuyoboka  bose  bantegeka  n’abanyigisha  n’abapatori  bantegeka  mu  by’Itorero.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nkwiriye  korohera abanduta  ubukuru  bose  no kububaha.  Nkwiriye  kutagira  umuntu  wese  mbabarisha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: icyo mvuga, cyangwa icyo nkora, no kuba umunyamurava n’umunyakuri mu mico yanjye yose, kutagira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urwango cyangwa igomwa mu mutima wanjye, kubuza ukuboko kwanjye kwenda iby’abandi no kwiba,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi  kubuza  ururimi  rwanjye  gushyushya  inkuru  mbi  no  kubeshya,  no  kubeshyera  abandi.  Nkwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kurinda umubiri wanjye, ne gusinda cyangwa kwinezeza, haba no gusambana ; ahubwo nige umurimo wo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuntunga no kuwukorana umwete, no kujya nkora ibikwiriye urugero Imana yishimiye kungezaho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwigisha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwana wanjye mwiza, ukwiriye kumenya neza yuko ibyo nta bwo wabyishoboza, keretse
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ufashijwe n’ubuntu bwayo ; kandi ubwo buntu ukwiriye kuyibusaba ibihe byose, uko uenze. Nuko rero,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: reka numve yuko ushobora kuvuga Isengesho ry’Umwami wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data wa twese wo mi ijuru, izina ryawe ryubahwe ; ubwami bwawe buze; ibyo ukunda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Igisubizo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bikorwe mu isi, nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru, uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; utubabarire ibyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byacu,  nk’uko  natw  tubabarira  ababitugirira;  ntuduhane  mu  bitwoshya,  ahubwo  udukize  umubi;  kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubwami n ubushobozi n’icyubahiro ari ibyawe ubu n’iteka ryose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza  Muri iri sengesho icyo usaba Imana ni iki ?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza  Nsaba  Nyagasani  Imana  yanjye,  ni  we  Data  wa  twese  wo  mu  ijuru,  Umugabyi  w’ibyiza  byose,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo angirirane imbabazi n’abantu bose ; tubone uko tumuramya, tukamukorera, tukamwumvira,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imitima yacu n’imibiri yacu bikenye byose, itugirire imbabazi, kandi itubabarire ibyaha. Nyisaba kwemera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuturinda  no  kudukiza  ibyago  byose  bishaka  kwica  umutima  cyangwa  umubiri,  iturinde  gukora  ibyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose n’ibindi bibi, iturinde Umwanzi wacu n’urupfu rw’iteka. Kandi ibyo byose niringira yuko izabinkorera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ingiriye  imbabazi  n’ubuntu  ku  bwa  Yesu  Kristo  Umwami  wacu.  Ni  cyo  gituma  mvuga  nti  Amen ;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bisobanurwa ngo bibe bityo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo yahaye Itorero rye Amasakaramento angahe?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza  Ni abiri masa, ni yo ngombwa ku bashaka gukizwa; ni ayo Kubatiza, n’Igaburo ryera ry’Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Iryo jambo Isakaramento risobanurwa rite?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza  Isakaramento n’ikimenyetso cy’inyuma kigaragara cyerekana Ubuntu bw’imbere bwo mu mutima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: duhabwa. Kristo ubwe ni we wagishyizeho, ngo kibe icyo kuduhesha uwo mugisha, kigahamya ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tuwuhawe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isakaramento ririmo ibice bingahe?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza  Ni bibiri, ikimenyetso cy’inyuma kigaragara, n’ubuntu bw’imbere bwo mu mutima.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza  Mu ibatizwa ikimenyetso cy’inyuma kigaragara ni iki?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi Ubuntu bw’imbere bwo mu mutima ni iki?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza  Ni amazi, ayo umuntu abatirishwa mu Izina rya Data wa twese n’Umwana, n’Umwuka Wera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza  Gupfa ku byaha no kubyarwa ubwa kabiri; tukaba abakiranutsi; kuko twavukiye mu byaha muri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kamere yacu, tukaba abo kugirirwa uburakari; ariko none, ku bwo kubyarwa ubwa kabiri, turi abo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugirirwa imbabazi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza  Abashaka kubatizwa bakwiriye gukora iki?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza  Bakwiriye kwihana bakareka ibyaha byabo, kandi kwizera kubazanira kwishingikiriza ku byo Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yabasezeranije muri iryo Sakaramento.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza  Niba  ari  ko  biri,  niki  gituma  abana  bato  babatizwa,  ubwo  badashoboye  kubwo  ubuto  bwabo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gushyitsa ayo masezerano?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza  Kuko abishingizi babo baba babasezeranira gushyitsa amasezerano yombi, ayo bakazayisohoreza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bageze ku myaka y’ubukuru.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isakaramento ry’Igaburo Ryera ry’Umwami wacu ryashyiriweho iki?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza  Ryashyiriweho kugira ngo tujye twibuka gupfa kwa Kristo watubereye igitambo, hamwe n’ibindi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byiza byose kuduhesha.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ikimenyetso cy’inyuma cy’Igaburo ryera ry’Umwami wacu ni iki?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza  Umugati na Vino ibyo Umwami wacu yategetse ko tujya tubihabwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza  Umugati na Vino nk‘uko bisobanurwa mu buryo bw’Umwuka byerakana iki?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza  Byerekana  Umubiri  n’Amaraso  bya  Kristo,  ibyo  abamwizera  bakira,  bakarya  rwose,  iyo  bariye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Igaburo ryera ry’Umwami wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza  Muri iryo Gaburo ryera tuboneramo migisha ki?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza  Imitima  Yacu  ikomezwa  kandi  iruhurwa  n’Umubiri  n’Amaraso  bya  Kristo,  nk’uko  imibiri  yacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: igirirwa n’Umugati na Vino.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Baza  Abaza ku Igaburo ryera ry’Umwami wacu bakwiriye gukora iki?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Subiza  Bakwiriye  kwisuzuma,  bakamenya  ko  bihanye  by’ukuri  ibyaha  bakoze;  bakamaramaza  kugira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubugingo bushya, bakizera rwose Ubuntu bw’Imana bubonerwa muri Kristo, hamwe no kwibuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urupfu rwe bashima; kandi ikindi bagahorana umutima ukunda abandi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IBYO GUKOMEZWA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: CYANGWA IBYO KURAMBIKA IBIGANZA KU
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BABATIJWE BAMAZE KUMENYA UBWENGE.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abo gukomezwa bahagarare imbere y’Umwepiskopi, maze aya magamba asomwe,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Icyo  Itorero  rishaka  ni  uko  abarambikwaho  ibiganza  bose  barushaho  gukomezwa  mu  mutima.  Ni  cyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyatumye ritegeka ngo nta warambikwah ibiganza atabasha kwivugira ubwe ibyo kwemera kw’Intumwa,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho  ry’Umwami  wacu,  n’Amategeko  cumi.  Kandi  abashaka  gukomezwa  bakwiriye  kumenya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gusubiza neza amagambo yo muri Gatigisimu babazwa.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Iryo  tegeko  ry’Itorero  rikwiriye  kumvirwa  rwose,  kugira  ngo  abantu  babatijwe  bakiri  bato,  ni  bamara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukura,  bagasobanukirwa  neza  ibyo  abishingizi  babo  babasezeranije,  ubwo  babatizwaga,  babone  kuza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbere y’Itorero, bahamye yuko ubwabo babyemeye kandi babikomeje.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi  iryo  tegeko  rikwiriye  kumvirwa  n’ababatijwe  ari  bakuru,  kugira  ngo  na  bo  babone  uburyo  bwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukomezwa  mu  Bukristo,  bakarushaho  gusobanukirwa  imyigishirize  y’Itorero,  bakongera  gusezerana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwitondera neza ibyo bemeye ubwabo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma Umwepiskopi avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nuko rero mwebwe abifuza kurambikwaho ibiganza; mukwiriye guhamya imbere y’iri teraniro, yuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mumaramaje rwose kujya mwizera Kristo no kumvira amategeko y’Imana; mugakurikiza ibyo ishaka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose, kandi yuko mwemeye gukomeza gusohoza ibyo mwasezeranye gukora, ubwo mwabatizwaga.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Umwepiskopi abaze ababatijwe ari bakuru ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ndababaza yuko hano imbere y’Imana n’imbere y’iri teraniro mwongera gusezetana ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwasezeranye, ubwo mwabatizwaga, kandi yuko muzabikomeza rwose?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Nongeye kubisezerana cyane,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi abaze ababatijwe bakiri bato ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Namwe ababatijwe mukiri bato ndababza. Mbese muremera kongera gusezeranira imbere
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’Imana n’imbere y’iri teraniro ibyo abishingizi banyu babasezeraniye, ubwo mwabatizwaga?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwemeye kubyisezeranira ubwanyu, yuko muzakora nk’uko babasezeraniye cya gihe?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Nuko ndabyemeye, kandi ndabyisezeraniye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi abaze bose ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ibyo byose ndabyimuye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: None ndababaza mwese. Mwimuye Satani n’ingeso ze zose, n’ikuzo n’icyubahiro by’iyi si
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: by’ubusa, no kwifuza ibyayo kose, n’irari ry’umubiri? Mwemeye kutazabikurirkira, cyangwa gutegekwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: na byo?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umwepiskopi  Wemeye Imana Data wa twese ushobora byose, Umuremyi w’ijuru n’isi; Wemeye Yesu
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kristo Umwana we w’ikinege Umwami wacu? Wemeye n’Umwuka Wera umufasha wacu?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umwepiskopi  Wemeye kwitondera amategeko year y’Imana, n’ibyo ikunda? Uzajya ubikurikiza iminsi
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: yose uzaba ukiriho?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Nzagerageza kubikora, mfatanije n’Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo byose ndabyemeye rwose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi  Gutabarwa kwacu kubonerwa mu Izina cy’Uwiteka,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umwepiskopi
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umwepiskopi  Uwiteka, umva ibyo tugusaba.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Gutabaza kwacu kukugereho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Waremye ijuru n’isi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Izina ry’Uwiteka nirihimbazwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uhereye none ukageza iteka ryose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi: Dusenge
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, turagushimira yuko wemeye kubyarisha ubwa kabiri aba Bantu bawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amazi n’Umwuka Wera, ukabababarira ibyaha byose. Nyagasani, turakwinginga; ubakomereshe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwuka Wera Umufasha, kandi iminsi yose uhore ubagwizamo impano z’ubuntu bwawe nyinshi; ubahe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwuka w’ubwenge n’uwo kwitegereza, umwuka wo kujya inama neza n’uw’ubushobozi bwo mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mutima, n’umwuka wo kukumenya no kukubaha by’ukuri. Kandi Nyagasani, ubagwizemo umwuka wo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuguhesha icyubahiro kubwo kwera kwawe, uhereye none ukageza iteka ryose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi ahereko abarambikeho ibiganza bapfukamye imbere ye, nk’uko bakurikiranye,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NYAGASANI Mana, ujye urindisha uyu mugaragu (umuja) wawe Ubuntu bwawe buva mu ijuru, akomeze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuba uwawe ibihe byose, kandi ajye yunguka Umwuka wawe Wera uko bukeye, kugeza aho azagerera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu bwami bwawe butazashira. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwiteka abane namwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bakomejwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abane nawe mu mutima.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi n’arangiza avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umwepiskopi yongere avuge ati, Dusenge
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: DATA wa twese wo mu ijuru, izina ryawe ryubahwe; ubwami bwawe buze; ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru; uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; utubabariwe ibyaha byacu, nk’uko
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: natwe tubabarira ababitugirira; ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize umubi. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana ishobora byose ihoraho, turagushimira yuko ari wowe udukundisha gukora ibyiza bigutunganiye;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: none turakwingingira aba bagaragu bawe n’abaja bawe barambitsweho ibiganza dukurikije icyitegerezo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cy’intumwa zawe zera. Turagusaba kugira ngo icyo kimenyetso kibahamirize yuko ubakunda, ukishimira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubagirira  neza.  Ujye  ubarindisha  amabako yawe,  kuko  uri  umubyeyi.  Emera  ko  Umwuka wawe  Wera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abana na bo iminsi yose, abayobore, barusheho kumenya Ijambo ryawe ryera no kuryumvira; hanyuma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babone  kuzahabwa  ubugingo  buhoraho.  Ibyo  tubisabye  ku  bw’Umwami  wacu  Yesu  Kristo  uhoraho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: buhoraho. Ibyo tubisabye ku bw’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo uhoraho, wimanye nawe n’Umwuka Wera,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muri Imana imwe iteka ryose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA  ishobora  byose,  Mana  ihoraho,  turakwinginga  wemere  kuyobora  imitima  n’imibiri  yacu  no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubyeza, kandi no kubitegeka, tubone kugendera mu buryo bw’amategeko yawe, dukore ibyo wategetse,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo ububasha bwawe buturinde imibiri n’imitima iminsi yose. Tubisabye ku bw’Umwami wacu Yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo, ni we Mukiza wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze umwepiskopi abasabire umugisha.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umugisha w’Imana ishobora byose, Data wa twese n’Umwana n’Umwuka Wera, ube muri mwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ugumane namwe iteka ryose. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ntihagire umuntu ujya ku Meza y’Umwami wacu atarakomezwa, keretse umuntu urangije kwigishwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyo gukomezwa, akaba yiteguye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IBYO GUSHYINGIRA KWERA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abashaka gushyingirwa bose ni ngombwa ko barangwa ibyumweru bitatu mu gihe cyo gusenga, bamaze
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: gusoma igice cya kabiri. Umusengesha avuge ati.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ndavuga amagambo yo gushyingira kwera kwa Kanaka w’I Naka na Kanaka w’I Naka. Niba hari uwo muri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwe uzi impamvu y’ukuri yabuza aba bantu bombi gufatanywa mu Gushyingiranwa kwera, naze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ayivuge. Uku ni ukubaza kwa mbere (kwa kabiri, cyangwa kwa gatatu).
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abashaka gushyingirwa niba badatuye mu Bushumba bumwe, bombi bakwiriye kurangwa mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bushumba bw’iwabo. Kandi Umupastori wo mu Bushumba bw’umwe, ntiyemerwa kubashyingiranya,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: atarabona urwandiko rw’Umupastori w’ubundi Bushumba ruhamya yuko baranzwe gatatu.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abagiye gushyingirwa binjire mu rusengero, bahagarare imbere y’Umupastori, Umugeni ari ibumuso
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bw’umukwe. Umupastori avuge ati.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BAKUNDWA cyane, duteraniye hano imbere y’Imana n’imbere y’iri teraniro gufatanisha uyu mugabo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’uyu mugabo n’uyu mugeni gushyingirwa kwera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwo mubano ni uw’icyubahiro wategetswe n’Imana abantu batarakora icyaha; werekana gufatana kwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo yarawushimishije, awubahisha kubayo kwe, ubwo yatahaga ubukwe I Kana y’I Galilaya,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: agakorerayo igitangaza cye cya mbere. Kandi Pawulo yawushimye ko ari uwo kubahwa n’abantu bose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni cyo gituma ari nta muntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukwiriye kubikora abiturumbukiye, cyangwa atigiriye inama, cyangwa atigiriye abitewe n’irari ry’umubiri,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’uko inyamaswa zitagira ubwenge zigenza. Ahubwo abikore yitonze, yigirire inama neza, yirinda,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: yubaha Imana kandi atekereza icyatumye uwo mubano wera utegekwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icya mbere, wategekewe kubyara abana, ngo batozwe ingeso nziza zo kubaha Imana no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gushimisha Izina ryayo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivya kabiri wategekewe kurinda abantu icyaha cy’ubusambanyi, ahubwo bashyingiranwe bahoe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ari ingingo z’umubiri wa Kristo zitanduye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icya gatatu, wategekewe kugira ngo bombi babane bafatanije, bamarane imibabaro, nk’uko bibakwiye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugirirana, bari mu mahoro cyangwa mu byago.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko aba bantu bombi, bazanywe no gufatanywa n’uko gushyingiranwa kwera. Ni cyo gitumye, niba hari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuntu uzi impavu y’ukuri yababuza gufatanywa hamwe, akwiriye kuyivuga nonaha; ni yanga kuyivuga,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uhereye ubu ahore acecetse kugeza iteka ryose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Akurikizeho kubwira abagiye gushyingirwa ati,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NDABAHUGURA mwembi, ndabihanangiriza, kuko muzi yuko muzabibazwa kuri wa munsi w’amateka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uteye ubwoba, ubwo ibihishwe mu mitima yose bizahishurwa, niba hari umwe uzi impamvu ibabuza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gufatanywa nk’uko amategeko yemera, ni ayivuge nonaha, kuko mukwiriye kumenya neza yuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abafatanijwe n’Imana, kandi gushyingirwa kwabo kuba kunyuranye n’amategeko.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Niba ari ntawe ufite impamvu ibabuza gushyingirwa. Umupastori abaze umukwe ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kanaka, wemeye uyu mugeni ko aba umugore wawe ushyingiwe, ngo mubane umubano wera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’abashyingiwe, mukurikije itegeko ryera ry’Imana? Uzajya umukunda, umukuyakuya kandi umurinda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ari muzima cyangwa arwaye? Uzareka abandi bagore bose, ubane na we wenyine iminsi yose muzamara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mukiriho mwembi?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Mwemeye ntyo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze abaze umugeni ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kanaka, wemeye uyu mugabo ko aba umugabo wawe mushyingiranywe, ngo mubane umubano wera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’abashyingiwe, mukurikije itegeko ryera ry’Imana? Uzajya umwumvira, umukorera, umukunda,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwubaha kandi uzajya umurinda ari muzima cyangwa arwaye? Uzareka abandi bagabo bose, ubane na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: we wenyine iminsi yose muzamara mukiriho mwembi?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Mwemeye ntyo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Akurikizeho kubaza ati,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni nde ushyingiye uyu mugeni uyu mugabo?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umushyingira amuzanire umukwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Umupastori abwire umugabo kuzana ukuboko kwe kw’iburyo agufatishe ukw’iburyo kw’umugeni,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: avuge amukurikije ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Jyewe Kanaka ndakwemeye Kanaka ko uba umugore wanjye dushyingiranywe, ngo tubane
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akaramata uhereye none, mu mahoro no mu byago, mu butunzi no mu bukene, urwaye cyangwa uri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muzima. Nzajya ngukunda, ngukuyakuya, kugeza aho urupfu ruzadutandukaniriza, nkurikije itegeko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryera ry’Imana Mbikurahiye ntyo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze barekurane; umugeni nawe afatishe ukuboko kwe kw’iburyo ukw’iburyo k’umugabo, avuga
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: akurikiza umupastori ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Jyewe Kanaka ndakwemeye Kanaka ko uba umugabo wanjye dushyingiranywe, ngo tubane akaramata
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uhereye none, mu mahoro no mu byago, mu butunzi no mu bukene, urwaye cyangwa uri muzima.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nzajya ngukunda, ngukusha neza, kumvira, kugeza aho urupfu ruzadutandukaniriza, nkurikije itegeko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryera ry’Imana Mbikurahiye ntyo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze bongere barekurane; Umupastori yakire impeta, ayihe umugabo, kugira ngo ayishyire mu rutoke
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: rw’umugeni rw’ibumoso rukurikirwa n’agahera, agumye ayifateho, avuge akurikiza Umupastori ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nkwambitse iyi mpeta, nkubahishije umubiri wanjye, nguhaye ibintu byanjye byose; mbivuze mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Izina rya Data wa twese, n’iry’Umwana, n’iry’Umwuka Wera…Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze bombi bapfukamye, Umupastori avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MANA y’iteka, Muremyi kandi Murinzi w’abantu bose, turagushimira yuko ari wowe utanga Ubuntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwose bw’umwuka, kandi ko ari wowe urema ubugingo buhoraho. Nuko turakwingize wohereze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umugisha wawe aba Bantu bawe, uyu mugabo n’uyu mugore, abo dusabira umugisha mu Izina ryawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo, nk’uko Isaka na Rebeka babanaga batava mu isezerano, abe ari ko n’aba basohoza indahiro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: barahiye n’isezerano basezeranye; iyi mpera itanzwe kandi ikemerwa, ni yo kimenyetso kandi umugabo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wo kubihamya. Bajye babana iteka bafitanye urukundo n’amahoro biboneye rwose, bakurikiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amategeko yawe. Tubisabye mu Izina ry’Uwami wacu Yesu Kristo. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Umupastori abafatanishe ibiganza by’iburyo; avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abo Imana yateranije hamwe, ntihakagire umuntu ubatandukanya.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze akurikizeho kubwira abantu bose ati.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kuko Kanaka na Kanaka bahuje umutima, ngo bashyingirwe gushyingirwa kwera, kandi babihamije
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbere y’Imana n’imbere yanyu, bagasezerana batyo, kandi babyerekanishije gutanga impeta, no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuyakira, kandi no gufatana mu ntoke, ni cyo gitumye mvuga nti, Aba ni umugabo n’umugore
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bashyingiwe; mbivuze mu izina rya Data wa twese n’iry’Umwana n’iry’Umwuka Wera. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori akurikizeho kubasabira umugisha ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Imana Data wa twese, Imana Umwana, Imana Umwuka Wera, ibahe umugisha, ibakize, kandi ibarinde.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwiteka abagirire imbabazi; abarebane urukundo, abagwizemo imigisha yose y’Umwuka n’Ubuntu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo uburyo muzabana mukiri muri ubu bugingo bizatume mu gihe kizaza muhabga ubugingo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: budashira. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori ahagarare I ruhande rw’ameza y’Umwami wacu, basome iyi Zaburi.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Zaburi 128
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hahirwa uwubaha Uwiteka wese, Akagenda mu nzira ze. Kuko uzatungwa n'imirimo y'amaboko yawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uzajya wishima, uzahirwa. Umugore wawe azaba nk'umuzabibu wera cyane mu kirambi cy'inzu yawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abana bawe bazaba nk'uduti twa elayo, Bagose ameza yawe. Uko ni ko umuntu wubaha Uwiteka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azahirwa. Uwiteka azaguha umugisha uva i Siyoni, Nawe uzabona ibyiza biza kuri Yerusalemu, Iminsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yose ukiriho. Ni koko uzabona abuzukuru bawe. Amahoro abe mu Bisirayeli.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya Data wa twese, n’icy’Umwana, n’icy’Umwuka Wera, Nk’uko Cyahoze mbere na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mbere, n’ubu ni ko kiri, kandi ni ko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amen.

verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IMANA itubabarire iduhe umugisha,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Itumurikishirize mu maso hayo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kugira ngo inzira yawe imenywe mu isi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubugingo bwawe bukiza bumenywe mu mahanga yose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana, amoko agushime,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amoko yose agushime.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amahanga yishime, aririmbishwe n'ibyishimo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuko uzacira amoko imanza z'ukuri,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi uzashorerera amahanga mu isi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana, amoko agushime,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amoko yose agushime.

verses.text: Ubutaka bweze umwero wabwo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana ni yo Mana yacu, izaduha umugisha.

verses.text: Kandi abo ku mpera y'isi hose bazayubaha.

verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nk’uko cyahoze mbere na mbere, na n’ubu ni ko kiri, kandi ni ko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amen.

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: MANA y’Aburahamu, Mana ya Isaka; Mana ya Yakobo, uhe uyu mugaragu wawe n’uyu muja wawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umugisha, ubihe mu mitima yabo imbuto zizazana ubugingo budashira, kugira ngo ibyo baziga mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ijambo ryawe ryera, bikabagirira akamaro, babisohoreshe ibyo bakora. Mwami wacu, ubarebana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: imbabazi uri mu ijuru, ubahe umugisha. Kandi nk’uko wahaye Abarahamu na Sara umugisha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukabanezeza cyane, abe ari ko wemera kuwuha uyu mugaragu wawe n’uyu muja wawe, kugira ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bitondere ibyo ushaka, bahore barindwa neza n’amaboko yawe, bakomeze gukundwa nawe iminsi yose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazamara bakiriho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umugore ni aba acuze, atakibyara, iri Sengesho barisige.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: M  W  A  M  I  w’imbabazi,  Data  wa  twese  wo  mu  ijuru,  tuzi  yuko  ari  impano  yawe  y’ubuntu  ko  abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bagwira.  Turakwinginga,  ufashishe  umugisha  wawe  aba  bantu  bombi,  babyarane  abana,  babane
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakundanye  urukundo  ruva  aho  uri,  ari  abanyakuri,  babone  uko  bazatoza  abana  babo  ingeso  nziza  za
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gikristo, bagushimisha kandi bakubahisha. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA, turagushimira ko waranesheje imbaraga zawe zikomeye ibintu byose, ari nta kintu wabiremyemo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi umaze gutunganya ibindi, wategetse ko umugore akomoka ku mugabo waremwe mu ishusho yawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubateranya  hamwe,  wigisha  yuko  kizira  rwose  gutandukanya  abo  wateranishije  hamwe  gushyingirwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mana, turagushimira ko wejeje umubano w’abashyingiwe, ukawuhindura icyitegererezo cy’umubano wa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo n’itorero rye wo mu buryo bw’umwuka. Nuko urebane imbabazi uyu mugaragu wawe n’uyu muja
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: wawe,  kugira  ngo  uyu  mugabo  akunde  umugore  we  akurikiza  itegeko  ry’Ijambo  ryawe,  nk’uko  Kristo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yakunze  umugeni we mi ryo Torero rye, akaryitangira arikunze,  arikuyakuya nk’umubiri we. Kandi uyu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mugore  ajye  yerekana  urukundo  n’ineza,  ngo  asohoze  isezerano  yasezeranye  n’umugabo  we,  ajye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amwumvira,  akurikiza  abagore  bera  bubahaga  Imana,  yoroheje,  yitonda,  kandi  ari  umunyamahoro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani,  ubahe  bombi  umugisha,  baragwe  ubwami  bwawe  budashira.  Tubisabye  mu  izina  rya  Yesu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori ahereko avuga ati;
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: IMANA  ishobora  byose  mbere  yaremye  basogokuruza  Adamu  na  Eve,  irabeza,  ibateranisha  hamwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gushyingirwa,  isuke  kuri  mwe  Ubuntu  bwayo  busesekaye,  ibeze,  ibahe  umugisha,  kugira  ngo  ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mukoresha imibiri n’imitima yanyu biyinezeze, kandi mubane mukundana urukundo rwera iminsi yose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muzamarana mukiriho. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Byaba ari byiza, bamaze gushingirwa, guhabwa Igaburo ryera, cyangwa kurihabwa bidatinze.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IBYO GUSHIMIRA IMANA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: KW’ABAGORE BABYAYE
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ababyeyi bapfukame, Umusengesha avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: KUKO Imana yakugiriye imbabazi, ikagutaburura neza mu mibabaro yo Kubyara, ni cyo gitumye ukwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuyishimira mu magambo yo muri Zaburi 116.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NKUNDIRA Uwiteka, kuko yumvise ijwi ryanjye no kwinginga kwanjye. Kuko yantegeye ugutwi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ni cyo gituma nzajya mwambaza nkiriho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ingoyi z’urupfu zantaye hagati, uburibwe bw’ikuzimu bwaramfashe; ngira ibyago n’umubabaro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze nambaza izina ry’Uwiteka, nti, Uwiteka, ndakwingize, kiza ubugingo bwanjye.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Uwiteka arinda abaswa; nacishujwe bugufi, arankiza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mutima wanjye, subira mu buruhukiro bwawe, kuko Uwiteka yakugiriye neza;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuko wakijije ubugingo bwanjye urupfu, amaso yanjye ukayakiza amarira, n’ibirenge byanjye ukabikiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nzagendera mu maso y’Uwiteka mu isi y’ababaho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nari nizeye; ubwo navugaga nti, Narababajwe cyane,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nkavugana ubwira nti, abantu bose ni abanyabinyoma.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyiza Uwiteka yangiriye byose, ndabimwitura ki ?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nzakira igikombe cy’agakiza, nambaze izina ry’Uwiteka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nzahigura Uwiteka umuhigo wanjye, ni koko nzawumuhigurira mu maso y’ubwoko bwebwose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urupfu rw’abakunzi be n’urw’igiciro cyinshi mu maso y’Uwiteka.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwiteka, ni ukuri ndi umugaragu wawe ; ndi umugaragu wawe, Umwana w’umuja wawe ; wambohoye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ingoyi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nzagutambira igitambo cy’ishimwe, nambaze izina ry’uwiteka.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nzahigura Uwiteka umuhigo wanjye ; ni koko nzawumuhigurira mu maso y’ubwoko bwe bwose, Mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bikari by’inzu y’Uwiteka, hagati muri wowe, Yerusalemu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Haleluya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Na Zaburi 127
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UWITEKA iyo atari we wubaka inzu, Abayubaka baba baruhira ubusa. Uwiteka iyo atari we urinda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umudugudu, Umurinzi abera maso ubusa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bibaruhiriza ubusa kuzinduka kare, Mugatinda cyane kuruhuka, Mukarya umutsima w'umuruho. Ni ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: aha uwo akunda ibitotsi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Dore abana ni umwandu uturuka ku Uwiteka, Imbuto z'inda ni zo ngororano atanga.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nk'uko imyambi yo mu ntoki z'intwari iri, Ni ko abana bo mu busore bamera.

verses.text: Hahirwa ufite ikirimba kibuzuye, Abameze batyo ntibazakorwa n'isoni,

verses.text: Uko bazavuganira n'abanzi babo mu marembo.

verses.text: Nk’uko cyahoze mbere na mbere, n’ubu niko kiri, kandi ni ko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amen.

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, turagushima cyane twitonze ko wemeye gutaburura uyu muja wawe mu

verses.text: mibibabaro yo kubyara.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: icyubahiro kitazashira ; tubisabye mu Izina rya Kristo Yesu Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA Data wa twese, ni Wowe Mubyeyi mwiza ; tuzi yuko abana ari umwandu ugukomokako ; ni cyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gitumye tugushimira, ko wahaye aba babyeyi iyi mpano nziza. Nuko none, Nyagasani turakwingize, ujye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubafasha kurerera uyu mwana mu ngeso nziza abone gukurira muri Kristo ;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi umuhe umugisha n’ubuntu bwawe, abone kwakira agakiza kawe akiri muto, kugeza umunsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azagerera mu bwami bwawe. Tubisabye mu izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

verses.text: IBYO GUHAMBA ABAPFU
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Aya magambo si ayo gukoreshwa ku muntu upfuye atabatijwe, cyangwa waciwe mu Itorero,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyangwa wiyahuye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umupastori (Umusengesha) asanganire intumbi, ayijye imbere, bajye murusengero cyangwa ku
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: mva. Bakigenda avuge ati,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMWAMI wacu yaravuze ati, Ni jye kuzuka n'ubugingo, unyizera naho yaba yarapfuye azabaho, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuntu wese ukiriho unyizera ntazapfa iteka ryose Yohana 11 : 25,26
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ariko jye ubwanjye nzi yuko Umucunguzi wanjye ariho, Kandi ko amaherezo azahagarara mu isi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi uruhu rwanjye nirumara kubora, Nzareba Imana mfite umubiri. Nzayireba ubwanjye, Amaso
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yanjye azayitegereza si ay'undi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuko ari nta cyo twazanye mu isi, ni ko nta cyo tuzayivanamo, Uwiteka ni we wabimpaye, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwiteka ni we ubitwaye ; Izina ry’Uwiteka ni we ubitwaye ; Izina ry’uwiteka rishimwe.   1Timoteyo 6 :7 ;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yobu1 :21
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni bagera mu rusengero, basome Zaburi imwe muri izi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Zaburi 39
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NARIBAGIYE nti, Nzirindira mu nzira zanjye, Kugira ngo ntacumuza ururimi rwanjye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nzajya mfata ururimi rwanjye, Umunyabyaha akiri imbere yanjye." Nabeshejwe nk'ikiragi no kutavuga,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: narahoze naho byaba ibyiza sinabivuga,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umubabaro wanjye uragwira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umutima wanjye ungurumana mu nda, Ngitekereza umuriro unyakamo, Maze mvugisha ururimi nti
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwiteka, umenyeshe iherezo ryanjye, N'urugero rw'iminsi yanjye, Menye ko ndi igikenya.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Dore wahinduye iminsi yanjye nk'intambwe z'intoki,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Igihe cy'ubugingo bwanjye kuri wowe kimeze nk'ubusa,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni ukuri umuntu wese nubwo akomeye, ni umwuka gusa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni ukuri umuntu wese agenda nk'igicucu, Ni ukuri bahagarikira umutima ubusa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umuntu arundanya ubutunzi atazi uzabujyana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami, none ntegereje iki ? Ni wowe niringira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Unkize ibicumuro byanjye byose, Ntumpindure uwo gutukwa n'abapfu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Narahoze sinabumbura akanwa, Kuko ari wowe wabikoze. Unkureho inkoni yawe, Mazwe no gukubitwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'ukuboko kwawe. Iyo uhaniye umuntu gukiranirwa kwe umuhanisha ibihano, Unyenzura ubwiza bwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk'inyenzi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni ukuri umuntu wese ni umwuka gusa. Sela. Uwiteka umva gusenga kwanjye, tegera ugutwi gutaka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwanjye, Ntiwicire amatwi amarira yanjye. Kuko ndi umusuhuke imbere yawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: N'umwimukira nk'uko ba sogokuruza bose bari bari. Rekera aho kundeba igitsure, Mbone uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nsubizwamo intege, Ntarava hano ntakibaho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Zaburi 90.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MWAMI, ibihe byose wahoze uri ubuturo bwacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imisozi itaravuka, Utararamukwa isi n'ubutaka, Uhereye iteka ryose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukageza iteka ryose, Ni wowe Mana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uhindura abantu umukungugu, Kandi ukavuga uti"Bana b'abantu, musubireyo."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuko imyaka igihumbi mu maso yawe imeze nk'umunsi wejo wahise, Cyangwa nk'igicuku cy'ijoro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubajyana nk'isuri bameze nk'ibitotsi, Bukeye bameze nk'ibyatsi bimera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu gitondo birera bigakura, Nimugoroba bigacibwa bikuma.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Natwe uburakari bwawe bwatumazeho, Umujinya wawe waduhagaritse imitima.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Washyize ibyo twakiraniwe imbere yawe, N'ibyaha byacu byahishwe wabishyize mu mucyo wo mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: maso hawe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuko iminsi yacu yose ishize tukiri mu mujinya wawe, Imyaka yacu tuyirangiza nko gusuhuza umutima.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Iminsi y'imyaka yacu ni imyaka mirongo irindwi, Ariko kandi nitugira intege nyinshi ikagera kuri mirongo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: inani.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyamara ibyiratwa byayo ni imiruho n'umubabaro, Kuko ishira vuba natwe tukaba tugurutse.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni nde uzi imbaraga z'uburakari bwawe, Akamenya umujinya wawe uko wowe ukwiriye kubahwa?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Utwigishe kubara iminsi yacu, Uburyo butuma dutunga imitima y'ubwenge.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwiteka garuka, Ko watinze uzageza ryari? Abagaragu bawe uduhindurire umutima.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu gitondo uzaduhaze imbabazi zawe, Kugira ngo tuzajye twishima tunezerwe iminsi yacu yose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Utwishimishe ibyishimo bingana n'iminsi watubabarijemo, N'imyaka twabonyemo ibyago.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umurimo wawe utubonekere abagaragu bawe, Gukomera kwawe kumenyekanire ku bana bacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubwiza bw'Uwiteka Imana yacu bube kuri twe, Kandi udukomereze imirimo y'intoki zacu, Nuko imirimo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y'intoki zacu, uyikomeze.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umusengesha akurikizeho gusoma 1 Korinto 15:20-58, cyangwa 1 Tesalonike 4:13-15: 11. N’amara
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: gusoma icyo gice, asenge iri sengesho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MWAMI w’ibambe, aba bantu bapfushije uwabo ubahe kukwizera no kwihanganira iby’igihe kizaza, be
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gucogozwa n’agahinda gasaze, ahubwo bakomere mu mitima; be guheranwa n’umubabaro nk’abandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: badafite ibyiringiro, ahubwo bajye bibuka ibyiza byose wabagiriye mu bihe byashize, bafite ibyiringiro ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazongera kubonanira mu ijuru.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bacyitegura gushyira intumbi mu mva, Umusengesha avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UMUNTU wabyawe n’umugore, amara igihe gito ariho, kandi cyuzuyemwo imiruho. Avuka ameze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’ururabyo, maze agacibwa; ahita nk’igicucu, kandi ntarame.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tukiriho turi hagati y’urupfu. Twahungira kuri nde wo kudukiza atari Wowe, Nyagasani, nubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ufite impamvu yo kurakarira ibyaha byacu. Ariko, ayi Mwami Mana yera rwose, ayi Nyagasani urusha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bose imbaraga, ayi Mukiza Wera w’imbabazi nyinshi, ntuduhane mu buribwe bwinshi bw’urupfu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rw’iteka ryose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani, uzi ibihishwe mu mititma yacu, ntiwice amatwi yawe y’imbabazi, ngo we kumva ibyo dusaba;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahubwo utubabarire, ayi Mwami wera cyane, Umukiza wera umunyambabazi, Wowe Mucamanza mwiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uhoraho, igihe cyacu cyo gupfa ni gisohora, ntuzakunde ko dutandukanwa nawe n’uburibwe bw’urupfu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bahagaritswe hafi no gushyira igitaka ku ntumbi. Umusengesha avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: TUZI yuko Imana ishobora byose ku bw’imbabazi zayo nyinshi ishase kujyana i wayo mwene Data uyu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukundwa, utaashye; ni cyo gitumye dushyira umubiri we mu butaka, igitaka mu butaka, ivu mu ivu,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umukungugu mu mukungugu, dufite ibyiringiro tudashidikanya na hato ko tuzazuka, tugahabwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubugingo buhoraho, tubuhabwa na Yesu Kristo, uzahindura umubiri wacu ugayitse, akawushushanya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’umubiri we ufite ubwiza, kuko agira imbaraga zo kumubashisha kwigandurira byose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bose bavugire hamwe bati,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Numva ijwi rivugira mu ijuru rimbwira riti"Andika uti 'Uhereye none hahirwa abapfa bapfira mu Mwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu.' " Umwuka na we aravuga ati"Yee, ngo baruhuke imihati yabo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umusengesha   Nyagasani, utugirire imbabazi
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Abantu
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Nyagasani, utugirire imbabazi.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kristo, utugirire imbabazi
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: DATA wa twese wo mu ijuru, izina ryawe ryubahwe; ubwami bwawe buze; ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru; uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; utubabariwe ibyaha byacu, nk’uko
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: natwe tubabarira ababitugirira; ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize umubi. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, tuzi yuko aho uri imyuka y’abavuye ino bapfiriye mu Mwami wacu ari ho iri,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi ari mizima; kandi duhamya yuko abakwizeye, ni bamara guturwa umutwaro w’uyu mubiri, babana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nawe bishima. Nuko turagushimira ko ushatse gukiza mwene Data uyu mubabaro wo muri iyi si irimo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyaha; kandi turakwingingira kwemerana imbabazi zawe gushyitsa rwose umubare w’intore zawe no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kudutebukiriza ubwami bwawe, kugira ngo, ni tugera mu bwiza bwawe budashira, tuzasangire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’abapfuye bizeye by’ukuri Izina ryawe ryera umunezero usohoye w’umubiri n’uw’ubugingo. Tubisabye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA y’ibambe, sew’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo, turagushimira yuko ari we Kuzuka n’ubugingo, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yuko umwizera wese, naho yaba yarapfuye, azabaho, ntazongera gupfa iteka ryose. Kandi, Mana,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turagushimira yuko watwigishirije mu ijwi ry’Intumwa yawe Pawulo wera kutababazwa n’abasinziriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muri Yesu nk’abadafite ibyiringiro. None, Data wa twese turakwingira kutuzura mu rupfu, ni rwo byaha,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tugere mu bugingo bwo gukiranuka. Uduhe ibyo kugira ngo, ni tuva muri ubu bugingo, tuzaruhukire mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mwami Yesu, nk’uko twiringiye yuko mwene data uyu aruhutse, no kugira ngo, ubwo abantu bose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazazuka ku munsi w’imperuka, tuzemerwe nawe, duhabwe umugisha Umwana wawe ukunda cyane
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: azaha abagukunda bakakubaha bose ati, Nimuze abo Data yahaye umugisha, muragwe ubwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwabatunganirijwe uhereye ku kuremwa kw’isi. Data wa twese w’imbabazi nyinshi, turakwinginze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uduhe ibyo ku bwa Yesu Kristo, Umuhuza kandi Umurengezi wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Niba upfuye ari umwana muto, bakoresha aya masengesho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MWAMI wacu Yesu Kristo, ni wowe wakikiye abana, ukabaha umugisha; none turakwinginga, humura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amaso yacu kugira ngo dusobanukirwe yuko uyu mwana umwakirije amaboko yawe y’urukundo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukamuvana mu isi ataranduzwa cyane n’ibyaha. None ubu ageze mu mahoro. Ni cyo gitumye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tubigushimira, Yesu Kristo Umwungeri mwiza w’abana. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA Se w’Umwami wacu Yesu; Umukunzi w’abana, tuzi yuko nta cyo uremera ubusa, kandi ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukunda icyo waremye cyose; None turakwinga, wurure umubabaro w’aba bantu bawe bapfushije
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwana wabo w’inkora-mutima; ubahe kudahugira mu mubabaro, ahubwo bahuguke, bakomeze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugukunda no kugukorera bakiri muri ubu bugingo; babone kuzongera kubonana na w, no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwambikanwa na we ubwiza bwawe buhebuje mu bwami bwawe, ku bw’Umwama wawe watwitangiye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yesu Kristo Umukiza wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBUNTU bw’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo n’urukundo rw’Imana, n’ubumwe bw’Umwuka Wera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bibane natwe twese iteka ryose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ZABURI ZA DAWIDI
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Uko zisomwa buri munsi kumara Ukwezi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umunsi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: izo mugitondo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: iza nimugoroba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBURYO BWO KUROBANURA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ABEPISKOPI N’ABAPASTORI N’ABADIKONI
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: nk’uko imigenzo y’Itorero iri.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: IBYO GUSOBANURA UBUKURU BWO MU
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ITORERO ICYO ARI CYO.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Abantu bose, abagira umwete wo gusoma Ibyanditswe Byera n’ibindi bitabo byanditswe n’aba kera, bazi
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: neza ngo, uhereye mu gihe cy’Intumwa, hariho Abakuru bari mu Itorero rya Kristo, Abepiskopi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Abapastori, kandi n’Abadikoni.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ubwo bukuri bwari bwubashywe cyane. Ni cyo cyatumaga umuntu wese atemererwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubuhabwa, atabanje guhamagarwa, no kugeragezwa, kandi no kubazwa, ngo babone guhamya yuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: afite ingeso nziza zikwiriye ubwo bukuru; hanyuma abone kwinjizwa muri uwo murimo n’Abakuru bafite
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubutware bwabyo, nk’uko amategeko ategeka, bawumuhesha gusenga kw’Abakristo bose bateranye, no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kumushyiraho ibiganza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko dushaka yuko ubwo bukuru bukomezwa mu Itorero, kandi bukoreshwa neza, bukubahwa,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: na none nta muntu wemererwa kuba Umwepiskopi, cyangwa Umupastori, cyangwa Umudikoni,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: atabanje guhamagarwa, no kugeregezwa, no kubazwa ngo abone kubuhabwa nk’uko iyi migenzo igenza,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: keretse niba yari yararobanuriwe ahandi, cyangwa yari yarashyizweho ibiganza n’undi Mwepiskopi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi nta muntu wemererwa kuba Umudikoni atarashyitsa imyaka makumyabiri n’itatu avutse,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: keretse yaba afite urwandiko rumwemeza; kandi umuntu wese ushaka guhabwa Ubupastori akwiriye
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: kuba ashyikije imyaka makumyabiri n’ine; kandi umuntu wese ugiye kurobanurirwa Ubwepiskopi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akwiriye kuba afite imyaka mirongo itatu rwose avutse.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBURYO BWO KUROBANURA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ABADIKONI
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ubwiriza abanze asobanure umurimo n’ubuhereza bw’abantu barobanurirwa Ubudikoni uwo ari wo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi uko ubwo buhereza ari ngombwa mu Itorero.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze igisonga cy’Umwepiskopi ajyane abantu bo kurobanurwa, abashyikirize Umwepiskopi yicaye ku
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ntebe ye hafi y’Ameza year, amubwire ati,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MUBYEYI nyakubahwa wo mu Mana, nkuzaniye aba bantu kugira ngo barobanurirwe Ubudikoni.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi  Wirinde, hatagira umuntu unzanira utabasha guhamya yuko yigishijwe neza, kandi agira
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ingeso nziza zo kumushoboza guhereza iby’Imana uburyo bukwiriye, kugira ngo Imana yubahwe, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Itorero ryayo rikomezwe.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Igisonga:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nabajije ibyabo, kandi narababajije ubwabo; maze niringira ko ari ko bameze.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi abwire abantu bose ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BENE Data, niba hari uwo muri mwe uzi icyaha gikomeye, cyangwa indi mpamvu ku muntu wese wo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muri aba bantu banzaniye kurobanurirwa uwo murimo, aze imbere yanjye mu Izina ry’Imana,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abigaragaze.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Niba hari icyaha gikomeye cyangwa indi mpamvu yaboneka kuri umwe muri abo bantu yamubuza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kurobanurwa, Umwepiskopi abe amuretse kugeza ubwo azamenya ko nta mpamvu ikwiriye kumubuza.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umwepiskopi abwire Iteraniro ngo risabire abagiye kurobanura; maze afatanye na ryo gusenga
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: amasengesho ya LITANI
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amagambo yose ya Litani avugwe, uretse Isengesho rya Krisostomu Wera ryonyine.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma hakurikireho amagambo y’Igaburo Ryera. Isengesho, Urwandiko, n’Ubutumwa byanditswe
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: hepfo, abe ari byo bisomwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, kera wategekesheje ubwenge bw’Ubumana bwawe, ko Itorero ryawe rigira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abahereza b’uburyo butari bumwe; kandi wayoboye Intumwa zawe kurobanura Sitefano wera kuba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umudikoni, ni na we mfura y’abishwe babahora Yesu None turakwinginga ngo urebane imbabazi aba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bagaragu bawe bahamagariwe uwo murimo n’ubwo buhereza. Ubamenyeshe rwose imyigishirize yawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’ukuri, ubarimbishishe ingeso nziza kugira ngo ibyo bigisha bifatanije n’ibyo bakora byose bizatume
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: basohoza neza ubuhereza bahawe, ngo Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Igice cyo mu Nzandiko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 1Timoteo 3:8-13
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kandi n'abadiyakoni na bo ni uko: bakwiriye kuba abitonda, batari intereganya cyangwa abamenyereye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: vino nyinshi bakifuza indamu mbi, ahubwo bakomeze ubwiru bwo kwizera bafite imitima itabacira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: urubanza. Bakwiriye kubanza kugeragezwa, maze nibatabaho umugayo babone gukora umurimo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w'ubudiyakoni. N'abadiyakonikazi na bo ni uko: babe abitonda, abatabeshyera abandi, abadakunda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibisindisha, bakiranuka muri byose. Abadiyakoni babe abagabo b'umugore umwe, bategeka neza abana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babo n'abo mu ngo zabo. Kuko abakora neza uwo murimo w'ubudiyakoni bibonera umwanya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w'icyubahiro mwiza, n'ubushizi bw'amanga bwinshi bwo kwizera Yesu Kristo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Cyangwa Ibyakozwe n’Intumwa 6:2-7.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Abo cumi na babiri bahamagara abigishwa bose bati"Ntibikwiriye ko turekera kwigisha ijambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ry'Imana kwicara ku meza tugabura. Nuko bene Data, mutoranye muri mwe abantu barindwi bashimwa,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: buzuye Umwuka Wera n'ubwenge, tubashyire kuri uwo murimo. Ariko twebweho tuzakomeza gusenga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: no kugabura ijambo ry'Imana." Abahateraniye bose bashima ayo magambo, batoranya Sitefano umuntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wuzuye kwizera n'Umwuka Wera, na Filipo na Purokoro na Nikanori na Timoni, na Parumena na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nikolawo wo muri Antiyokiya watoye idini y'Abayuda, babashyira imbere y'intumwa kandi bamaze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gusenga babarambikaho ibiganza. Nuko ijambo ry'Imana rikomeza kwamamara, umubare w'abigishwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ugwira cyane i Yerusalemu, abatambyi benshi bumvira uko kwizera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa batarasomwa, Umwepiskopi, yicaye ku ntebe ye, abarize imbere y’iteraniro abagiye
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: kurobanurwa ibi bibazo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi  Wiringiye yuko ari Umwuka Wera wakwemeje gukora uyu murimo n’ubu buhereza, ngo
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ukwize icyubahiro cy’Imana, kandi ukomeze abantu bayo?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Ni byo niringiye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wiringiye yuko wahamagariwe by’ukuri ubu buhereza bw’Itorero, nk’uko Umwami wacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kubaza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yesu Kristo ashaka, kandi nk’uko iri Torero ritegeka?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kubaza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kubaza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nsengero uzaturamwo?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umwepiskopi  Nimwumve imirimo y’Umudikoni iyo ari yo.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nzajya mbibasomera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni byo nibgira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wemeye rwose by’ukuri Ibyanditswe Byera byose byo mu Isezerano rya kera n’irishya?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ndabyemeye rwose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uzajya ugira umwete wo gusomera abantu ibyo Byanditswe aho bateranira mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ajye afasha Umupastori gusengesha abantu mu rusengero, cyane cyane amufasha guhereza Igaburo
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ryera; yigisha Gatigisimu; abatiza abana bato n’abantu bakuru Umupastori adahari; kansi akwiriye
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: kubahiriza abarwayi n’abakene n’ibimuga, ngo amenyeshe ab’Itorero, kugira ngo babafashe. Mbese
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uzajya ukora utyo ubyishimiye kandi ubikunze?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kubaza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: b’Itorero, n’abandi bahawe ubutware bwo kukuyobora wemeranije umutima unezerewe ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: baguhuguza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Nzajya mbikora Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uzajya wumvira Umwepiskopi wawe umwubashye, hamwe n’abandi bahereza bakuru
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Nzajya mbikora Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi arambike ibiganza ku mutwe w’umuntu wese wo muri bo umupfukamiye imbere,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: amubwire ati,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UHABWE, ubutware bwo gukora umurimo w’umudikoni mu Itorero ry’Imana. Ndabuguhaye mu Izina rya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Data wa twese, n’iry’Umwana n’iry’Umwuka Wera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Umwepiskopi amuhereze Isezerano rishya, avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UHABWE: ubutware bwo gusomera Ubutumwa Bwiza mu rusengero, no kubwiriza, uko Umwepiskopi
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: azakwemerera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwe wo muri bo utoranijwe n’Umwepiskopi asome igice cyo mu Butumwa bwiza.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MUHORE mukenyeye kandi amatabaza yanyu yake, mumere nk'abantu bategereza shebuja aho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: agarukira ava mu bukwe, kugira ngo ubwo azaza nakomanga bamukingurire vuba. Hahirwa abagaragu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: shebuja azaza agasanga bari maso. Ndababwira ukuri yuko azakenyera, akabicaza akabahereza. Naza mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gicuku cyangwa mu nkoko agasanga bameze batyo, bazaba bahirwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi akurikizeho kuvuga ibyo twemera n’amagambo y’Igaburo ryera aheruka,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: abarobanuwe bose barihabwe n’Umwepiskopi uwo munsi. Nibarangiza iby’Igaburo ryera, hanyuma
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: y’Isengesho riheruka, batarasaba amahoro, aya masengesho abe ari yo avugwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, Umugabyi w’ibyiza byose, turagushimira Ubuntu bwawe bwinshi butumye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wemera kwakira aba bagaragu bawe, ukabinjiza mu murimo w’ubudikoni mu Itorero ryawe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nyagasani, turakwingingira kugira ngo ubahe kuba inyangamugayo bicisha bugufi, ari abizerwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu murimo wabo, kani bakuyobokane umutima ukunze muri byose, kugira ngo bahagarare bashikamye
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: mu Mwana wawe Yesu Kristo, bafite umutima utabarega ikibi. Kandi ubahe kuyoboka bakiri muri uru
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rwego rwo hasi, kugira ngo baboneke ko bakwiriye kuzahamagarirwa kujya mu rundi rwo hejuru mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Buhereza bw’Itorero ryawe. Ibyo tubisabye mu Izina ry’Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo Umukiza wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NYAGASANI, turagusaba kugira ngo urukundo rwawe n’ubuntu bwawe bidushorere mu byo dukora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose, kandi udufashe kujya twunguka mu byo tugukorera, kugira ngo muri Wowe umurimo wacu wose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abe ari ho utangirira, abe ari ho ukomerezwa, kandi abe ari ho urangirizwa, bitumen duhesha Izina
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryawe ryera icyubahiro, kandi natwe hanyuma tuzahabwe ubugingo buhoraho ku bw’imbabazi zawe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: AMAHORO Imana itanga, aruta ayo umuntu wese yakwibgira, ajye arinda imitima yanyu n’ubwenge
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwanyu, kugira ngo mukomeze kumenya no gukunda Imana n’Umwana wayo Yesu Kristo Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi Umugisha w’Imana ishobora byose, Data wa twese, n’Umwana n’Umwuka Wera, ube muri mwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi ugumane namwe Iminsi yose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umudikoni akwiriye kubwirwa ko azamara umwaka wose muri uwo murimo w’Ubudikoni (keretse
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi abonye impamvu ituma awugabanya), kugira ngo awushyitse neza, kandi abe umuhanga
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: mu byerekeye umurimo w’Itorero.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwo mwaka ushize, niba aboneka ari umwizerwa kandi umunyamwete, yashobora kwinjizwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu Bupastori imbere y’Itorero, bakurikije uburyo bwo kurobanura. Abapastori mu magambo
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: akurikiraho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UBURYO BWO KUROBANURA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ABAPASTORI
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umunsi Umwepiskopi yatoranije n’ushyika, hanyuma yo Gusenga kwa gitondo, habeho kubwiriza
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: cyangwa guhugura abantu ku by’umurimo n’ubukuru by’abashaka kurobanurwa kuba Abapastori, ko ari
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ngombwa mu Itorero rya Kristo, kandi ko abantu bakwiriye kubaha abarobanurirwa uwo murimo kubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubukuru bahawe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Igisonga cy’umwepiskopi ajyane abantu kurobanurwa, abashyikirize, Umwepiskopi yicaye
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ku ntebe ye amubwire ati:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MUBYEYI nyakubahwa wo mu Mana, nkuzaniye aba bantu kugira ngo barobanuriwe Ubupastori.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umwepiskopi:   Wirinde, hatagira umuntu unzanira, utabasha guhamya yuko yigishijwe neza, kandi agira
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ingeso nziza zo kumushoboza guhereza iby’Imana uburyo bukwiriye, kugira ngo Imana yubahwe, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Itorero ryayo rikomezwe.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Igisonga: Nabajije ibyabo, kandi narabajije ubwabo; maze niringira ko ari ko bameze.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Umwepiskopi abwire abantu ati:
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BENE DATA bakundwa, aba bantu nibo nemeye kwinjiza mu mirimo wera w’ubupastori, Imana
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: nibishaka; kuko, tumaze kubabaza, duhamya ko aria bantu bahamagariwe uwo murimo, nk’uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: amategeko yemera, kandi ko ari abantu bawukwiriye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko, niba hari uwo muri mwe uzi icyaha gikomeye, cyangwa indi mpamvu ku muntu wese wo muri aba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bantu banzaniye kurobanurirwa Ubupastori, bikwiriye kumubaza guhabwa uwoaze imbere yanjye mu
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Izina ry’Imana, abigaragaze.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Niba hari icyaha gikomeye cyangwa indi mpamvu yaboneka kuri umwe muri abo bantu yamubuza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kurobanurwa, Umwepiskopi abe amuretse kugeza ubwo azamenya ko nta mpamvu ikwiriye kumubuza.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umwepiskopi abwire Iteraniro ngo risabire abagiye kurobanurwa; maze afatanye na ryo gusenga
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: amasengesho ya Litani, nk’uko biri mu byo Kurobanura Abadikoni.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amagambo y’Igaburo Ryera akurikireho; Isengesho, Urwandiko, n’Ubutumwa byanditswe hepfo, abe ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byo bisomwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, Umugabyi w’ibyiza byose, kera wategekesheje Umwuka Wera, ko Itorero ryawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rigira abahereza b’uburyo butari bumwe; none turakwinginze urebane imbabazi aba bagaragu bawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bahamagariwe kuba Abapastori. Ubamenyeshe rwose imyigishirize yawe y’ukuri, ubarimbishishe ingezo
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: nziza kugira ngo ibyo bigisha bifatanije n’ibyo bakora byose bizatume basohoza neza ubuhereza bahawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo Izina ryawe ryubahwe, n’Itorero ryawe rikomezwe. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: URWANDIKO  Abefeso 4:7-13
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ARIKO umuntu wese muri twe yahawe ubuntu nk'uko urugero rw'impano ya Kristo ruri. Ni cyo gituma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ivuga iti"Amaze kuzamuka mu ijuru, Ajyana iminyago myinshi, Aha abantu impano." Ariko iryo jambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo"Yazamutse mu ijuru" risobanurwa rite? Ntirigaragaza yuko yabanje kumanuka ikuzimu?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uwamanutse ni we wazamutse ajya hejuru y'amajuru yose, kugira ngo asohoze byose. Nuko aha bamwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuba intumwa ze, n'abandi kuba abahanuzi, n'abandi kuba ababwirizabutumwa bwiza, n'abandi kuba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abungeri n'abigisha, kugira ngo abera batunganirizwe rwose gukora umurimo wo kugabura iby'Imana no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukomeza umubiri wa Kristo, kugeza ubwo twese tuzasohora kugira ubumwe bwo kwizera no kumenya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwana w'Imana, kandi kugeza ubwo tuzasohora kuba abantu bashyitse bageze ku rugero rushyitse
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rw'igihagararo cya Kristo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma hasomwe Ubutumwa bwa Matayo igice cya 9.36-38
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ABONYE abantu uko ari benshi arabababarira, kuko bari barushye cyane basandaye nk'intama zitagira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwungeri. Maze abwira abigishwa be ati"Ibisarurwa ni byinshi, ariko abasaruzi ni bake. Nuko rero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwinginge nyir'ibisarurwa, yohereze abasaruzi mu bisarurwa bye."
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Cyangwa Ubutumwa bwa Yohana igice cya 10:1-16
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: NI UKURI, ni ukuri, ndababwira yuko uwinjira mu rugo rw'intama atanyuze mu irembo, ahubwo akuririra
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahandi, uwo aba ari umujura n'umunyazi. Ariko unyura mu irembo ni we mwungeri w'intama. Umurinzi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w'irembo aramwugururira, kandi intama zumva ijwi rye. Ahamagara intama ze mu mazina yazo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akazahura. Iyo amaze kwahura ize zose azijya imbere, intama zikamukurikira kuko zizi ijwi rye. Undi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntizamukurikira, ahubwo zamuhunga kuko zitazi amajwi y'abandi." Yesu abacira uwo mugani, ariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntibamenya ibyo yababwiye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko Yesu arongera arababwira ati"Ni ukuri, ni ukuri, ndababwira yuko ari jye rembo ry'intama.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abambanjirije bose bari abajura n'abanyazi, ariko intama ntizabumvise. Ni jye rembo, umuntu niyinjira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muri jye azakizwa, azinjira asohoke kandi azabona urwuri. Umujura ntazanwa n'ikindi keretse kwiba no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwica no kurimbura, ariko jyeweho nazanywe no kugira ngo zibone ubugingo, ndetse ngo zibone
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwinshi. "Ni jye mwungeri mwiza. Umwungeri mwiza apfira intama ze, ariko uragirira ibihembo, utari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwungeri bwite kandi n'intama atari ize, iyo abonye isega rije asiga intama agahunga, isega rikazifata
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rikazitatanya. Kuko ari uw'ibihembo, arahunga ntiyite ku ntama. Ni jye mwungeri mwiza kandi menya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: izanjye, izanjye zikamenya nk'uko Data amenya nanjye nkamumenya, kandi mpfira intama zanjye. Mfite
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n'izindi ntama zitari izo muri uru rugo, na zo nkwiriye kuzizana. Zizumva ijwi ryanjye kandi zizaba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umukumbi umwe, zigire umwungeri umwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bamaze kumva Ubutumwa Bwiza, Umwepiskopi yicare ku ntebe ye, abwire abagiye kurobanura ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BENE DATA; mwumvis ibyo twababwiye, ubwo twababazaga wihereye, byo kubigisha iby’icyubahiro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cy’uyu murimo mwahamagariwe no gukomera kwawo kwinshi. Kandi ibyo ni ibyo mwigishijwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mukabibwirizwa uyu munsi, kandi n’Igice cyo mu butumwa bwiza n’icyo mu Nzandiko z’Intumwa na byo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bibibigishije. None ubu turababwira mu Izina ry’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo, ko mujya mwibuka Ubukuru
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muhawe uko ari ubw’icyubahiro, kandi uyu murimo muhamagarirwa ko ukomeye cyane. Uyu murimo ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukuba Intumwa z’Umwami Imana, n’abarinzi b’abantu bayo, n’Ibisonga byayo. Kandi n’umuriro wo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwigisha abantu bayo, n’Ibisonga byayo. Kandi n’umurimo wo kwigisha abantu b’Umwami wacu, no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubahugura, no kubagaburira, no kubatunga, kuko ari umukumbi wa Kristo muzaragira; kandi hamwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ibyo umurimo wanyu n’ugushaka intama za Kristo zatanye, n’abana be bari muri iyi sim bi, ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakizwe na Kristo iteka ryose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni cyo gituma mukwiriye kujya mwibuka ubudasiba, yuko abo muragijwe ari ab’igiciro cyinshi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyane, kuko ari intama za Kristo yacunguje urupfu rwe akabavira amaraso. Itorero mukwiriye gukorera ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umugeni we kandi umubiri we. Kandi umwete wanyu muke watuma iryo Torero cyangwa umuntu umwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wo muri ryo agira icy’aba, cyangwa abuzwa guca mu nzira y’Imana, muzi yuko mwaba mukoze icyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gikomeye mukazacirwa urubanza rukomeye ruteye ubwoba. Ni cyo gituma mukwiriye kwibwira cyane
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: icyo muherwa kugabura kwanyu kugaburira abana b’Imana, ni bo mugeni wa Kristo, kandi umubiri we;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bibatere gukomeza imihati yanyu n’umwete wanyu, ntimurorere na hato, mutarakora ibyo mushobora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose ngo mutunganye abo muragijwe bose, bateranirizwe hamwe bizera kumwe, bamenya kumwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana. Kandi ntimurorere, bataragera bose kuba abantu bakuru no ku rugero rw’ubwinshi bwo kuzura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwa Kristo, kandi batarakurwaho ubuyobe mu by’Imana bwose n’ingeso mbi zose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubwo umurimo wanyu ari mwiza utyo, ariko kandi ukarushya, numenye yuko mukwiriye kujya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muhirimbanira cyane kwerekana ishimwe mushimira Umwami wacu, yuko yabahaye umurimo ukomeye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: utyo, kandi muhirimbanire kwirinda gucumura ku Mana ubwanyu cyangwa gutera abanda
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuyicumuraho. Ariko ubwanyu ntimuzabasha gukundisha umutima wanyu kugira umwete ungana utyo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuko Imana yonyine ari yo itanga umutima ubishaka n’imbaraga zibishobora. Ni cyo gituma mukwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira umwete mwinshi wo kuyisaba Umwuka wayo Wera. Kandi ubwo umurimo wanyu ukomeye ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uwo kuyobora abantu inzira y’agakiza kadashira, ntimwawubasha na hato mudakura kwigisha kwanyu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu Byanditswe Byera, kandi mutagira ingeso zihura na byo. Nuko mukwiriye kujya mugira umwete
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mwinshi wo kubisoma no kubyiga, kandi n’ingezo zanyu n’iz’abanyu mukwiriye guhirimbanira cyane
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuzihuza n’ibitegekwa n’ibyo Byanditswe. Kandi ku bw’iyo mpamvu, uko mushobora, mukwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwitandukanya n’iby’iyi si hamwe n’ubwenge bwayo, byatuma umuntu ahagaruka umutima.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Twiringiye yuko mwarangije kera gutekereza kuri ibyo byose, mukabyibwira cyane gutekereza kuri ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose, mukabyibwira cyane, kandi yuko mwagambiriye guhugukira mu murimo Imana yabahamagariye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukora ku bw’ubuntu bwayo. Twiringiye yuko iyo migambi yanyu izatuma muwuhirimbanira wonyine,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akaba ari wo muruhira, ibyabafasha kuwukora bikaba ari byo byonyine mushaka kwiga. Kandi twiringiye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yuko muzajya musaba Imana Data wa twese mu Izina ry’Umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo, ni we Muhuza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’Imana n’abantu, ngo ibahe Umwuka Wera, abafashe, abahe imbaraga ze ziva mu ijuru, kugira ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kujya musoma mwitegereza Ibyanditswe Byera, uko bukeye, gutume muhinduka abahanga b’ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: guhereza kwanyu, mukazihuza n’amategeko ya Kristo n’imyigishirize ye, bitume muhinduka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyitegererezo byiza bishimwa n’Imana byo gukurikizwa n’abo mwigisha.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Noneho ndashaka ko imigambi yanyu myiza yo kujya mukora ibyo igaragarira iri teraniro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ry’abakundwa na Kristo riteraniye hano, namwe mukarushaho gukundishwa kubikora n’isezerano
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mugiye gusezerana none. Ni cyo gitumye mbategeka gusubirisha amagambo yeruye ibyo ngiye kubabaza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu Izina ry’Imana no mu ry’Itorero ryayo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni byo nibwira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Wemeye rwose yuko Ibyanditswe Byera birimo kwigisha kose gukwiriyye kwemerwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi:  Wibwira yuko wahamagiriwe by’ukuri umurimo n’ubuhereza bw’Ubupastori mu Itorero,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: uko Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo ashaka, kandi uko Itorero ryacu ryategetse.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kubaza:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’abashaka agakiza kadashira gaheshwa no kwizera Yesu Kristo, kandi yuko ari ntakundi umuntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akwiriye guhatwa kwemera, ngo atabyemeye ntiyakira? Ugambiriye rwose kwigisha abo uragijwe ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Byanditswe? Kandi wemeye kutagira ikindi cyose kidahamywa na byo wakwigisha ugahamya ko ari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngombwa ku muntu ushaka gukizwa, keretse ibihamirizwa muri byo?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nzajya mbikora, Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uzitegura kujya ugira umwete rwose wo kubuza imyigishirize yose y’inzaduka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nemeye ntyo, kandi ngambiriye ntyo, niringiye Ubuntu bw’Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko rero uzajya ugira umwete rwose wo kwigisha imyigishirize ya Kristo, gutanga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kubaza:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amasakaramento ye no gutoza abantu amategeko ye, nk’uko yategetse ubwe, kandi nk’uko iri Torero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryemera, kugira ngo wigishe abo uragijwe kugira umwete wo kubyitondera?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kubaza:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’iy’ibinyoma inyurana n’Ijambo ry’Imana? Kandi uzitegura kujya uhana ugahugura abazima n’abarwayi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: na bo, mwiherereye no ku mugaragaro, uko uzabona ko bikwiriye, ukabona uburyo?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nzajya mbikora, Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kubaza:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uzagira umwete wo gusenga no gusoma Ibyanditwe Byera, no kwiga ibigufasha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwitegereza ibyo Byanditswe, uretse guhirimbanira iby’iyi si n’iby’umubiri?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kubaza:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo yigishije, kugira ngo mufatanije mubere umukumbi wa Kristo icyitegererezo cyiza nk’uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mushoboye rwose?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:
verses.speaker: congregation
