verses.text: Nzajya ngerageza ntyo, Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uzagira umwete wo gutunganya ingeso zawe ubwawe n’iz’abo mu rugo rwawe, nk’uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nzahirimbanira kugenza ntyo, Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uzajya ushyira imbere, nk’uko ushoboye rwose, umubano mwiza n’amahoro n’urukundo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kubaza:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu Bakristo bose, cyane cyane mu bo uragijwe?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Kubaza:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubukuru bwo kugutegeka, wemeye ko bakuyobora mu by’Imana unezerewe kandi udahatwa?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nzajya ngenza ntyo, Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Nzajya ngenza ntyo, Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uzajya wubaha Umwepiskopi wawe, kandi umwumvira n’abandi Bahereza bakuru bafite
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Umwepiskopi ahaguruke, avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: IMANA ishobora byose, yabakundishije gukora ibyo byose, ibahe n’imbaraga zibabashisha kubikora,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugira ngo isohoze umurimo yatangiye muri mwe. Mbisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bakurikizeho gusaba Imana, kugira ngo ibyo byose Imana ibisohoze, bayisabishe imitima yabo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi kugira ngo bayisabe batyo, bamare umwanya bacecetse.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze abagiye kurobanurwa bagipfukamye, Umwepiskopi avuge iyi ndirimbo, cyangwa ayiririmbe,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ayifatanije n’Abakuru n’abandi bahari.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NGWINO, MWUKA WERA.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 1  Ngwino, Mwuka Wera, ngwino
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umurimo wawe utuvugutire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni wowe ukunda guha abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bagusabye impano zawe nyinshi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni Wowe utanga ubugingo, ni wowe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Utanga gukundana kwiza kwinshi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: N’amahoro n’ibyishimo byinshi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 2  Amaso yacu atareba,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mugabyi w’umucyo uyahwejeshe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abandujwe n’ibyaha utweze,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Utwogeshe Ubuntu bwawe bwinshi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uturinde ababisha ubwo ari Wowe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Muyobora wacu, dushire ubwoba ;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nta kibi cyatugeraho rwose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 3  Data wa twese n’Umwana,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nawe, Mwuka Wera, muri Imana imwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Utwigishe ibyo kugira ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tujye turirimba iteka ryose,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tuti, Ubwiza butagira akagero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bw’Ubutatu bwera, turabushima;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni bwo Mana Rurema dusenga.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi akurikizeho kuvuga atya ati :
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Dusenge
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, turagushimira yuko urukundo rwawe rutagira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akagero no kugira neza kwawe kwinshi cyane byatuye uduha Yesu Kristo Umwana wawe w’ikinege
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ukunda cyane, kugira ngo atubere Umucunguzi kandi Umuremyi w’ubugingo buhoraho. Kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gucungurwa kwacu yarangirishije urupfu rwe si ko konyine tugushimira ariko kandi, Mwami Mana,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turagushimira yuko, amaze kuzamuka ajya mu ijuru, yohereje mu isi intumwa ze n’abahanuzi be
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’abungeri be n’ababwiriza b’ubutumwa bwe n’abigisha n’abungeri be, agateranisha hamwe imiruho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yabo umukumbi mwinshi cyane wo kogeza ishimwe ridashira ry’Izina ryawe ryera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi nk’uko abantu baguhindukiriye ahandi benshi mu isi, niko n’ino I Rwanda hari umukumbi wawe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo byiza byose watugiriye ku bwo kugira neza kwawe kudashira, turabiguhimbariza ; kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turagushimira yuko wemeye guhamagarira n’aba bagaragu bawe, kugira ngo basangire na ba bandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umurimo wategekeye gukiza abari mu isi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi turakwingize, ku bw’uwo Mwana wawe ushimwa kuduha twese kwerekanisha ingeso zacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ishimwe tugushimira ibyo byiza n’ibindi watugiriye byose, tukagwiza iminsi yose kukumenya no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kukwizera, tubiheshwa n’Umwuka wawe Wera. Tubisabye kugira ngo aba bahereza b’ibyawe n’abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bazategekwa guhereza bafatanye gushimisha Izina ryawe ryera no kwagurisha Yesu Kristo Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amaze kuvuga atyo, Umwepiskopi n’Abapastori bahari bafatanye kurambika ibiganza byabo ku
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: mutwe w’umuntu wese urobanurirwa Ubupastori, apfukamye ; akiri aho, Umwepiskopi ahereko avuge
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: atya, ati
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UHABWE Umwuka Wera wo kukubashisha Ubukuru n’umurimo by’Ubupastori mu Itorero ry’Imana,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: tubiguhesheje kukurambikaho ibiganza byacu. Abo uzababarira ibyaha bose bazaba babibabariwe, abo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: utazabibabarira bazaba batabibabariwe. Kandi ujye uba umugabura wizerwa w’Ijambo ry’Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Amasakaramento yayo yera. Mbivuze mu Izina Data wa twese n’iry’Umwana n’iry’Umwuka Wera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi akurikizeho kubahereza umwe-umwe Igitabo cy’Imana, amubwire atya ati
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UHABWE ubushobozi bwo kubwiriza Ijambo ry’Imana, n’ubwo kugabura Amasakaramento yera mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bupastori uzaba utumwemo.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Hanyuma y’ibyo bavuge Kwemera kwo mu Igaburo ryera ; Umwepiskopi akurikizeho ibindi byaryo ;
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: abarobanuwe bakomeze bapfukame aho bari, kugeza ubwo barangiza kugaburirwa. Ni barangiza
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: amasengesho yose, bakurikireho aya :
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NYAGASANI, turagusaba kugira ngo urukundo rwawe n’ubuntu bwawe bidushorere mu byo dukora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose, kandi udufashe kujya twunguka mu byo tugukorera, kugira ngo muri Wowe umurimo wacu wose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abe ari ho utangirira, abe ari ho ukomerezwa, kandi abe ari ho urangirizwa, bitume duhesha Izina ryawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryera icyubahiro, kandi natwe hanyuma duhabwe ubugingo buhoraho ku bw’imbabazi zawe. Tubisabye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu Izina ryawe Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: AMAHORO Imana itanga, aruta ayo umuntu wese yakwibgira, ajye arinda imitima yanyu n’ubwenge
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwanyu, kugira ngo mukomeze kumenya no gukunda Imana n’Umwana wayo Yesu Kristo Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi Umugisha w’Imana ishobora byose, Data wa twese, n’Umwana n’Umwuka Wera, ube muri mwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi ugumane namwe Iminsi yose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Niba hariho kurobanura Abadikoni n’Abapaastori ku munsi umwe, Abadikoni abe ari bo babanza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuzanwa, maze Abapastori bakurikireho; gusoma Litani rimwe biba birangirije bose. Amasengesho
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: yambi avugwe, irya mbere n’iry’Abadikoni, irya kabiri n’iry’Abapastori. Urwandiko rwo gusomwa rube
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: mu Befeso 4:7-13, nk’uko rurri mu byo kurobanura Abapastori. Ni bamara kurusoma, abagiye
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: kurobanurirwa Ubudikoni abe ari bo babazwa, barobanurwe bakurikije ibyanditswe haruguru. Hanyuma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’ibyo umwe muri bo n’amara gusoma Ubutumwa bwo muri Matayo 9:36-38, nk’uko biri mu kurobanura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abapastori, cyangwa ubwo muri Luka 12:35-38, nk’uko biri mu byo kurobanura Abadikoni, abo
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: kurobanurirwa Ubupastori abe ari bo babazwa, bakurikije ibyanditswe haruguru.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UBURYO BWO KUROBANURA
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ABEPISKOPI
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Uko Kurobanura gukwiriye gukorwa ku munsi w’icyumweru, cyangwa ku wundi munsi mukuru
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibintu byose ni bimara gutegurwa mu rusengero, nyuma yo Gusenga kwa mugitondo, Umwepiskopi
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: utegeka abanda, cyangwa undi utoranijwe, abanze asome iby’Igaburo ryera, birimo iri sengesho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isengesho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, tuzi yuko kera wahaye Intumwa zawe zera impano nyinshi kandi nziza,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubizihesha Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo, ukazihanangiriza kuragira umukumbi wawe; none
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: turakwingingira Abepiskopi abaragira Itorero ryawe, ngo ubahe imbabazi zituma bashishikarira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kubwiriza Ijambo ryawe, no gutegeka neza Itorero, rikuyoboke kandi rikubahe. Kandi abantu bose ubahe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kumvira amategeko yawe, ngo hanyuma bazahabwe ikamba ry’icyubahiro kitazashira. Tubisabye mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma undi Mwepiskopi asome ibyo mu Nzandiko.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: 1TIMOTEO 3:1-7
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Cyangwa iki gice mu cyimbo cy’Urwandiko.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IBYAKOZWE N’INTUMWA 20:17-35
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Hanyuma undi Mwepiskopi asome icyo mu Butumwa
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: YOHANA 21:15-17
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Cyangwa iki-
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Cyangwa iki-
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: YOHANA 20:19-23
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MATAYO 28:18-20
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Ni bamara gusoma Ubutumwa, bakavuga ibyo kKwemera kw’I Nike, no kubwiriza, Utoranijwe kuba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi azanwe n’Abepiskopi abiri, bamushyire Umwepiskopi mukuru w’icyo gihugu, (cyangwa
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: undi Mwepiskopi utoranirijwe uwo murimo, nk’uko amategeko ategeka), yicaye kuntebe ye hafi y’Ameza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yera; hanyuma Abepiskopi bamuzanye bavuge bati,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MUBYEYI wubahwa wo mu Mana, tukuzanie uyu muntu wubaha Imana kandi wigishijwe neza, kugira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo umurobanurire kuba Umwepiskopi.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Hanyuma Umwepiskopi mukuru yake urwandiko rumuha uburenganzira bwo kurobanura uwo muntu,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ategeke ku rusomwa. Ni bamara kurusoma, barahize uwo muntu indahiro yo guhora yumvira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi mukuru.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: INDAHIRO YO KUMVIRA UMWEPISKOPI MUKURU
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Mu izina ry’Imana. Amen. Jyewe Kanaka uwatoranijwe kuba Umwepiskopi w’Itorero Angilikani mu
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Rwanda, nemeye kandi nsezeranye guhora nubaha kandi numvira Umwepiskopi mukuru w’iki gihugu
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: kanaka n’abazamuzungura, nk’uko bikwiriye. Imana imfashe kubisohoza, ku bwa Yesu Kristo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma Umwepiskopi mukuru abwire abantu bateraniye aho gusenga ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: BENE DATA, mu Butumwa bwa Luka wera handitswe ngo, Umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo, ataratoranya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: intumwa ze cumi n’ebyiri kuzituma, yakesheje ijoro asenga. Kandi handitswe mu Byakozwe n’Intumwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngo, Abigishwa bo muri Antiyokiya, batarashyira ibiganza kuri Pawulo na Barunaba kubatuma, biyirije
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubusa basenga. None natwe dukurikize icyitegererezo cy’Umukiza wacu Kristo n’Intumwa ze, tubanze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: dusenge, tutararobanura uyu muntu batuzaniye, tukamutuma gukora umurimo, twiringira yuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwuka Wera ari we wawumuhamagariye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma basome Litani, nk’uko byanditswe mu byo Kurobanura Abadikoni; ariko ni bamara gusenga
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bati, “Emera kumurikishiriza Abepiskopi n’ibindi”, mu cimbo cyo gusabira Abapastori n’Abadikoni,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: bavuge iri sengesho:
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: EMERA guha umugisha mwene Data uyu utoranijwe, no kumwambika imbabazi zawe, zitume akora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: neza umurimo wamuhamagariye, ngo Itorero ryawe ryubakwe, n’Izina ryawe risingizwe rishimwe, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rihabwe icyubahiro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu: Mwami mwiza, turakwinginze, utwumvire.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Ni bamara kuvuga Litani, basenge iri sengesho:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, Umugabyi w’ibyiza byose, wategekesheje Umwuka wawe Wera kugabira Itorero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryawe Abahereza b’uburyo butari bumwe; none turakwingize, urebane imbabazi uyu mugaragu wawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uhamagariwe umurimo n’ubuhereza by’Umwepiskopi, ugwize muri we imyigishirize yawe y’Ukuri, kandi
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: umurimbishishe ingeso nziza zitagira inenge, bizatume ajya aguhereza muri ubu Buhereza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ubunyangamugayo mu byo avuga no mu byo akora, ngo Izina ryawe rihabwe icyubahiro, n’Itorero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryawe ryubakwe kandi ritegekwe neza; ribiheshwe n’ubwiza bw’Umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo, ubana nawe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi utegekana nawe n’Umwuka Wera ibihe bidashira. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma Umwepiskopi mukuru, yicaye mu ntebe ye, abwire uwo muntu ugiye kurobanura ati:
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: MWENE Data, uzi yuko Ibyanditswe Byera na za Kanoni za kera bidutegeka kutihutira kurambika ibiganza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ku muntu wese ushaka guhabwa Ubutegetsi mu Itorero rya Krist, kandi uzi ko igiciro yatanze kurigura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Atari gito, ahubwo ari kinini cyane, ndetse n’amaraso ye yavuye. Ni cyo gitumye nshaka kubanza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kukubaza amagambo amwe, ntarakugabira uwo murimo, ngo abantu bateraniye aha babone kumva uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umaramaje kugenza mu Itorero ry’Imana, bakaba abagabo bo kubihamya.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi:    Wemeye neza yuko wahamagariwe ubu Buhereza nyakuri, nk’uko Umwami wacu Yesu
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kristo ashaka?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:   Nemeye ntyo
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umwepiskopi:   Wemeye neza yuko Ibyanditswe Byera birimo imyigishirize yose ishobora kurangiza
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: rimwe gukiza umuntu, agaheshwa agakiza kadashira no kwizera Yesu Kristo? Kandi umaramaje rwose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kujya wigisha abantu uzaragizwa ibyo Byanditswe Byera, no kutagira ikindi cyose wigisha ugahamya ko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ari ngombwa guhesha abantu agakiza gahoraho, keretse ibihamywa n’ibyo Byanditswe?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:  Ni byo nemeye, kandi maramaje gukora ntyo kubw’ubuntu bw’Imana
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umwepiskopi: Wemeye gushishikarira gusoma ibyo Byanditswe Byera no kudacogora, ugasaba Imana,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: iyo usenze, kugufasha kubisobanukirwa neza, bitume ushobozwa na byo kwigisha abantu imyigishirize
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: myiza no kubihanangiriza no kubitsindisha ababihakanya, ndetse ukabibemeze?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:      Nemeye gukora ntyo, mfashijwe n’Imana.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umwepiskopi:   Witeguye kuba umwiringirwa, ukagira umwete wose wo gutsemba imyigishirize yose
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: y’ubuyobe kandi y’inzaduka inyurana n’Ijambo ry’Imana; no kubwira abantu mu mubonano no ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mugaragaro kwanga iyo myigishirize, no kubahugura kugira ngo bayigenze nkawe?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:     Niteguye gukora ntyo, Umwami wacu ari Umufasha wanjye
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umwepiskopi:      Wemeye kwanga kutubaha Imana kose, n’irari ryose ry’iyi si, ngo ubone kumara iminsi
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ukiri muri iyi si wirinda, ukiranuka, kandi wubaha Imana; maze ubere abanda icyitegererezo mu ngeso
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: zawe nziza, ukwanze wese afatwe n’isoni, abure urwitwazo rwo kukurega?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza      Nzajya ngenza ntyo, Umwami wacu ari Umufasha wanjye
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umwepiskopi:   Wemeye kurinda no kugwiza mu bantu gutuza no gukundana n’amahoro, nk’uko
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ushoboye; kandi abo mu Bwepiskopi bwawe, abatera imivurungano n’abatayumvira n’abanyangeso mbi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wemeye kubacyaha no kubahana, nk’uko ububasha buri uhabwa n’Ijambo ry’Imana n’Amategeko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’Itorero?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:   Nemeye gukora ntyo, mfashijwe n’Imana
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umwepiskopi:   Wemeye kuba inyangamugayo, iyo urobanura abantu, n’iyo ubatuma, kandi iyo
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ubashyiraho ibiganza?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:   Ni ko nzajya mba, mfashijwe n’Imana.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umwepiskopi:  Wemeye kwerekana ubugwaneza, no gufata neza abakene n’indushyi, n’abanyamahanga
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: badafite gifasha, ukabagirira imbabazi ku bwa Kristo?
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza:    Nemeye kwiyerekana ntyo, mfashijwe n’Imana.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Hanyuma Umwepiskopi mukuru ahaguruke, avuge ati:
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: IMANA ishobora byose, Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, waguhaye umutima mwiza wemeye gusohoza ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose, ajye aguha imbaraga n’ububasha byo kubishyitsa rwose, abone kurangiriza muri wowe umurimo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yatangiye, kugira ngo ku munsi w’imperuka uzaboneke utunganye rwose, kandi utabonetseho umugayo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Urobanurwa kuba Umwepiskopi asubire mu cyumba hirya, yambare indi myambaro
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: y’Umwepiskopi isigaye:  n’amara kuyambara, asubire ku Mwepiskopi mukuru, amupfukamire imbere,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: uwo Mwepiskopi n’abandi bari kumwe bavuge indirimbo yitwa” Veni Creator”
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NGWINO, MWUKA WERA.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 1.  Ngwino, Mwuka Wera, ngwino
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umurimo wawe utuvugutire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni wowe ukunda guha abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bagusabye impano zawe nyinshi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni Wowe utanga ubugingo, ni wowe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Utanga gukundana kwiza kwinshi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: N’amahoro n’ibyishimo byinshi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 2.  Amaso yacu atareba,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mugabyi w’umucyo uyahwejeshe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abandujwe n’ibyaha utweze,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Utwogeshe Ubuntu bwawe bwinshi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Uturinde ababisha ubwo ari Wowe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Muyobora wacu, dushire ubwoba ;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nta kibi cyatugeraho rwose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 3.  Data wa twese n’Umwana,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nawe, Mwuka Wera, muri Imana imwe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Utwigishe ibyo kugira ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tujye turirimba iteka ryose,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tuti, Ubwiza butagira akagero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Bw’Ubutatu bwera, turabushima;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni bwo Mana Rurema dusenga.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni bamara kuyirirmba, Umwepiskopi mukuru avuge ati :
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Mwami wacu, umva ibyo tugusaba ;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gusubiza :  Kandi no gutabaza kwacu ukumve.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: Umwepiskopi :
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Dusenge.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: MANA ishobora byose, Data wa twese w’imbabazi nyinshi, turagushimiye kuko, ku bw’urukundo rwawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rutagira akagero, waduhaye Umwana wawe w’ikinege ukunda cyane, Yesu Kristo, katubera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umucungunzi, kandi Umuhesha w’ubugingo budashira ; kandi arangije kuducunguza rwose urupfu rwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: arazamuka, ajya mu ijuru ; agezeyo, asesekaza ku bantu impano ze, bamwe abagira intumwa, abandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abahanuzi, abandi ababwiriza b’ubutumwa, n’abandi abapastori n’abigisha, ngo abone kubaka Itorero
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: rye no kuritunganya rwose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: None turakwinginga ngo uhe uyu mugaragu wawe imbabazi, zitume ahora yiteguye gukwiza hose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubutumwa bwawe bwiza, ni bwo magambo anezeza cyane, ahamya ibyo kuzura nawe, kandi akoreshe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubutware umuhaye gukiza abantu si ukubarimbura, kubafasha si ukubababaza, kandi ajye agaburira abo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: muryango wawe ibibakwiriye ; hanyuma ku munsi w’imperuka azabone kwakirwa, atahe mu munezero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: udashira, ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu ubana nawe, kandi utegekana nawe n’Umwuka Wera ibihe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma Umwepiskopi mukuru n’abandi Bepiskopi bahari barambike ibiganza ku mutwe
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: w’Umwepiskopi mushya ubapfukamiye imbere, Umukuru avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UHABWE Umwuka Wera, ubone guhabwa Ubukuru n’Umurimo by’Umwepiskopi mu Itorero ry’Imana,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ibyo uheshejwe no kurambikwaho ibiganza byacu, mu Izina rya Data wa twese, n’iry’Umwana,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’iry’Umwuka Wera. Kandi ujye wibuka kwenyegeza imbabazi z’Imana uheshejwe no kurambikwaho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibiganza byacu ; kuko Imana itaduhaye umwuka w’ubwoba, ahubwo yaduhaye uw’imbaraga n’urukundo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: no kwirinda.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Maze Umwepiskopi mukuru amuhe Bibiliya, avuge ati,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: UJYE ushyiraho umwete gusoma iby’Imana, no guhugura abantu, no kubigisha imyigishirize y’idini yacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ujye utekereza ku byanditswemo ; ubigirire umwete, kugira ngo ibyo wungukamo bigaragarire abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bose. Wirinde, kandi ushyire umwete ku myigishirize yacu, maze ushishikarire kuyishyitsa ; kuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ugenza utyo, uzikizanya n’abazakumva. Ujye ubera umukumbi wa Kriato umwungeri, si isega ; intama
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ze uziragire, ntuziconcomere. Ramira abanyantegenke, kiza abarwayi, abavunitse ubunge, garura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abaciwe, kandi abazimiye ubashake. Tegekesha imbaraga, ariko ntiwibagirwe imbabazi ; maze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwungeri mukuru niyerekanwa, uzahabwe ikamba ry’icyubahiro ritangirika. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma Umwepiskopi mukuru akomeze iby’Igaburo ryera, Umwepiskopi mushya agaburirwa ibyo
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: kurya by’Umwami wacu hamwe n’abandi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mu cyimbo cy’Isengesho riheruka basenge aya:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: DATA wa twese w’imbabazi nyinshi, turakwinginze usuke kuri uyu mugaragu wawe umugisha wawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uvuye mu ijuru, kandi umwuzuze Umwuka wawe Wera, kugira ngo, iyo abwiriza Ijambo ryawe, agire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umwete wo gucyaha abantu no kubihanangariza, no kubahana, kandi no kubigisha imyigishirize
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abihanganisha rwose, Kandi si cyo cyo nyine, abere abizera icyitegererezo cyiza mu byo avuga no mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ngeso ze nziza, no mu rukundo, no mu byo twizera, no ku kwirinda, kandi no gutungana rwose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hanyuma n’arangiza neza urugendo rwe, ku munsi w’imperuka abone kuzahabwa ikamba
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: ry’Ubukiranutsi, aryambitswe n’Umuca-manza ukiranuka, ubana nawe, kandi utegekana nawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Umwuka Wera, muri Imana imwe, ibihe bitazashira. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NYAGASANI, turagusaba kugira ngo urukundo rwawe n’ubuntu bwawe bidushorere mu byo dukora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byose, kandi udufashe kujya twunguka mu byo tugukorera, kugira ngo muri Wowe umurimo wacu wose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abe ari ho utangirira, abe ari ho ukomerezwa, kandi abe ari ho urangirizwa, bitume duhesha Izina ryawe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ryera icyubahiro, kandi natwe hanyuma tuzahabwe ubugingo buhoraho ku bw’imabazi zawe. Tubisabye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu Izina ryawe Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: AMAHORO Imana itanga, aruta ayo umuntu wese yakwibwira, ajye arinda imitima yanyu n’ubwenge
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bwanyu, kugira ngo mukomeze kumenya no gukunda Imana n’Umwana wayo Yesu Kristo Umwami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi Umugisha w’Imana ishobora byose, Data wa twese, n’Umwana n’Umwuka Wera, ube muri mwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi ugumane namwe Iminsi yose. Amen
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: INGINGO Z’IBYO TWIZERA
verses.speaker: all

sections.title: Ingingo z'Ibyo Twizera
sections.description: Ingingo makumyabiri n'cumi n'icyenda z'Ibyo Twizera, zemewe n'Itorero ry'Ubwongereza mu 1562.

verses.text: Izi Ngingo z’ibyo twizera zemewe n’Abepiskopi b’Itorero ry’I Bwongereza mu mwaka 1562, ubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umugabekazi Elisabeti ari ku ngoma y’I Bwongereza. (reba Ingingo 36)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ingingo 1
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga ibyo kwizera Ubutatu bwera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: HARIHO Imana imwe yonyine, ibaho kandi y’ukuri, ihoraho idafite umubiri cyangwa ingingo, haba no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gutegekwa na kamere y’abantu. Ubushobozi bwayo, n’ubwenge bwayo, no kugira-neza kwayo ntibigira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akagero. Niyo Muremyi w’ibintu byose, bigaragara n’ibitagaragara, kandi umurinzi wabyo. Mu bumwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw’ubwo Bumana harimo Abaperisona batatu, basangiye akamero kamwe n’ubushobozi bumwe, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bose uko ari batatu ntabwo bazashira. Abo Baperisona ni Data wa twese n’Umwana n’Umwuka Wera.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.title: Ingingo 2

verses.text: Ingingo 2
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga Ijambo ry’Imana, niryo Mwana wayo wahindutse umuntu nyamuntu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMWANA w’Imana, ni we Jambo rya Data wa twese, yahoze ari Umwana wayo uhereye kera kose, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana nyamana idashira; yari afite akamero kamwe n’aka Data wa twese, Yishyiriyeho kamere y’umuntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu nda yaw a Mwari ushimwa, ayikuye mu kamero ke. Ni cyo cyatumye kamer ebyiri, nizo Bumana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Ubuntu, zifatanira muri Perisona umwe, zitazatandukanywa ukundi, zigahinduka Kristo umwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ufatanije kuba Imana nyamana, kandi Umuntu nyamuntu. Kristo uwo yababarijwe by’ukuri, abambirwa,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: apfira kugira ngo atwuzuze na Se, kandi ngo abe igitambo kitatambiwe ibyaha abantu bavukanye gusa,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ariko kandi cyatambiwe n’ibyo bakoze ubwabo.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ivuga Ijambo ry’Imana, niryo Mwana wayo wahindutse umuntu nyamuntu.

chapters.title: Ingingo 3

verses.text: Ingingo 3
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga ibyo Kumanuka kwa Kristo, ajya I Kizimu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NKUKO twemeye yuko Kristo yadupfriye, agahambwa, niko dukwiriye no kwemera yuko yamanutse,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akajya I Kuzimu.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ivuga ibyo Kumanuka kwa Kristo, ajya I Kizimu.

verses.text: Ingingo 4
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga ibyo Kuzuka kwa Kristo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NI UKURI koko Kristo yarazutse, asubirana umubiri we ufite inyama n’amagufa n’ibindi byose ibikwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kamere y’umuntu ishyitse; arabizamukana, abijyana mu ijuru, aho yicaye, kugeza aho azagarukira, aje
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gucira abantu imanza ku munsi w’imperuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ingingo 5
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Vuga iby’Umwuka Wera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UMWUKA Wera ukomoka kuri Data wa twese no ku Mwana, afite akamero kamwe n’aka Data wa twese
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Umwana, afite icyubahiro n’ubwiza bimwe n’ibyabo; kandi ari Imana nyamana ihoraho.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.title: Ingingo 6

verses.text: Ingingo 6
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Vuga yuko Ibyanditswe Byera birimo byose bikwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kwemerwa ngo dukizwe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyanditswe Byea birimo amagambo yose dukwiriye kwemera ngo dukwize. Ni cyo gituma ari nta kintu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuntu akwiriye guhatwa kwemera ko ari ngombwa kumuhesha agakiza, kitaboneka muri byo; cyangwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bitagihamya. Iyo tuvuze Ibyanditswe Byera, tuba tuvuze ibitabo byemewe muri Canoni z’Itorero byo mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isezerano rya kera n’irishya, Itorero ritigeze gushidikanya ko bidafite ubutware bw’Imana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amazina n’umubare by’ibitabo byo mu isezerano rya kera byemewe n’ibi:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Itangiriro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kuva
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abalevi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kubara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 2 Ibyo ku Ngoma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ezira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nehemiya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Esiteri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gutegeka kwa kabiri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yosuwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abacamanza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Rusi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 1 Samweli
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 2 Samweli
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 1 Abami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 2 Abami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 1 Ibyo ku ngoma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yobu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Zaburi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imigani
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umubgiriza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Indirimbo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abahanuzi bakuru (Yesaya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Yeremiya, Ezekiyeli na Daniyeli)
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abahanuzi bato cumi na babiri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibitabo byo muri Kanoni n’ibitabo byemewe na Sinode nkuru y’Itorero yabayeho mu mwaka 397 A.D.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Hariho n’ibindi bitabo Itorero risoma, nk’uko Hieronumo yavuze, kugira ngo bibeshe abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyitegererezo b’ibyo bakwiriye gukora, bibigishe ingeso nziza; ariko Itorero ntiribikuramo icyo ryigisha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kigaragazwa na byo byonyine. Ibitabo tuvuze n’ibi:
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Icya Ezera 3 na 4; Icya Tobiti; Icya Yuditi; Ibice byongewe ku gitabo; Icya Baruki umuhanuzi; Indirimbo ya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ba bana batatu; Igitekerezo cya Susana; Icya Belu n’Ikiyoka; Gusenga kwa Manase; Igitabo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cy’Abamakabayo 1 na 2.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibitabo byo mu Isezerano rishya byemewe n’abandi Bakristo bose, tubyemera byose, twemera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ko bifite ubutware bw’Imana.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Vuga yuko Ibyanditswe Byera birimo byose bikwiriye

verses.text: Ingingo 7
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga iby’isezerano rya kera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ISEZERANO rya Kera ntirinyurana n’Irishya, kuko ayo Masezerano yombi ahamya yuko Kristo abwira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abantu ko yemeye kubaha Ubugingo buhoraho, kandi ni we Muhuza wenyine w’Imana n’abantu, kuko
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: asangiye kuba Imana n’Umuntu. Ni cyo gituma tudakwiriye kumvira abatubeshya ngo basogokuruza bo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu gihe cy’Isezerano rya kera bategerezaga amasezerano y’igihe gito gusa. Twemeye yuko mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mategeko Mose yahawe n’Imana gushyiraho, amategeko avuga iby’ibitambo n’iby’uburyo bwo gusenga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ibisa bityo adategeka Abakristo; kandi ko amategeko ya Mose ategeka iby’ubwami n’iby’imanza n’ibisa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bityo adakwiriye rwose kwemerwa n’ubwami bwose bw’Abakristo. Ariko nubwo bimeze bityo, nta
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Mukristo n’umwe udakwiriye kumvira amategeko ya Mose avuga iby’ingeso z’abantu n’ibyo bakwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ku Mana.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.title: Ingingo 8

verses.text: Ingingo 8
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga ku byo Kwemera k’uburyo butatu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: KWEMERA kwacu ko mu buryo butatu, ukw’I Nike, ukwa Atanasiyo, n’ukw’Intumwa, gukwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwemerwa rwose, kuko guhamirishijwe amagambo yo mu Byanditswe Byera, ari ntawe ugushidikanya.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ivuga ku byo Kwemera k’uburyo butatu

verses.text: Ingingo 9
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga iby’Ibyaha bya Kavukire
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IBYAHA bya kavukire si ugukurikiza Adamu (nk’uko abantu ba kera bitwa Abapelagiyo babeshyaga),
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahubwo n’inenge no kwandura bya kamere y’umuntu wese avukana, kuko ari uw’urubyaro rwa Adamu;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bituma abantu baba kure cyane yo gukiranuka kwa kavukire Adamu na Eva bari bafite batarakora icyaha,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi ku bwa kamere yabo ubwayo bashaka gukora ibyaha, kameree iyo igahora yifuza ibyo Umwuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yanga. Ni cyo gituma ibyaha bya kavukire byo mu muntu wese uvukira muri iyi si ari uwo kurakarirwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Imana, akazacirwaho iteka. Kandi uko kwandura kwa kemere guhora no mu babyawe ubwa kabiri;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nicyo gituma kwifuza k’umuntu wa kamere kudategekwa n’amategeko y’Imana. Kandi nubwo abizera
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bakabatizwa batazacirwaho iteka, Intumwa Pawulo yahamije yuko kwifuza ibibi n’irari ryabyo birimo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akarande k’ibyaha.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.title: Ingingo 10

verses.text: Ingingo 10
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ihamya ko umuntu atabasha guhitamo ibyiza adafashijwe n’ubuntu bw’Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UHEREYE igihe Adamu yakoreye icyaha cya mbere, abantu bose bagira kamere ituma umutima
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bavukanye, naho washaka gukora imirimo myiza, utabasha kubahindura ukabemeza kwizera Imana no
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuyambaza. Ni cyo gituma tutabasha gukora imirimo myiza ikundwa, igashimwa n’Imana, keretse
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubuntu bwayo buheshwa na Kristo bwabanza kudufasha, ngo dukunde ibyiza, bugakorana natwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tumaze kubikunda
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ihamya ko umuntu atabasha guhitamo ibyiza adafashijwe n’ubuntu bw’Imana

verses.text: Ingingo 11
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga uko abantu batsindishirizwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: KWIZERA ni ko kuduhesha kubarwaho gukiranuka, tugatsindira urubanza imbere y’Imana ku bw’imirimo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’Umwami wacu kandi Umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo yonyine, Atari ku bw’iyacu na hato. Ni cyo gituma
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abigisha ko dutsindishirizwa no kwizera gusa, baba bigishije ibyiza cyane, bigira umumaro mwinshi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bigahumuriza abantu cyane (nk’uko bivugwa mu magambo menshi mu bibwirizwa b’ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Gutsindishirizwa).
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ingingo 12
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga iby’Imirimo myiza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nta MIRIMO myiza ibasha kudukuzaho ibyaha, kandi yo ntiyabura kuzagawa ku munsi w’urubanza, yuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ifite inenge imbere y’Imana. Ariko niba ari imbuto zo kwizera igakurikira gutsindishirizwa, iba ishimwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Imana ku bwa Kristo, ikayinezeza, kandi kwizera nyakuri kuzima ntiyabura kugukomakaho. Ni cyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gituma ari yo igaragaza kwizera k’ukuri, nk’uko igiti kimenyekanira ku mbuto zacyo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ingingo 13
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga iby’imirimo ikorwa n’abataratsindishirizwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IMIRIMO ikorwa n’umuntu utarahabwa Ubuntu bwa Kristo kandi atarahumekerwaho Umwuka we Wera,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntinezeza Imana, kuko idakomoka ku kwizera Yesu Kristo; kandi ntituma abantu baba bakwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: guhabwa Ubuntu bw’Imana. Ahubwo turahamya yuko irimo akarande k’ibyaha, kuko idakorwa uburyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Imana yashatse, igategeka.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ingingo 14
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga iby’imirimo irenze ibikwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: KWIGISHA yuko umuntu yabasha gukora ibirenze amategeko y’Imana abikoreshwa n’umutima ukunze
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: (nibyo bita imirimo irenze ibikwiriye), kurimo kwibona no kutubaha Imana; kuko abigisha batyo baba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bavuze yuko badakorera Imana ibyo bakwiriye rwose gukora. Ariko Kristo yavuze yeruye ati, Nimumara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukora ibyo mwategetswe byose, muvuge muti, turi abagaragu batagira umumaro. (Luka 17:10)
verses.speaker: all

chapters.title: Ingingo 15

verses.text: Ingingo 15
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ihamya yuko Kristo wenyine atigeze gukora icyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: KUGIRANGO Kristo agire kamere y’umuntu nyakuri, yashushanijwe natwe muri byose, keretse ibyaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byonyine; kandi ibyo ntiyari abifite na hato mu mubiri we haba no mu mutima. Yazanywe mu isi no kuba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwana w’intama utagira inenge cyangwa ibara, no kugira ngo akuzeho ibyaha by’abari mu isi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwitamba rimwe, kandi nk’uko Yohanawera yavuze atya ati “Ntacyaha kimurimo” (1 Yoh 3:5). Ariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abanda twese, naho twabatijwe tukabyarirwa ubwa kabiri muri Kristo, ducumura muri byinshi; kandi ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tuba tuvuze yuko ari nta cyaha dufite, turiyobya, ukuri ntikuri muri twe (1 Yoh 1:8).
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ihamya yuko Kristo wenyine atigeze gukora icyaha

chapters.title: Ingingo 16

verses.text: Ingingo 16
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga iby’ibyaha byakozwe n’umuntu nyuma yo kubatizwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ICYAHA gikomeye cy’icyitumano cyose gikorwa n’uwabatijwe, ntidukwiriye kukibara ko ari icyaha cyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gucumura ku Mwuka Wera kitabasha kubabarirwa. Ni cyo gituma tudakwiriye kuvuga yuko abagushijwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ibyaha bamaze kubatizwa batakibasha guhabwa kwihana. Tumaze guhabwa Umwuka Wera,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: byashoboka ko tuva mu buntu twahawe, tugashukwa n’ibyaha, kandi hanyuma tugaheshwa n’ubuntu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bw’Imana kubyuka, tugahaguruka, tukagendana ingezo nshya nziza. Ni cyo gituma abavuga yuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: batabaha gukora icyaha ukundi bakiri muri iyi si ari abo gutsindwa n’urubanza; kandi abigisha yuko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abihannye by’ukuri batabasha kubabarirwa na bo nuko bwakwiriye gutsindwa n’urubanza.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ivuga iby’ibyaha byakozwe n’umuntu nyuma yo kubatizwa.

chapters.title: Ingingo 17

verses.text: Ingingo 17
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo Imana yagambiriye ku bw’umuntu wese,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ikabimutoraniriza atarabaho.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: UHEREYE kera kose Imana yagambiriye gutegurira abantu ubugingo buhoraho. Ni cyo cyatumye yigira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: inama duhishwa, isi itararemwa, gukiza abo yatoranirije mu bantu muri Kristo, ngo abavaneho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: umuvumo no gucirwaho iteka, ikibazana guheshwa na Kristo agakiza kadashira nk’inzabya zabumbiwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: icyubahiro. Nuko abahawe iyi mpano iruta izindi y’Imana bahamagarwa n’Umwuka wayo, ubakoreramo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu gihe gikwiriye, nk’uko Imana yabigambiriye; bagaheshwa n’ubuntu bwayi kwitaba; bagashushanywa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ishusho y’Umwana wayo Yesu Kristo; bahubahisha Imana gukora imirimo myiza; nyuma bagaheshwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’imbabazi z’Imana ibyishimo bidashira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abo bantu, abubaha Imana, bakumva Umwuka wa Kristo abakoreramo, ababiciramo imirimo ya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kamere n’iy’ingingo zabo z’umubiri, kandi agahesha imitima yabo gucururuka; ikibwira ibyo mu ijuru, ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: batekereza ku by’Imana yagambiriye ubwo yabatoranyaga muri Kristo, bagira ihumure ryinshi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ritarondoreka ku mpamvu ebyiri iya mbere, n’uko ibyo bibakomereza cyane kwizera agakiza kadashira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gaheshwa na Kristo; iya kabiri, ni uko urukundo bakunda Imana rugwira cyane muri bo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nk’uko kwibwira ibyo kuzanira abeza ibyiza byinshi, niko abantu ba kamere, abadafite Umwuka wa
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Kristo, ni bahora bumva yuko Imana yabahamirije gutsindwa n’urubanza, bibagusha mu kaga gakomeye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bituma Satani abona urwitwazo rwo kubihebesha rwose, cyangwa urwo kubatera kwirekura mu byaha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: biteye isoni bikabije, bibashyira mu kaga ko kurimbuka kangana n’akazanwa n’ubwihebe.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko dukwiriye kwemera ibyo Imana yasezeranye, nk’uko tubisoma mu Byanditswe Byera;
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kandi mu byo dukora dukwiriye gukurikira ibyo Imana ishaka, nk’uko byanditswe mu Ijambo ryayo
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ibyo Imana yagambiriye ku bw’umuntu wese,

chapters.title: Ingingo 18

verses.text: Ingingo 18
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga yuko duheshwa agakiza kadashira n’izina rya
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo ryonyine.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: BENE aba n’ibivume, abahangara kuvuga bati, Umuntu azakirishwa n’amategeko cyangwa imyigishirize
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yatura, niba agira umwete wo guhwanya ingezo ze n’ayo mategeko n’ibyo mategeko n’ibyo yigishwa na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kamere ye; kuko Ibyanditswe Byera bitubwira yuko Izina rya Kristo ari ryo ryonyine ribasha gukirisha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abantu
verses.speaker: congregation

chapters.subtitle: Ivuga yuko duheshwa agakiza kadashira n’izina rya

verses.text: Ingingo 19
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga iby’itorero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ITORERO RYA KRISTO rigaragara ni iteraniro ry’abizera, ryigishirizwamo Ijambo ry’Imana ritavanzwe,
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: kandi nigaburirwamo Amasakaramento neza, uburyo buhura n’amategeko ya Kristo, kandi bagakora
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibikwiriye kuyashyitsa byose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nkuko Itorero ry’I Yerusalemu n’iryo mu Alekisandeniya, n’iryo mu Antiyokiya, ryajijwe muri
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bimwe, niko n’iry’I Roma ryajijwe, si mu by’imico yabo n’imisengere yabo gusa, ariko no mu byo bizera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ingingo 20
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga iby’Ubutware bw’Itorero.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ITORERO rifite ubutware bwo gutegeka uburyo abantu basengera mu rusengero n’imihango y’idini,
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: kandi n’ubwo gukiranuka abantu bagize impaka ku byo twizera. Ariko Itorero ntirikwiriye gushyiraho
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibinyurana n’ijambo ry’Imana ryanditswe, haba no gusobanura amagambo amwe yo mu Byanditswe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: uburyo bunyurana n’uko risobanura ayandi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko ubwo twemeye yuko Itorero ari umugabo ubuhamya Ibyanditswe Byera kandi umurinzi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: wabyo, ntirikwiriye gutegeka ibinyurana na byo, nk’uko tuvuze haruguru; kandi ntirikwiriye guhata
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abantu kwemera ikitari muri ibyo Byanditswe cyose, nk’aho batabasha gukizwa batacyemeye.
verses.speaker: congregation

chapters.title: Ingingo 21

verses.text: Ingingo 21
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga iby’Ubutware bw’inkiko z’Abakristo bo mu isi yose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NTA RUKIKO rw’Abakristo bo mu isi yose rubasha guteranywa, abami batabitegetse, kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: batabyemeye. Abo muri izo nkiko, iyo bateranye, babasha kujijwa, kandi rimwe na rimwe barajijwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: koko, ndetse no mu by’Imana, kuko ari iteraniro ry’abantu-bantu, kandi si bose bayoborwa n’Umwuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: w’Imana n’Ijambo ryayo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Nuko rero ibyategetswe na zo ngo ni ngombwa ku bashaka gukizwa, ntibifite ubutware na buke,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: keretse bihamijwe ko byakuwe mu Byanditswe Byera.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ivuga iby’Ubutware bw’inkiko z’Abakristo bo mu isi yose.

verses.text: Ingingo 22
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga ibya Purigatori
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IMYIGISHIRIZE y’Itorero ry’I Roma y’ibya Purigatori, n’iyo kubabarirwa ibyaha na papa, n’iyo gusenga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibishushanyo n’ibintu by’abera ba kera, no kubasaba ngo badusabire, iyo yose ni amagambo y’ubupfu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ibihimbano bitagira umumaro, bidashinze ku magambo yo mu Byanditswe Byera yabasha kubihamya,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahubwo binyurana n’Ijambo ry’Imana.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.title: Ingingo 23

verses.text: Ingingo 23
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga ibyo Kugabura iby’Imana mu Iteraniro ryayo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: AMATEGEKO ntiyemera ko umuntu wese yishyiraho umurimo wo kubwiriza abantu mu rusengero,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyangwa uwo kugaburira Amasakaramento mu Iteraniro ry’Imana, ataratoranywa nk’uko amategeko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yategetse, agatumwa ngo abikore. Kandi dukwiriye gutekeeza yuko abatoranywa nk’uko amategeko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yategetse, ari bo bantu batoranywa, bagahamagarirwa uwo murimo n’abaherewe mu Iteraniro ry’Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubutware bugaragara bwo gutoranya abagabura b’iby’Umwami wacu, bakabatuma mu ruzabibu rwe.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ivuga ibyo Kugabura iby’Imana mu Iteraniro ryayo.

chapters.title: Ingingo 24

verses.text: Ingingo 24
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga ibyo kuvugira mu iteraniro ry’Imana mu rurimi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abantu bumva.
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: GUSENGERA mu rusengero cyangwa kugabura Amasakaramento mu rurimi rutumvikana, biragaragara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yuko binyurana n’Ijambo ry’Imana n’imihango y’Itorero mu gihe cya mbere,
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ivuga ibyo kuvugira mu iteraniro ry’Imana mu rurimi

verses.text: Ingingo 25
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga iby’Amasakaramento.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: AMASAKARAMENTO yategetswe na Kristo si ibimenyetso by’ibyo Abakristo bahamya gusa, ahubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ibintu bidashidikanywa biduhamiriza Ubuntu bw’Imana n’urukundo idukunda, kandi bifite akamaro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kenshi. Kandi ibyo bimenyetso Imana ibikoreshereza muri twe imirimo igaragara, ikabikomeresha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuyizera kwacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amasakaramento Kristo Umwami wacu yategetse mu Butumwa bwiza ni abiri, ni iryo Kubatiza,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Igaburo ry’Umwami wacu wacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Iyo abanda bita Amasakaramento, Kurambikaho ibiganza, no Kwibabaza, no Kurobanura
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Abapastori, no Gushyingira, kandi no Gusiga abari hafi gupfa, ntibikwiriye kwitwa
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Amasakaremtoy’Ubutumwa Bwiza; kuko bimwe muri byo byazanywe n’abakurikiza nabi Intumwa za
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo; ibindi bikaba imibanire y’abantu ishimwa n’Ibyanditswe Byera, ariko atari Amasakaramento
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ahwanye no Kubatiza cyangwa umuhango wabyo utegetswe n’Imana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amasakaramento ntiyategekewe na Kristo kuyahangako amaso, cyangwa kuzereranwa; ahubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yategekewe kugira ngo tuyakoreshe neza. Abayahabwa babikwiriye nibo bonyine agirira akamaro; ariko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abayahabwa batayakwiriye, baba bizanira gucirwaho iteka, nk’uko Pawulo wera yavuze.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.title: Ingingo 26

verses.text: Ingingo 26
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga yuko naho Abagabura b’iby’Imana baba abanyangeso mbi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bitabuza Amasakaramento guhesha abantu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ubuntu bw’Imana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: NUBWO mu Itorero rigaragara abanyangeso mbi bavangwa n’abanyangeso nziza iteka, kandi ubundi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ubundi ababi bagira ubutware bukuru bwo kugabura Ijambo ry’Imana n’Amasakaramento yayo,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ntibabikora mu ryabo zina, ahubwo babikora mu izina rya Kristo, bagaheshwa kubigaburo n’uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yabatumye akabaha ubutware. Ni cyo gituma twemererwa kubumvana Ijambo ry’Imana, no kwakira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amasakaramento bagabura.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kandi abakira neza bizeye Amasakaramento bagaburirwa nabo, ntibakuzwaho n’ingeso mbi za ba bandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyiza biheshwa n’ibyo Kristo yategetse; kandi ntizituma Ubuntu buheshwa n’impano z’Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bubagabanukaho; kuko igituma Amasakaramento ahesha ibyiza ari uko Kristo ari we wayategetse,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: agasezeranya ibyo byiza, naho abayagabura baba abanyangeso mbi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ariko nubwo bimeze bityo, ku bwo gushaka ngo Itorerp ritegekwa neza, bikwiriye ko aba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bagabura b’iby’Imana babibazwa, bakaburanywa n’abazi ibicumuro byabo; maze batsindwa, bagakurwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu murimo wabo.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ivuga yuko naho Abagabura b’iby’Imana baba abanyangeso mbi,

verses.text: Ingingo 27
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga ibyo Kubatizwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: KUBATIZWA si ikimenyetsocy’ibyo twemera gusa, kandi si cyo gusa gitandukanya Abakristo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’abatarabatizwa; ariko kandi ni ikimenyetso cyo kubyarwa ubwa kabiri, gihesha abakabiri, gihesha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abakira kubatizwa mu buryo bukwiriye guterwa nk’ingurukira mu Itorero. Kandi Kubatizwa ni
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ikimenyetso kigaragara gikomeza amasezerano y’Imana, yuko itubabarira ibyaha, ikaduhindurisha abana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bayo Umwuka Wera; kandi kudukomereza kwizera, kukatugwiriza Ubuntu bw’Imana kubwo kuyisenga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kwacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kubatiza abana bato ni umuhango ukwiriye rwose kudahanguka mu Itorero, kuko uhuye rwose n’ibyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Kristo yategetse.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ingingo 28
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivugwa iby’Igaburo ry’Umwami wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IGABURO ry’umwami wacu si ikimenyetso gusa cy’urukundo Abakristo bakwiriye gukundana, ariko kandi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ni Isakaramento ryo gucungurwa kwacu n’urupfu rwa Kristo. Ni cyo gituma ku bakira neza iryo Gaburo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu mitima itunganye yizera, umutsima dusatagura ari ugufatana n’umubiri wa Kristo, kandi n’igikombe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cy’Umugisha, kikaba gufatana n’amaraso ya Kristo. Imyigishirize ivuga yuko umutsima na vino ubwabyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bihinduka rwose umubiri n’amaraso bya Kristo, ntibasha guhamywa n’Ibyanditswe Byera, ahubwo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: inyurana n’amagambo yabyo yeruye, yangiza akamero k’Isakaramento, kandi yakomotsweho n’imihango
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mibi myinshi n’ibyo bizera by’ibihimbano bidafite akamaro.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umubiri wa Kristo utangirwa muri iryo Gaburo, wakirwa kandi usangirwa mu buryo bw’Umwuka
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gusa. Kandi ikiduhesha kwakirira umubiri wa Kristo muri iryo Gaburo, tukawusangira, ni ukwizera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isakaramento ry’Igaburo ry’Umwami wacu, Kristo si we wategetse ko ribikwa, cyangwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rizereranwa, cyangwa risengwa.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.title: Ingingo 29

verses.text: Ingingo 29
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivugwa yuko abanyabyaha batihannye batarira umubiri wa Kristo mu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Igaburo ry’Umwami wacu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ABANYABYAHA batihannye n’abadafite kwizera nyakuri, nubwo bw’umubiri bagaragara batapfuna
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Isakaramento ry’umubiri n’amaraso bya Kristo, nk’uko Augustini wera yavuze, ntibahabwa Kristo na
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hato, ahubwo bararya bakanywa ikimenyetso cyangwa isakaramento cy’ibyo bikomeye, bakizanira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gucirwaho iteka.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ivugwa yuko abanyabyaha batihannye batarira umubiri wa Kristo mu

chapters.title: Ingingo 30

verses.text: Ingingo 30
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga yuko Abakristo bose bakwiriye kugaburirwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umugati na Vino byombi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ABATARI abagabura b’iby’Imana ntibakwiriye kwimwa Igikombe cy’Umwami wacu , kuko ibice byombi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: by’iryo Sakaramento y’Umwami wacu bikwiriye kugaburirwa Abakristo bose, nk’uko Kristo yategetse.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ivuga yuko Abakristo bose bakwiriye kugaburirwa

verses.text: Ingingo 31
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga iby’igitambo cya Kristo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Cyarangijwe ku musaraba.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IGITAMBO cya Kristo cyatambwe rimwe ni cyo nshungu n’impongano n’icyiru bitagira inenge, bibasha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gukuraho ibyaha byose by’abari mu isi bose, ibyakavukire n’ibyo bakoze ubwabo. Nicyo gituma ibitambo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bya Misa, bavuga yuko umusaseredoti abitambiramo Kristo abazima n’abapfuye, ari ibihimbano
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bitukisha Imana, n’uburiganya buzanira abantu akaga.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ingingo 32
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga ibyo gushyingirwa kw’Abakuru b’Itorero.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ABEPISKOPI, n’Abapastori n’Abadikoni ntibategetswe n’amategeko y’Imana kurahira yuko
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: batazarongorana. Ni cyo gituma abo batabuzwa gushyingirwa, bahwanye n’abandi Bakristo bose, niba
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babikunda, bakibwira yuko bizabafasha kurushaho kubaha Imana.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.title: Ingingo 33

verses.text: Ingingo 33
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga yuko dukwiriye kuzibukira abirukanywe ku
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Meza y’Umwami wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IYO ITORERO riciriye umuntu urubanza rumukwiriye ku mugaragaro, agakurwa mu bumwe bw’Itorero,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: akabuzwa kujya ku Meza y’Umwami wacu, abizera Kristo bose bakwiriye kumuhwanya n’umupagani,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kugeza aho azihanira, akuzurira n’Itorero ku mugaragaro, akagarurwa muri ryo n’umucamanza ufite
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubutware bwo kumugaruramo.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ivuga yuko dukwiriye kuzibukira abirukanywe ku

chapters.title: Ingingo 34

verses.text: Ingingo 34
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga iby’imihango Itorero ryahawe n’aba kera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IMIHANGO Itorero ryahawe n’aba kera n’uburyo bwose bwo gusengera mu rusengero, ntibikwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: rwose kuba bimwe mu bihugu byose, cyangwa bihwana rwose; kuko mu bihe byose iyo mihango
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yaratandukanye, kandi yahindurwa, nk’uko ibihugu n’ibihe n’imigenzo y’abantu bitandukana, niba gusa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: hatagira igitegekwa kinyurana n’Ijambo ry’Imana. Nuk niba umuntu ku bw’icyo akunze ku bwe, kandi azi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ibyo akora, azirurira iyo mihango ku mugarago itanyurana n’Ijambo ry’Imana, ahubwo yategetswe,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: igashimwa n’ubutware bwemerwa na bose, uwo muntu akwiriye guhanirwa ku mugaragaro, kugira ngo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abanda batinye kugenza batyo; kuko aba yishe gahunda y’Itorero yemerwa na bose, akaba acumuye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubutware bw’Abakuru, kandi akaba akomerekeje imitima ya bene Data badakomeye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Itorero ryose rya bene gihugu rifite ubutware bwo gutegeka, no guhindura no gukora imihango
verses.speaker: congregation

verses.text: yashyizweho n’ab’Itorero ubwabo, gusa bikorewe gukomeza Itorero.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ivuga iby’imihango Itorero ryahawe n’aba kera.

verses.text: Ingingo 35
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga ibyo kubwirizwa mu rusengero.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IGITABO cya kabiri cy’Ibyo kubwirizwa mu rusengero, twanditse hepfo amazina yabyo, kirimo kwigisha
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: kuzima kubahisha Imana, gukwiriye ibihe byacu. Kandi n’igitabo cya mbere cy’ibyo kubwirizwa,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyanditswe ku ngoma ya Eduwadi wa gatandatu (ni we wimye 1547-1553) na cyo kirimo kwigisha kwiza.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ni cyo gituma dutegeka ko abagabura b’iby’Imana babisomera mu nsengero, babishyizeho umwete
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: babisoma neza, kugira ngo abantu babyumve cyane.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amazina y’Ibyo kubwirizwa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 1 Ibyo Gukoresha neza Urusengero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 2 Iby’Akaga kazanywe no gusenga ibishushanyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 3 Ibyo Guhindura insengero no kuziboneza
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Iby’Imirimo myiza, uwa mbere ni ukwiyiriza ubusa.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo Kubuza uburura n’ubusinzi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ikitubuza gukabya kwirimbisha, cyane cyane imyambaro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ibyo Gusenga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Iby’Imyanya yo gusengeramo, n’igihe cyako.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Iby’Amasengesho yo mu rusengero n’Amasakaramento bikwiriye kuvugwa mu rurimi rwumvikana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 10  Ikivuga yuko Ijambo ry’Imana rikwiriye kubahwa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 11  Ibyo Gufasha abakene.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 12  Ibyo Kuvuka kwa Kristo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 13  Iby’Urupfu rwa Kristo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 14  Ibyo Kuzuka kwa Kristo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 15  Ibyo Kwakira Isakaramento ry’umubiri n’amaraso bya Kristo uburyo bukwiriye.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 16  Iby’Impano z’Umwuka Wera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 17  Ibyo Kubwirizwa mu minsi ibanziriza Kuzamuka k’Umwami wacu.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 18  Ibyo Gushyingira kwera.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 19  Ibyo Kwihana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 20  Ikitubuza kugira Ubute.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: 21  Ikitubuza Kugomera Abategetsi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ingingo 36
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga ibyo Kurobanura Abepiskopi
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Abagabura b’iby’Imana.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IGITABO kirimo amagambo yo kurobanura Abepiskopi batwara abandi, n’Abepiskopi bandi,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’ayo kurobanura Abapastori n’Abadiyakoni, cyanditswe ku ngoma ya Eduwadi wa gatandatu,
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: kigakomezwa n’Urukiko rw’Abongereza rukuru kuri iyo ngoma, kirimo ibikwiriye byose gushyitsa
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: neza uko kurobanura, uko ari bitatu. Kandi ntikirimo Ijambo ryose ry’ikizira kidafite akamaro,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: haba no kunyurana no kubaha Imana. Ni cyo gituma abarobanuwe bose mu buryo bwose
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: butegekwa kuri ubu, kandi abazarobanurwa neza nk’uko bikwiye, nk’uko amategeko yategetse.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ingingo 37
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivugwa iby’Abategetsi b’igihugu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: IBWONGEREZA no mu bindi bihugu bitwarwa n’Abongereza, Umwami w’Abongereza ni we ufite
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubutware busumba ubundi, ni we utwara abo mu bihugu bye bose, naho baba ab’Itorero
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: cyangwa abakora imirimo y’iby’iyi si, ni we uca imanza zabo zose, kandi nta munyamahanga
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ufite ubutware bwo gutegeka ibyo na hato, nta wukwiriye kubugira.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Tumenye yuko iryo jambo ngo, Umwami afite ubutware busumba ubundi mu bihugu
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bye, rigawa n’abakunda kutubeshyera bamwe. Ni cyo gitumye dusobanura yuko tudaha abami
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bacu kugabura Ijambo ry’Imana cyangwa Amasakaramento, nk’uko amategeko yandikishijwe
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: n’Umugabekazi wacu Elizabeti 1 abihamya mu magambo yeruye rwose.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ahubwo tubaha ubutware, Imana yajyaga iha abami b’Abayunda bayubahaga bose, nk’uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: tubisoma mu Byanditswe Byera. Nibwo butware bwo gutegeka abantu b’uburyo bwose, Imana
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: yabaragije, naho baba ab’Itorero cyangwa bakora imirimo y’iby’iyi si, n’ubwo guhanisha inkota
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: y’ubwami abadakurwa ku ijambo n’inkozi z’ibibi; ubwo butware ni bwo duha abami bacu, nta
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bundi.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Umwepiskopi w’i Roma nta butware afite i Bungereza.
verses.speaker: narrator

verses.text: Amategeko y’ubwai ntabuzwa n’ay’Imana guhanisha Abakristo urupfu, babahora ibicumuro
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bikomeye cyane.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Amategeko y’Imana yemera ko Abakristo, iyo babitegetswe n’umutware, batwara intwaro, bagatabara
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: mu ntambara.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.title: Ingingo 38

verses.text: Ingingo 38
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga iby’amatungo n’ibintu by’Abakristo ko Atari
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Urusange, ahubwo ari ibyabo bwite.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: AMATUNGO n’ibintu by’Abakristo si urusange, ngo abandi Bakristo babikoreshe ibyo bashaka, nk’uko
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: bamwe mu babatiza abantu ubwa kabiri babeshya. Ariko nubwo bimeze bityo, umuntu wese akwiriye
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: gufasha abakene cyane mu byo afite, uko abishobora.
verses.speaker: all

chapters.subtitle: Ivuga iby’amatungo n’ibintu by’Abakristo ko Atari

verses.text: Ingingo 39
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: Ivuga iby’indahiro z’Abakristo.
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: TWEMERA yuko Umwami wacu Yesu na Yakobo intumwa ye babujije Abakristo kwihutira gupfa kurahira
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: ubusa. Ariko tuvuga yuko idini y’Ubukristo itabuza Umukristo kurahira ku bw’umurava n’Urukundo, iyo
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: abitegetswe n’Umucamanza, niba gusa arahira indahiro ihura n’ukuri, ikazana urubanza rwiza rukwiriye,
verses.speaker: all

verses.text: nk’uko wa muhanuzi yategetse (Yeremiya 4:2).
verses.speaker: narrator
